Combined with continuous phase rotation, this enables geometric shadowing: obsolete facts are rotated out of phase in complex vector space, so temporally correct facts naturally outrank contradictions without deletion. On temporal knowledge graph completion, RoMem achieves state-of-the-art results on ICEWS05-15 (72.6 MRR). Applied to agentic memory, it delivers 2-3x MRR and answer accuracy on temporal reasoning (MultiTQ), dominates hybrid benchmark (LoCoMo), preserves static memory with zero degradation (DMR-MSC), and generalises zero-shot to unseen financial domains (FinTMMBench).

</details>


### [256] [NovBench: Evaluating Large Language Models on Academic Paper Novelty Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11543)
*Wenqing Wu,Yi Zhao,Yuzhuo Wang,Siyou Li,Juexi Shao,Yunfei Long,Chengzhi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: NovBench：首个用于评估LLMs在同行评审中生成新颖性评价能力的大规模基准，包含1,684篇论文-评审对，提出四维评估框架，实验显示当前模型对科学新颖性理解有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学术出版中新颖性是核心要求，但提交量增长给人工评审带来压力。虽然LLMs在生成评审意见方面有潜力，但缺乏专门基准来系统评估其评估研究新颖性的能力。

Method: 构建NovBench基准，包含1,684个NLP会议论文-评审对，从引言提取新颖性描述，对应专家撰写的新颖性评估。提出四维评估框架（相关性、正确性、覆盖度、清晰度），在不同提示策略下对通用和专业LLMs进行广泛实验。

Result: 当前模型对科学新颖性理解有限，微调模型常存在指令遵循缺陷。需要针对性微调策略来联合提升新颖性理解和指令遵循能力。

Conclusion: NovBench填补了评估LLMs新颖性评估能力的空白，揭示了当前模型的局限性，为开发更有效的AI辅助同行评审系统提供了重要基准和方向。

Abstract: Novelty is a core requirement in academic publishing and a central focus of peer review, yet the growing volume of submissions has placed increasing pressure on human reviewers. While large language models (LLMs), including those fine-tuned on peer review data, have shown promise in generating review comments, the absence of a dedicated benchmark has limited systematic evaluation of their ability to assess research novelty. To address this gap, we introduce NovBench, the first large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate LLMs' capability to generate novelty evaluations in support of human peer review. NovBench comprises 1,684 paper-review pairs from a leading NLP conference, including novelty descriptions extracted from paper introductions and corresponding expert-written novelty evaluations. We focus on both sources because the introduction provides a standardized and explicit articulation of novelty claims, while expert-written novelty evaluations constitute one of the current gold standards of human judgment. Furthermore, we propose a four-dimensional evaluation framework (including Relevance, Correctness, Coverage, and Clarity) to assess the quality of LLM-generated novelty evaluations. Extensive experiments on both general and specialized LLMs under different prompting strategies reveal that current models exhibit limited understanding of scientific novelty, and that fine--tuned models often suffer from instruction-following deficiencies. These findings underscore the need for targeted fine-tuning strategies that jointly improve novelty comprehension and instruction adherence.

</details>


### [257] [METER: Evaluating Multi-Level Contextual Causal Reasoning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11502)
*Pengfeng Li,Chen Huang,Chaoqun Hao,Hongyao Chen,Xiao-Yong Wei,Wenqiang Lei,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: METER是一个新的基准测试，用于在统一上下文设置下系统评估大语言模型在因果推理三个层次上的表现，发现模型能力随因果层次上升而显著下降，并揭示了两种主要失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试在评估大语言模型的上下文因果推理能力时存在局限性：1）评估设置碎片化，缺乏上下文一致性；2）未能全面覆盖因果层次的所有三个级别。这阻碍了对模型因果推理能力的系统性理解和评估。

Method: 提出了METER基准测试，在统一上下文设置下系统评估大语言模型在因果阶梯所有三个层次上的表现。通过广泛的模型评估，结合错误模式识别和内部信息流追踪的深度机制分析，诊断模型性能下降的原因。

Result: 评估发现：1）大语言模型在因果推理任务中的能力随因果层次上升而显著下降；2）识别出两种主要失败模式：a) 在较低因果层次上，模型容易被因果无关但事实正确的信息分散注意力；b) 随着任务上升到更高因果层次，模型对提供上下文的忠实度下降，导致性能降低。

Conclusion: METER基准测试推进了对大语言模型上下文因果推理机制的理解，为未来研究建立了关键基础。研究揭示了模型在因果推理中的系统性弱点，特别是随着因果复杂性增加而出现的性能下降模式。

Abstract: Contextual causal reasoning is a critical yet challenging capability for Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate this skill in fragmented settings, failing to ensure context consistency or cover the full causal hierarchy. To address this, we pioneer METER to systematically benchmark LLMs across all three levels of the causal ladder under a unified context setting. Our extensive evaluation of various LLMs reveals a significant decline in proficiency as tasks ascend the causal hierarchy. To diagnose this degradation, we conduct a deep mechanistic analysis via both error pattern identification and internal information flow tracing. Our analysis reveals two primary failure modes: (1) LLMs are susceptible to distraction by causally irrelevant but factually correct information at lower level of causality; and (2) as tasks ascend the causal hierarchy, faithfulness to the provided context degrades, leading to a reduced performance. We belive our work advances our understanding of the mechanisms behind LLM contextual causal reasoning and establishes a critical foundation for future research. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SCUNLP/METER .

</details>


### [258] [Retrieval as Generation: A Unified Framework with Self-Triggered Information Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11407)
*Bo Li,Mingda Wang,Gexiang Fang,Shikun Zhang,Wei Ye*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GRIP框架将检索决策嵌入到生成过程中，通过控制令牌实现端到端的检索增强生成，无需额外控制器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统检索增强生成将检索作为外部干预，缺乏检索与生成的端到端协调，需要额外的控制器或分类器

Method: 提出GRIP框架，采用"检索即生成"范式，通过控制令牌发射实现检索行为调节，核心是自触发信息规划，让模型在单一自回归轨迹中决定何时检索、如何重构查询、何时终止

Result: 在五个QA基准测试中，GRIP超越了强RAG基线，与GPT-4o竞争性相当，同时使用显著更少的参数

Conclusion: 将检索控制嵌入生成过程可实现更紧密的检索-推理耦合，支持动态多步推理和实时证据整合，为检索增强生成提供了统一框架

Abstract: We revisit retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by embedding retrieval control directly into generation. Instead of treating retrieval as an external intervention, we express retrieval decisions within token-level decoding, enabling end-to-end coordination without additional controllers or classifiers. Under the paradigm of Retrieval as Generation, we propose \textbf{GRIP} (\textbf{G}eneration-guided \textbf{R}etrieval with \textbf{I}nformation \textbf{P}lanning), a unified framework in which the model regulates retrieval behavior through control-token emission. Central to GRIP is \textit{Self-Triggered Information Planning}, which allows the model to decide when to retrieve, how to reformulate queries, and when to terminate, all within a single autoregressive trajectory. This design tightly couples retrieval and reasoning and supports dynamic multi-step inference with on-the-fly evidence integration. To supervise these behaviors, we construct a structured training set covering answerable, partially answerable, and multi-hop queries, each aligned with specific token patterns. Experiments on five QA benchmarks show that GRIP surpasses strong RAG baselines and is competitive with GPT-4o while using substantially fewer parameters.

</details>


### [259] [Generating Multiple-Choice Knowledge Questions with Interpretable Difficulty Estimation using Knowledge Graphs and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10748)
*Mehmet Can Şakiroğlu,H. Altay Güvenir,Kamer Kaya*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种利用知识图谱和大型语言模型从输入文档生成多选题并估计难度的方法，通过结构化知识表示与数据驱动的难度评估模型相结合，提高了自动化多选题生成的质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在自适应AI辅助教育系统中，生成具有难度估计的多选题仍然具有挑战性。现有自动化多选题生成系统难以准确评估题目难度，需要一种能够结合结构化知识表示和语言模型的方法来生成高质量且难度可解释的多选题。

Method: 使用LLM从输入文档构建知识图谱，然后从KG中选取节点作为关键点，采样相关三元组或五元组（可选增强额外三元组），通过LLM提示生成题干。干扰项从KG中选择。为每个多选题计算九个难度信号，并通过数据驱动方法组合成统一的难度分数。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够生成高质量的多选题，其难度估计具有可解释性且与人类感知一致。该方法通过整合结构化知识表示、LLM和数据驱动的难度估计模型，改进了自动化多选题生成。

Conclusion: 该研究提出的方法成功地将知识图谱与大型语言模型相结合，实现了高质量多选题的生成和可解释的难度估计，为自适应AI辅助教育系统提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Generating multiple-choice questions (MCQs) with difficulty estimation remains challenging in automated MCQ-generation systems used in adaptive, AI-assisted education. This study proposes a novel methodology for generating MCQs with difficulty estimation from the input documents by utilizing knowledge graphs (KGs) and large language models (LLMs). Our approach uses an LLM to construct a KG from input documents, from which MCQs are then systematically generated. Each MCQ is generated by selecting a node from the KG as the key, sampling a related triple or quintuple -- optionally augmented with an extra triple -- and prompting an LLM to generate a corresponding stem from these graph components. Distractors are then selected from the KG. For each MCQ, nine difficulty signals are computed and combined into a unified difficulty score using a data-driven approach. Experimental results demonstrate that our method generates high-quality MCQs whose difficulty estimation is interpretable and aligns with human perceptions. Our approach improves automated MCQ generation by integrating structured knowledge representations with LLMs and a data-driven difficulty estimation model.

</details>


### [260] [Attention Sinks as Internal Signals for Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10697)
*Jakub Binkowski,Kamil Adamczewski,Tomasz Kajdanowicz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SinkProbe：基于注意力汇（attention sinks）理论的新型幻觉检测方法，通过分析注意力分布从分散到压缩的转变来识别LLM幻觉，在多个数据集和模型上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型经常产生幻觉（流畅但事实错误或缺乏上下文支持的输出）。现有幻觉检测方法虽探索了注意力图特征，但其底层机制仍不明确。本文旨在从理论角度理解幻觉与注意力汇（过度集中注意力的标记）之间的关联。

Method: 提出SinkProbe方法，基于观察：幻觉与注意力汇（在生成过程中积累不成比例注意力质量的标记）深度纠缠，表明注意力从分布式、基于输入的分布转向压缩的、先验主导的计算。方法仅从注意力图计算汇分数，但发现分类器优先依赖具有大范数值向量的汇。同时建立了先前方法与注意力汇的数学关系。

Result: SinkProbe在多个流行数据集和LLM上实现了最先进的幻觉检测性能。证明了注意力汇是幻觉检测的关键机制，先前方法实际上隐式依赖于注意力汇。

Conclusion: 本文提出了一个基于理论的幻觉检测新方法，通过揭示幻觉与注意力汇之间的深层联系，为理解LLM幻觉机制提供了理论依据，并开发出有效的检测工具。

Abstract: Large language models frequently exhibit hallucinations: fluent and confident outputs that are factually incorrect or unsupported by the input context. While recent hallucination detection methods have explored various features derived from attention maps, the underlying mechanisms they exploit remain poorly understood. In this work, we propose SinkProbe, a hallucination detection method grounded in the observation that hallucinations are deeply entangled with attention sinks - tokens that accumulate disproportionate attention mass during generation - indicating a transition from distributed, input-grounded attention to compressed, prior-dominated computation. Importantly, although sink scores are computed solely from attention maps, we find that the classifier preferentially relies on sinks whose associated value vectors have large norms. Moreover, we show that previous methods implicitly depend on attention sinks by establishing their mathematical relationship to sink scores. Our findings yield a novel hallucination detection method grounded in theory that produces state-of-the-art results across popular datasets and LLMs.

</details>


### [261] [Do LLMs Know Tool Irrelevance? Demystifying Structural Alignment Bias in Tool Invocations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11322)
*Yilong Liu,Xixun Lin,Pengfei Cao,Ge Zhang,Fang Fang,Yanan Cao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文发现LLMs在工具调用中存在结构性对齐偏差：即使工具与用户查询无关，只要查询属性能有效分配给工具参数，LLMs仍倾向于调用工具，导致错误调用。作者提出SABEval数据集和对比注意力归因方法来研究该偏差，并提出再平衡策略来缓解问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在使用外部工具时面临一个普遍但被忽视的问题：当暴露于与用户查询无关的工具时，即使工具无法满足用户目标，LLMs仍倾向于调用这些工具。这种结构性对齐偏差导致大量工具调用错误，而现有评估方法未能充分考量这一问题。

Method: 1) 引入SABEval数据集，将结构性对齐与语义相关性解耦；2) 提出对比注意力归因方法，揭示语义检查和结构匹配两个竞争通路；3) 设计再平衡策略来缓解结构性对齐偏差。

Result: 结构性对齐偏差导致LLMs产生严重的工具调用错误，且现有评估未能充分捕捉这一问题。对比注意力归因显示，LLMs的工具调用决策由语义检查和结构匹配两个通路的相对强度驱动。再平衡策略能有效缓解该偏差，且不损害一般工具使用能力。

Conclusion: 结构性对齐偏差是LLMs工具调用中普遍存在的机制缺陷，需要专门的数据集和评估方法来识别。通过理解语义检查和结构匹配的竞争机制，可以设计有效的干预策略来改善LLMs的工具调用决策，提高其在实际应用中的可靠性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in utilizing external tools. In practice, however, LLMs are often exposed to tools that are irrelevant to the user's query, in which case the desired behavior is to refrain from invocations. In this work, we identify a widespread yet overlooked mechanistic flaw in tool refusal, which we term structural alignment bias: Even when a tool fails to serve the user's goal, LLMs still tend to invoke it whenever query attributes can be validly assigned to tool parameters. To systematically study this bias, we introduce SABEval, a new dataset that decouples structural alignment from semantic relevance. Our analysis shows that structural alignment bias induces severe tool-invocation errors in LLMs, yet remains largely unaccounted for in existing evaluations. To investigate the internal mechanisms underlying this bias, we propose Contrastive Attention Attribution, which reveals two competing pathways for semantic checking and structural matching. The relative strength of these pathways drives LLMs' tool invocation decisions. Based on these findings, we further introduce a rebalancing strategy that effectively mitigates structural alignment bias, as demonstrated by extensive experiments, without degrading general tool-use capabilities.

</details>


### [262] [Learning and Enforcing Context-Sensitive Control for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10667)
*Mohammad Albinhassan,Pranava Madhyastha,Mark Law,Alessandra Russo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 自动学习上下文敏感约束的框架，通过探索-利用两阶段过程从LLM交互中学习约束，无需人工指定，使小模型也能完美遵守约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 上下文敏感约束能克服上下文无关文法在保证生成有效性方面的局限性，但通常需要人工指定，这需要专业知识，成为显著障碍

Method: 两阶段框架：1) 句法探索阶段收集多样化输出用于约束学习；2) 约束利用阶段在生成时强制执行学习到的规则

Result: 实验表明，该方法使小模型（1B参数）也能学习和生成时完美遵守约束，性能优于更大模型和最先进的推理模型

Conclusion: 这是首次将上下文敏感文法学习与LLM生成相结合，消除了人工指定需求，同时保持生成有效性

Abstract: Controlling the output of Large Language Models (LLMs) through context-sensitive constraints has emerged as a promising approach to overcome the limitations of Context-Free Grammars (CFGs) in guaranteeing generation validity. However, such constraints typically require manual specification -- a significant barrier demanding specialized expertise. We introduce a framework that automatically learns context-sensitive constraints from LLM interactions through a two-phase process: syntactic exploration to gather diverse outputs for constraint learning, followed by constraint exploitation to enforce these learned rules during generation. Experiments demonstrate that our method enables even small LLMs (1B parameters) to learn and generate with perfect constraint adherence, outperforming larger counterparts and state-of-the-art reasoning models. This work represents the first integration of context-sensitive grammar learning with LLM generation, eliminating manual specification while maintaining generation validity.

</details>


### [263] [Efficient Process Reward Modeling via Contrastive Mutual Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10660)
*Nakyung Lee,Sangwoo Hong,Jungwoo Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CPMI方法，利用模型内部概率自动标注推理步骤奖励，显著降低数据集构建的计算成本和时间消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有过程奖励模型（PRM）需要人工标注推理步骤奖励，成本高昂且耗时；自动化方法如蒙特卡洛估计需要大量计算资源。需要一种高效、低成本的自动奖励标注方法。

Method: 提出对比点互信息（CPMI）方法，通过量化推理步骤相对于硬负例在增加与正确答案互信息方面的贡献，自动生成步骤级监督信号作为奖励标签。

Result: CPMI标注相比蒙特卡洛估计减少84%的数据集构建时间和98%的token生成量，同时在过程级评估和数学推理基准测试中达到更高准确率。

Conclusion: CPMI是一种高效、低成本的自动奖励标注方法，能够显著减少推理步骤监督的数据集构建成本，同时保持或提高模型性能。

Abstract: Recent research has devoted considerable effort to verifying the intermediate reasoning steps of chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories using process reward models (PRMs) and other verifier models. However, training a PRM typically requires human annotators to assign reward scores to each reasoning step, which is both costly and time-consuming. Existing automated approaches, such as Monte Carlo (MC) estimation, also demand substantial computational resources due to repeated LLM rollouts. To overcome these limitations, we propose contrastive pointwise mutual information (CPMI), a novel automatic reward labeling method that leverages the model's internal probability to infer step-level supervision while significantly reducing the computational burden of annotating dataset. CPMI quantifies how much a reasoning step increases the mutual information between the step and the correct target answer relative to hard-negative alternatives. This contrastive signal serves as a proxy for the step's contribution to the final solution and yields a reliable reward. The experimental results show that CPMI-based labeling reduces dataset construction time by 84% and token generation by 98% compared to MC estimation, while achieving higher accuracy on process-level evaluations and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

</details>


### [264] [Enhancing Multimodal Large Language Models for Ancient Chinese Character Evolution Analysis via Glyph-Driven Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11299)
*Rui Song,Lida Shi,Ruihua Qi,Yingji Li,Hao Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文构建了一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在古汉字演变分析能力的综合基准，提出了字形驱动的微调框架GEVO，显著提升了模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在古汉字研究中的应用潜力尚未充分探索，文字演变是理解文化转型和历史连续性的基本途径，需要系统评估MLLMs在文本演变分析中的能力。

Method: 构建包含11个任务、超过13万个实例的综合基准；提出字形驱动的微调框架GEVO，通过显式鼓励模型捕捉字形变换中的演化一致性来增强对文本演变的理解。

Result: 现有MLLMs在字形级比较方面能力有限，在字符识别和演化推理等核心任务上表现受限；GEVO框架使2B规模的模型在所有评估任务上获得一致且全面的性能提升。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了MLLMs在古汉字演变分析领域的空白，提出的基准和微调框架为未来研究提供了重要基础，有助于推动文字演变分析的智能化发展。

Abstract: In recent years, rapid advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have increasingly stimulated research on ancient Chinese scripts. As the evolution of written characters constitutes a fundamental pathway for understanding cultural transformation and historical continuity, how MLLMs can be systematically leveraged to support and advance text evolution analysis remains an open and largely underexplored problem. To bridge this gap, we construct a comprehensive benchmark comprising 11 tasks and over 130,000 instances, specifically designed to evaluate the capability of MLLMs in analyzing the evolution of ancient Chinese scripts. We conduct extensive evaluations across multiple widely used MLLMs and observe that, while existing models demonstrate a limited ability in glyph-level comparison, their performance on core tasks-such as character recognition and evolutionary reasoning-remains substantially constrained. Motivated by these findings, we propose a glyph-driven fine-tuning framework (GEVO) that explicitly encourages models to capture evolutionary consistency in glyph transformations and enhances their understanding of text evolution. Experimental results show that even models at the 2B scale achieve consistent and comprehensive performance improvements across all evaluated tasks. To facilitate future research, we publicly release both the benchmark and the trained models\footnote{https://github.com/songruiecho/GEVO}.

</details>


### [265] [Exploring Knowledge Conflicts for Faithful LLM Reasoning: Benchmark and Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11209)
*Tianzhe Zhao,Jiaoyan Chen,Shuxiu Zhang,Haiping Zhu,Qika Lin,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ConflictQA：首个系统评估LLM在文本证据与知识图谱证据冲突下推理能力的基准，发现LLM难以可靠识别证据且易受提示影响，提出XoT两阶段解释性思维框架提升异构冲突证据推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注外部知识与LLM参数知识间的冲突，而忽略了不同外部知识源（如文本与知识图谱）之间的冲突。随着现代RAG系统日益强调整合非结构化文本和（半）结构化知识图谱以提高知识完整性和推理忠实性，理解LLM在跨源冲突下的表现变得至关重要。

Method: 提出ConflictQA基准，系统性地实例化文本证据与知识图谱证据之间的冲突。基于研究发现，进一步提出XoT（解释性思维）框架，这是一个两阶段的解释性思维框架，专门用于处理异构冲突证据的推理。

Result: 对代表性LLM的广泛评估表明，面对跨源冲突时，LLM往往无法识别可靠证据进行正确推理，反而对提示选择更加敏感，倾向于仅依赖KG或文本证据中的一种，导致错误回答。

Conclusion: LLM在处理异构知识源冲突时存在显著局限性，需要专门设计的推理框架。提出的XoT框架通过两阶段解释性思维有效提升了LLM在冲突证据下的推理能力，为解决RAG系统中跨源知识冲突问题提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of applications especially when augmented by external knowledge through retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Despite their widespread adoption, recent studies have shown that LLMs often struggle to perform faithful reasoning when conflicting knowledge is retrieved. However, existing work primarily focuses on conflicts between external knowledge and the parametric knowledge of LLMs, leaving conflicts across external knowledge largely unexplored. Meanwhile, modern RAG systems increasingly emphasize the integration of unstructured text and (semi-)structured data like knowledge graphs (KGs) to improve knowledge completeness and reasoning faithfulness. To address this gap, we introduce ConflictQA, a novel benchmark that systematically instantiates conflicts between textual evidence and KG evidence. Extensive evaluations across representative LLMs reveal that, facing such cross-source conflicts, LLMs often fail to identify reliable evidence for correct reasoning. Instead, LLMs become more sensitive to prompting choices and tend to rely exclusively on either KG or textual evidence, resulting in incorrect responses. Based on these findings, we further propose XoT, a two-stage explanation-based thinking framework tailored for reasoning over heterogeneous conflicting evidence, and verify its effectiveness with extensive experiments.

</details>


<div id='eess.SP'></div>

# eess.SP [[Back]](#toc)

### [266] [Token Encoding for Semantic Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12931)
*Jingzhi Hu,Geoffrey Ye Li*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: 提出TokCode框架，通过令牌编码实现鲁棒语义恢复，无需额外传输开销，支持即插即用部署


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于令牌的语义通信在有限信道容量下能压缩语义令牌，但恶劣无线信道常导致令牌丢失，造成严重失真，阻碍接收端可靠语义恢复

Method: 提出TokCode令牌编码框架，开发句子语义引导的基础模型适配算法(SFMA)，避免昂贵的端到端训练

Result: 在基于提示的生成式图像传输仿真中，TokCode能减轻语义失真，即使40%-60%令牌随机丢失的恶劣信道下也能接近性能上限

Conclusion: TokCode框架为令牌语义通信提供鲁棒解决方案，在恶劣信道条件下仍能保持良好性能，具有实际部署价值

Abstract: Token-based semantic communication is promising for future wireless networks, as it can compact semantic tokens under very limited channel capacity. However, harsh wireless channels often cause missing tokens, leading to severe distortion that prevents reliable semantic recovery at the receiver. In this article, we propose a token encoding framework for robust semantic recovery (TokCode), which incurs no additional transmission overhead and supports plug-and-play deployment. For efficient token encoder optimization, we develop a sentence-semantic-guided foundation model adaptation algorithm (SFMA) that avoids costly end-to-end training. Based on simulation results on prompt-based generative image transmission, TokCode mitigates semantic distortion and can approach the performance upper-bound, even under harsh channels where 40% to 60% of tokens are randomly lost.

</details>


### [267] [VLMaterial: Vision-Language Model-Based Camera-Radar Fusion for Physics-Grounded Material Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11671)
*Jiangyou Zhu,He Chen*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: VLMaterial：一种免训练框架，融合视觉语言模型与雷达特定知识，用于物理基础材料识别，在真实世界实验中达到96.08%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的材料识别是智能感知系统与物理世界安全有效交互的基础能力。现有基于视觉的方法难以区分视觉相似物体（如玻璃和塑料杯），而现有的相机-雷达融合方法仅限于封闭集类别且缺乏语义可解释性。

Method: 提出三部分方法：1）双流水线架构：光学流水线使用SAM和VLM生成材料候选提案，电磁表征流水线通过PRCA方法和加权矢量合成从雷达信号提取介电常数；2）上下文增强生成策略：为VLM提供雷达特定物理知识；3）自适应融合机制：基于不确定性估计智能整合双传感器输出。

Result: 在超过120个真实世界实验中，涉及41种日常物体和4种典型视觉欺骗仿制品，VLMaterial实现了96.08%的识别准确率，性能与最先进的封闭集基准相当，同时无需大量任务特定数据收集和训练。

Conclusion: VLMaterial通过融合视觉语言模型与领域特定雷达知识，实现了免训练的物理基础材料识别，解决了视觉欺骗问题，提供了语义可解释性，并在真实场景中展示了卓越性能。

Abstract: Accurate material recognition is a fundamental capability for intelligent perception systems to interact safely and effectively with the physical world. For instance, distinguishing visually similar objects like glass and plastic cups is critical for safety but challenging for vision-based methods due to specular reflections, transparency, and visual deception. While millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar offers robust material sensing regardless of lighting, existing camera-radar fusion methods are limited to closed-set categories and lack semantic interpretability. In this paper, we introduce VLMaterial, a training-free framework that fuses vision-language models (VLMs) with domain-specific radar knowledge for physics-grounded material identification. First, we propose a dual-pipeline architecture: an optical pipeline uses the segment anything model and VLM for material candidate proposals, while an electromagnetic characterization pipeline extracts the intrinsic dielectric constant from radar signals via an effective peak reflection cell area (PRCA) method and weighted vector synthesis. Second, we employ a context-augmented generation (CAG) strategy to equip the VLM with radar-specific physical knowledge, enabling it to interpret electromagnetic parameters as stable references. Third, an adaptive fusion mechanism is introduced to intelligently integrate outputs from both sensors by resolving cross-modal conflicts based on uncertainty estimation. We evaluated VLMaterial in over 120 real-world experiments involving 41 diverse everyday objects and 4 typical visually deceptive counterfeits across varying environments. Experimental results demonstrate that VLMaterial achieves a recognition accuracy of 96.08%, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art closed-set benchmarks while eliminating the need for extensive task-specific data collection and training.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [268] [NeuVolEx: Implicit Neural Features for Volume Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11172)
*Haill An,Suhyeon Kim,Donghyuk Choo,Younhyun Jung*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: NeuVolEx：一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的神经体积探索方法，将INR从体积压缩扩展到体积探索，利用INR训练期间学习的特征表示作为稳健的探索基础，通过结构编码器和多任务学习增强空间一致性，在图像传递函数设计和视点推荐任务中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有体积探索方法存在局限性：显式局部特征表示难以捕捉更广泛的几何模式和空间相关性，而隐式卷积特征表示在实际用户监督有限的情况下性能不够稳健。同时，隐式神经表示（INR）在体积压缩中表现出色，但尚未被充分用于体积探索任务。

Method: 提出NeuVolEx方法：1）利用INR训练期间学习的特征表示作为体积探索的稳健基础；2）通过结构编码器增强空间一致性；3）采用多任务学习方案改进感兴趣区域（ROI）表征；4）应用于图像传递函数设计和视点推荐两个基本体积探索任务。

Result: 在多种模态和ROI复杂度的体积数据集上验证：1）在稀疏用户监督下实现准确的ROI分类；2）支持无监督聚类以识别揭示不同ROI簇的紧凑互补视点；3）在有效性和可用性方面优于先前方法。

Conclusion: NeuVolEx成功将INR从体积压缩扩展到体积探索，利用INR特征表示作为稳健的探索基础，通过结构增强和多任务学习改进ROI表征，为体积探索提供了更有效和可用的解决方案。

Abstract: Direct volume rendering (DVR) aims to help users identify and examine regions of interest (ROIs) within volumetric data, and feature representations that support effective ROI classification and clustering play a fundamental role in volume exploration. Existing approaches typically rely on either explicit local feature representations or implicit convolutional feature representations learned from raw volumes. However, explicit local feature representations are limited in capturing broader geometric patterns and spatial correlations, while implicit convolutional feature representations do not necessarily ensure robust performance in practice, where user supervision is typically limited. Meanwhile, implicit neural representations (INRs) have recently shown strong promise in DVR for volume compression, owing to their ability to compactly parameterize continuous volumetric fields. In this work, we propose NeuVolEx, a neural volume exploration approach that extends the role of INRs beyond volume compression. Unlike prior compression methods that focus on INR outputs, NeuVolEx leverages feature representations learned during INR training as a robust basis for volume exploration. To better adapt these feature representations to exploration tasks, we augment a base INR with a structural encoder and a multi-task learning scheme that improve spatial coherence for ROI characterization. We validate NeuVolEx on two fundamental volume exploration tasks: image-based transfer function (TF) design and viewpoint recommendation. NeuVolEx enables accurate ROI classification under sparse user supervision for image-based TF design and supports unsupervised clustering to identify compact complementary viewpoints that reveal different ROI clusters. Experiments on diverse volume datasets with varying modalities and ROI complexities demonstrate NeuVolEx improves both effectiveness and usability over prior methods

</details>


<div id='cs.DB'></div>

# cs.DB [[Back]](#toc)

### [269] [ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12988)
*Wenqi Pei,Shizheng Hou,Boyan Li,Han Chen,Zhichao Shi,Yuyu Luo*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: ROSE是一个面向意图的NL2SQL评估指标，通过证明者-反驳者对抗级联来评估预测SQL是否回答了用户问题，而不是与参考SQL的语法一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的执行准确率（EX）指标在评估自然语言到SQL转换时存在多个问题：对语法变化敏感、忽略问题的多种解释可能、容易被错误的真实SQL误导，导致评估结果不可靠。

Method: 提出ROSE指标，采用对抗性的证明者-反驳者级联方法：SQL证明者独立评估预测SQL相对于用户意图的语义正确性；对抗性反驳者使用真实SQL作为证据来挑战和优化这一判断。

Result: 在专家对齐的验证集ROSE-VEC上，ROSE与人类专家的Cohen's Kappa一致性达到最佳，比次优指标高出近24%。对19种NL2SQL方法的大规模重新评估揭示了四个有价值的见解。

Conclusion: ROSE解决了传统EX指标的局限性，提供了更可靠的NL2SQL评估方法。作者发布了ROSE和ROSE-VEC以促进更可靠的NL2SQL研究。

Abstract: Execution Accuracy (EX), the widely used metric for evaluating the effectiveness of Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) solutions, is becoming increasingly unreliable. It is sensitive to syntactic variation, ignores that questions may admit multiple interpretations, and is easily misled by erroneous ground-truth SQL. To address this, we introduce ROSE, an intent-centered metric that focuses on whether the predicted SQL answers the question, rather than consistency with the ground-truth SQL under the reference-dependent paradigm. ROSE employs an adversarial Prover-Refuter cascade: SQL Prover assesses the semantic correctness of a predicted SQL against the user's intent independently, while Adversarial Refuter uses the ground-truth SQL as evidence to challenge and refine this judgment. On our expert-aligned validation set ROSE-VEC, ROSE achieves the best agreement with human experts, outperforming the next-best metric by nearly 24% in Cohen's Kappa. We also conduct a largescale re-evaluation of 19 NL2SQL methods, revealing four valuable insights. We release ROSE and ROSE-VEC to facilitate more reliable NL2SQL research.

</details>


### [270] [Lit2Vec: A Reproducible Workflow for Building a Legally Screened Chemistry Corpus from S2ORC for Downstream Retrieval and Text Mining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12498)
*Mahmoud Amiri,Jamile Mohammad Jafari,Sara Mostafapour,Thomas Bocklitz*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: Lit2Vec：一个可复现的工作流，用于从Semantic Scholar开放研究语料库中构建和验证化学语料库，包含58万篇化学全文文章，具有段落级嵌入、元数据和许可筛选。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要构建一个高质量、可复现的化学领域文本语料库，支持下游检索和文本挖掘应用，同时确保许可合规性和技术验证。

Method: 使用保守的基于元数据的许可筛选方法，从Semantic Scholar开放研究语料库中提取化学特定全文文章；生成结构化全文、段落块、段落级嵌入（使用intfloat/e5-large-v2模型）；通过Unpaywall、OpenAlex和Crossref进行许可验证；对子集添加机器生成的摘要和18个化学领域的多标签标注。

Result: 构建了包含582,683篇化学特定全文研究文章的内部研究语料库，具有完整的元数据、段落级嵌入和许可信息；工作流通过了模式合规性、嵌入可复现性、文本质量和元数据完整性的技术验证。

Conclusion: 主要贡献是提供了一个可复现的语料库构建和验证工作流，包括相关模式、代码和验证资源；研究人员可以使用公开的上游数据集和元数据服务复现该工作流，但源文本的公共重新分发不在发布范围内。

Abstract: We present Lit2Vec, a reproducible workflow for constructing and validating a chemistry corpus from the Semantic Scholar Open Research Corpus using conservative, metadata-based license screening. Using this workflow, we assembled an internal study corpus of 582,683 chemistry-specific full-text research articles with structured full text, token-aware paragraph chunks, paragraph-level embeddings generated with the intfloat/e5-large-v2 model, and record-level metadata including abstracts and licensing information. To support downstream retrieval and text-mining use cases, an eligible subset of the corpus was additionally enriched with machine-generated brief summaries and multi-label subfield annotations spanning 18 chemistry domains. Licensing was screened using metadata from Unpaywall, OpenAlex, and Crossref, and the resulting corpus was technically validated for schema compliance, embedding reproducibility, text quality, and metadata completeness. The primary contribution of this work is a reproducible workflow for corpus construction and validation, together with its associated schema and reproducibility resources. The released materials include the code, reconstruction workflow, schema, metadata/provenance artifacts, and validation outputs needed to reproduce the corpus from pinned public upstream resources. Public redistribution of source-derived text and broad text-derived representations is outside the scope of the general release. Researchers can reproduce the workflow by using the released pipeline with publicly available upstream datasets and metadata services.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [271] [Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12992)
*Farbod Alinezhad,Jianfei Cao,Gary J. Young,Brady Post*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出首个用于序列干预下反事实结果概率分布生成的因果扩散模型（CDM），在复杂时间依赖混杂场景中显著优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向数据中序列治疗决策严重依赖患者状态演变，现有方法在复杂时间依赖混杂和不确定性量化方面存在不足，需要更强大的反事实预测工具

Method: 提出因果扩散模型（CDM），采用残差去噪架构和关系自注意力机制，捕获复杂时间依赖和多模态结果轨迹，无需显式去混杂调整

Result: 在药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上，CDM在分布准确性（1-Wasserstein距离）上相对提升15-30%，在高混杂场景下保持竞争性或更优的点估计准确性（RMSE）

Conclusion: CDM统一了复杂序列混杂场景下的不确定性量化和稳健反事实预测，无需专门去混杂处理，为医学决策支持和政策评估等领域提供了灵活高效的工具

Abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.

</details>


### [272] [A Bayesian Perspective on the Role of Epistemic Uncertainty for Delayed Generalization in In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12434)
*Abdessamed Qchohi,Simone Rossi*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文从贝叶斯视角研究transformer中的情境学习与顿悟现象，发现认知不确定性在模型"顿悟"时急剧下降，可作为无标签泛化诊断指标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究transformer在情境学习中的任务泛化能力和"顿悟"现象，探究从记忆到泛化的延迟转变机制，理解不确定性在训练过程中的演化规律

Method: 采用贝叶斯视角分析模运算任务，使用近似贝叶斯技术估计后验分布，研究不确定性在训练中的行为变化，考察任务多样性、上下文长度和噪声的影响，并通过简化的贝叶斯线性模型提供理论支持

Result: 发现认知不确定性在模型"顿悟"时急剧下降，使不确定性成为transformer泛化的实用无标签诊断指标；理论分析表明延迟泛化和不确定性峰值源于相同的光谱机制，将顿悟时间与不确定性动态联系起来

Conclusion: 不确定性是理解transformer中情境学习和顿悟现象的关键指标，认知不确定性的急剧下降标志着从记忆到泛化的转变，为模型泛化提供了实用的无标签诊断方法

Abstract: In-context learning enables transformers to adapt to new tasks from a few examples at inference time, while grokking highlights that this generalization can emerge abruptly only after prolonged training. We study task generalization and grokking in in-context learning using a Bayesian perspective, asking what enables the delayed transition from memorization to generalization. Concretely, we consider modular arithmetic tasks in which a transformer must infer a latent linear function solely from in-context examples and analyze how predictive uncertainty evolves during training. We combine approximate Bayesian techniques to estimate the posterior distribution and we study how uncertainty behaves across training and under changes in task diversity, context length, and context noise. We find that epistemic uncertainty collapses sharply when the model groks, making uncertainty a practical label-free diagnostic of generalization in transformers. Additionally, we provide theoretical support with a simplified Bayesian linear model, showing that asymptotically both delayed generalization and uncertainty peaks arise from the same underlying spectral mechanism, which links grokking time to uncertainty dynamics.

</details>


### [273] [Information-Geometric Decomposition of Generalization Error in Unsupervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12340)
*Gilhan Kim*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文将无监督学习的KL泛化误差精确分解为三个非负分量：模型误差、数据偏差和方差，并应用于ε-PCA模型，揭示了最优秩选择机制和相图结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统泛化误差分析通常关注监督学习，而无监督学习的泛化误差分解缺乏系统框架。作者旨在为无监督学习建立精确的KL泛化误差分解理论，特别针对e-平坦模型类，以深入理解模型复杂性、数据偏差和方差之间的权衡关系。

Method: 基于信息几何中的广义勾股定理和对偶e-混合方差恒等式，为e-平坦模型类建立精确的KL泛化误差分解。将该框架应用于ε-PCA（正则化主成分分析），通过技术性重构使其适用于分解分析。在各项同性高斯数据上推导出各分量的闭式解。

Result: 1. 最优秩选择机制：最优截断值λ_cut* = ε，即保留超过噪声地板ε的经验特征值；2. 三区域相图：保留全部、内部和塌缩三个区域，由下Marchenko-Pastur边缘和可解析计算的塌缩阈值ε*(α)分隔；3. 模型误差增益与数据偏差成本之间的边际率平衡；4. 所有理论结果均通过数值验证。

Conclusion: 该研究为无监督学习的泛化误差分析提供了精确的分解框架，揭示了模型复杂性选择的深层机制。ε-PCA的案例分析展示了该框架的实际应用价值，最优秩选择反映了模型误差与数据偏差之间的基本权衡，为模型选择提供了理论指导。

Abstract: We decompose the Kullback--Leibler generalization error (GE) -- the expected KL divergence from the data distribution to the trained model -- of unsupervised learning into three non-negative components: model error, data bias, and variance. The decomposition is exact for any e-flat model class and follows from two identities of information geometry: the generalized Pythagorean theorem and a dual e-mixture variance identity. As an analytically tractable demonstration, we apply the framework to $ε$-PCA, a regularized principal component analysis in which the empirical covariance is truncated at rank $N_K$ and discarded directions are pinned at a fixed noise floor $ε$. Although rank-constrained $ε$-PCA is not itself e-flat, it admits a technical reformulation with the same total GE on isotropic Gaussian data, under which each component of the decomposition takes closed form. The optimal rank emerges as the cutoff $λ_{\mathrm{cut}}^{*} = ε$ -- the model retains exactly those empirical eigenvalues exceeding the noise floor -- with the cutoff reflecting a marginal-rate balance between model-error gain and data-bias cost. A boundary comparison further yields a three-regime phase diagram -- retain-all, interior, and collapse -- separated by the lower Marchenko--Pastur edge and an analytically computable collapse threshold $ε_{*}(α)$, where $α$ is the dimension-to-sample-size ratio. All claims are verified numerically.

</details>


### [274] [Fine-tuning Factor Augmented Neural Lasso for Heterogeneous Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12288)
*Jinhang Chai,Jianqing Fan,Cheng Gao,Qishuo Yin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: FAN-Lasso：一种用于高维非参数回归与变量选择的迁移学习框架，通过残差微调分解和低秩因子结构处理协变量与后验偏移，实现统计加速和参数高效微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有微调方法在高维非参数设置下的理论性质尚未建立，特别是在处理协变量偏移、后验偏移和变量选择方面存在空白。需要开发一个能够同时处理这些挑战的理论框架。

Method: 提出FAN-Lasso框架：1) 使用低秩因子结构处理高维相关协变量；2) 提出残差微调分解，将目标函数表示为冻结源函数与其他变量的变换；3) 通过源预测器的增强特征实现知识迁移并降低目标域模型复杂度。

Result: 推导出FAN-Lasso的极小极大最优超额风险界，精确刻画了微调相对于单任务学习产生统计加速的条件（相对样本量和函数复杂度）。在多种协变量和后验偏移场景下的数值实验表明，FAN-Lasso优于基线方法，在目标样本严重受限时仍能达到接近Oracle的性能。

Conclusion: FAN-Lasso为高维非参数回归中的迁移学习提供了理论框架，实现了变量选择并处理了协变量和后验偏移。该框架为参数高效微调方法提供了理论视角，证明了在适当条件下微调能带来统计加速。

Abstract: Fine-tuning is a widely used strategy for adapting pre-trained models to new tasks, yet its methodology and theoretical properties in high-dimensional nonparametric settings with variable selection have not yet been developed. This paper introduces the fine-tuning factor augmented neural Lasso (FAN-Lasso), a transfer learning framework for high-dimensional nonparametric regression with variable selection that simultaneously handles covariate and posterior shifts. We use a low-rank factor structure to manage high-dimensional dependent covariates and propose a novel residual fine-tuning decomposition in which the target function is expressed as a transformation of a frozen source function and other variables to achieve transfer learning and nonparametric variable selection. This augmented feature from the source predictor allows for the transfer of knowledge to the target domain and reduces model complexity there. We derive minimax-optimal excess risk bounds for the fine-tuning FAN-Lasso, characterizing the precise conditions, in terms of relative sample sizes and function complexities, under which fine-tuning yields statistical acceleration over single-task learning. The proposed framework also provides a theoretical perspective on parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. Extensive numerical experiments across diverse covariate- and posterior-shift scenarios demonstrate that the fine-tuning FAN-Lasso consistently outperforms standard baselines and achieves near-oracle performance even under severe target sample size constraints, empirically validating the derived rates.

</details>


### [275] [A Nonparametric Adaptive EWMA Control Chart for Binary Monitoring of Multiple Stream Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12095)
*Faruk Muritala,Austin Brown,Dhrubajyoti Ghosh,Sherry Ni*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出CSB-EWMA控制图，通过精确计算EWMA统计量的时变方差，解决了二项比例多流监控中早期阶段渐进方差近似失效的问题，实现了自适应的控制限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在统计过程控制中，监控多个独立流的二项比例是一个关键挑战。现有EWMA控制图依赖渐进方差近似，在早期监控阶段失效，需要一种能在初始阶段就保证统计严谨性的方法。

Method: 提出累积标准化二项EWMA(CSB-EWMA)控制图，推导了二项多流数据EWMA统计量的精确时变方差，实现了自适应控制限。通过大量模拟确定了最优平滑参数(λ)和控制限参数(L)，以达到目标受控平均运行长度(ARL0)为370和500。

Result: CSB-EWMA控制图在两个ARL0目标下都表现出快速的偏移检测能力：对于中等偏移(δ=0.2)，失控平均运行长度(ARL1)降至3-7个样本；在不同数据分布下表现出卓越的鲁棒性，对于小偏移，ARL1的变异系数(CV)低于0.10。该控制图对早期变化检测具有分布无关性、高灵敏度和理论严谨性。

Conclusion: CSB-EWMA控制图为二项多流过程的早期变化检测提供了一个分布无关、灵敏度高且理论严谨的工具，克服了现有EWMA控制图在早期监控阶段的局限性。

Abstract: Monitoring binomial proportions across multiple independent streams is a critical challenge in Statistical Process Control (SPC), with applications from manufacturing to cybersecurity. While EWMA charts offer sensitivity to small shifts, existing implementations rely on asymptotic variance approximations that fail during early-phase monitoring. We introduce a Cumulative Standardized Binomial EWMA (CSB-EWMA) chart that overcomes this limitation by deriving the exact time-varying variance of the EWMA statistic for binary multiple-stream data, enabling adaptive control limits that ensure statistical rigor from the first sample. Through extensive simulations, we identify optimal smoothing (λ) and limit (L) parameters to achieve target in-control average run length (ARL0) of 370 and 500. The CSB-EWMA chart demonstrates rapid shift detection across both ARL0 targets, with out-of-control average run length (ARL1) dropping to 3-7 samples for moderate shifts (δ=0.2), and exhibits exceptional robustness across different data distributions, with low ARL1 Coefficients of Variation (CV < 0.10 for small shifts) for both ARL0 = 370 and 500. This work provides practitioners with a distribution-free, sensitive, and theoretically sound tool for early change detection in binomial multiple-stream processes.

</details>


### [276] [On the continuum limit of t-SNE for data visualization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12041)
*Jeff Calder,Zhonggan Huang,Ryan Murray,Adam Pickarski*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文研究了t-SNE算法的连续极限，证明了当数据点数量趋于无穷时，经过适当缩放，Kullback-Leibler散度收敛到一个包含非凸梯度正则化项和可视化空间概率密度函数幅值惩罚项的连续变分问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: t-SNE作为一种广泛使用的数据可视化技术，虽然在实际应用中表现出色，但从理论角度仍然缺乏深入理解。本文旨在从连续极限的角度为t-SNE算法提供理论基础，解释其工作机制和特性。

Method: 通过分析t-SNE算法在数据点数量趋于无穷时的渐近行为，采用适当的缩放处理，证明Kullback-Leibler散度收敛到一个连续变分问题。该问题包含非凸梯度正则化项和概率密度函数幅值惩罚项，分别对应t-SNE算法中的吸引力和排斥力。

Result: 在一维情况下，证明了该连续变分问题存在唯一的光滑极小值点，同时存在无限多个间断极小值点（在松弛意义下）。这一结果与t-SNE在实际中能够以看似任意方式分离数据的经验观察一致。该能量泛函与著名的病态Perona-Malik方程密切相关。

Conclusion: 本文为t-SNE算法建立了连续极限理论框架，揭示了其内在的数学结构。由于连续变分问题的非凸性，适定性问题仅得到部分解决。研究结果为理解t-SNE的工作机制提供了理论基础，并指出了高维情况下极限能量问题的微妙性质以及未来研究方向。

Abstract: This work is concerned with the continuum limit of a graph-based data visualization technique called the t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (t-SNE), which is widely used for visualizing data in a variety of applications, but is still poorly understood from a theoretical standpoint. The t-SNE algorithm produces visualizations by minimizing the Kullback-Leibler divergence between similarity matrices representing the high dimensional data and its low dimensional representation. We prove that as the number of data points $n \to \infty$, after a natural rescaling and in applicable parameter regimes, the Kullback-Leibler divergence is consistent as the number of data points $n \to \infty$ and the similarity graph remains sparse with a continuum variational problem that involves a non-convex gradient regularization term and a penalty on the magnitude of the probability density function in the visualization space. These two terms represent the continuum limits of the attraction and repulsion forces in the t-SNE algorithm.
  Due to the lack of convexity in the continuum variational problem, the question of well-posedeness is only partially resolved. We show that when both dimensions are $1$, the problem admits a unique smooth minimizer, along with an infinite number of discontinuous minimizers (interpreted in a relaxed sense). This aligns well with the empirically observed ability of t-SNE to separate data in seemingly arbitrary ways in the visualization. The energy is also very closely related to the famously ill-posed Perona-Malik equation, which is used for denoising and simplifying images. We present numerical results validating the continuum limit, provide some preliminary results about the delicate nature of the limiting energetic problem in higher dimensions, and highlight several problems for future work.

</details>


### [277] [Obtaining Partition Crossover masks using Statistical Linkage Learning for solving noised optimization problems with hidden variable dependency structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11862)
*M. W. Przewozniczek,B. Frej,M. M. Komarnicki,M. Prusik,R. Tinós*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于统计关联学习(SLL)的噪声优化问题变量依赖分析方法，通过新的掩码构造算法处理噪声环境下的变量依赖识别，使分区交叉(PX)等高效算子能在噪声场景中保持有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界优化问题常受各种噪声影响，传统变量依赖检测方法在噪声环境下难以准确识别变量间的非线性或非单调关联，导致分区交叉等高效优化算子失效，需要开发适用于噪声环境的变量依赖分析方法。

Method: 采用统计关联学习(SLL)来分解噪声问题，提出新的SLL专用掩码构造算法，理论上证明当SLL分解质量足够高时，该算法能产生与无噪声情况下PX掩码等效的掩码。

Result: 实验表明，使用所提机制的优化器在不同噪声水平下均保持同等有效性，并在高噪声问题中优于现有最先进的优化器。

Conclusion: 提出的SLL方法和掩码构造算法能够有效处理噪声环境下的变量依赖分析，使优化器在噪声场景中保持高性能，解决了传统方法在噪声环境下失效的问题。

Abstract: In optimization problems, some variable subsets may have a joint non-linear or non-monotonical influence on the function value. Therefore, knowledge of variable dependencies may be crucial for effective optimization, and many state-of-the-art optimizers leverage it to improve performance. However, some real-world problem instances may be the subject of noise of various origins. In such a case, variable dependencies relevant to optimization may be hard or impossible to tell using dependency checks sufficient for problems without noise, making highly effective operators, e.g., Partition Crossover (PX), useless. Therefore, we use Statistical Linkage Learning (SLL) to decompose problems with noise and propose a new SLL-dedicated mask construction algorithm. We prove that if the quality of the SLL-based decomposition is sufficiently high, the proposed clustering algorithm yields masks equivalent to PX masks for the noise-free instances. The experiments show that the optimizer using the proposed mechanisms remains equally effective despite the noise level and outperforms state-of-the-art optimizers for the problems with high noise.

</details>


### [278] [ADD for Multi-Bit Image Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11491)
*An Luo,Jie Ding*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: ADD是一种两阶段多比特图像水印方法，通过线性组合学习的水印与多比特消息嵌入图像，再通过内积解码，在48位水印任务中实现100%解码准确率，对图像失真具有强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成模型能够快速创建高保真图像，社会对虚假信息和真实性的担忧加剧。现有多比特图像水印方法在容量、对常见图像失真的鲁棒性以及理论依据方面存在不足。

Method: 提出ADD（Add, Dot, Decode）两阶段方法：1）学习一个水印，与多比特消息线性组合后添加到图像中；2）通过水印图像与学习到的水印之间的内积进行解码。

Result: 在MS-COCO基准测试中，48位水印任务实现100%解码准确率，在各种图像失真下性能最多下降2%（远低于SOTA方法的14%平均下降）。计算效率显著提升：嵌入速度快2倍，解码速度快7.4倍。

Conclusion: ADD在多比特图像水印方面表现出色，具有高容量、强鲁棒性和计算效率，并提供了理论分析解释其有效性，为解决生成图像的真实性问题提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: As generative models enable rapid creation of high-fidelity images, societal concerns about misinformation and authenticity have intensified. A promising remedy is multi-bit image watermarking, which embeds a multi-bit message into an image so that a verifier can later detect whether the image is generated by someone and further identify the source by decoding the embedded message. Existing approaches often fall short in capacity, resilience to common image distortions, and theoretical justification. To address these limitations, we propose ADD (Add, Dot, Decode), a multi-bit image watermarking method with two stages: learning a watermark to be linearly combined with the multi-bit message and added to the image, and decoding through inner products between the watermarked image and the learned watermark. On the standard MS-COCO benchmark, we demonstrate that for the challenging task of 48-bit watermarking, ADD achieves 100\% decoding accuracy, with performance dropping by at most 2\% under a wide range of image distortions, substantially smaller than the 14\% average drop of state-of-the-art methods. In addition, ADD achieves substantial computational gains, with 2-fold faster embedding and 7.4-fold faster decoding than the fastest existing method. We further provide a theoretical analysis explaining why the learned watermark and the corresponding decoding rule are effective.

</details>


### [279] [Trustworthy Feature Importance Avoids Unrestricted Permutations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11253)
*Emanuele Borgonovo,Francesco Cappelli,Xuefei Lu,Elmar Plischke,Cynthia Rudin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文提出三种新方法解决特征重要性评估中的外推误差问题：条件模型依赖、高斯变换的Knockoffs和受限ALE图设计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于无限制置换的特征重要性方法存在外推误差问题，这种误差在所有非平凡变量重要性方法中都会出现，需要新的解决方案

Method: 提出三种新方法：1) 条件模型依赖 2) 高斯变换的Knockoffs 3) 受限ALE图设计，从理论和数值上减少或消除外推误差

Result: 理论和数值结果表明，提出的策略能够显著减少或完全消除外推误差，提高特征重要性评估的准确性

Conclusion: 通过条件模型依赖、Knockoffs高斯变换和受限ALE图设计三种方法，有效解决了特征重要性评估中的外推误差问题，为变量重要性分析提供了更可靠的框架

Abstract: Feature importance methods using unrestricted permutations are flawed due to extrapolation errors; such errors appear in all non-trivial variable importance approaches. We propose three new approaches: conditional model reliance and Knockoffs with Gaussian transformation, and restricted ALE plot designs. Theoretical and numerical results show our strategies reduce/eliminate extrapolation.

</details>


### [280] [Regional Explanations: Bridging Local and Global Variable Importance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11223)
*Salim I. Amoukou,Nicolas J-B. Brunel*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文分析了两种广泛使用的局部归因方法（Local Shapley Values和LIME）的根本局限性，提出R-LOCO方法来解决这些问题，通过区域化方法在局部和全局解释之间建立桥梁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Local Shapley Values和LIME被广泛使用，但研究发现即使在理想条件下（精确计算和特征独立），它们也无法可靠地检测局部重要特征。这些方法会错误地将重要性分配给既不直接影响模型输出（如线性模型中系数为零的特征）也不与功能相关特征存在统计依赖的特征。

Method: 提出R-LOCO（Regional Leave Out COvariates）方法：1）将输入空间分割为具有相似特征重要性特征的区域；2）在这些区域内应用全局归因方法；3）根据实例的区域成员资格推导其特征贡献。这种方法结合了局部和全局解释的优点，避免了局部解释的不稳定性，同时保留了全局方法通常丢失的实例特定细节。

Result: R-LOCO方法提供了更准确的归因，能够更忠实地反映局部特征重要性，同时避免了现有局部归因方法（Local SV和LIME）违反基本原则的问题。该方法在局部解释不稳定性和全局方法细节丢失之间取得了平衡。

Conclusion: 现有局部归因方法存在根本缺陷，无法可靠识别局部重要特征。R-LOCO通过区域化方法有效桥接了局部和全局解释，提供了更准确、更稳定的特征归因，同时保持了实例特异性，为可解释机器学习提供了改进方案。

Abstract: We analyze two widely used local attribution methods, Local Shapley Values and LIME, which aim to quantify the contribution of a feature value $x_i$ to a specific prediction $f(x_1, \dots, x_p)$. Despite their widespread use, we identify fundamental limitations in their ability to reliably detect locally important features, even under ideal conditions with exact computations and independent features. We argue that a sound local attribution method should not assign importance to features that neither influence the model output (e.g., features with zero coefficients in a linear model) nor exhibit statistical dependence with functionality-relevant features. We demonstrate that both Local SV and LIME violate this fundamental principle. To address this, we propose R-LOCO (Regional Leave Out COvariates), which bridges the gap between local and global explanations and provides more accurate attributions. R-LOCO segments the input space into regions with similar feature importance characteristics. It then applies global attribution methods within these regions, deriving an instance's feature contributions from its regional membership. This approach delivers more faithful local attributions while avoiding local explanation instability and preserving instance-specific detail often lost in global methods.

</details>


### [281] [Cost-optimal Sequential Testing via Doubly Robust Q-learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11165)
*Doudou Zhou,Yiran Zhang,Dian Jin,Yingye Zheng,Lu Tian,Tianxi Cai*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种双稳健Q学习框架，用于从回顾性数据中学习成本最优的序贯决策策略，通过路径特异性逆概率权重处理测试可用性导致的非随机缺失数据


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床决策中测试通常成本高、有创且耗时，需要个体化序贯策略来决定测量内容和停止时机。回顾性数据中测试可用性依赖于先前结果，导致信息性缺失，需要专门方法处理

Method: 在序贯随机缺失机制下，开发双稳健Q学习框架，引入路径特异性逆概率权重处理异质性测试轨迹，结合辅助对比模型构建正交伪结局，实现当获取模型或对比模型之一正确设定时的无偏策略学习

Result: 建立了阶段对比估计器的oracle不等式，推导了收敛速率、遗憾界和学习策略的误分类率。仿真显示相比加权和完整案例基线方法，成本调整性能有改进。在前列腺癌队列研究中，该方法在不损害预测准确性的前提下降低了测试成本

Conclusion: 该方法为从具有信息性缺失的回顾性数据中学习成本最优序贯决策策略提供了理论保证和实用框架，在临床决策支持中具有应用价值

Abstract: Clinical decision-making often involves selecting tests that are costly, invasive, or time-consuming, motivating individualized, sequential strategies for what to measure and when to stop ascertaining. We study the problem of learning cost-optimal sequential decision policies from retrospective data, where test availability depends on prior results, inducing informative missingness. Under a sequential missing-at-random mechanism, we develop a doubly robust Q-learning framework for estimating optimal policies. The method introduces path-specific inverse probability weights that account for heterogeneous test trajectories and satisfy a normalization property conditional on the observed history. By combining these weights with auxiliary contrast models, we construct orthogonal pseudo-outcomes that enable unbiased policy learning when either the acquisition model or the contrast model is correctly specified. We establish oracle inequalities for the stage-wise contrast estimators, along with convergence rates, regret bounds, and misclassification rates for the learned policy. Simulations demonstrate improved cost-adjusted performance over weighted and complete-case baselines, and an application to a prostate cancer cohort study illustrates how the method reduces testing cost without compromising predictive accuracy.

</details>


### [282] [DDO-RM for LLM Preference Optimization: A Minimal Held-Out Benchmark against DPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11119)
*Tiantian Zhang,Jierui Zuo,Wenping Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文比较了DPO与DDO-RM两种偏好优化方法，在有限设置下DDO-RM在配对准确率、AUC和平均边际等指标上表现优于DPO，但结果仍属初步。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索在最小化成对选择（chosen-versus-rejected）设置下，基于奖励模型的决策分布更新方法（DDO-RM）是否能比直接成对目标优化方法（DPO）表现更好。

Method: 方法包括算法视角和基准测试两部分。算法上，DDO-RM将每个提示视为候选回复的有限决策问题，构建策略分布，基于该分布中心化奖励模型分数，然后将奖励引导的目标分布蒸馏回策略。基准测试使用EleutherAI/pythia-410m模型和HuggingFaceH4/ultrafeedback_binarized数据集，在test_prefs分割上进行评估，使用42、13和3407三个随机种子。

Result: 在当前公开基准测试中，DDO-RM相比DPO：平均配对准确率从0.5238提升到0.5602，AUC从0.5315提升到0.5382，平均边际从0.1377提升到0.5353。这些是初步但令人鼓舞的结果。

Conclusion: 结论是DDO-RM在有限设置下显示出优于DPO的潜力，但研究范围有限（仅一个模型系列、一个数据集、一个评估分割和三个随机种子），需要更广泛的验证来确认其普遍适用性。

Abstract: This paper reorganizes the current manuscript around the DPO versus DDO-RM preference-optimization project and focuses on two parts: the algorithmic view and the preliminary held-out benchmark. The benchmark asks a narrow question: even in a minimal pairwise chosen-versus-rejected setting, can a reward-guided decision-distribution update outperform a direct pairwise objective? We compare Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) against DDO-RM on EleutherAI/pythia-410m using HuggingFaceH4/ultrafeedback\_binarized, evaluate on the held-out test\_prefs split, and report results for seeds 42, 13, and 3407.
  Algorithmically, DDO-RM treats each prompt as a finite decision problem over candidate responses. Instead of optimizing only a binary chosen-rejected relation, it forms a policy distribution over candidates, centers reward-model scores under that distribution, and distills a reward-guided target distribution back into the policy. In the current public benchmark, DDO-RM improves mean pair accuracy from 0.5238 to 0.5602, AUC from 0.5315 to 0.5382, and mean margin from 0.1377 to 0.5353 relative to DPO. These are encouraging but still preliminary results: the study covers one model family, one dataset, one held-out evaluation split, and three seeds.

</details>


### [283] [Tail-Aware Information-Theoretic Generalization for RLHF and SGLD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10727)
*Huiming Zhang,Binghan Li,Wan Tian,Qiang Sun*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出针对重尾数据的尾部依赖信息论框架，基于子威布尔分布，开发无需矩母函数的泛化界工具，应用于鲁棒学习、RLHF和随机优化等场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于KL散度的信息论泛化界依赖矩母函数存在性，但在鲁棒学习、RLHF、随机优化等现代场景中，损失和奖励常呈重尾分布，矩母函数可能不存在，导致传统工具失效。需要开发适用于重尾数据的新框架。

Method: 1. 建立子威布尔数据的尾部依赖信息论框架，尾参数θ控制尾部厚度；2. 提出去相关引理，使用移位对数fθ散度约束测度变化期望；3. 建立子威布尔过程的尖锐极大不等式和Dudley型链式界；4. 推导期望和高概率PAC-Bayes泛化界；5. 基于多尺度Rényi互信息的信息论链式不等式。

Result: 1. 获得复杂度按log^{1/θ}和熵^{1/θ}缩放的泛化界；2. 实现与Rényi散度的显式比较而无需矩母函数论证；3. 应用于重尾奖励下的Rényi正则化RLHF和重尾梯度噪声下的随机梯度Langevin动力学。

Conclusion: 该工作为处理重尾数据提供了系统的信息论工具，填补了传统KL散度方法在矩母函数不存在时的空白，在鲁棒学习、RLHF和随机优化等现代机器学习场景中具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: Classical information-theoretic generalization bounds typically control the generalization gap through KL-based mutual information and therefore rely on boundedness or sub-Gaussian tails via the moment generating function (MGF). In many modern pipelines, such as robust learning, RLHF, and stochastic optimization, losses and rewards can be heavy-tailed, and MGFs may not exist, rendering KL-based tools ineffective. We develop a tail-dependent information-theoretic framework for sub-Weibull data, where the tail parameter $θ$ controls the tail heaviness: $θ=2$ corresponds to sub-Gaussian, $θ=1$ to sub-exponential, and $0<θ<1$ to genuinely heavy tails. Our key technical ingredient is a decorrelation lemma that bounds change-of-measure expectations using a shifted-log $f_θ$-divergence, which admits explicit comparisons to Rényi divergence without MGF arguments. On the empirical-process side, we establish sharp maximal inequalities and a Dudley-type chaining bound for sub-Weibull processes with tail index $θ$, with complexity scaling as $\log^{1/θ}$ and entropy$^{1/θ}$. These tools yield expected and high-probability PAC-Bayes generalization bounds, as well as an information-theoretic chaining inequality based on multiscale Rényi mutual information. We illustrate the consequences in Rényi-regularized RLHF under heavy-tailed rewards and in stochastic gradient Langevin dynamics with heavy-tailed gradient noise.

</details>


### [284] [One-Step Score-Based Density Ratio Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10672)
*Wei Chen,Qibin Zhao,John Paisley,Junmei Yang,Delu Zeng*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: OS-DRE是一种结合直接密度比估计和基于分数的方法优势的框架，通过解析径向基函数分解时间分数，避免了数值求解器，只需一次函数评估即可实现高效准确的密度比估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有密度比估计方法存在估计质量与计算效率之间的权衡：直接方法推理高效但在分布差异大时性能下降；基于分数的方法更准确但需要大量重复函数评估和数值积分。需要结合两者优势的新方法。

Method: 提出一步基于分数的密度比估计(OS-DRE)，将时间分数分解为空间和时间分量，用解析径向基函数(RBF)框架表示时间分量，将难以处理的时域积分转化为闭式加权和，无需数值求解器，只需一次函数评估。

Result: 实验表明OS-DRE在密度估计、连续KL散度和互信息估计、近分布外检测等任务中，在估计质量和推理效率之间取得了有利平衡。分析了解析框架的近似条件，建立了有限和无限光滑时间核的近似误差界。

Conclusion: OS-DRE通过解析框架结合了直接方法和基于分数方法的互补优势，实现了高效准确的密度比估计，为相关应用提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Density ratio estimation (DRE) is a useful tool for quantifying discrepancies between probability distributions, but existing approaches often involve a trade-off between estimation quality and computational efficiency. Classical direct DRE methods are usually efficient at inference time, yet their performance can seriously deteriorate when the discrepancy between distributions is large. In contrast, score-based DRE methods often yield more accurate estimates in such settings, but they typically require considerable repeated function evaluations and numerical integration. We propose One-step Score-based Density Ratio Estimation (OS-DRE), a partly analytic and solver-free framework designed to combine these complementary advantages. OS-DRE decomposes the time score into spatial and temporal components, representing the latter with an analytic radial basis function (RBF) frame. This formulation converts the otherwise intractable temporal integral into a closed-form weighted sum, thereby removing the need for numerical solvers and enabling DRE with only one function evaluation. We further analyze approximation conditions for the analytic frame, and establish approximation error bounds for both finitely and infinitely smooth temporal kernels, grounding the framework in existing approximation theory. Experiments across density estimation, continual Kullback-Leibler and mutual information estimation, and near out-of-distribution detection demonstrate that OS-DRE offers a favorable balance between estimation quality and inference efficiency.

</details>


### [285] [A Deep Generative Approach to Stratified Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10650)
*Randy Martinez,Rong Tang,Lizhen Lin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出两种深度生成方法用于分层空间学习：基于变分自编码器混合的筛极大似然方法和基于扩散的分数场结构方法，能够学习不同维度流形（层）的分布，并估计层数和维度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂数据通常更适合建模为分层空间（不同维度流形的并集），但分层学习面临维度变化、交集奇点和缺乏高效分布学习模型的挑战

Method: 开发了两种生成框架：1）通过维度感知的变分自编码器混合实现筛极大似然方法；2）基于扩散的框架，探索混合分布的分数场结构

Result: 建立了学习环境分布和内在分布的收敛率，证明了分数场几何用于估计各层内在维度的一致性，提出了能一致估计层数和维度的算法

Conclusion: 两种框架的理论结果为底层几何、环境噪声水平和深度生成模型之间的相互作用提供了基本见解，模拟和实际数据集应用验证了方法的有效性

Abstract: While the manifold hypothesis is widely adopted in modern machine learning, complex data is often better modeled as stratified spaces -- unions of manifolds (strata) of varying dimensions. Stratified learning is challenging due to varying dimensionality, intersection singularities, and lack of efficient models in learning the underlying distributions. We provide a deep generative approach to stratified learning by developing two generative frameworks for learning distributions on stratified spaces. The first is a sieve maximum likelihood approach realized via a dimension-aware mixture of variational autoencoders. The second is a diffusion-based framework that explores the score field structure of a mixture. We establish the convergence rates for learning both the ambient and intrinsic distributions, which are shown to be dependent on the intrinsic dimensions and smoothness of the underlying strata. Utilizing the geometry of the score field, we also establish consistency for estimating the intrinsic dimension of each stratum and propose an algorithm that consistently estimates both the number of strata and their dimensions. Theoretical results for both frameworks provide fundamental insights into the interplay of the underlying geometry, the ambient noise level, and deep generative models. Extensive simulations and real dataset applications, such as molecular dynamics, demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [286] [DINO-Explorer: Active Underwater Discovery via Ego-Motion Compensated Semantic Predictive Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12933)
*Yuhan Jin,Nayari Marie Lessa,Mariela De Lucas Alvarez,Melvin Laux,Lucas Amparo Barbosa,Frank Kirchner,Rebecca Adam*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DINO-Explorer：基于DINOv3基础模型的主动感知框架，通过语义惊喜信号实现水下自主机器人对科学价值事件的在线检测与带宽高效传输


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主水下航行器（AUV）大多作为被动数据记录器运行，捕获大量视频供离线审查，经常错过具有高科学价值的瞬态事件。需要从被动感知转向主动感知，需要一个因果的在线信号来突出显著现象，同时抑制机动引起的视觉变化。

Method: 提出DINO-Explorer框架：1）在冻结的DINOv3基础模型的潜在空间中运行；2）使用轻量级、动作条件循环预测器预测短期语义演化；3）采用传出副本启发模块，利用全局池化光流来抵消自诱导的视觉变化而不抑制真实的环境新颖性；4）在变体遥测约束下评估异步事件分诊的下游任务。

Result: 1）在固定工作点，系统保留了78.8%的后发现人类审查共识事件，触发确认率为56.8%；2）自我运动条件抑制了45.5%的假阳性（相对于未补偿的惊喜信号基线）；3）在回放侧帕累托消融研究中，DINO-Explorer在验证的峰值F1与遥测带宽前沿上稳健占优，在选定工作点将遥测带宽减少48.2%，同时保持62.2%的峰值F1分数。

Conclusion: DINO-Explorer提供了一个鲁棒、带宽高效的注意力机制，成功将数据传输集中在人类验证的新颖事件周围，为水下自主机器人的主动感知提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Marine ecosystem degradation necessitates continuous, scientifically selective underwater monitoring. However, most autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) operate as passive data loggers, capturing exhaustive video for offline review and frequently missing transient events of high scientific value. Transitioning to active perception requires a causal, online signal that highlights significant phenomena while suppressing maneuver-induced visual changes. We propose DINO-Explorer, a novelty-aware perception framework driven by a continuous semantic surprise signal. Operating within the latent space of a frozen DINOv3 foundation model, it leverages a lightweight, action-conditioned recurrent predictor to anticipate short-horizon semantic evolution. An efference-copy-inspired module utilizes globally pooled optical flow to discount self-induced visual changes without suppressing genuine environmental novelty. We evaluate this signal on the downstream task of asynchronous event triage under variant telemetry constraints. Results demonstrate that DINO-Explorer provides a robust, bandwidth-efficient attention mechanism. At a fixed operating point, the system retains 78.8% of post-discovery human-reviewer consensus events with a 56.8% trigger confirmation rate, effectively surfacing mission-relevant phenomena. Crucially, ego-motion conditioning suppresses 45.5% of false positives relative to an uncompensated surprise signal baseline. In a replay-side Pareto ablation study, DINO-Explorer robustly dominates the validated peak F1 versus telemetry bandwidth frontier, reducing telemetry bandwidth by 48.2% at the selected operating point while maintaining a 62.2% peak F1 score, successfully concentrating data transmission around human-verified novelty events.

</details>


### [287] [Learning Versatile Humanoid Manipulation with Touch Dreaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13015)
*Yaru Niu,Zhenlong Fang,Binghong Chen,Shuai Zhou,Revanth Senthilkumaran,Hao Zhang,Bingqing Chen,Chen Qiu,H. Eric Tseng,Jonathan Francis,Ding Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出HTD方法，通过触觉预测增强的多模态Transformer实现接触感知的人形机器人灵巧操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决人形机器人在现实世界中需要全身稳定性、灵巧手部和接触感知的复杂操作挑战

Method: 1) 基于RL的全身控制器；2) VR遥操作与人体运动映射的数据收集系统；3) HTD多模态编码器-解码器Transformer，包含触觉预测增强的行为克隆训练

Result: 在五个接触丰富任务中，HTD相比最强基线平均成功率相对提升90.9%；潜在空间触觉预测比原始触觉预测带来30%相对增益

Conclusion: 结合稳健全身执行、可扩展数据收集和预测性触觉中心学习，可实现现实世界中多功能、高灵巧性的人形机器人操作

Abstract: Humanoid robots promise general-purpose assistance, yet real-world humanoid loco-manipulation remains challenging because it requires whole-body stability, dexterous hands, and contact-aware perception under frequent contact changes. In this work, we study dexterous, contact-rich humanoid loco-manipulation. We first develop an RL-based whole-body controller that provides stable lower-body and torso execution during complex manipulation. Built on this controller, we develop a whole-body humanoid data collection system that combines VR-based teleoperation with human-to-humanoid motion mapping, enabling efficient collection of real-world demonstrations. We then propose Humanoid Transformer with Touch Dreaming (HTD), a multimodal encoder--decoder Transformer that models touch as a core modality alongside multi-view vision and proprioception. HTD is trained in a single stage with behavioral cloning augmented by touch dreaming: in addition to predicting action chunks, the policy predicts future hand-joint forces and future tactile latents, encouraging the shared Transformer trunk to learn contact-aware representations for dexterous interaction. Across five contact-rich tasks, Insert-T, Book Organization, Towel Folding, Cat Litter Scooping, and Tea Serving, HTD achieves a 90.9% relative improvement in average success rate over the stronger baseline. Ablation results further show that latent-space tactile prediction is more effective than raw tactile prediction, yielding a 30% relative gain in success rate. These results demonstrate that combining robust whole-body execution, scalable humanoid data collection, and predictive touch-centered learning enables versatile, high-dexterity humanoid manipulation in the real world. Project webpage: humanoid-touch-dream.github.io.

</details>


### [288] [XRZero-G0: Pushing the Frontier of Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with Interfaces, Quality and Ratios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13001)
*Junming Wang,Teng Pu,Wingmun Fung,Jindong Wang,Shanchang Wang,Yuan Deng,Shuyuan Wang,Ziwei Liu,Kunhao Pan,Ping Yang,Peng Zhai,Yuxin Liang,Xiaofan Li,Jiabi Sun,Renchao Xu,Xiaotian Tian,Pengfei Yan,Guoqiang Ye,Liang Li,Qian Wang,Ruyi Gan,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: XRZero-G0系统通过硬件软件协同设计，结合VR界面和专用夹具，实现了高效的非本体感知机器人操作数据收集，并通过闭环质量控制和数据混合策略，以低成本实现高性能策略学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人操作基础模型面临高质量动作对齐演示数据的获取瓶颈。虽然无机器人的人类演示（如UMI范式）提供了比传统遥操作更可扩展的替代方案，但现有系统存在硬件人机工程学不佳、开环工作流程以及缺乏系统性数据混合策略等限制。

Method: 提出了XRZero-G0硬件软件协同设计系统，包括：1）配备顶视摄像头和双专用夹具的虚拟现实界面，提高收集效率；2）用于非本体感知数据的闭环收集、检查、训练和评估流程；3）研究机器人无关数据的经验缩放行为和最优混合比例。

Result: 系统实现了85%的数据有效性率，建立了透明的质量控制机制。实验表明，将少量真实机器人数据与大规模机器人无关数据结合（如10:1比例）可达到与纯真实机器人数据集相当的性能，同时将获取成本降低20倍。构建了2000小时机器人无关数据集，实现了到目标物理机器人的零样本跨具身迁移。

Conclusion: XRZero-G0提供了一种高度可扩展的方法，用于通用真实世界机器人操作，通过硬件软件协同设计、闭环质量控制和优化数据混合策略，显著降低了高质量演示数据的获取成本。

Abstract: The acquisition of high-quality, action-aligned demonstration data remains a fundamental bottleneck in scaling foundation models for dexterous robot manipulation. Although robot-free human demonstrations (e.g., the UMI paradigm) offer a scalable alternative to traditional teleoperation, current systems are constrained by sub-optimal hardware ergonomics, open-loop workflows, and a lack of systematic data-mixing strategies. To address these limitations, we present XRZero-G0, a hardware-software co-designed system for embodied data collection and policy learning. The system features an ergonomic, virtual reality interface equipped with a top-view camera and dual specialized grippers to directly improve collection efficiency. To ensure dataset reliability, we propose a closed-loop collection, inspection, training, and evaluation pipeline for non-proprioceptive data. This workflow achieves an 85% data validity rate and establishes a transparent mechanism for quality control. Furthermore, we investigate the empirical scaling behaviors and optimal mixing ratios of robot-free data. Extensive experiments indicate that combining a minimal volume of real-robot data with large-scale robot-free data (e.g., a 10:1 ratio) achieves performance comparable to exclusively real-robot datasets, while reducing acquisition costs by a factor of twenty. Utilizing XRZero-G0, we construct a 2,000-hour robot-free dataset that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer to a target physical robot, demonstrating a highly scalable methodology for generalized real-world manipulation.Our project repository: https://github.com/X-Square-Robot/XRZero-G0

</details>


### [289] [RMGS-SLAM: Real-time Multi-sensor Gaussian Splatting SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12942)
*Dongen Li,Yi Liu,Junqi Liu,Zewen Sun,Zefan Huang,Shuo Sun,Jiahui Liu,Chengran Yuan,Hongliang Guo,Francis E. H. Tay,Marcelo H. Ang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种紧密耦合的LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架，用于大规模真实场景的实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行执行状态估计与高斯初始化、级联初始化策略和基于高斯地图的闭环检测来平衡实时性、定位精度和渲染质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射SLAM方法在大规模真实环境中难以同时实现低延迟位姿估计、与传感器流同步的3D高斯重建以及长期全局一致性，需要一种能够平衡这些需求的解决方案。

Method: 1) 并行执行状态估计和3D高斯基元初始化与全局高斯优化；2) 采用级联初始化策略结合前馈预测和基于体素的主成分分析几何先验；3) 通过基于高斯的广义迭代最近点配准估计闭环约束，然后进行位姿图优化；4) 收集了具有硬件同步LiDAR-相机-IMU和地面真实轨迹的大规模闭环室外SLAM序列用于评估。

Result: 在公开数据集和自建数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在多样化和具有挑战性的真实场景中实现了实时效率、定位精度和渲染质量之间的良好平衡。

Conclusion: 提出的紧密耦合LiDAR-惯性-视觉3D高斯溅射SLAM框架能够在大规模真实世界环境中实现实时位姿估计和逼真建图，通过并行处理、级联初始化和基于高斯地图的闭环检测有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: Real-time 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS)-based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) in large-scale real-world environments remains challenging, as existing methods often struggle to jointly achieve low-latency pose estimation, 3D Gaussian reconstruction in step with incoming sensor streams, and long-term global consistency. In this paper, we present a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Visual (LIV) 3DGS-based SLAM framework for real-time pose estimation and photorealistic mapping in large-scale real-world scenes. The system executes state estimation and 3D Gaussian primitive initialization in parallel with global Gaussian optimization, thereby enabling continuous dense mapping. To improve Gaussian initialization quality and accelerate optimization convergence, we introduce a cascaded strategy that combines feed-forward predictions with voxel-based principal component analysis (voxel-PCA) geometric priors. To enhance global consistency in large scenes, we further perform loop closure directly on the optimized global Gaussian map by estimating loop constraints through Gaussian-based Generalized Iterative Closest Point (GICP) registration, followed by pose-graph optimization. In addition, we collected challenging large-scale looped outdoor SLAM sequences with hardware-synchronized LiDAR-camera-IMU and ground-truth trajectories to support realistic and comprehensive evaluation. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and our dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a strong balance among real-time efficiency, localization accuracy, and rendering quality across diverse and challenging real-world scenes.

</details>


### [290] [E2E-Fly: An Integrated Training-to-Deployment System for End-to-End Quadrotor Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12916)
*Fangyu Sun,Fanxing Li,Linzuo Zhang,Yu Hu,Renbiao Jin,Shuyu Wu,Wenxian Yu,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: E2E-Fly是一个集成框架，将可微分物理学习与四旋翼无人机端到端控制任务的训练、验证和实际部署统一起来，实现了零样本仿真到现实的转移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决四旋翼无人机从仿真到现实转移学习中的挑战，包括视觉渲染效率低、物理建模不准确、传感器差异未建模以及缺乏将可微分物理学习集成到端到端训练的统一平台。现有系统缺乏系统化的零样本转移流程，阻碍了可重复性和实际部署。

Method: 引入E2E-Fly集成框架，包含敏捷四旋翼平台和全栈训练、验证、部署工作流。训练框架包含支持可微分物理学习和强化学习的高性能仿真器，以及针对常见四旋翼任务的结构化奖励设计。采用两阶段验证策略（仿真到仿真转移和硬件在环测试），并通过专用低级控制接口和全面的仿真到现实对齐方法（系统辨识、域随机化、延迟补偿和噪声建模）将策略部署到两个物理四旋翼平台。

Result: 这是首个系统地将可微分物理学习与四旋翼的训练、验证和实际部署统一起来的工作。成功训练了六个端到端控制任务并在现实世界中部署。

Conclusion: E2E-Fly框架有效解决了四旋翼无人机从仿真到现实转移学习的关键挑战，提供了一个系统化的零样本转移管道，实现了端到端控制策略的实际部署，为相关研究提供了可重复的基准平台。

Abstract: Training and transferring learning-based policies for quadrotors from simulation to reality remains challenging due to inefficient visual rendering, physical modeling inaccuracies, unmodeled sensor discrepancies, and the absence of a unified platform integrating differentiable physics learning into end-to-end training. While recent work has demonstrated various end-to-end quadrotor control tasks, few systems provide a systematic, zero-shot transfer pipeline, hindering reproducibility and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we introduce E2E-Fly, an integrated framework featuring an agile quadrotor platform coupled with a full-stack training, validation, and deployment workflow. The training framework incorporates a high-performance simulator with support for differentiable physics learning and reinforcement learning, alongside structured reward design tailored to common quadrotor tasks. We further introduce a two-stage validation strategy using sim-to-sim transfer and hardware-in-the-loop testing, and deploy policies onto two physical quadrotor platforms via a dedicated low-level control interface and a comprehensive sim-to-real alignment methodology, encompassing system identification, domain randomization, latency compensation, and noise modeling. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to systematically unify differentiable physical learning with training, validation, and real-world deployment for quadrotors. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework for training six end-to-end control tasks and deploy them in the real world.

</details>


### [291] [Tree Learning: A Multi-Skill Continual Learning Framework for Humanoid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12909)
*Yifei Yan,Linqi Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Tree Learning框架，通过根-分支层次参数继承机制解决人形机器人多技能持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，支持周期性与非周期性运动，在Unity仿真中实现100%技能保留率和高奖励表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着人形机器人强化学习从单任务向多技能范式发展，如何高效扩展新技能同时避免灾难性遗忘成为具身智能的关键挑战。现有方法要么依赖混合专家模型的复杂拓扑调整，要么需要训练极大模型，难以轻量部署。

Method: 提出Tree Learning框架：1) 根-分支层次参数继承机制，通过参数重用为分支技能提供运动先验；2) 结合相位调制和插值的多模态前馈适应机制，支持周期性和非周期性运动；3) 任务级奖励塑形策略加速技能收敛。

Result: Unity仿真实验表明，相比同时多任务训练，Tree Learning在各种代表性运动技能上获得更高奖励，同时保持100%技能保留率，支持无缝多技能切换和实时交互控制。在超级马里奥式交互场景和古典中国园林自主导航两个任务中验证了性能和泛化能力。

Conclusion: Tree Learning框架通过参数继承机制从根本上防止灾难性遗忘，支持多模态运动适应，实现高效的多技能持续学习，为人形机器人的轻量部署和实时交互控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: As reinforcement learning for humanoid robots evolves from single-task to multi-skill paradigms, efficiently expanding new skills while avoiding catastrophic forgetting has become a key challenge in embodied intelligence. Existing approaches either rely on complex topology adjustments in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models or require training extremely large-scale models, making lightweight deployment difficult. To address this, we propose Tree Learning, a multi-skill continual learning framework for humanoid robots. The framework adopts a root-branch hierarchical parameter inheritance mechanism, providing motion priors for branch skills through parameter reuse to fundamentally prevent catastrophic forgetting. A multi-modal feedforward adaptation mechanism combining phase modulation and interpolation is designed to support both periodic and aperiodic motions. A task-level reward shaping strategy is also proposed to accelerate skill convergence. Unity-based simulation experiments show that, in contrast to simultaneous multi-task training, Tree Learning achieves higher rewards across various representative locomotion skills while maintaining a 100% skill retention rate, enabling seamless multi-skill switching and real-time interactive control. We further validate the performance and generalization capability of Tree Learning on two distinct Unity-simulated tasks: a Super Mario-inspired interactive scenario and autonomous navigation in a classical Chinese garden environment.

</details>


### [292] [FastGrasp: Learning-based Whole-body Control method for Fast Dexterous Grasping with Mobile Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12879)
*Heng Tao,Yiming Zhong,Zemin Yang,Yuexin Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FastGrasp是一个基于学习的移动机器人快速抓取框架，通过两阶段强化学习策略整合抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，解决高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调和跨物体泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在高速运动下的冲击稳定、实时全身协调以及跨不同物体和场景的泛化能力方面存在根本性挑战，受限于固定基座、简单夹爪或缓慢的触觉响应能力。物流、制造和服务应用中的移动机器人需要快速抓取能力。

Method: 提出FastGrasp框架，采用两阶段强化学习策略：第一阶段通过条件变分自编码器基于物体点云生成多样化抓取候选；第二阶段通过最优抓取选择引导移动基座、机械臂和手部的协调运动。触觉感知支持实时抓取调整以处理冲击效应和物体变化。

Result: 在仿真和真实场景中的大量实验展示了优越的抓取性能，通过有效的仿真到现实迁移实现了跨不同物体几何形状的鲁棒操作。

Conclusion: FastGrasp框架成功解决了移动机器人快速抓取中的关键挑战，通过整合抓取引导、全身控制和触觉反馈，实现了高速运动下的稳定抓取和跨物体泛化能力。

Abstract: Fast grasping is critical for mobile robots in logistics, manufacturing, and service applications. Existing methods face fundamental challenges in impact stabilization under high-speed motion, real-time whole-body coordination, and generalization across diverse objects and scenarios, limited by fixed bases, simple grippers, or slow tactile response capabilities.
