Abstract: We present Logical Robots, an interactive multi-agent simulation platform where autonomous robot behavior is specified declaratively in the logic programming language Logica. Robot behavior is defined by logical predicates that map observations from simulated radar arrays and shared memory to desired motor outputs. This approach allows low-level reactive control and high-level planning to coexist within a single programming environment, providing a coherent framework for exploring multi-agent robot behavior.

</details>


### [482] [Governance by Design: A Parsonian Institutional Architecture for Internet-Wide Agent Societies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11337)
*Anbang Ruan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 论文提出基于帕森斯AGIL框架的互联网范围智能体社会治理架构，诊断发现现有生态系统存在严重治理缺口，仅有技术基础设施而无有效治理机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前本地多智能体系统正被互联网范围的智能体社会取代，这些社会缺乏中央协调器，需要制度设计而非简单的风险枚举或流程合规来治理。

Method: 应用帕森斯的AGIL框架（适应、目标达成、整合、潜在模式维持）推导出16单元制度架构，通过递归子功能分析（64个二元指标）诊断OpenClaw生态系统，并扩展到更广泛的智能体原生协议栈。

Result: OpenClaw生态系统最多只有19%的子功能覆盖率（敏感范围17-30%），零个跨单元协调，12个跨支柱通路中零个功能正常；整个智能体原生协议栈呈现相同结构模式，确认治理缺口是市场驱动开发的特征而非生态系统不成熟。

Conclusion: 制度设计在社会模式固化前最有效，论文提出了缺失治理基础设施的优先路线图，强调需要建立协调层和规范基础，特别是受托和政治支柱最需要加强。

Abstract: The dominant paradigm of local multi-agent systems -- orchestrated, enterprise-bounded pipelines -- is being superseded by internet-wide agent societies in which autonomous agents discover each other through open registries, interact without central orchestrators, and generate emergent social behaviors. We argue that governing such societies requires institutional design, not merely risk enumeration or process compliance. Applying Talcott Parsons' AGIL framework -- four functional imperatives (Adaptation, Goal Attainment, Integration, Latency) every viable social system must satisfy -- we derive a prescriptive sixteen-cell institutional architecture for internet-wide agent governance. Diagnostically applied to the OpenClaw ecosystem (250,000+ GitHub stars, 2M+ monthly users, 770,000+ registered agents) via a recursive sub-function analysis (64 binary indicators across 16 cells), we find at most 19% sub-function coverage (sensitivity range 17-30%) -- potential rather than operative capacity, since zero inter-cell coordination prevents existing infrastructure from participating in inter-pillar interchange. A complementary interchange media assessment finds zero of twelve inter-pillar pathways functional: the ecosystem has technical infrastructure but no active governance, no coordination layer, and no normative grounding, with the Fiduciary and Political pillars most severely underserved. Extending the diagnostic to the broader agent-native protocol stack (MCP, A2A, ANP, x402, ERC-8004), independent development teams reproduce the same structural pattern -- confirming the governance gap is a feature of market-driven development, not ecosystem immaturity. Institutional design is most effective before social patterns calcify; we conclude with a prioritized roadmap for the missing governance infrastructure.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [483] [CBAM-Enhanced DenseNet121 for Multi-Class Chest X-Ray Classification with Grad-CAM Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12305)
*Utsho Kumar Dey*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出CBAM-DenseNet121框架，用于胸部X光三分类（正常、细菌性肺炎、病毒性肺炎），在资源受限的孟加拉国医疗环境中实现84.29%的测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肺炎是儿童死亡的主要原因，在孟加拉国等资源有限地区放射科医生稀缺。现有深度学习模型大多将肺炎检测视为二分类问题，忽略了细菌性和病毒性肺炎的临床关键区分。

Method: 提出CBAM-DenseNet121迁移学习框架，将卷积块注意力模块集成到DenseNet121中，用于胸部X光三分类。同时进行了系统性二分类基线研究，比较了EfficientNetB3和自定义CNN的性能。

Result: CBAM-DenseNet121达到84.29%±1.14%的测试准确率，细菌性肺炎、正常、病毒性肺炎的AUC分别为0.9565±0.0010、0.9610±0.0014、0.9187±0.0037。EfficientNetB3（73.88%）表现甚至不如自定义CNN基线（78.53%）。

Conclusion: CBAM-DenseNet121在资源受限的临床环境中表现出色，能够区分细菌性和病毒性肺炎，Grad-CAM可视化显示模型关注解剖学合理的肺部区域，支持可解释的临床应用。

Abstract: Pneumonia remains a leading cause of childhood mortality worldwide, with a heavy burden in low-resource settings such as Bangladesh where radiologist availability is limited. Most existing deep learning approaches treat pneumonia detection as a binary problem, overlooking the clinically critical distinction between bacterial and viral aetiology. This paper proposes CBAM-DenseNet121, a transfer-learning framework that integrates the Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) into DenseNet121 for three-class chest X-ray classification: Normal, Bacterial Pneumonia, and Viral Pneumonia. We also conduct a systematic binary-task baseline study revealing that EfficientNetB3 (73.88%) underperforms even the custom CNN baseline (78.53%) -- a practically important negative finding for medical imaging model selection. To ensure statistical reliability, all experiments were repeated three times with independent random seeds (42, 7, 123), and results are reported as mean +/- standard deviation. CBAM-DenseNet121 achieves 84.29% +/- 1.14% test accuracy with per-class AUC scores of 0.9565 +/- 0.0010, 0.9610 +/- 0.0014, and 0.9187 +/- 0.0037 for bacterial pneumonia, normal, and viral pneumonia respectively. Grad-CAM visualizations confirm that the model attends to anatomically plausible pulmonary regions for each class, supporting interpretable deployment in resource-constrained clinical environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [484] [CUTEv2: Unified and Configurable Matrix Extension for Diverse CPU Architectures with Minimal Design Overhead](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11615)
*Jinpeng Ye,Chongxi Wang,Wenqing Li,Bin Yuan,Shiyi Wang,Fenglu Zhang,Junyu Yue,Jianan Xie,Yunhao Ye,Haoyu Deng,Yingkun Zhou,Xin Cheng,Fuxin Zhang,Jian Wang*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出统一可配置的CPU矩阵扩展架构，通过解耦矩阵单元与CPU流水线实现低开销集成，支持混合精度运算和异步矩阵乘法抽象，在多个开源CPU平台上验证了高性能和跨平台适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CPU矩阵扩展设计存在硬件和软件开销大的问题：与CPU流水线紧耦合导致跨平台集成复杂，细粒度同步指令阻碍高性能内核开发。需要一种统一、可配置且易于集成的矩阵扩展架构来满足AI工作负载需求。

Method: 1. 将矩阵单元从CPU流水线解耦，保持与现有计算和内存资源的紧密协调；2. 设计可配置矩阵单元支持混合精度运算，适应不同计算需求和内存带宽限制；3. 采用灵活粒度的异步矩阵乘法抽象，隐藏硬件细节，简化矩阵-向量重叠，支持统一软件栈；4. 在四个开源CPU RTL平台上集成该架构。

Result: 1. GEMM工作负载下矩阵单元利用率超过90%；2. 在计算吞吐量和内存带宽与Intel AMX相当配置下，ResNet、BERT和Llama3分别获得1.57x、1.57x和2.31x加速，其中30%以上增益来自重叠矩阵-向量执行；3. 4 TOPS@2GHz矩阵单元在14nm CMOS中仅占0.53 mm²面积。

Conclusion: 该架构展示了强大的跨平台适应性和有效的软硬件协同优化，为开源社区提供了实用的矩阵扩展解决方案。解耦设计降低了集成复杂度，异步抽象简化了编程模型，可配置性适应了多样化AI工作负载需求。

Abstract: Matrix extensions have emerged as an essential feature in modern CPUs to address the surging demands of AI workloads. However, existing designs often incur substantial hardware and software design overhead. Tight coupling with the CPU pipeline complicates integration across diverse CPUs, while fine-grained synchronous instructions hinder the development of high-performance kernels.
  This paper proposes a unified and configurable CPU matrix extension architecture. By decoupling matrix units from the CPU pipeline, the design enables low-overhead integration while maintaining close coordination with existing compute and memory resources. The configurable matrix unit supports mixed-precision operations and adapts to diverse compute demands and memory bandwidth constraints. An asynchronous matrix multiplication abstraction with flexible granularity conceals hardware details, simplifies matrix-vector overlap, and supports a unified software stack.
  The architecture is integrated into four open-source CPU RTL platforms and evaluated on representative AI models. Matrix unit utilization under GEMM workloads exceeds 90% across all platforms. When configured with compute throughput and memory bandwidth comparable to Intel AMX, our design achieves speedups of 1.57x, 1.57x, and 2.31x on ResNet, BERT, and Llama3, with over 30% of the gains attributed to overlapped matrix-vector execution. A 4 TOPS@2GHz matrix unit occupies only 0.53 mm\textsuperscript{2} in 14nm CMOS. These results demonstrate strong cross-platform adaptability and effective hardware-software co-optimization, offering a practical matrix extension for the open-source community.

</details>


### [485] [CapBench: A Multi-PDK Dataset for Machine-Learning-Based Post-Layout Capacitance Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11202)
*Hector R. Rodriguez,Jiechen Huang,Wenjian Yu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: CapBench是一个完全可复现的多PDK电容提取数据集，基于开源设计生成，包含61,855个3D窗口，支持机器学习模型训练和基准测试。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为电容提取领域提供标准化、可复现的基准数据集，支持机器学习方法的研究和比较，解决现有数据缺乏和不可复现的问题。

Method: 从开源设计（CPU、SoC、媒体加速器）中提取布局，使用OpenROAD流程在三个工艺节点（ASAP7、NanGate45、Sky130HD）上完成布局布线，生成61,855个3D窗口，使用RWCap随机游走求解器生成高精度电容标签，并预处理为密度图、图表示和点云。

Result: 电容标签验证显示与行业标准Raphael的平均绝对误差为0.64%；评估10种机器学习架构，CNN表现最佳（误差1.75%），GNN速度最快（快41.4倍）但误差较大（10.2%），展示了精度与速度的权衡。

Conclusion: CapBench为电容提取的机器学习研究提供了全面、可复现的基准数据集，支持不同架构的性能比较和权衡分析，代码和数据集已开源。

Abstract: We present CapBench, a fully reproducible, multi-PDK dataset for capacitance extraction. The dataset is derived from open-source designs, including single-core CPUs, systems-on-chip, and media accelerators. All designs are fully placed and routed using 14 independent OpenROAD flow runs spanning three technology nodes: ASAP7, NanGate45, and Sky130HD. From these layouts, we extract 61,855 3D windows across three size tiers to enable transfer learning and scalability studies. High-fidelity capacitance labels are generated using RWCap, a state-of-the-art random-walk solver, and validated against the industry-standard Raphael, achieving a mean absolute error of 0.64% for total capacitance. Each window is pre-processed into density maps, graph representations, and point clouds. We evaluate 10 machine learning architectures that illustrate dataset usage and serve as baselines, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), point cloud transformers, and graph neural networks (GNNs). CNNs demonstrate the lowest errors (1.75%), while GNNs are up to 41.4x faster but exhibit larger errors (10.2%), illustrating a clear accuracy-speed trade-off. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/THU-numbda/CapBench.

</details>


### [486] [EdgeCIM: A Hardware-Software Co-Design for CIM-Based Acceleration of Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11512)
*Jinane Bazzi,Mariam Rakka,Fadi Kurdahi,Mohammed E. Fouda,Ahmed Eltawil*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: EdgeCIM是一个硬件-软件协同设计框架，通过计算内存(CIM)宏和分块映射策略优化边缘设备上小型语言模型(SLM)的推理性能，相比现有边缘加速器实现显著吞吐量和能效提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备部署小型语言模型的需求增长暴露了现有加速器的根本低效问题。GPU虽能高效处理预填充工作负载，但自回归解码阶段受限于内存绑定的GEMV操作，导致边缘设备上利用率低下和能耗过高。

Method: EdgeCIM采用硬件-软件协同设计框架，核心是65nm工艺实现的CIM宏，结合基于分块的映射策略平衡流水线阶段，最大化并行性同时缓解DRAM带宽瓶颈。通过模拟器支持高达40亿参数SLM的设计空间探索。

Result: 相比NVIDIA Orin Nano，EdgeCIM在LLaMA3.2-1B上实现高达7.3倍吞吐量和49.59倍能效提升；相比Qualcomm SA8255P在LLaMA3.2-3B上实现9.95倍吞吐量提升。在INT4精度下，平均达到336.42 tokens/s和173.02 tokens/J的性能。

Conclusion: EdgeCIM通过重新思考解码器专用推理的加速器设计，为实时、高能效的边缘规模SLM推理提供了有竞争力的解决方案。

Abstract: The growing demand for deploying Small Language Models (SLMs) on edge devices, including laptops, smartphones, and embedded platforms, has exposed fundamental inefficiencies in existing accelerators. While GPUs handle prefill workloads efficiently, the autoregressive decoding phase is dominated by GEMV operations that are inherently memory-bound, resulting in poor utilization and prohibitive energy costs at the edge. In this work, we present EdgeCIM, a hardware-software co-design framework that rethinks accelerator design for end-to-end decoder-only inference. At its core is a CIM macro, implemented in 65nm, coupled with a tile-based mapping strategy that balances pipeline stages, maximizing parallelism while alleviating DRAM bandwidth bottlenecks. Our simulator enables design space exploration of SLMs up to 4B parameters, identifying Pareto-optimal configurations in terms of latency and energy. Compared to an NVIDIA Orin Nano, EdgeCIM achieves up to 7.3x higher throughput and 49.59x better energy efficiency on LLaMA3.2-1B, and delivers 9.95x higher throughput than Qualcomm SA8255P on LLaMA3.2-3B. Extensive benchmarks on TinyLLaMA-1.1B, LLaMA3.2 (1B, 3B), Phi-3.5-mini-3.8B, Qwen2.5 (0.5B, 1.5B, 3B), SmolLM2-1.7B, SmolLM3-3B, and Qwen3 (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B) reveal that our accelerator, under INT4 precision, achieves on average 336.42 tokens/s and 173.02 tokens/J. These results establish EdgeCIM as a compelling solution towards real-time, energy-efficient edge-scale SLM inference.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.str-el'></div>

# cond-mat.str-el [[Back]](#toc)

### [487] [Machine-learning modeling of magnetization dynamics in quasi-equilibrium and driven metallic spin systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11513)
*Gia-Wei Chern,Yunhao Fan,Sheng Zhang,Puhan Zhang*

Main category: cond-mat.str-el

TL;DR: 本文综述了机器学习力场方法在金属自旋系统大规模Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert模拟中的最新进展，通过推广Behler-Parrinello架构并引入对称性磁描述符，实现了对巡游磁体中电子介导交换场的精确建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发可扩展、可迁移的机器学习模型，以准确捕捉巡游磁体中电子介导交换场对局部磁环境的复杂依赖关系，从而实现对大规模自旋系统的精确模拟。

Method: 将Behler-Parrinello机器学习架构推广到自旋系统，实现基于群论双谱形式主义的对称性磁描述符，构建能够学习保守和非保守电子扭矩的广义势理论框架。

Result: 机器学习力场成功再现了三角晶格中的120°和四面体非共线磁序，准确捕捉了方晶格双交换模型混合相态下的复杂自旋纹理，并实现了电压驱动畴壁运动的定量准确预测。

Conclusion: 该框架为量子精确的多尺度非平衡自旋动力学和自旋电子学功能建模奠定了基础，实现了从微观量子方法到宏观LLG模拟的有效桥接。

Abstract: We review recent advances in machine-learning (ML) force-field methods for large-scale Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (LLG) simulations of metallic spin systems. We generalize the Behler-Parrinello (BP) ML architecture -- originally developed for quantum molecular dynamics -- to construct scalable and transferable ML models capable of capturing the intricate dependence of electron-mediated exchange fields on the local magnetic environment characteristic of itinerant magnets. A central ingredient of this framework is the implementation of symmetry-aware magnetic descriptors based on group-theoretical bispectrum formalisms. Leveraging these ML force fields, LLG simulations faithfully reproduce hallmark non-collinear magnetic orders -- such as the $120^\circ$ and tetrahedral states -- on the triangular lattice, and successfully capture the complex spin textures emerging in the mixed-phase states of a square-lattice double-exchange model under thermal quench. We further discuss a generalized potential theory that extends the BP formalism to incorporate both conservative and nonconservative electronic torques, thereby enabling ML models to learn nonequilibrium exchange fields from computationally demanding microscopic approaches such as nonequilibrium Green's-function techniques. This extension yields quantitatively accurate predictions of voltage-driven domain-wall motion and establishes a foundation for quantum-accurate, multiscale modeling of nonequilibrium spin dynamics and spintronic functionalities.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [488] [Human Centered Non Intrusive Driver State Modeling Using Personalized Physiological Signals in Real World Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11549)
*David Puertas-Ramirez,Raul Fernandez-Matellan,David Martin Gomez,Jesus G. Boticario*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 个性化驾驶员状态监测在L2-L3级自动驾驶中的可行性研究，通过可穿戴设备采集生理信号并转换为二维图像表示，使用预训练ResNet50进行多模态分析，个性化模型准确率达92.68%，而通用模型仅54%，显示跨用户泛化能力有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在部分或有条件自动驾驶（SAE 2-3级）车辆中，驾驶员仍需监督系统并响应接管请求，因此可靠的驾驶员监测对安全的人机协作至关重要。现有驾驶员监测系统大多依赖忽略个体生理变异性的通用模型，需要探索个性化驾驶员状态建模的可行性。

Method: 在SAE 2级车辆中进行真实世界自动驾驶实验，使用Empatica E4可穿戴传感器采集多模态生理信号（皮肤电活动、心率、温度、运动数据）。将生理信号转换为二维表示，采用基于预训练ResNet50特征提取器的多模态架构进行深度学习分析，比较个性化模型与通用模型的性能。

Result: 四名驾驶员的实验显示驾驶员意识相关的生理模式存在显著个体间变异性。个性化模型平均准确率达92.68%，而训练在多个用户上的通用模型准确率降至54%，表明跨用户泛化能力存在实质性限制。

Conclusion: 研究结果强调了未来自动驾驶车辆需要自适应、个性化的驾驶员监测系统，暗示自主系统应适应每位驾驶员独特的生理特征，个性化方法在驾驶员状态监测中具有显著优势。

Abstract: In vehicles with partial or conditional driving automation (SAE Levels 2-3), the driver remains responsible for supervising the system and responding to take-over requests. Therefore, reliable driver monitoring is essential for safe human-automation collaboration. However, most existing Driver Monitoring Systems rely on generalized models that ignore individual physiological variability. In this study, we examine the feasibility of personalized driver state modeling using non-intrusive physiological sensing during real-world automated driving. We conducted experiments in an SAE Level 2 vehicle using an Empatica E4 wearable sensor to capture multimodal physiological signals, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, temperature, and motion data. To leverage deep learning architectures designed for images, we transformed the physiological signals into two-dimensional representations and processed them using a multimodal architecture based on pre-trained ResNet50 feature extractors. Experiments across four drivers demonstrate substantial interindividual variability in physiological patterns related to driver awareness. Personalized models achieved an average accuracy of 92.68%, whereas generalized models trained on multiple users dropped to an accuracy of 54%, revealing substantial limitations in cross-user generalization. These results underscore the necessity of adaptive, personalized driver monitoring systems for future automated vehicles and imply that autonomous systems should adapt to each driver's unique physiological profile.

</details>


### [489] [Teaching Robots to Interpret Social Interactions through Lexically-guided Dynamic Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10895)
*Tongfei Bian,Mathieu Chollet,Tanaya Guha*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: SocialLDG：一种多任务学习框架，通过动态图学习建模人类内部状态与可观察行为之间的动态关系，赋予机器人社交智能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为使机器人具备社交智能，需要能够从用户当前行为推断其内部状态、预测未来行为并做出适当响应。现有方法未能充分建模内部状态（潜在）与行为（可观察状态）之间的动态关系，这些状态源于相同的社会认知过程并相互影响。

Method: 提出SocialLDG多任务学习框架：1）将六个不同任务表示为状态；2）使用语言模型为每个任务引入词汇先验；3）采用动态图学习建模随时间演化的任务亲和性；4）显式建模状态间的动态关系。

Result: 1）在两个公开的人类-机器人社交交互数据集上达到最先进性能；2）支持强大的任务可扩展性，能够无缝学习新任务而不会发生灾难性遗忘；3）通过显式建模任务亲和性，揭示了不同交互如何随时间展开以及内部状态和可观察行为如何在人类决策中相互影响。

Conclusion: SocialLDG通过建模内部状态与可观察行为之间的动态关系，有效赋予机器人社交智能。该框架在性能、可扩展性和可解释性方面均表现出色，为理解人类决策过程和机器人社交交互提供了新视角。

Abstract: For a robot to be called socially intelligent, it must be able to infer users internal states from their current behaviour, predict the users future behaviour, and if required, respond appropriately. In this work, we investigate how robots can be endowed with such social intelligence by modelling the dynamic relationship between user's internal states (latent) and actions (observable state). Our premise is that these states arise from the same underlying socio-cognitive process and influence each other dynamically. Drawing inspiration from theories in Cognitive Science, we propose a novel multi-task learning framework, termed as \textbf{SocialLDG} that explicitly models the dynamic relationship among the states represent as six distinct tasks. Our framework uses a language model to introduce lexical priors for each task and employs dynamic graph learning to model task affinity evolving with time. SocialLDG has three advantages: First, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on two challenging human-robot social interaction datasets available publicly. Second, it supports strong task scalability by learning new tasks seamlessly without catastrophic forgetting. Finally, benefiting from explicit modelling task affinity, it offers insights on how different interactions unfolds in time and how the internal states and observable actions influence each other in human decision making.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.QM'></div>

# q-bio.QM [[Back]](#toc)

### [490] [Evaluating the Limitations of Protein Sequence Representations for Parkinson's Disease Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11852)
*César Jesús Núñez-Prado,Grigori Sidorov,Liliana Chanona-Hernández*

Main category: q-bio.QM

TL;DR: 该研究系统评估了仅基于蛋白质一级序列的多种表示方法对帕金森病的分类性能，发现所有方法都只能达到中等区分能力，表明一级序列信息本身对复杂疾病分类的判别力有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 帕金森病作为多因素疾病，其可靠分子标志物的识别具有挑战性。虽然蛋白质序列是基础且广泛可得的生物信息源，但其单独用于复杂疾病分类的判别能力尚不明确，需要系统评估。

Method: 采用无泄漏的受控评估框架，比较了仅基于蛋白质一级序列的多种表示方法：氨基酸组成、k-mers、理化描述符、混合表示以及蛋白质语言模型嵌入。所有方法在嵌套分层交叉验证框架下评估，确保无偏性能估计。

Result: 最佳配置（ProtBERT + MLP）的F1分数为0.704±0.028，ROC-AUC为0.748±0.047，仅达到中等判别性能。经典表示如k-mers达到类似F1值（约0.667），但表现出高度不平衡行为（召回率约0.98，精确率约0.50）。所有表示的性能差异很小（F1在0.60-0.70之间），无监督分析显示没有与类别标签对齐的内在结构，统计检验也未发现模型间显著差异。

Conclusion: 蛋白质一级序列信息单独对帕金森病分类的判别能力有限，表明类别间存在显著重叠。该研究建立了可重复的基线，并提供经验证据表明需要更丰富的生物特征（如结构、功能或基于相互作用的描述符）来实现稳健的疾病建模。

Abstract: The identification of reliable molecular biomarkers for Parkinson's disease remains challenging due to its multifactorial nature. Although protein sequences constitute a fundamental and widely available source of biological information, their standalone discriminative capacity for complex disease classification remains unclear. In this work, we present a controlled and leakage-free evaluation of multiple representations derived exclusively from protein primary sequences, including amino acid composition, k-mers, physicochemical descriptors, hybrid representations, and embeddings from protein language models, all assessed under a nested stratified cross-validation framework to ensure unbiased performance estimation. The best-performing configuration (ProtBERT + MLP) achieves an F1-score of 0.704 +/- 0.028 and ROC-AUC of 0.748 +/- 0.047, indicating only moderate discriminative performance. Classical representations such as k-mers reach comparable F1 values (up to approximately 0.667), but exhibit highly imbalanced behavior, with recall close to 0.98 and precision around 0.50, reflecting a strong bias toward positive predictions. Across representations, performance differences remain within a narrow range (F1 between 0.60 and 0.70), while unsupervised analyses reveal no intrinsic structure aligned with class labels, and statistical testing (Friedman test, p = 0.1749) does not indicate significant differences across models. These results demonstrate substantial overlap between classes and indicate that primary sequence information alone provides limited discriminative power for Parkinson's disease classification. This work establishes a reproducible baseline and provides empirical evidence that more informative biological features, such as structural, functional, or interaction-based descriptors, are required for robust disease modeling.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [491] [Transformer Based Machine Fault Detection From Audio Input](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12733)
*Kiran Voderhobli Holla*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 比较Transformer和CNN在基于声音的机器故障检测任务中的表现，证明Transformer架构在声音数据分析中的有效性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CNN虽然在实际应用中表现良好，但其局部性和参数共享等归纳偏置可能不完全适用于声谱图分析。随着Transformer在图像处理领域的成功应用，研究者希望利用其更低的归纳偏置来提升声音数据分析的性能。

Method: 使用基于Transformer的架构分析声音数据，并与传统CNN方法进行比较，特别关注它们在机器故障检测任务中生成的嵌入表示。

Result: 论文展示了Transformer驱动架构在声音数据分析中的有效性，并比较了Transformer和CNN生成的嵌入表示在机器故障检测任务中的表现差异。

Conclusion: Transformer架构在声音数据分析中具有优势，特别是在有足够数据的情况下，其较低的归纳偏置使其在声谱图分析任务中可能优于CNN。

Abstract: In recent years, Sound AI is being increasingly used to predict machine failures. By attaching a microphone to the machine of interest, one can get real time data on machine behavior from the field. Traditionally, Convolutional Neural Net (CNN) architectures have been used to analyze spectrogram images generated from the sounds captured and predict if the machine is functioning as expected. CNN architectures seem to work well empirically even though they have biases like locality and parameter-sharing which may not be completely relevant for spectrogram analysis. With the successful application of transformer-based models in the field of image processing starting with Vision Transformer (ViT) in 2020, there has been significant interest in leveraging these in the field of Sound AI. Since transformer-based architectures have significantly lower inductive biases, they are expected to perform better than CNNs at spectrogram analysis given enough data. This paper demonstrates the effectiveness of transformer-driven architectures in analyzing Sound data and compares the embeddings they generate with CNNs on the specific task of machine fault detection.

</details>


### [492] [Audio Source Separation in Reverberant Environments using $β$-divergence based Nonnegative Factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12480)
*Mahmoud Fakhry,Piergiorgio Svaizer,Maurizio Omologo*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于非负分解的改进多通道音频源分离方法，通过先验信息控制稀疏性来提高分离性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于高斯模型的多通道音频源分离方法通过期望最大化算法估计参数，但缺乏对源信号方差先验信息的有效利用，分离性能有待提升。

Method: 提出基于非负分解的参数估计方法：1）利用源方差先验信息定义谱基矩阵；2）通过非负张量分解提取或检测最佳表示源信号功率谱的基矩阵；3）通过乘法更新规则最小化β散度实现分解，通过调整β值控制分解稀疏性。

Result: 实验表明：稀疏性（而非训练中β的具体取值）对提升分离性能至关重要；在多种混合条件下，该方法相比其他可比算法提供了更好的分离质量。

Conclusion: 基于非负分解并利用先验信息控制稀疏性的方法能有效提高多通道音频源分离性能，稀疏性是影响分离效果的关键因素。

Abstract: In Gaussian model-based multichannel audio source separation, the likelihood of observed mixtures of source signals is parametrized by source spectral variances and by associated spatial covariance matrices. These parameters are estimated by maximizing the likelihood through an Expectation-Maximization algorithm and used to separate the signals by means of multichannel Wiener filtering.
  We propose to estimate these parameters by applying nonnegative factorization based on prior information on source variances. In the nonnegative factorization, spectral basis matrices can be defined as the prior information. The matrices can be either extracted or indirectly made available through a redundant library that is trained in advance. In a separate step, applying nonnegative tensor factorization, two algorithms are proposed in order to either extract or detect the basis matrices that best represent the power spectra of the source signals in the observed mixtures. The factorization is achieved by minimizing the $β$-divergence through multiplicative update rules. The sparsity of factorization can be controlled by tuning the value of $β$.
  Experiments show that sparsity, rather than the value assigned to $β$ in the training, is crucial in order to increase the separation performance. The proposed method was evaluated in several mixing conditions. It provides better separation quality with respect to other comparable algorithms.

</details>


### [493] [Audio-Omni: Extending Multi-modal Understanding to Versatile Audio Generation and Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10708)
*Zeyue Tian,Binxin Yang,Zhaoyang Liu,Jiexuan Zhang,Ruibin Yuan,Hubery Yin,Qifeng Chen,Chen Li,Jing Lv,Wei Xue,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: Audio-Omni：首个端到端统一框架，在通用声音、音乐和语音领域整合生成与编辑，具备多模态理解能力，通过冻结多模态大语言模型和可训练扩散变换器实现，并在大规模AudioEdit数据集上训练，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态模型在音频理解、生成和编辑方面取得进展，但这些能力通常由专门化模型处理，缺乏能够无缝整合所有三个任务的真正统一框架。现有工作虽然探索了音频理解与生成的统一，但往往局限于特定领域。

Method: 提出Audio-Omni框架，结合冻结的多模态大语言模型（用于高级推理）和可训练的扩散变换器（用于高保真合成）。为解决音频编辑数据稀缺问题，构建了包含超过100万精心策划编辑对的大规模AudioEdit数据集。

Result: Audio-Omni在一系列基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，超越了先前的统一方法，同时达到或优于专门化专家模型的性能。此外，框架展现出知识增强推理生成、上下文生成和零样本跨语言音频生成控制等继承能力。

Conclusion: Audio-Omni为通用生成音频智能提供了有前景的方向，首次在通用声音、音乐和语音领域实现了生成与编辑的统一，具备多模态理解能力，展示了强大的性能和扩展能力。

Abstract: Recent progress in multimodal models has spurred rapid advances in audio understanding, generation, and editing. However, these capabilities are typically addressed by specialized models, leaving the development of a truly unified framework that can seamlessly integrate all three tasks underexplored. While some pioneering works have explored unifying audio understanding and generation, they often remain confined to specific domains. To address this, we introduce Audio-Omni, the first end-to-end framework to unify generation and editing across general sound, music, and speech domains, with integrated multi-modal understanding capabilities. Our architecture synergizes a frozen Multimodal Large Language Model for high-level reasoning with a trainable Diffusion Transformer for high-fidelity synthesis. To overcome the critical data scarcity in audio editing, we construct AudioEdit, a new large-scale dataset comprising over one million meticulously curated editing pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Audio-Omni achieves state-of-the-art performance across a suite of benchmarks, outperforming prior unified approaches while achieving performance on par with or superior to specialized expert models. Beyond its core capabilities, Audio-Omni exhibits remarkable inherited capabilities, including knowledge-augmented reasoning generation, in-context generation, and zero-shot cross-lingual control for audio generation, highlighting a promising direction toward universal generative audio intelligence. The code, model, and dataset will be publicly released on https://zeyuet.github.io/Audio-Omni.

</details>


### [494] [Multimodal Dataset Normalization and Perceptual Validation for Music-Taste Correspondences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10632)
*Matteo Spanio,Valentina Frezzato,Antonio Rodà*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 该研究通过两个互补实验验证了音频-风味关联在不同监督机制下的可迁移性，并证实了基于食品化学的计算风味目标与人类感知的一致性，为跨模态AI研究提供了可复现的数据集和代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音乐风味研究面临大规模对齐跨模态数据集收集困难的问题，因为感知实验成本高且规模小。本研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，验证音频-风味关联在不同数据集间的可迁移性，并评估计算风味目标与人类感知的一致性。

Method: 采用两个互补实验：1）测试音频-风味相关性、特征重要性排序和潜在因子结构从实验性音轨集（257条带人工标注）到大规模FMA衍生语料库（约49,300个片段带合成标签）的迁移性；2）通过在线听众研究（49名参与者，20条音轨）验证基于食品化学的可复现管道生成的计算风味目标与人类感知的一致性。

Result: 两个实验结果一致：定量迁移分析证实跨模态结构在不同监督机制下得以保持；感知评估显示计算目标与听众评分显著对齐（置换检验p<0.0001，Mantel r=0.45，Procrustes m²=0.51）。这些发现支持合成FMA标注中存在声音调味效应。

Conclusion: 研究证实了音频-风味关联在不同监督机制下的可迁移性，以及计算风味目标与人类感知的一致性。作者发布了数据集和配套代码以支持可复现的跨模态AI研究，为音乐风味研究提供了可扩展的方法论基础。

Abstract: Collecting large, aligned cross-modal datasets for music-flavor research is difficult because perceptual experiments are costly and small by design. We address this bottleneck through two complementary experiments. The first tests whether audio-flavor correlations, feature-importance rankings, and latent-factor structure transfer from an experimental soundtracks collection (257~tracks with human annotations) to a large FMA-derived corpus ($\sim$49,300 segments with synthetic labels). The second validates computational flavor targets -- derived from food chemistry via a reproducible pipeline -- against human perception in an online listener study (49~participants, 20~tracks). Results from both experiments converge: the quantitative transfer analysis confirms that cross-modal structure is preserved across supervision regimes, and the perceptual evaluation shows significant alignment between computational targets and listener ratings (permutation $p<0.0001$, Mantel $r=0.45$, Procrustes $m^2=0.51$). Together, these findings support the conclusion that sonic seasoning effects are present in synthetic FMA annotations. We release datasets and companion code to support reproducible cross-modal AI research.

</details>


<div id='math.ST'></div>

# math.ST [[Back]](#toc)

### [495] [On Higher-Order Geometric Refinements of Classical Covariance Asymptotics: An Approach via Intrinsic and Extrinsic Information Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12725)
*Malik Amir,Sourangshu Ghosh*

Main category: math.ST

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于黎曼几何的曲率感知协方差修正理论，用于改进经典Fisher信息渐近性在弯曲模型中的局限性，并扩展到奇异模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典Fisher信息渐近性仅捕捉一阶几何，在弯曲模型（如混合模型、弯曲指数族、潜变量模型等）中，有限样本行为会系统性偏离这些预测。需要一种坐标不变、曲率感知的修正方法。

Method: 将正则参数族视为具有Fisher-Rao度量的黎曼流形(Θ,g)，通过平方根密度映射浸入L^2(μ)空间。在正则性和矩假设下，推导出对n^{-1}I(θ)^{-1}协方差项的n^{-2}阶修正。修正由张量P_{ij}控制，可分解为三部分：Fisher-Rao曲率张量的内蕴Ricci型收缩、第二基本形式的外蕴Gram型收缩，以及编码高阶概率信息的Hellinger差异张量。

Result: 外蕴项是半正定的，完整修正在光滑重参数化下不变，且在完整指数族中恒为零。将框架扩展到奇异模型，在加法正规交叉假设下使用奇点解消，描述了解析度量、实对数正则阈值在学习率和后验均方误差中的作用，以及在解析空间上的曲率基协方差展开。

Conclusion: 该框架为弱可识别性提供了几何诊断工具，并提出了曲率感知的正则化和优化原则，将经典理论作为特例包含在内，为弯曲和奇异模型的统计推断提供了更精确的几何理论。

Abstract: Classical Fisher-information asymptotics describe the covariance of regular efficient estimators through the local quadratic approximation of the log-likelihood, and thus capture first-order geometry only. In curved models, including mixtures, curved exponential families, latent-variable models, and manifold-constrained parameter spaces, finite-sample behavior can deviate systematically from these predictions. We develop a coordinate-invariant, curvature-aware refinement by viewing a regular parametric family as a Riemannian manifold \((Θ,g)\) with Fisher--Rao metric, immersed in \(L^2(μ)\) through the square-root density map. Under suitable regularity and moment assumptions, we derive an \(n^{-2}\) correction to the leading \(n^{-1}I(θ)^{-1}\) covariance term for score-root, first-order efficient estimators. The correction is governed by a tensor \(P_{ij}\) that decomposes canonically into three parts, an intrinsic Ricci-type contraction of the Fisher--Rao curvature tensor, an extrinsic Gram-type contraction of the second fundamental form, and a Hellinger discrepancy tensor encoding higher-order probabilistic information not determined by immersion geometry alone. The extrinsic term is positive semidefinite, the full correction is invariant under smooth reparameterization, and it vanishes identically for full exponential families. We then extend the picture to singular models, where Fisher information degenerates. Using resolution of singularities under an additive normal crossing assumption, we describe the resolved metric, the role of the real log canonical threshold in learning rates and posterior mean-squared error, and a curvature-based covariance expansion on the resolved space that recovers the regular theory as a special case. This framework also suggests geometric diagnostics of weak identifiability and curvature-aware principles for regularization and optimization.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.mtrl-sci'></div>

# cond-mat.mtrl-sci [[Back]](#toc)

### [496] [Agentic LLM Reasoning in a Self-Driving Laboratory for Air-Sensitive Lithium Halide Spinel Conductors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11957)
*Yuxing Fei,Bernardus Rendy,Xiaochen Yang,Junhee Woo,Xu Huang,Chang Li,Shilong Wang,David Milsted,Yan Zeng,Gerbrand Ceder*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

TL;DR: A-Lab GPSS是首个能在严格无氧条件下自主合成和表征空气敏感无机材料的机器人平台，通过集成智能AI框架探索锂卤化物尖晶石固态离子导体，成功实现了72%的金属组合合成，并显著提高了高离子电导率材料的发现率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动化固态合成平台仅限于环境条件，无法处理空气敏感材料，这限制了材料发现的广度和深度。需要开发能在严格无氧条件下工作的自主实验平台来加速空气敏感材料的发现。

Method: 开发了A-Lab GPSS机器人平台，集成智能AI框架实现自主实验设计。平台采用溯因推理和归纳推理相结合的策略：溯因推理用于分析已探索区域的异常观察，归纳推理用于扩展到新的化学空间。在锂卤化物尖晶石固态离子导体研究中，系统探索了352个不同组成的样品。

Result: 在171种可能的金属组合中，实验实现了72%的组合合成。在整个研究过程中，同时具有良好离子电导率(>0.05 mS/cm)和高卤化物尖晶石相纯度的组成比例从最初75个AI提议样品的1.33%增加到最后75个样品的5.33%。AI推理过程显示出互补的发现策略。

Conclusion: A-Lab GPSS建立了一个可扩展的平台，能够自主发现复杂的空气敏感固态材料。通过结合溯因和归纳推理的AI框架，系统不仅能深入分析已探索区域，还能有效扩展到新的化学空间，显著提高了高性能材料的发现效率。

Abstract: Self-driving laboratories promise to accelerate materials discovery. Yet current automated solid-state synthesis platforms are limited to ambient conditions, thereby precluding their use for air-sensitive materials. Here, we present A-Lab for Glovebox Powder Solid-state Synthesis (A-Lab GPSS), a robotic platform capable of synthesizing and characterizing air-sensitive inorganic materials under strict air-free conditions. By integrating an agentic AI framework into the A-Lab GPSS platform, we structure autonomous experimental design through abductive and inductive reasoning. We deploy this platform to explore the vast compositional space of lithium halide spinel solid-state ionic conductors. Across a synthesis campaign comprising 352 samples with diverse compositions, the system explores a broad chemical space, experimentally realizing 72% of the 171 possible pairwise combinations among the 19 metals considered in this study. Over the course of the campaign, the fraction of compositions exhibiting both good ionic conductivity (> 0.05 mS/cm) and high halide spinel phase purity increases from 1.33% in the first 75 agent-proposed samples to 5.33% in the final 75. Furthermore, by inspecting the AI's reasoning processes, we reveal distinct yet complementary discovery strategies: abductive reasoning interrogates abnormal observations within already explored regions, whereas inductive reasoning expands the search into broader, previously unvisited chemical space. This work establishes a scalable platform for the autonomous discovery of complex, air-sensitive solid-state materials.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [497] [Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08099)
*Alessandro Melis,Soulaimane Berkane,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性向量仅沿特定体坐标系向量部分观测的情况，通过修改创新项实现几乎全局渐近稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当惯性向量无法完全观测而只能沿特定体坐标系向量测量时，需要处理标量测量问题。这种情况出现在不完整向量测量或来自异构传感器信息的姿态约束中，需要开发适用于标量输出结构的姿态估计算法。

Method: 基于SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器，提出了一种具有修改创新项的观测器，专门针对标量输出结构设计。当至少三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，在适当的持续激励条件下恢复几乎全局渐近稳定性。

Result: 对于两种标量配置（一个惯性向量沿两个体坐标系向量测量，或两个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量），推导了保证收敛于减小吸引域的充分条件。数值结果证明了该方法在挑战性场景中的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于标量的互补滤波器为涉及减少传感和/或新型传感模式的姿态估计问题提供了有效解决方案，扩展了传统向量测量方法的适用范围。

Abstract: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

</details>


### [498] [Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07970)
*Kevin Riehl,Julius Schlapbach,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过不可交易的信用记录智能体历史合作行为，在有限通信下实现公平协调


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式最优求解器计算复杂度指数级增长，难以扩展到大规模系统和实时应用；现有去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但导致次优结果和高成本差异

Method: 基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架，将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，智能体通过成对重规划解决冲突，Karma作为不可交易信用记录历史合作行为并调节未来冲突决策

Result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取送场景中，Karma机制平衡了智能体间的重规划工作量，减少了服务时间差异而不牺牲整体效率

Conclusion: Karma机制为去中心化多智能体路径规划提供了一种有效的公平协调方法，在有限通信和无全局优先级结构下实现长期公平性

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

</details>


### [499] [Generative Design for Direct-to-Chip Liquid Cooling for Data Centers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10941)
*Zheng Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于生成式设计和物理模型的框架，为NVIDIA GB200 Grace Blackwell Superchip优化冷板通道布局，相比基线设计降低平均温度5°C以上、最大温度35°C以上


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI工作负载快速增长导致数据中心功率密度上升，需要先进热管理技术。直接芯片液冷虽能高效散热，但现有冷板通道布局多基于启发式设计，未针对现代异构封装的不均匀温度分布进行优化

Method: 开发生成式设计框架，结合基于物理的有限差分热模型（提供快速稳态温度预测）和约束反应扩散过程（生成新颖通道拓扑），在闭环迭代中重新分配冷却能力到高功率区域

Result: 相比基线平行通道设计，生成通道实现平均温度降低超过5°C，最大温度降低超过35°C，有效抑制热点形成

Conclusion: 生成式算法与轻量级物理建模相结合能显著提升直接芯片液冷性能，支持AI计算更可持续的扩展

Abstract: Rapid growth in artificial intelligence (AI) workloads is driving up data center power densities, increasing the need for advanced thermal management. Direct-to-chip liquid cooling can remove heat efficiently at the source, but many cold plate channel layouts remain heuristic and are not optimized for the strongly non-uniform temperature distribution of modern heterogeneous packages. This work presents a generative design framework for synthesizing cooling channel geometries for the NVIDIA GB200 Grace Blackwell Superchip. A physics-based finite-difference thermal model provides rapid steady-state temperature predictions and supplies spatial thermal feedback to a constrained reaction-diffusion process that generates novel channel topologies while enforcing inlet/outlet and component constraints. By iterating channel generation and thermal evaluation in a closed loop, the method naturally redistributes cooling capacity toward high-power regions and suppresses hot-spot formation. Compared with a baseline parallel channel design, the resulting channels achieve more than a 5 degree Celsius reduction in average temperature and over 35 degree Celsius reduction in maximum temperature. Overall, the results demonstrate that coupling generative algorithms with lightweight physics-based modeling can significantly enhance direct-to-chip liquid cooling performance, supporting more sustainable scaling of AI computing.

</details>


### [500] [eVTOL Aircraft Energy Overhead Estimation under Conflict Resolution in High-Density Airspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06093)
*Alex Zongo,Peng Wei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: MVP冲突解决算法对eVTOL能耗影响有限：中位数能耗开销低于1.5%，但分布右偏，高密度时尾部案例可达44%开销，95%分位数在3.84%-5.3%之间，建议预留4-5%能量储备。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高密度城市空域中eVTOL飞机需要通过战术冲突解决保持安全间隔，但此类机动对能耗的影响尚未得到系统量化。研究旨在评估MVP算法下的冲突解决机动对eVTOL能耗的具体影响。

Method: 将基于物理的功率模型集成到交通仿真中，分析一个扇区内约71,767个航路段，覆盖10-60架同时飞行飞机的交通密度。开发机器学习模型在任务开始时估计能耗开销，提供点估计和不确定性边界。

Result: MVP冲突解决具有能源效率：所有密度水平下中位数能耗开销均低于1.5%，扇区内大多数航段开销可忽略。但分布呈现明显右偏，高密度时尾部案例可达44%开销，95%分位数在3.84%-5.3%之间。机器学习模型的不确定性边界保守，实际结果落在预测范围内的频率高于声明的置信水平。

Conclusion: MVP算法适用于能源受限的eVTOL运行，研究结果为先进空中交通的储备能量确定提供了定量指导，建议4-5%的储备裕度可覆盖绝大多数战术冲突解决场景。

Abstract: Electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft operating in high-density urban airspace must maintain safe separation through tactical conflict resolution, yet the energy cost of such maneuvers has not been systematically quantified. This paper investigates how conflict-resolution maneuvers under the Modified Voltage Potential (MVP) algorithm affect eVTOL energy consumption. Using a physics-based power model integrated within a traffic simulation, we analyze approximately 71,767 en route sections within a sector, across traffic densities of 10-60 simultaneous aircraft. The main finding is that MVP-based deconfliction is energy-efficient: median energy overhead remains below 1.5% across all density levels, and the majority of en route flights within the sector incur negligible penalty. However, the distribution exhibits pronounced right-skewness, with tail cases reaching 44% overhead at the highest densities due to sustained multi-aircraft conflicts. The 95th percentile ranges from 3.84% to 5.3%, suggesting that a 4-5% reserve margin accommodates the vast majority of tactical deconfliction scenarios. To support operational planning, we develop a machine learning model that estimates energy overhead at mission initiation. Because conflict outcomes depend on future traffic interactions that cannot be known in advance, the model provides both point estimates and uncertainty bounds. These bounds are conservative; actual outcomes fall within the predicted range more often than the stated confidence level, making them suitable for safety-critical reserve planning. Together, these results validate MVP's suitability for energy-constrained eVTOL operations and provide quantitative guidance for reserve energy determination in Advanced Air Mobility.

</details>


### [501] [Synchronous Observer Design for Landmark-Inertial SLAM with Magnetometer and Intermittent GNSS Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05156)
*Arkadeep Saha,Pieter van Goor,Ravi Banavar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种非线性观测器用于地标-惯性SLAM，通过间歇性GNSS位置和磁力计测量克服可观测性限制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在传统的地标-惯性SLAM中，机器人和地标在惯性坐标系中的绝对位置以及机器人的偏航角是不可观测的，这限制了系统的实际应用

Method: 设计非线性观测器，结合间歇性GNSS位置测量和磁力计测量来增强系统的可观测性

Result: 所提观测器的全状态误差动态被证明是几乎全局渐近稳定且局部指数稳定的，并通过仿真验证了性能

Conclusion: 通过引入间歇性GNSS和磁力计测量，成功解决了LI-SLAM中的可观测性问题，实现了稳定可靠的状态估计

Abstract: In Landmark-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (LI-SLAM), the positions of landmarks in the environment and the robot's pose relative to these landmarks are estimated using landmark position measurements, and measurements from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). However, the robot and landmark positions in the inertial frame, and the yaw of the robot, are not observable in LI-SLAM. This paper proposes a nonlinear observer for LI-SLAM that overcomes the observability constraints with the addition of intermittent GNSS position and magnetometer measurements. The full-state error dynamics of the proposed observer is shown to be both almost-globally asymptotically stable and locally exponentially stable, and this is validated using simulations.

</details>


### [502] [Finite-Step Invariant Sets for Hybrid Systems with Probabilistic Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05102)
*Varun Madabushi,Elizabeth Dietrich,Hanna Krasowski,Maegan Tucker*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于采样优化的算法框架，计算混合动力系统周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球体，提供概率保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Poincare返回映射是分析混合动力系统周期轨道的基本工具，但计算不变集在仅通过前向模拟获得系统动力学时计算困难，需要评估对扰动的鲁棒性

Method: 提出算法框架，利用基于采样的优化方法，通过返回映射的采样评估计算名义周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球体

Result: 方法在两个低维系统和一个指南针步态行走模型上得到验证，结果伴随满足用户定义精度阈值的有限步不变性的概率保证

Conclusion: 该框架为混合动力系统周期轨道的鲁棒性分析提供了有效的计算方法，特别适用于仅通过模拟获得系统动力学的情况

Abstract: Poincare return maps are a fundamental tool for analyzing periodic orbits in hybrid dynamical systems, including legged locomotion, power electronics, and other cyber-physical systems with switching behavior. The Poincare return map captures the evolution of the hybrid system on a guard surface, reducing the stability analysis of a periodic orbit to that of a discrete-time system. While linearization provides local stability information, assessing robustness to disturbances requires identifying invariant sets of the state space under the return dynamics. However, computing such invariant sets is computationally difficult, especially when system dynamics are only available through forward simulation. In this work, we propose an algorithmic framework leveraging sampling-based optimization to compute a finite-step invariant ellipsoid around a nominal periodic orbit using sampled evaluations of the return map. The resulting solution is accompanied by probabilistic guarantees on finite-step invariance satisfying a user-defined accuracy threshold. We demonstrate the approach on two low-dimensional systems and a compass-gait walking model.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [503] [Data-driven Reachable Set Estimation with Tunable Adversarial and Wasserstein Distributional Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12654)
*Georgios Pantazis,Michelle S. Chong*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究未知离散时间动力系统的有限时域可达集估计，基于采样状态轨迹，通过定制化场景优化方法，在保持轨迹包含概率保证的同时，实现可达集大小与异常值敏感性的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统场景优化方法在处理可达集估计问题时存在局限性，需要针对基于完整轨迹的集合族学习问题进行专门设计，同时需要处理异常值、对抗扰动和概率分布偏移等实际挑战。

Method: 提出松弛场景规划方法，引入松弛变量实现可达集大小与轨迹包含概率的权衡；利用对抗鲁棒场景优化理论处理有界对抗扰动；基于Wasserstein距离分析概率分布偏移下的性能退化边界；针对不同几何结构（p-范数球、椭球、zonotope）推导可处理的凸重构形式。

Result: 获得了未来轨迹包含的后验概率保证；推导了在概率分布偏移下理论保证的优雅退化边界；针对不同几何结构得到了可计算的凸优化重构；通过仿真验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 该研究为未知动力系统的可达集估计提供了一种基于场景优化的系统化框架，能够处理异常值、对抗扰动和分布偏移，并在不同几何结构下保持计算可行性，具有理论和实际应用价值。

Abstract: We study finite horizon reachable set estimation for unknown discrete-time dynamical systems using only sampled state trajectories. Rather than treating scenario optimization as a black-box tool, we show how it can be tailored to reachable set estimation, where one must learn a family of sets based on whole trajectories, while preserving probabilistic guarantees on future trajectory inclusion for the entire horizon. To this end, we formulate a relaxed scenario program with slack variables that yields a tunable trade-off between reachable set size and out-of-sample trajectory inclusion over the horizon, thereby reducing sensitivity to outliers. Leveraging the recent results in adversarially robust scenario optimization, we then extend this formulation to account for bounded adversarial perturbations of the observed trajectories and derive a posteriori probabilistic guarantees on future trajectory inclusion. When probability distribution shifts in the Wasserstein distance occur, we obtain an explicit bound on how gracefully the theoretical probabilistic guarantees degrade. For different geometries, i.e., $p$-norm balls, ellipsoids, and zonotopes, we derive tractable convex reformulations and corroborate our theoretical results in simulation.

</details>


### [504] [Computation of Least Trimmed Squares: A Branch-and-Bound framework with Hyperplane Arrangement Enhancements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11584)
*Xiang Meng,Andrés Gómez,Rahul Mazumder*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种新的混合整数优化（MIO）公式，用于求解惩罚最小截断平方（LTS）回归问题，通过超平面排列逻辑和透视重构，在特征数固定时实现多项式规模的搜索树，显著提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 惩罚最小截断平方（LTS）回归是一种稳健的统计估计方法，能够通过截断大残差来减轻异常值的影响。尽管统计性能优越，但该问题是NP难的，现有混合整数优化（MIO）方法由于松弛弱和指数级最坏情况复杂度而难以扩展到大规模数据集。

Method: 提出新的MIO公式，将超平面排列逻辑嵌入透视重构中，显式强制执行最优解的结构特性。开发定制化的分支定界算法，使用一阶方法和对偶界高效求解节点松弛问题。

Result: 理论证明：当特征数固定时，分支定界树的大小是样本量的多项式规模。计算实验显示显著改进：在5000个样本、20个特征的合成实例上，定制求解器在1分钟内达到1%的间隙，而现有方法在1小时内无法实现。

Conclusion: 新方法使精确稳健回归能够在低维设置下处理显著更大规模的样本，为大规模稳健统计计算提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: We study computational aspects of a key problem in robust statistics -- the penalized least trimmed squares (LTS) regression problem, a robust estimator that mitigates the influence of outliers in data by capping residuals with large magnitudes. Although statistically attractive, penalized LTS is NP-hard, and existing mixed-integer optimization (MIO) formulations scale poorly due to weak relaxations and exponential worst-case complexity in the number of observations. We propose a new MIO formulation that embeds hyperplane arrangement logic into a perspective reformulation, explicitly enforcing structural properties of optimal solutions. We show that, if the number of features is fixed, the resulting branch-and-bound tree is of polynomial size in the sample size. Moreover, we develop a tailored branch-and-bound algorithm that uses first-order methods with dual bounds to solve node relaxations efficiently. Computational experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate substantial improvements over existing MIO approaches: on synthetic instances with 5000 samples and 20 features, our tailored solver reaches a 1% gap in 1 minute while competing approaches fail to do so within one hour. These gains enable exact robust regression at significantly larger sample sizes in low-dimensional settings.

</details>


### [505] [Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08495)
*Kooktae Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，需要一种更严谨的方法来弥合个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配之间的差距。

Method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个严格的拉格朗日框架，将问题表述为类似随机MPC的最优化问题，以Wasserstein距离作为运行成本进行最小化，在随机LTI动力学下实现分布匹配。

Result: 通过可达性分析建立了形式收敛保证，即使在过程和测量噪声存在的情况下也能提供有界跟踪误差；数值结果表明该方法在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。

Conclusion: 随机D²OC方法为多智能体系统提供了稳健、去中心化的覆盖解决方案，通过严格的拉格朗日框架和收敛保证，在空间优先级高和资源受限的任务中表现出色。

Abstract: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

</details>


<div id='hep-ex'></div>

# hep-ex [[Back]](#toc)

### [506] [Cross-Domain Transfer with Particle Physics Foundation Models: From Jets to Neutrino Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12364)
*Gregor Krzmanc,Vinicius Mikuni,Benjamin Nachman,Callum Wilkinson*

Main category: hep-ex

TL;DR: OmniLearned基础模型在粒子物理中的跨实验迁移：将预训练于高能pp/ep碰撞的模型成功应用于低能中微子-核散射实验，在能量回归和π介子分类任务上优于从头训练的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索粒子物理基础模型的通用性，验证预训练于高能碰撞数据的模型是否能有效迁移到能量尺度、探测器技术和物理过程完全不同的低能固定靶中微子实验。

Method: 使用预训练的OmniLearned基础模型，将其迁移到MINERvA中微子-核散射实验数据。评估两个任务：可用能量的回归，以及带电流π介子末态的二元分类（CC1π±、CCNπ±、CC1π0）。与相同规模从头训练的模型进行对比。

Result: 预训练的OmniLearned模型在相同计算预算下始终优于从头训练的模型，获得更好的整体性能；在相同训练步数下也表现更优。这表明模型获得了可跨能量尺度、探测器技术和物理过程泛化的归纳偏置。

Conclusion: 粒子级基础模型获得的归纳偏置能够跨越能量尺度、探测器技术和基础物理过程的巨大差异进行泛化，指向粒子物理中探测器无关推理的新范式。

Abstract: Future AI-based studies in particle physics will likely start from a foundation model to accelerate training and enhance sensitivity. As a step towards a general-purpose foundation model for particle physics, we investigate whether the OmniLearned foundation model pre-trained on diverse high-$Q^2$ simulated and real $pp$ and $ep$ collisions can be effectively transferred to a few-GeV fixed-target neutrino experiment. We process MINERvA neutrino--nucleus scattering events and evaluate pre-trained models on two types of tasks: regression of available energy and binary classification of charged-current pion final states ($\mathrm{CC1π^{\pm}}$, $\mathrm{CCNπ^{\pm}}$, and $\mathrm{CC1π^{0}}$). Pre-trained OmniLearned models consistently outperform similarly sized models trained from scratch, achieving better overall performance at the same compute budget, as well as achieving better performance at the same number of training steps. These results suggest that particle-level foundation models acquire inductive biases that generalize across large differences in energy scale, detector technology, and underlying physics processes, pointing toward a paradigm of detector-agnostic inference in particle physics.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [507] [LogicEval: A Systematic Framework for Evaluating Automated Repair Techniques for Logical Vulnerabilities in Real-World Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12994)
*Syed Md Mukit Rashid,Abdullah Al Ishtiaq,Kai Tu,Yilu Dong,Tianwei Wu,Ali Ranjbar,Tianchang Yang,Najrin Sultana,Shagufta Mehnaz,Syed Rafiul Hussain*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文系统评估了传统和基于LLM的修复方法在解决真实世界逻辑漏洞方面的能力，创建了首个逻辑漏洞数据集LogicDS，并开发了评估框架LogicEval。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动化程序修复技术主要关注内存损坏漏洞，对逻辑漏洞修复效果有限，因为缺乏对漏洞代码语义和预期行为的深入理解。虽然大型语言模型在代码理解和修复方面显示出潜力，但目前缺乏系统评估这类技术处理逻辑漏洞能力的框架。

Method: 创建了首个逻辑漏洞数据集LogicDS（包含86个具有CVE编号的逻辑漏洞），开发了系统评估框架LogicEval，用于评估传统和基于LLM的修复方法对逻辑漏洞的修复效果。

Result: 评估表明，编译和测试失败主要源于提示敏感性、代码上下文丢失以及补丁定位困难。基于LLM的方法在逻辑漏洞修复方面显示出潜力，但仍面临这些关键挑战。

Conclusion: 该研究为逻辑漏洞修复提供了首个系统评估框架和基准数据集，揭示了当前修复技术的主要局限性，为未来改进基于LLM的逻辑漏洞修复方法指明了方向。

Abstract: Logical vulnerabilities in software stem from flaws in program logic rather than memory safety, which can lead to critical security failures. Although existing automated program repair techniques primarily focus on repairing memory corruption vulnerabilities, they struggle with logical vulnerabilities because of their limited semantic understanding of the vulnerable code and its expected behavior. On the other hand, recent successes of large language models (LLMs) in understanding and repairing code are promising. However, no framework currently exists to analyze the capabilities and limitations of such techniques for logical vulnerabilities. This paper aims to systematically evaluate both traditional and LLM-based repair approaches for addressing real-world logical vulnerabilities. To facilitate our assessment, we created the first ever dataset, LogicDS, of 86 logical vulnerabilities with assigned CVEs reflecting tangible security impact. We also developed a systematic framework, LogicEval, to evaluate patches for logical vulnerabilities. Evaluations suggest that compilation and testing failures are primarily driven by prompt sensitivity, loss of code context, and difficulty in patch localization.

</details>


### [508] [Evaluating Differential Privacy Against Membership Inference in Federated Learning: Insights from the NIST Genomics Red Team Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12737)
*Gustavo de Carvalho Bertoli*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文评估了差分隐私(DP)作为联邦学习中成员推理攻击(MIA)的防御机制，提出了基于堆叠的集成攻击策略，并在不同隐私级别下测试了攻击效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管联邦学习(FL)减少了直接数据暴露，但训练出的模型仍然容易受到成员推理攻击(MIA)。论文旨在通过实证评估差分隐私(DP)作为FL中MIA防御机制的有效性，特别是在2025年NIST基因组学隐私保护联邦学习(PPFL)红队测试环境中。

Method: 提出了一种堆叠攻击策略，集成七个黑盒估计器，在预测概率和交叉熵损失上训练元分类器。该方法在三种隐私配置下评估目标模型：无保护的CNN(ε=∞)、低隐私DP模型(ε=200)和高隐私DP模型(ε=10)。

Result: 堆叠攻击在无DP和低隐私设置下优于所有基线方法，关键是在ε=200时仍能检测到可测量的成员信息泄露，而单信号LiRA基线在此设置下失效。在独立第三方基准测试中，结果提供了堆叠推理在不同校准DP层级下性能退化的实证特征。

Conclusion: 差分隐私虽然能有效防御传统成员推理攻击，但堆叠集成攻击策略在中等隐私级别(ε=200)下仍能检测到成员信息泄露，表明需要更强的隐私保护机制或更复杂的防御策略来应对先进的集成攻击方法。

Abstract: While Federated Learning (FL) mitigates direct data exposure, the resulting trained models remain susceptible to membership inference attacks (MIAs). This paper presents an empirical evaluation of Differential Privacy (DP) as a defense mechanism against MIAs in FL, leveraging the environment of the 2025 NIST Genomics Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning (PPFL) Red Teaming Event. To improve inference accuracy, we propose a stacking attack strategy that ensembles seven black-box estimators to train a meta-classifier on prediction probabilities and cross-entropy losses. We evaluate this methodology against target models under three privacy configurations: an unprotected convolutional neural network (CNN, $ε=\infty$), a low-privacy DP model ($ε=200$), and a high-privacy DP model ($ε=10$). The attack outperforms all baselines in the No DP and Low Privacy settings and, critically, maintains measurable membership leakage at $ε=200$ where a single-signal LiRA baseline collapses. Evaluated on an independent third-party benchmark, these results provide an empirical characterisation of how stacking-based inference degrades across calibrated DP tiers in FL.

</details>


### [509] [Scaling Exposes the Trigger: Input-Level Backdoor Detection in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models via Cross-Attention Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12446)
*Zida Li,Jun Li,Yuzhe Sha,Ziqiang Li,Lizhi Xiong,Zhangjie Fu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出SET框架，通过主动探测跨注意力缩放响应差异来检测文本到图像扩散模型中的后门攻击，无需攻击先验知识或模型训练访问权限


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后门检测方法依赖可观察异常，在隐蔽、语义保持的触发器设计下不可靠。现代后门攻击将触发器嵌入自然输入中，导致现有方法性能大幅下降，需要探索更稳定、隐式、触发器无关的检测方法

Method: 从主动探测角度出发，引入受控缩放扰动到跨注意力机制，发现跨注意力缩放响应差异现象。构建SET框架：在多尺度扰动下构建响应偏移特征，从少量干净样本学习紧凑的良性响应空间，通过测量与学习空间的偏差进行检测

Result: SET在多样化攻击方法、触发器类型和模型设置中一致优于现有基线，在隐蔽隐式触发器场景下表现尤为突出。相比最佳基线，AUROC提升9.1%，ACC提升6.5%

Conclusion: SET框架通过利用跨注意力缩放响应差异现象，实现了有效且鲁棒的后门检测，无需攻击先验知识或模型训练访问权限，具有实际部署价值

Abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in image synthesis, but their reliance on large-scale data and open ecosystems introduces serious backdoor security risks. Existing defenses, particularly input-level methods, are more practical for deployment but often rely on observable anomalies that become unreliable under stealthy, semantics-preserving trigger designs. As modern backdoor attacks increasingly embed triggers into natural inputs, these methods degrade substantially, raising a critical question: can more stable, implicit, and trigger-agnostic differences between benign and backdoor inputs be exploited for detection? In this work, we address this challenge from an active probing perspective. We introduce controlled scaling perturbations on cross-attention and uncover a novel phenomenon termed Cross-Attention Scaling Response Divergence (CSRD), where benign and backdoor inputs exhibit systematically different response evolution patterns across denoising steps. Building on this insight, we propose SET, an input-level backdoor detection framework that constructs response-offset features under multi-scale perturbations and learns a compact benign response space from a small set of clean samples. Detection is then performed by measuring deviations from this learned space, without requiring prior knowledge of the attack or access to model training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SET consistently outperforms existing baselines across diverse attack methods, trigger types, and model settings, with particularly strong gains under stealthy implicit-trigger scenarios. Overall, SET improves AUROC by 9.1% and ACC by 6.5% over the best baseline, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness for practical deployment.

</details>


### [510] [VeriX-Anon: A Multi-Layered Framework for Mathematically Verifiable Outsourced Target-Driven Data Anonymization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12431)
*Miit Daga,Swarna Priya Ramu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: VeriX-Anon是一个用于外包目标驱动k-匿名化的多层验证框架，结合确定性哈希、概率边界哨兵和XAI指纹三种机制，在12个攻击场景中成功检测到11个异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组织越来越多地将隐私敏感数据转换外包给云提供商，但缺乏实用机制让数据所有者验证外包算法是否被忠实执行。需要一种验证框架来确保外包的k-匿名化过程的可信度。

Method: VeriX-Anon采用三层正交验证机制：1) 确定性验证：通过认证决策树的Merkle风格哈希；2) 概率验证：在随机森林决策边界附近设置边界哨兵和具有加密标识符的精确复制孪生记录；3) 效用验证：通过可解释AI指纹技术，使用Wasserstein距离比较匿名化前后的SHAP值分布。

Result: 在三个跨领域数据集上对抗三种攻击者（Lazy、Dumb、Approximate）的12个场景中，VeriX-Anon正确检测到11个异常。XAI层是唯一能检测Approximate攻击者的机制，在Adult和Bank数据集上成功，但在严重不平衡的Diabetes数据集上失败。目标驱动匿名化比盲目匿名化保留更多效用（p=0.000977，Cohen's d=1.96，平均F1差距+0.1574）。客户端验证在100万行数据下可在1秒内完成。

Conclusion: VeriX-Anon是一个有效的多层验证框架，能够检测外包k-匿名化中的异常。三层机制互补，没有单一层能单独实现完整检测。XAI层对平衡数据集有效，但对严重不平衡数据集需要自适应阈值。目标驱动匿名化显著优于盲目匿名化，验证效率高，适合实际应用。

Abstract: Organisations increasingly outsource privacy-sensitive data transformations to cloud providers, yet no practical mechanism lets the data owner verify that the contracted algorithm was faithfully executed. VeriX-Anon is a multi-layered verification framework for outsourced Target-Driven k-anonymization combining three orthogonal mechanisms: deterministic verification via Merkle-style hashing of an Authenticated Decision Tree, probabilistic verification via Boundary Sentinels near the Random Forest decision boundary and exact-duplicate Twins with cryptographic identifiers, and utility-based verification via Explainable AI fingerprinting that compares SHAP value distributions before and after anonymization using the Wasserstein distance. Evaluated on three cross-domain datasets against Lazy (drops 5 percent of records), Dumb (random splitting, fake hash), and Approximate (random splitting, valid hash) adversaries, VeriX-Anon correctly detected deviations in 11 of 12 scenarios. No single layer achieved this alone. The XAI layer was the only mechanism that caught the Approximate adversary, succeeding on Adult and Bank but failing on the severely imbalanced Diabetes dataset where class imbalance suppresses the SHAP signal, confirming the need for adaptive thresholding. An 11-point k-sweep showed Target-Driven anonymization preserves significantly more utility than Blind anonymization (Wilcoxon $p = 0.000977$, Cohen's $d = 1.96$, mean F1 gap $+0.1574$). Client-side verification completes under one second at one million rows. The threat model covers three empirically evaluated profiles and one theoretical profile (Informed Attacker) aware of trap embedding but unable to defeat the cryptographic salt. Sentinel evasion probability ranges from near-zero for balanced datasets to 0.52 for imbalanced ones, a limitation the twin layer compensates for in every tested scenario.

</details>


### [511] [LLM-Guided Prompt Evolution for Password Guessing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12601)
*Vladimir A. Mazin,Mikhail A. Zorin,Dmitrii S. Korzh,Elvir Z. Karimov,Dmitrii A. Bolokhov,Oleg Y. Rogov*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 使用LLM驱动的进化计算自动优化密码猜测框架的提示词，将破解率从2.02%提升至8.48%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密码仍然是主流认证方式，但其安全性常因用户选择可预测密码和大规模凭证泄露而受到威胁。自动密码猜测是压力测试密码策略和模拟攻击者行为的关键工具，但现有方法效果有限。

Method: 应用LLM驱动的进化计算自动优化LLM密码猜测框架的提示词。使用OpenEvolve系统（结合MAP-Elites质量多样性搜索和岛屿种群模型），在RockYou派生测试集上进化提示词以最大化破解率。评估三种配置：本地Qwen3 8B、云端Gemini-2.5 Flash、以及两个前沿LLM的集成模型。

Result: 该方法将破解率从2.02%提升至8.48%。字符分布分析进一步证实进化后的提示词能生成统计上更真实的密码。

Conclusion: 自动提示词进化是增强基于LLM的密码审计的低门槛有效方法，同时揭示了攻击管道通过自动化改进展现出的趋势性。

Abstract: Passwords still remain a dominant authentication method, yet their security is routinely subverted by predictable user choices and large-scale credential leaks. Automated password guessing is a key tool for stress-testing password policies and modeling attacker behavior. This paper applies LLM-driven evolutionary computation to automatically optimize prompts for the LLM password guessing framework. Using OpenEvolve, an open-source system combining MAP-Elites quality-diversity search with an island population model we evolve prompts that maximize cracking rate on a RockYou-derived test set. We evaluate three configurations: a local setup with Qwen3 8B, a single compact cloud model Gemini-2.5 Flash, and a two-model ensemble of frontier LLMs. The approach raises the cracking rates from 2.02\% to 8.48\%. Character distribution analysis further confirms how evolved prompts produce statistically more realistic passwords. Automated prompt evolution is a low-barrier yet effective way to strengthen LLM-based password auditing and underlining how attack pipelines show tendency via automated improvements.

</details>


### [512] [CoLA: A Choice Leakage Attack Framework to Expose Privacy Risks in Subset Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12342)
*Qi Li,Cheng-Long Wang,Yinzhi Cao,Di Wang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 论文挑战了"训练数据子集选择能降低隐私风险"的直觉假设，提出子集训练并非隐私安全，选择过程本身会引入新的隐私泄露面，并提出了统一的CoLA框架来分析这种隐私泄露。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习实践中，从完整数据集中精心选择子集进行训练已成为标准预处理步骤，通常认为训练样本减少会降低隐私风险。本文旨在挑战这一假设，揭示子集选择过程本身会引入新的隐私泄露面，导致隐私风险被低估。

Method: 提出了CoLA（Choice Leakage Attack）统一框架，系统分析子集选择中的隐私泄露。根据攻击者对侧信道信息的了解程度，定义两种攻击场景：子集感知侧信道攻击和黑盒攻击。研究两种独特的隐私泄露面：训练成员MIA（TM-MIA）和选择参与MIA（SP-MIA）。在视觉和语言模型上进行实验验证。

Result: 实验表明现有威胁模型低估了子集训练的隐私风险：扩展的隐私泄露面会同时泄露训练成员和选择参与成员信息，将隐私风险从单个模型扩展到整个ML生态系统。子集选择过程本身成为新的隐私泄露源。

Conclusion: 子集训练并非隐私安全，数据选择过程会引入新的隐私泄露面。需要重新评估子集训练的隐私影响，将隐私保护从模型训练扩展到整个数据-模型供应链。CoLA框架为系统分析这类隐私风险提供了工具。

Abstract: Training models on a carefully chosen portion of data rather than the full dataset is now a standard preprocess for modern ML. From vision coreset selection to large-scale filtering in language models, it enables scalability with minimal utility loss. A common intuition is that training on fewer samples should also reduce privacy risks. In this paper, we challenge this assumption. We show that subset training is not privacy free: the very choices of which data are included or excluded can introduce new privacy surface and leak more sensitive information. Such information can be captured by adversaries either through side-channel metadata from the subset selection process or via the outputs of the target model. To systematically study this phenomenon, we propose CoLA (Choice Leakage Attack), a unified framework for analyzing privacy leakage in subset selection. In CoLA, depending on the adversary's knowledge of the side-channel information, we define two practical attack scenarios: Subset-aware Side-channel Attacks and Black-box Attacks. Under both scenarios, we investigate two privacy surfaces unique to subset training: (1) Training-membership MIA (TM-MIA), which concerns only the privacy of training data membership, and (2) Selection-participation MIA (SP-MIA), which concerns the privacy of all samples that participated in the subset selection process. Notably, SP-MIA enlarges the notion of membership from model training to the entire data-model supply chain. Experiments on vision and language models show that existing threat models underestimate subset-training privacy risks: the expanded privacy surface leaks both training and selection membership, extending risks from individual models to the broader ML ecosystem.

</details>


### [513] [SpanKey: Dynamic Key Space Conditioning for Neural Network Access Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12254)
*WenBin Yan*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SpanKey是一种轻量级的门控推理方法，通过在激活中注入密钥子空间来实现访问控制，无需加密权重或追求门控推理的排行榜精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种轻量级的门控推理机制，能够在无需加密模型权重的情况下控制对模型推理的访问，同时避免过度追求传统门控推理方法的精度指标。

Method: 使用基矩阵B定义低维密钥子空间Span(B)，训练时采样系数α生成密钥k=α⊤B，通过加性或乘性映射以强度γ将密钥注入中间激活。有效密钥位于Span(B)子空间内，无效密钥采样于该子空间外。采用多层设计空间，包含密钥吸收分析、Beta能量分割和边缘尾部诊断等方法。

Result: 在CIFAR-10 ResNet-18和MNIST数据集上进行实验，展示了三种模式（A-C）及其扩展。分析了密钥吸收失效模式，提供了能量和边缘项的基线分离分析，但未提供密码学安全保证。

Conclusion: SpanKey提供了一种实用的门控推理方法，通过密钥子空间注入实现访问控制，但明确不承诺密码学安全性。讨论了威胁模型和扩展规模的可能性。

Abstract: SpanKey is a lightweight way to gate inference without encrypting weights or chasing leaderboard accuracy on gated inference. The idea is to condition activations on secret keys. A basis matrix $B$ defines a low-dimensional key subspace $Span(B)$; during training we sample coefficients $α$ and form keys $k=α^\top B$, then inject them into intermediate activations with additive or multiplicative maps and strength $γ$. Valid keys lie in $Span(B)$; invalid keys are sampled outside that subspace. We make three points. (i) Mechanism: subspace key injection and a multi-layer design space. (ii) Failure mode: key absorption, together with two analytical results (a Beta-energy split and margin-tail diagnostics), explains weak baseline separation in energy and margin terms -- these are not a security theorem. iii) Deny losses and experiments: Modes A--C and extensions, with CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 runs and MNIST ablations for Mode B. We summarize setup and first-order analysis, injectors, absorption, deny losses and ablations, a threat discussion that does not promise cryptography, and closing remarks on scale. Code: \texttt{https://github.com/mindmemory-ai/dksc}

</details>


### [514] [TEMPLATEFUZZ: Fine-Grained Chat Template Fuzzing for Jailbreaking and Red Teaming LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12232)
*Qingchao Shen,Zibo Xiao,Lili Huang,Enwei Hu,Yongqiang Tian,Junjie Chen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TEMPLATEFUZZ：针对LLM聊天模板的细粒度模糊测试框架，通过元素级变异规则、启发式搜索和主动学习策略，有效发现并利用聊天模板漏洞进行越狱攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有越狱攻击主要关注提示注入，需要大量提示工程且忽视了聊天模板这一关键攻击面。聊天模板作为LLM部署中的关键组件，其安全漏洞尚未得到充分研究

Method: 1) 设计元素级变异规则生成多样化聊天模板变体；2) 提出启发式搜索策略引导模板生成，在提高攻击成功率的同时保持模型准确性；3) 集成主动学习策略构建轻量级规则化预言机，用于准确高效的越狱评估

Result: 在12个开源LLM上评估，平均攻击成功率达98.2%，准确率仅下降1.1%，优于现有方法9.1%-47.9%的攻击成功率和8.4%的准确率下降。在5个商业LLM上通过聊天模板提示注入攻击达到90%平均成功率

Conclusion: TEMPLATEFUZZ证明了聊天模板是LLM安全的关键攻击面，其细粒度模糊测试方法能有效发现和利用模板漏洞，为LLM安全评估提供了新视角和实用工具

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across diverse domains, yet their vulnerability to jailbreak attacks, where adversarial inputs bypass safety mechanisms to elicit harmful outputs, poses significant security risks. While prior work has primarily focused on prompt injection attacks, these approaches often require resource-intensive prompt engineering and overlook other critical components, such as chat templates. This paper introduces TEMPLATEFUZZ, a fine-grained fuzzing framework that systematically exposes vulnerabilities in chat templates, a critical yet underexplored attack surface in LLMs. Specifically, TEMPLATEFUZZ (1) designs a series of element-level mutation rules to generate diverse chat template variants, (2) proposes a heuristic search strategy to guide the chat template generation toward the direction of amplifying the attack success rate (ASR) while preserving model accuracy, and (3) integrates an active learning-based strategy to derive a lightweight rule-based oracle for accurate and efficient jailbreak evaluation. Evaluated on twelve open-source LLMs across multiple attack scenarios, TEMPLATEFUZZ achieves an average ASR of 98.2% with only 1.1% accuracy degradation, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 9.1%-47.9% in ASR and 8.4% in accuracy degradation. Moreover, even on five industry-leading commercial LLMs where chat templates cannot be specified, TEMPLATEFUZZ attains a 90% average ASR via chat template-based prompt injection attacks.

</details>


### [515] [Fully Homomorphic Encryption on Llama 3 model for privacy preserving LLM inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12168)
*Anes Abdennebi,Nadjia Kara,Laaziz Lahlou*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将后量子密码学（PQC）基于格的同态加密（HE）集成到LLM推理管道中的方法，以保护LLAMA-3模型的数据隐私，对抗量子计算攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI与数据驱动领域（如医疗、金融等）的融合提高了服务效率，但也带来了LLM安全性和数据隐私的严重问题。现有安全技术无法抵御量子计算攻击，量子计算可能破解现有加密算法，泄露密钥和敏感数据。

Method: 修改LLAMA-3模型的transformer架构推理管道，注入concrete-ml库提供的同态加密主要操作，将基于格的同态加密集成到LLM推理层中，以保护数据隐私。

Result: 在i9 CPU上实现了高达98%的文本生成准确率，延迟为237毫秒，达到每秒80个token的生成速度，证明了FHE保护的LLAMA-3推理模型的可行性和有效性。

Conclusion: 通过将后量子密码学同态加密集成到LLM推理管道中，可以有效保护模型免受数据隐私攻击，特别是对抗未来的量子计算威胁，同时保持合理的性能表现。

Abstract: The applications of Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) and their intersections with data-driven fields, such as healthcare, finance, transportation, and information security, have led to significant improvements in service efficiency and low latency. However, this synergy raises serious concerns regarding the security of large language models (LLMs) and their potential impact on the privacy of companies and users' data. Many technology companies that incorporate LLMs in their services with a certain level of command and control bear a risk of data exposure and secret divulgence caused by insecure LLM pipelines, making them vulnerable to multiple attacks such as data poisoning, prompt injection, and model theft. Although several security techniques (input/output sanitization, decentralized learning, access control management, and encryption) were implemented to reduce this risk, there is still an imminent risk of quantum computing attacks, which are expected to break existing encryption algorithms, hence, retrieving secret keys, encrypted sensitive data, and decrypting encrypted models. In this extensive work, we integrate the Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) based Lattice-based Homomorphic Encryption (HE) main functions in the LLM's inference pipeline to secure some of its layers against data privacy attacks. We modify the inference pipeline of the transformer architecture for the LLAMA-3 model while injecting the main homomorphic encryption operations provided by the concrete-ml library. We demonstrate high text generation accuracies (up to 98%) with reasonable latencies (237 ms) on an i9 CPU, reaching up to 80 tokens per second, which proves the feasibility and validity of our work while running a FHE-secured LLAMA-3 inference model. Further experiments and analysis are discussed to justify models' text generation latencies and behaviours.

</details>


### [516] [The Salami Slicing Threat: Exploiting Cumulative Risks in LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11309)
*Yihao Zhang,Kai Wang,Jiangrong Wu,Haolin Wu,Yuxuan Zhou,Zeming Wei,Dongxian Wu,Xun Chen,Jun Sun,Meng Sun*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出Salami Attack多轮越狱攻击框架，通过串联多个低风险输入累积有害意图，绕过LLM安全约束，在GPT-4o和Gemini上实现超过90%的攻击成功率，并提出相应防御策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多轮越狱方法存在两个根本限制：1) 随着模型上下文感知能力增强，显式有害触发器容易被检测和阻止；2) 成功的最终步骤触发器通常需要精细调整的模型特定上下文，使得攻击高度依赖上下文。需要一种不依赖预设计上下文结构、更通用的攻击方法。

Method: 提出Salami Slicing Risk概念，通过串联多个低风险输入（每个单独都能避开对齐阈值）累积有害意图，最终触发高风险行为。基于此开发Salami Attack自动框架，适用于多种模型类型和模态，不严重依赖预设计的上下文结构。

Result: Salami Attack在多样化模型和模态上实现最先进性能，在GPT-4o和Gemini上攻击成功率超过90%，对现实世界对齐防御具有鲁棒性。提出的防御策略能将Salami Attack约束至少44.8%，对其他多轮越狱攻击最大阻断率达到64.8%。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了多轮越狱的普遍风险，提出的Salami Attack框架展示了LLM安全漏洞，同时提供了可行的缓解策略，为增强LLM安全性提供了关键见解。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) face prominent security risks from jailbreaking, a practice that manipulates models to bypass built-in security constraints and generate unethical or unsafe content. Among various jailbreak techniques, multi-turn jailbreak attacks are more covert and persistent than single-turn counterparts, exposing critical vulnerabilities of LLMs.
  However, existing multi-turn jailbreak methods suffer from two fundamental limitations that affect the actual impact in real-world scenarios: (a) As models become more context-aware, any explicit harmful trigger is increasingly likely to be flagged and blocked; (b) Successful final-step triggers often require finely tuned, model-specific contexts, making such attacks highly context-dependent. To fill this gap, we propose \textit{Salami Slicing Risk}, which operates by chaining numerous low-risk inputs that individually evade alignment thresholds but cumulatively accumulate harmful intent to ultimately trigger high-risk behaviors, without heavy reliance on pre-designed contextual structures. Building on this risk, we develop Salami Attack, an automatic framework universally applicable to multiple model types and modalities.
  Rigorous experiments demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance across diverse models and modalities, achieving over 90\% Attack Success Rate on GPT-4o and Gemini, as well as robustness against real-world alignment defenses. We also proposed a defense strategy to constrain the Salami Attack by at least 44.8\% while achieving a maximum blocking rate of 64.8\% against other multi-turn jailbreak attacks. Our findings provide critical insights into the pervasive risks of multi-turn jailbreaking and offer actionable mitigation strategies to enhance LLM security.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [517] [Beyond LLMs, Sparse Distributed Memory, and Neuromorphics <A Hyper-Dimensional SRAM-CAM "VaCoAl" for Ultra-High Speed, Ultra-Low Power, and Low Cost>](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11665)
*Hiroyuki Chuma,Kanji Otsuka,Yoichi Sato*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文发现确定性超维计算架构中自发涌现出类似STDP的路径依赖语义选择机制，提出VaCoAl算法实现可逆多跳推理，为AI提供第三种范式HDC-AI。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
