Motivation: 解决现代AI的灾难性遗忘、学习停滞和绑定问题等限制，通过代数层面方法实现可逆组合推理，补充大语言模型的不足。

Method: 提出VaCoAl算法及其Python实现PyVaCoAl，基于伽罗瓦域代数的超维计算架构，结合稀疏分布式内存和伽罗瓦域扩散解决高维二进制空间的正交化和检索问题。

Result: 在Wikidata约47万导师-学生关系上评估多跳推理，追踪57代（超2550万条路径）。结果显示牛顿-莱布尼茨争议的新解释，发现从稀疏收敛到后莱布尼茨"超级高速公路"的相变，涌现出支持库恩范式转移的结构指标。

Conclusion: VaCoAl定义了第三种AI范式HDC-AI，通过可逆多跳推理补充大语言模型，其碰撞容忍机制诱导的路径剪枝产生等效于STDP的涌现语义选择。

Abstract: This paper reports an unexpected finding: in a deterministic hyperdimensional computing (HDC) architecture based on Galois-field algebra, a path-dependent semantic selection mechanism emerges, equivalent to spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), with magnitude predictable a priori by a closed-form expression matching large-scale measurements. This addresses limitations of modern AI including catastrophic forgetting, learning stagnation, and the Binding Problem at an algebraic level. We propose VaCoAl (Vague Coincident Algorithm) and its Python implementation PyVaCoAl, combining ultra-high-dimensional memory with deterministic logic. Rooted in Sparse Distributed Memory, it resolves orthogonalisation and retrieval in high-dimensional binary spaces via Galois-field diffusion, enabling low-load deployment. VaCoAl is a memory-centric architecture prioritising retrieval and association, enabling reversible composition while preserving element independence and supporting compositional generalisation with a transparent reliability metric (CR score). We evaluated multi-hop reasoning on about 470k mentor-student relations from Wikidata, tracing up to 57 generations (over 25.5M paths). Using HDC bundling and unbinding with CR-based denoising, we quantify concept propagation over DAGs. Results show a reinterpretation of the Newton-Leibniz dispute and a phase transition from sparse convergence to a post-Leibniz "superhighway", from which structural indicators emerge supporting a Kuhnian paradigm shift. Collision-tolerance mechanisms further induce path-based pruning that favors direct paths, yielding emergent semantic selection equivalent to STDP. VaCoAl thus defines a third paradigm, HDC-AI, complementing LLMs with reversible multi-hop reasoning.

</details>


<div id='stat.CO'></div>

# stat.CO [[Back]](#toc)

### [518] [bioLeak: Leakage-Aware Modeling and Diagnostics for Machine Learning in R](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10965)
*Selçuk Korkmaz*

Main category: stat.CO

TL;DR: bioLeak是一个R包，用于构建防泄漏重采样工作流并审计常见数据泄漏机制，特别适用于具有重复测量、研究异质性、批次效应或时间依赖性的生物医学数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据泄漏是生物医学机器学习研究中反复出现的乐观偏倚来源。标准的行向交叉验证和全局估计的预处理步骤通常不适用于具有重复测量、研究级异质性、批次效应或时间依赖性的数据。

Method: bioLeak包提供泄漏感知的分割构建、仅训练折叠预处理、交叉验证模型拟合、嵌套超参数调优、事后泄漏审计和HTML报告。实现支持二元分类、多类分类、回归和生存分析，具有特定任务指标以及用于分割、拟合、审计和膨胀摘要的S4容器。

Result: 模拟工件展示了在受控泄漏机制下表现性能的变化，案例研究说明了防护和泄漏管道如何在多研究转录组数据上产生实质性不同的结论。

Conclusion: 该包强调软件设计、可重现工作流和诊断输出的解释，为生物医学机器学习研究提供了系统化的防泄漏分析框架。

Abstract: Data leakage remains a recurrent source of optimistic bias in biomedical machine learning studies. Standard row-wise cross-validation and globally estimated preprocessing steps are often inappropriate for data with repeated measurements, study-level heterogeneity, batch effects, or temporal dependencies. This paper describes bioLeak, an R package for constructing leakage-aware resampling workflows and for auditing fitted models for common leakage mechanisms. The package provides leakage-aware split construction, train-fold-only preprocessing, cross-validated model fitting, nested hyperparameter tuning, post hoc leakage audits, and HTML reporting. The implementation supports binary classification, multiclass classification, regression, and survival analysis, with task-specific metrics and S4 containers for splits, fits, audits, and inflation summaries. The simulation artifacts show how apparent performance changes under controlled leakage mechanisms, and the case study illustrates how guarded and leaky pipelines can yield materially different conclusions on multi-study transcriptomic data. The emphasis throughout is on software design, reproducible workflows, and interpretation of diagnostic output.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [519] [2D or 3D: Who Governs Salience in VLA Models? -- Tri-Stage Token Pruning Framework with Modality Salience Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09244)
*Zihao Zheng,Sicheng Tian,Zhihao Mao,Lingyue Zhang,Chenyue Li,Ziyun Zhang,Hong Gao,Yuchen Huang,Yutong Xu,Guojie Luo,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对多视觉模态VLA模型的三阶段token剪枝框架，通过分析2D/3D模态显著性差异，实现高效推理加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多视觉模态VLA模型虽然提升了空间感知能力，但由于模态扩展导致输入token数量增加，面临更大的加速需求。现有的token剪枝方案仅针对2D-only VLA模型，忽略了2D/3D模态显著性差异。

Method: 提出三阶段分析框架捕捉2D/3D模态显著性差异和动态变化，基于此设计相应的三阶段token剪枝框架，实现最优的2D/3D token选择和高效剪枝。

Result: 实验表明该框架实现了最高2.55倍的推理加速，同时仅带来最小精度损失，额外开销仅为5.8%。

Conclusion: 该研究提出的三阶段token剪枝框架有效解决了MVLA模型的加速需求，通过考虑模态显著性差异实现了高效推理优化。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as the mainstream of embodied intelligence. Recent VLA models have expanded their input modalities from 2D-only to 2D+3D paradigms, forming multi-visual-modal VLA (MVLA) models. Despite achieving improved spatial perception, MVLA faces a greater acceleration demand due to the increased number of input tokens caused by modal expansion. Token pruning is an effective optimization methods tailored to MVLA models. However, existing token pruning schemes are designed for 2D-only VLA models, ignoring 2D/3D modality salience differences. In this paper, we follow the application process of multi-modal data in MVLA models and develop a tri-stage analysis to capture the discrepancy and dynamics of 2D/3D modality salience. Based on these, we propose a corresponding tri-stage token pruning framework for MVLA models to achieve optimal 2D/3D token selection and efficient pruning. Experiments show that our framework achieves up to a 2.55x inference speedup with minimal accuracy loss, while only costing 5.8% overhead. Our Code is coming soon.

</details>


<div id='physics.flu-dyn'></div>

# physics.flu-dyn [[Back]](#toc)

### [520] [Learning step-level dynamic soaring in shear flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12413)
*Lunbing Chen,Jixin Lu,Yufei Yin,Jinpeng Huang,Yang Xiang,Hong Liu*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 动态翱翔可以通过局部状态反馈控制实现，无需显式轨迹规划，利用深度强化学习获得在非稳态风切变环境中鲁棒导航的策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动态翱翔被视为循环级机动，假设稳定流动条件，但在实际非稳态环境中这些假设常被违反。研究探索是否必须进行显式循环级规划，以及是否可以通过局部传感实现动态翱翔。

Method: 使用深度强化学习作为工具，获得仅基于局部传感的状态反馈控制策略，研究在多样化风切变条件下的鲁棒全向导航。

Result: 学习到的行为组织成结构化控制律，协调转向和垂直运动，形成由能量提取与方向进展权衡支配的两阶段策略。该策略在不同条件下具有泛化能力，并重现了生物飞行和最优控制解决方案的关键特征。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了动态翱翔的反馈控制结构，证明高效能量收集飞行可以通过与流动的局部相互作用实现而无需显式规划，为生物飞行和复杂流动耦合环境中的自主系统提供了见解。

Abstract: Dynamic soaring enables sustained flight by extracting energy from wind shear, yet it is commonly understood as a cycle-level maneuver that assumes stable flow conditions. In realistic unsteady environments, however, such assumptions are often violated, raising the question of whether explicit cycle-level planning is necessary. Here, we show that dynamic soaring can emerge from step-level, state-feedback control using only local sensing, without explicit trajectory planning. Using deep reinforcement learning as a tool, we obtain policies that achieve robust omnidirectional navigation across diverse shear-flow conditions. The learned behavior organizes into a structured control law that coordinates turning and vertical motion, giving rise to a two-phase strategy governed by a trade-off between energy extraction and directional progress. The resulting policy generalizes across varying conditions and reproduces key features observed in biological flight and optimal-control solutions. These findings identify a feedback-based control structure underlying dynamic soaring, demonstrating that efficient energy-harvesting flight can emerge from local interactions with the flow without explicit planning, and providing insights for biological flight and autonomous systems in complex, flow-coupled environments.

</details>


<div id='math.PR'></div>

# math.PR [[Back]](#toc)

### [521] [FlowBoost Reveals Phase Transitions and Spectral Structure in Finite Free Information Inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11922)
*Baran Hashemi*

Main category: math.PR

TL;DR: FlowBoost框架用于研究有限自由Stam不等式在ℓ^p范数下的推广，发现p=2时Hermite对是唯一等式情况，p>2时Hermite对违反不等式，p<2时极值配置发生分岔。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究有限自由加性卷积下实根多项式的ℓ^p-广义Stam不等式，探索极值结构并建立与经典概率论的有限自由类比。

Method: 使用FlowBoost（闭环深度生成优化框架）进行极值结构发现，分析线性化卷积映射的谱结构，引入ℓ^p-Fisher信息定义p-Stam不等式族，通过系统计算验证猜想。

Result: 发现p=2时Hermite对是唯一等式情况；猜想耦合矩阵E_n在零均值子空间上的奇异值为{2^{-k/2}:k=1,...,n-1}；证明p>2时Hermite对违反不等式；p<2时极值配置发生分岔，收敛到Hermite对角线。

Conclusion: FlowBoost是无限维极值问题中有效的数学发现工具；p*=2是尖锐临界指数；有限自由CLT收敛率在n上一致；揭示了ℓ^p-广义Stam不等式的丰富结构。

Abstract: Using FlowBoost, a closed-loop deep generative optimization framework for extremal structure discovery, we investigate $\ell^p$-generalizations of the finite free Stam inequality for real-rooted polynomials under finite free additive convolution $\boxplus_n$. At $p=2$, FlowBoost finds the Hermite pair as the unique equality case and reveals the spectral structure of the linearized convolution map at this extremal point. As a result, we conjecture that the singular values of the doubly stochastic coupling matrix $E_n$ on the mean-zero subspace are ${2^{-k/2}:k=1,\ldots,n-1}$, independent of $n$. Conditional on this conjecture, we obtain a sharp local stability constant and the finite free CLT convergence rate, both uniform in $n$. We introduce a one-parameter family of $p$-Stam inequalities using $\ell^p$-Fisher information and prove that the Hermite pair itself violates the inequality for every $p>2$, with the sign of the deficit governed by the $\ell^p$-contraction ratio of $E_n$. Systematic computation via FlowBoost supports the conjecture that $p^*\!=2$ is the sharp critical exponent. For $p<2$, the extremal configurations undergo a bifurcation, meaning that they become non-matching pairs with bimodal root structure, converging back to the Hermite diagonal only as $p\to 2^-$. Our findings demonstrate that FlowBoost, can be an effective tool of mathematical discovery in infinite-dimensional extremal problems.

</details>


### [522] [Universality of first-order methods on random and deterministic matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11729)
*Nicola Gorini,Chris Jones,Dmitriy Kunisky,Lucas Pesenti*

Main category: math.PR

TL;DR: 论文通过交通分布分析广义一阶方法，解决了确定性矩阵的极限动力学问题，并设计了新的AMP迭代算法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期以来，广义一阶方法的研究主要集中在"非常随机"的输入矩阵和近似消息传递特例上，但如何为更结构化的输入构建保持高斯性的迭代算法，以及为什么现有AMP算法对某些确定性矩阵同样有效，这些问题一直未得到解决。

Method: 通过输入矩阵的极限交通分布分析广义一阶方法的图展开，交通分布包含了矩阵条目中置换不变多项式的所有极限值。计算了首批非平凡确定性矩阵的交通分布，并设计了新的AMP迭代算法。

Result: 1. 计算了Walsh-Hadamard矩阵和离散正弦/余弦变换矩阵等确定性矩阵的交通分布，确定了GFOM在这些输入上的极限动力学，解决了Marinari、Parisi和Ritort（1994）长期猜想的部分内容。
2. 设计了统一多个先前AMP变体并推广到新输入类型的新AMP迭代，其极限动力学在给定某些潜在随机变量的条件下是高斯性的。该分析为Onsager修正提供了简单的组合解释。

Conclusion: 通过交通分布框架，论文不仅解决了确定性矩阵上GFOM极限动力学的长期问题，还设计了具有更广泛适用性的新AMP算法，为理解AMP算法在结构化输入上的有效性提供了理论基础。

Abstract: General first-order methods (GFOM) are a flexible class of iterative algorithms which update a state vector by matrix-vector multiplications and entrywise nonlinearities. A long line of work has sought to understand the large-n dynamics of GFOM, mostly focusing on "very random" input matrices and the approximate message passing (AMP) special case of GFOM whose state is asymptotically Gaussian. Yet, it has long remained unknown how to construct iterative algorithms that retain this Gaussianity for more structured inputs, or why existing AMP algorithms can be as effective for some deterministic matrices as they are for random matrices.
  We analyze diagrammatic expansions of GFOM via the limiting traffic distribution of the input matrix, the collection of all limiting values of permutation-invariant polynomials in the matrix entries, to obtain the following results:
  1. We calculate the traffic distribution for the first non-trivial deterministic matrices, including (minor variants of) the Walsh-Hadamard and discrete sine and cosine transform matrices. This determines the limiting dynamics of GFOM on these inputs, resolving parts of longstanding conjectures of Marinari, Parisi, and Ritort (1994).
  2. We design a new AMP iteration which unifies several previous AMP variants and generalizes to new input types, whose limiting dynamics are Gaussian conditional on some latent random variables. The asymptotic dynamics hold for a large and natural class of traffic distributions (encompassing both random and deterministic input matrices) and the algorithm's analysis gives a simple combinatorial interpretation of the Onsager correction, answering questions posed recently by Wang, Zhong, and Fan (2022).

</details>


<div id='math.HO'></div>

# math.HO [[Back]](#toc)

### [523] [A Minimal Mathematical Model for Conducting Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10356)
*Tom Verhoeff*

Main category: math.HO

TL;DR: 提出一个分离几何轨迹与时间参数化的指挥手势最小数学模型，使用三次Hermite段连接准备点和击拍点，配合五次时间律控制加速减速，单参数调节均匀运动与表达强调的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为指挥手势提供紧凑而富有表现力的数学表示，分离几何轨迹与时间参数化，使模型既能准确描述手势形状，又能控制运动节奏和表达性。

Method: 基于准备点和击拍点的循环序列，用水平切线约束的三次Hermite段连接几何轨迹，结合控制加速减速的五次时间律，单参数调节均匀运动与表达强调的平衡。

Result: 模型实现了Wolfram演示程序"Conducting Patterns"和Crusis网页应用，提供了紧凑而富有表现力的指挥手势表示方法。

Conclusion: 该最小数学模型成功分离了指挥手势的几何轨迹与时间参数化，通过单参数控制表达性，为计算机辅助指挥教学和分析提供了有效的数学工具。

Abstract: We present a minimal mathematical model for conducting patterns that separates geometric trajectory from temporal parametrization. The model is based on a cyclic sequence of preparation and ictus points connected by cubic Hermite segments with constrained horizontal tangents, combined with a quintic timing law controlling acceleration and deceleration. A single parameter governs the balance between uniform motion and expressive emphasis. The model provides a compact yet expressive representation of conducting gestures. It is implemented as the interactive Wolfram Demonstration "Conducting Patterns" and is used in the Crusis web app.

</details>


<div id='eess.AS'></div>

# eess.AS [[Back]](#toc)

### [524] [X-VC: Zero-shot Streaming Voice Conversion in Codec Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12456)
*Qixi Zheng,Yuxiang Zhao,Tianrui Wang,Wenxi Chen,Kele Xu,Yikang Li,Qinyuan Chen,Xipeng Qiu,Kai Yu,Xie Chen*

Main category: eess.AS

TL;DR: X-VC：基于预训练神经编解码器潜在空间的零样本流式语音转换系统，通过单步转换实现高质量说话人转换和低延迟流式推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本语音转换系统难以同时实现高保真说话人转换和低延迟流式推理，特别是在交互场景中。需要一种既能保持高质量转换又能支持实时流式处理的解决方案。

Method: 1. 使用预训练神经编解码器的潜在空间进行单步转换；2. 采用双条件声学转换器，联合建模源编解码器潜在表示和目标参考语音的帧级声学条件；3. 通过自适应归一化注入话语级目标说话人信息；4. 使用生成配对数据和角色分配策略减少训练-推理不匹配；5. 采用分块推理方案与重叠平滑，与编解码器的分段训练范式对齐。

Result: 在Seed-TTS-Eval数据集上，X-VC在英语和中文中都取得了最佳流式WER（词错误率），在相同语言和跨语言设置中表现出强大的说话人相似性，离线实时因子显著低于基线方法。

Conclusion: 编解码器空间的单步转换是构建高质量低延迟零样本语音转换系统的实用方法。X-VC在保持高转换质量的同时实现了流式处理能力，为交互式语音转换应用提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Zero-shot voice conversion (VC) aims to convert a source utterance into the voice of an unseen target speaker while preserving its linguistic content. Although recent systems have improved conversion quality, building zero-shot VC systems for interactive scenarios remains challenging because high-fidelity speaker transfer and low-latency streaming inference are difficult to achieve simultaneously. In this work, we present X-VC, a zero-shot streaming VC system that performs one-step conversion in the latent space of a pretrained neural codec. X-VC uses a dual-conditioning acoustic converter that jointly models source codec latents and frame-level acoustic conditions derived from target reference speech, while injecting utterance-level target speaker information through adaptive normalization. To reduce the mismatch between training and inference, we train the model with generated paired data and a role-assignment strategy that combines standard, reconstruction, and reversed modes. For streaming inference, we further adopt a chunkwise inference scheme with overlap smoothing that is aligned with the segment-based training paradigm of the codec. Experiments on Seed-TTS-Eval show that X-VC achieves the best streaming WER in both English and Chinese, strong speaker similarity in same-language and cross-lingual settings, and substantially lower offline real-time factor than the compared baselines. These results suggest that codec-space one-step conversion is a practical approach for building high-quality low-latency zero-shot VC systems. Audio samples are available at https://x-vc.github.io. Our code and checkpoints will also be released.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [525] [Characterizing Resource Sharing Practices on Underground Internet Forum Synthetic Non-Consensual Intimate Image Content Creation Communities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12190)
*Bernardo B. P. Medeiros,Malvika Jadhav,Allison Lu,Tadayoshi Kohno,Vincent Bindschaedler,Kevin R. B. Butler*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该研究分析了4chan和Reddit论坛中合成非自愿亲密图像（SNCII）传播生态系统的关键参与者、资源和策略，揭示了技术熟练度不同的用户如何共享资源并进行知识转移，并提出了监管干预点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 恶意行为者在互联网论坛中传播合成非自愿亲密图像（SNCII），交换资源、策略和生成内容。不同技术水平的参与者活跃于不同平台（如4chan吸引技术熟练者，Reddit吸引普通用户），需要全面了解这一生态系统以制定有效对策。

Method: 对多个社区进行综合分析，包括282,154条4chan评论和78,308条Reddit提交，时间跨度为2025年6月至11月的165天。分析涉及参与者、行为和资源，特别关注技术熟练度差异和知识转移模式。

Result: 研究发现：（1）不同技术水平的用户使用和共享广泛的SNCII内容创建主要资源以及促进传播的次要资源；（2）专家与新手之间的知识转移促进了这些非法资源的传播。研究还识别了现有SNCII监管基础设施的缺陷。

Conclusion: 基于实证分析，研究综合提出了加强威慑的几个关键干预点，为完善SNCII监管框架提供了具体建议，强调了针对不同技术水平和平台特性的差异化监管策略的重要性。

Abstract: Many malicious actors responsible for disseminating synthetic non-consensual intimate imagery (SNCII) operate within internet forums to exchange resources, strategies, and generated content across multiple platforms. Technically-sophisticated actors gravitate toward certain communities (e.g., 4chan), while lower-sophistication end-users are more active on others (e.g., Reddit). To characterize key stakeholders in the broader ecosystem, we perform an integrated analysis of multiple communities, analyzing 282,154 4chan comments and 78,308 Reddit submissions spanning 165 days between June and November 2025 to characterize involved actors, actions, and resources. We find: (a) that users with differing levels of technical sophistication employ and share a wide range of primary resources facilitating SNCII content creation as well as numerous secondary resources facilitating dissemination; and (b) that knowledge transfer between experts and newcomers facilitates propagation of these illicit resources. Based on our empirical analysis, we identify gaps in existing SNCII regulatory infrastructure and synthesize several critical intervention points for bolstering deterrence.

</details>


### [526] [Infrastructure First: Enabling Embodied AI for Science in the Global South](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06722)
*Shaoshan Liu,Jie Tang,Marwa S. Hassan,Mohamed H. Sharkawy,Moustafa M. G. Fouda,Tiewei Shang,Zixin Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 论文主张基础设施优先的具身AI科学方法，强调通过可靠的计算、硬件和系统支持，使全球南方机构能够将AI进步转化为持续的科学能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球南方面临科学实验能力不足的根本限制：人手太少而实验太多。需要将自动化从奢侈品转变为必要的科学基础设施，以克服人力、电力和连接性限制。

Method: 提出基础设施优先的方法，强调需要可靠的边缘计算、能效硬件、模块化机器人系统、本地化数据管道和开放标准作为具身AI科学部署的基础。

Result: 开源AI和基础模型已缩小知识差距，但缺乏基础设施支持使得先进模型仍被困在资源充足的实验室中。基础设施是部署具身智能的主要障碍。

Conclusion: 通过基础设施优先的具身AI科学方法，全球南方机构能够将AI进步转化为持续的科学能力和有竞争力的研究成果，实现科学实验的自主运行。

Abstract: Embodied AI for Science (EAI4S) brings intelligence into the laboratory by uniting perception, reasoning, and robotic action to autonomously run experiments in the physical world. For the Global South, this shift is not about adopting advanced automation for its own sake, but about overcoming a fundamental capacity constraint: too few hands to run too many experiments. By enabling continuous, reliable experimentation under limits of manpower, power, and connectivity, EAI4S turns automation from a luxury into essential scientific infrastructure. The main obstacle, however, is not algorithmic capability. It is infrastructure. Open-source AI and foundation models have narrowed the knowledge gap, but EAI4S depends on dependable edge compute, energy-efficient hardware, modular robotic systems, localized data pipelines, and open standards. Without these foundations, even the most capable models remain trapped in well-resourced laboratories. This article argues for an infrastructure-first approach to EAI4S and outlines the practical requirements for deploying embodied intelligence at scale, offering a concrete pathway for Global South institutions to translate AI advances into sustained scientific capacity and competitive research output.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [527] [Evolution of Optimization Methods: Algorithms, Scenarios, and Evaluations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12968)
*Tong Zhang,Jiangning Zhang,Zhucun Xue,Juntao Jiang,Yicheng Xu,Chengming Xu,Teng Hu,Xingyu Xie,Xiaobin Hu,Yabiao Wang,Yong Liu,Shuicheng Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对深度学习优化算法演进轨迹的回顾性分析，通过综合实证评估主流优化器，提炼关键趋势和设计权衡，为下一代高效、鲁棒、可信的优化方法提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习优化面临收敛速度、泛化能力和计算效率的平衡挑战。大规模模型训练、差分隐私要求和分布式学习范式暴露了传统一阶方法在隐私保护和内存效率方面的局限性，而二阶和零阶方法各有优势但缺乏统一框架。

Method: 回顾性分析深度学习优化算法的演进轨迹，对主流优化器在不同模型架构和训练场景下进行全面的实证评估，综合理论洞见与大量实证证据。

Result: 提炼了关键新兴趋势和基本设计权衡，指出了未来研究的有前景方向，为设计下一代高效、鲁棒、可信的优化方法提供了可操作的指导。

Conclusion: 通过综合理论分析和实证评估，为深度学习优化领域提供了统一的视角和实用指导，有助于推动下一代优化方法的发展，代码已开源供社区使用。

Abstract: Balancing convergence speed, generalization capability, and computational efficiency remains a core challenge in deep learning optimization. First-order gradient descent methods, epitomized by stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and Adam, serve as the cornerstone of modern training pipelines. However, large-scale model training, stringent differential privacy requirements, and distributed learning paradigms expose critical limitations in these conventional approaches regarding privacy protection and memory efficiency. To mitigate these bottlenecks, researchers explore second-order optimization techniques to surpass first-order performance ceilings, while zeroth-order methods reemerge to alleviate memory constraints inherent to large-scale training. Despite this proliferation of methodologies, the field lacks a cohesive framework that unifies underlying principles and delineates application scenarios for these disparate approaches. In this work, we retrospectively analyze the evolutionary trajectory of deep learning optimization algorithms and present a comprehensive empirical evaluation of mainstream optimizers across diverse model architectures and training scenarios. We distill key emerging trends and fundamental design trade-offs, pinpointing promising directions for future research. By synthesizing theoretical insights with extensive empirical evidence, we provide actionable guidance for designing next-generation highly efficient, robust, and trustworthy optimization methods. The code is available at https://github.com/APRIL-AIGC/Awesome-Optimizer.

</details>


### [528] [Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13016)
*Yaxuan Li,Yuxin Zuo,Bingxiang He,Jinqian Zhang,Chaojun Xiao,Cheng Qian,Tianyu Yu,Huan-ang Gao,Wenkai Yang,Zhiyuan Liu,Ning Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在线策略蒸馏（OPD）的训练动态和机制，揭示了OPD成功或失败的两个关键条件，分析了token级机制，并提出了恢复失败OPD的实用策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线策略蒸馏已成为大型语言模型后训练的核心技术，但其训练动态机制仍不明确。本文旨在系统研究OPD的动态过程和内在机制，理解其成功与失败的条件。

Method: 通过弱到强反向蒸馏验证条件假设；分析token级机制，研究高概率token的渐进对齐；提出两种恢复失败OPD的实用策略：离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择。

Result: 发现OPD成功的两个关键条件：师生需有兼容的思维模式；教师需提供学生训练中未见过的新能力。token级分析显示成功的OPD表现为在学生访问状态下高概率token的渐进对齐，这些token集中了97%-99%的概率质量。提出的策略能有效恢复失败的OPD。

Conclusion: OPD的成功依赖于师生思维模式的兼容性和教师的新能力提供。虽然OPD提供密集的token级奖励，但这种"免费午餐"存在代价，引发了OPD能否扩展到长视野蒸馏的问题。研究为理解OPD机制提供了系统框架。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succeeds or fails: (i) the student and teacher should share compatible thinking patterns; and (ii) even with consistent thinking patterns and higher scores, the teacher must offer genuinely new capabilities beyond what the student has seen during training. We validate these findings through weak-to-strong reverse distillation, showing that same-family 1.5B and 7B teachers are distributionally indistinguishable from the student's perspective. Probing into the token-level mechanism, we show that successful OPD is characterized by progressive alignment on high-probability tokens at student-visited states, a small shared token set that concentrates most of the probability mass (97%-99%). We further propose two practical strategies to recover failing OPD: off-policy cold start and teacher-aligned prompt selection. Finally, we show that OPD's apparent free lunch of dense token-level reward comes at a cost, raising the question of whether OPD can scale to long-horizon distillation.

</details>


### [529] [Lightning OPD: Efficient Post-Training for Large Reasoning Models with Offline On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13010)
*Yecheng Wu,Song Han,Hai Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Lightning OPD，一种离线策略蒸馏框架，通过预计算教师模型在SFT轨迹上的对数概率来保证教师一致性，消除了在线教师服务器的需求，实现了4倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准在线策略蒸馏(OPD)需要在训练期间持续运行教师模型推理服务器，导致巨大的基础设施开销。离线OPD的简单实现（预计算教师对数概率）在实践中无法可靠匹配标准OPD的性能，需要深入理解这种差异的根本原因。

Method: 首先识别了教师一致性这一关键条件：要求监督微调(SFT)和OPD使用相同的教师模型。违反此条件会引入不可约的梯度偏差。基于此提出Lightning OPD框架，通过预计算教师模型在SFT轨迹上的对数概率来保证教师一致性，完全消除对在线教师服务器的需求。该方法具有有界的梯度差异和隐式正则化效应，有助于防止策略漂移。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上的广泛实验表明，Lightning OPD实现了最先进的性能并显著提升效率。从SFT初始化的Qwen3-8B-Base模型出发，仅用30GPU小时就在AIME 2024上达到69.9%的准确率，相比标准OPD实现了4.0倍加速，大幅降低了LLM后训练的学术研究门槛。

Conclusion: Lightning OPD通过保证教师一致性，实现了与标准OPD相同的最优解，同时完全消除了在线教师服务器的需求。该方法不仅解决了离线OPD的性能问题，还提供了效率优势，使得大规模语言模型的后训练对学术研究更加可行。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, standard OPD requires a live teacher inference server throughout training, resulting in substantial infrastructure overhead. In this work, we investigate whether on-policy distillation can be performed offline. A natural approach is to precompute teacher log-probabilities once over SFT rollouts and reuse them during training. In practice, however, this offline variant fails to reliably match the performance of standard OPD. To understand this discrepancy, we identify a previously overlooked condition that is critical for any OPD pipeline, which we term teacher consistency. This condition requires that the same teacher model be used for both supervised fine-tuning and OPD. We show that violating teacher consistency introduces an irreducible gradient bias, causing both offline and online OPD to converge to a suboptimal fixed point regardless of training duration. Building on this insight, we propose Lightning OPD, an offline on-policy distillation framework that enforces teacher consistency by precomputing teacher log-probabilities over SFT rollouts. This design eliminates the need for a live teacher server entirely. We further show that, under teacher consistency, Lightning OPD shares the same optimum as standard OPD, with bounded gradient discrepancy and an implicit regularization effect that helps prevent policy drift. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that Lightning OPD achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly improved efficiency. Starting from an SFT-initialized Qwen3-8B-Base model, Lightning OPD reaches 69.9% on AIME 2024 in just 30 GPU hours, achieving a 4.0x speedup over standard OPD and substantially lowering the barrier to entry for academic research on LLM post-training.

</details>


### [530] [CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13024)
*Benzhao Tang,Shiyu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CLAD是首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，无需解压和解析，通过检测压缩字节模式中的异常实现高效检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统日志爆炸式增长使得流式压缩变得必要，但现有日志异常检测方法需要完全解压和解析，产生严重的预处理开销。需要一种能直接在压缩数据上工作的方法来消除这些瓶颈。

Method: CLAD利用关键洞察：正常日志压缩成规则的字节模式，而异常会系统性破坏这些模式。采用专门构建的架构，包括扩张卷积字节编码器、混合Transformer-mLSTM和四路聚合池化。采用两阶段训练策略：掩码预训练和焦点对比微调来处理严重的类别不平衡。

Result: 在五个数据集上评估，CLAD实现了最先进的平均F1分数0.9909，比最佳基线高出2.72个百分点。在完全消除解压和解析开销的同时提供卓越的准确性。

Conclusion: CLAD提供了一个强大的解决方案，能够泛化到结构化流式压缩器，为日志异常检测提供了高效且准确的新方法。

Abstract: The explosive growth of system logs makes streaming compression essential, yet existing log anomaly detection (LAD) methods incur severe pre-processing overhead by requiring full decompression and parsing. We introduce CLAD, the first deep learning framework to perform LAD directly on compressed byte streams. CLAD bypasses these bottlenecks by exploiting a key insight: normal logs compress into regular byte patterns, while anomalies systematically disrupt them. To extract these multi-scale deviations from opaque bytes, we propose a purpose-built architecture integrating a dilated convolutional byte encoder, a hybrid Transformer--mLSTM, and four-way aggregation pooling. This is coupled with a two-stage training strategy of masked pre-training and focal-contrastive fine-tuning to effectively handle severe class imbalance. Evaluated across five datasets, CLAD achieves a state-of-the-art average F1-score of 0.9909 and outperforms the best baseline by 2.72 percentage points. It delivers superior accuracy while completely eliminating decompression and parsing overheads, offering a robust solution that generalizes to structured streaming compressors.

</details>


### [531] [An Optimal Sauer Lemma Over $k$-ary Alphabets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12952)
*Steve Hanneke,Qinglin Meng,Shay Moran,Amirreza Shaeiri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文建立了多类别和列表预测的尖锐Sauer不等式，用DS维度和列表-DS维度表达，改进了基于Natarajan维度的指数依赖关系，获得了最优的多项式依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对于k元字母表的多类别函数类，Natarajan维度作为VC维度的类似物，其对应的Sauer型边界在k>2时不是最优的。需要建立更尖锐的边界来改进多类别和列表预测的理论基础。

Method: 使用多项式方法证明多类别和列表预测的Sauer不等式，该不等式用Daniely-Shalev-Shwartz(DS)维度及其扩展列表-DS维度表达。

Result: 获得了对于任意字母表大小k、列表大小ℓ和维度值的紧致边界，将Natarajan基边界中对ℓ的指数依赖替换为最优的多项式依赖，并改进了对k的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 建立了多类别和列表预测的尖锐Sauer不等式，改进了列表PAC学习和列表预测器一致收敛的样本复杂度上界，为多类别学习理论提供了更优的理论基础。

Abstract: The Sauer-Shelah-Perles Lemma is a cornerstone of combinatorics and learning theory, bounding the size of a binary hypothesis class in terms of its Vapnik-Chervonenkis (VC) dimension. For classes of functions over a $k$-ary alphabet, namely the multiclass setting, the Natarajan dimension has long served as an analogue of VC dimension, yet the corresponding Sauer-type bounds are suboptimal for alphabet sizes $k>2$.
  In this work, we establish a sharp Sauer inequality for multiclass and list prediction. Our bound is expressed in terms of the Daniely--Shalev-Shwartz (DS) dimension, and more generally with its extension, the list-DS dimension -- the combinatorial parameters that characterize multiclass and list PAC learnability. Our bound is tight for every alphabet size $k$, list size $\ell$, and dimension value, replacing the exponential dependence on $\ell$ in the Natarajan-based bound by the optimal polynomial dependence, and improving the dependence on $k$ as well. Our proof uses the polynomial method. In contrast to the classical VC case, where several direct combinatorial proofs are known, we are not aware of any purely combinatorial proof in the DS setting. This motivates several directions for future research, which are discussed in the paper.
  As consequences, we obtain improved sample complexity upper bounds for list PAC learning and for uniform convergence of list predictors, sharpening the recent results of Charikar et al.~(STOC~2023), Hanneke et al.~(COLT~2024), and Brukhim et al.~(NeurIPS~2024).

</details>


### [532] [The Verification Tax: Fundamental Limits of AI Auditing in the Rare-Error Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12951)
*Jason Z Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文证明深度学习中校准误差估计存在根本性极限，揭示了随着AI模型改进，验证其校准性会变得更困难，并提出了四个与传统评估实践相悖的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习校准评估存在统计噪声问题，最常引用的校准结果（如CIFAR-100上的后温度缩放ECE为0.012）实际上低于统计噪声底限。作者旨在揭示校准误差估计的根本性理论极限，挑战当前校准评估的标准实践。

Method: 通过理论分析证明校准误差估计的极小极大率，建立四个与标准评估实践相悖的理论结果。在五个基准测试（MMLU、TruthfulQA、ARC-Challenge、HellaSwag、WinoGrande）上验证，使用6个来自5个家族的LLM（8B-405B参数），共27个基准-模型对，采用基于对数概率的置信度，95%自助置信区间和置换检验。

Result: 1. 校准误差估计的极小极大率为Θ((Lε/m)^{1/3})，无法超越；2. 无标签的自评估对校准提供零信息；3. 在mε≈1处存在尖锐相变，低于该阈值时误校准不可检测；4. 主动查询消除Lipschitz常数，将估计简化为检测；5. 验证成本以L^K的速率随管道深度指数增长。实证验证显示80%的模型对中自评估不显著，前沿模型中23%的成对比较与噪声无法区分。

Conclusion: 随着AI模型改进，验证其校准性变得根本性更困难。可信的校准声明必须报告验证底限，并在增益接近基准分辨率时优先考虑主动查询。当前校准评估实践存在根本性限制，需要新的验证方法。

Abstract: The most cited calibration result in deep learning -- post-temperature-scaling ECE of 0.012 on CIFAR-100 (Guo et al., 2017) -- is below the statistical noise floor. We prove this is not a failure of the experiment but a law: the minimax rate for estimating calibration error with model error rate epsilon is Theta((Lepsilon/m)^{1/3}), and no estimator can beat it. This "verification tax" implies that as AI models improve, verifying their calibration becomes fundamentally harder -- with the same exponent in opposite directions. We establish four results that contradict standard evaluation practice: (1) self-evaluation without labels provides exactly zero information about calibration, bounded by a constant independent of compute; (2) a sharp phase transition at mepsilon approx 1 below which miscalibration is undetectable; (3) active querying eliminates the Lipschitz constant, collapsing estimation to detection; (4) verification cost grows exponentially with pipeline depth at rate L^K. We validate across five benchmarks (MMLU, TruthfulQA, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag, WinoGrande; ~27,000 items) with 6 LLMs from 5 families (8B-405B parameters, 27 benchmark-model pairs with logprob-based confidence), 95% bootstrap CIs, and permutation tests. Self-evaluation non-significance holds in 80% of pairs. Across frontier models, 23% of pairwise comparisons are indistinguishable from noise, implying that credible calibration claims must report verification floors and prioritize active querying once gains approach benchmark resolution.

</details>


### [533] [Parcae: Scaling Laws For Stable Looped Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12946)
*Hayden Prairie,Zachary Novack,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick,Daniel Y. Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Parcae是一种稳定的循环架构，通过约束注入参数的谱范数解决传统循环架构的不稳定性问题，在固定参数和数据预算下比Transformer基线提升质量，并建立了可预测的训练和测试时计算扩展规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统固定深度架构通过增加参数化来扩展质量，但会导致更高的内存占用。循环架构作为一种替代方案，通过循环使用层块来增加FLOPs，但现有训练方法存在不稳定问题（残差爆炸和损失尖峰）。需要解决这些不稳定性问题，使循环架构能够可靠地扩展计算。

Method: 将循环视为残差流上的非线性时变动力系统，通过线性近似分析发现不稳定性源于注入参数的大谱范数。提出Parcae架构，通过对负对角参数化进行离散化来约束注入参数的谱范数，从而确保稳定性。研究了训练和测试时通过循环扩展FLOPs的规律。

Result: Parcae比先前大规模循环模型验证困惑度降低6.3%。在1.3B参数规模下，与强Transformer基线相比，在固定参数和数据预算下，CORE和Core-Extended质量分别提升2.99和1.18分，相对质量达到两倍大小Transformer的87.5%。建立了可预测的扩展规律：训练时循环和数据应协同增加；测试时循环扩展计算遵循可预测的饱和指数衰减。

Conclusion: Parcae通过约束注入参数谱范数解决了循环架构的不稳定性问题，实现了稳定的循环训练。循环架构能够有效扩展计算而不增加参数，在固定参数和数据预算下优于传统Transformer，并建立了可预测的扩展规律，为计算扩展提供了新途径。

Abstract: Traditional fixed-depth architectures scale quality by increasing training FLOPs, typically through increased parameterization, at the expense of a higher memory footprint, or data. A potential alternative is looped architectures, which instead increase FLOPs by sending activations through a block of layers in a loop. While promising, existing recipes for training looped architectures can be unstable, suffering from residual explosion and loss spikes. We address these challenges by recasting looping as a nonlinear time-variant dynamical system over the residual stream. Via a linear approximation to this system, we find that instability occurs in existing looped architectures as a result of large spectral norms in their injection parameters. To address these instability issues, we propose Parcae, a novel stable, looped architecture that constrains the spectral norm of the injection parameters via discretization of a negative diagonal parameterization. As a result, Parcae achieves up to 6.3% lower validation perplexity over prior large-scale looped models. Using our stable looped architecture, we investigate the scaling properties of looping as a medium to improve quality by increasing FLOPs in training and test-time. For training, we derive predictable power laws to scale FLOPs while keeping parameter count fixed. Our initial scaling laws suggest that looping and data should be increased in tandem, given a fixed FLOP budget. At test-time, we find that Parcae can use looping to scale compute, following a predictable, saturating exponential decay. When scaled up to 1.3B parameters, we find that Parcae improves CORE and Core-Extended quality by 2.99 and 1.18 points when compared to strong Transformer baselines under a fixed parameter and data budget, achieving a relative quality of up to 87.5% a Transformer twice the size.

</details>


### [534] [TCL: Enabling Fast and Efficient Cross-Hardware Tensor Program Optimization via Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12891)
*Chaoyao Shen,Linfeng Jiang,Yixian Shen,Tao Xu,Guoqing Li,Anuj Pathania,Andy D. Pimentel,Meng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TCL是一个高效、可迁移的深度学习编译器框架，通过数据高效的采样器、Mamba成本模型和连续知识蒸馏，显著减少调优时间并提升推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习编译器依赖大量离线数据集进行成本建模和自动调优，存在数据收集成本高、跨平台迁移性差的问题。需要一种更高效、可迁移的编译器框架来解决这些挑战。

Method: TCL框架基于三个核心组件：1) RDU采样器，通过联合优化代表性、多样性和不确定性，仅选择10%的张量程序进行训练；2) Mamba成本模型，有效捕捉长程调度依赖，在预测精度和计算成本间取得良好平衡；3) 连续知识蒸馏框架，渐进式地在多硬件平台间迁移知识，避免传统多任务学习的参数爆炸和数据依赖问题。

Result: 实验验证了各组件和整体框架的有效性。在CPU和GPU平台上优化主流DL模型时，TCL相比Tenset-MLP平均分别实现16.8倍和12.48倍的调优时间加速，以及1.20倍和1.13倍的推理延迟降低。

Conclusion: TCL框架通过创新的数据高效采样、轻量级成本建模和渐进式知识迁移，显著提升了深度学习编译器在跨硬件平台优化中的效率和性能，为解决现有编译器框架的数据依赖和迁移性问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Deep learning (DL) compilers rely on cost models and auto-tuning to optimize tensor programs for target hardware. However, existing approaches depend on large offline datasets, incurring high collection costs and offering suboptimal transferability across platforms. In this paper, we introduce TCL, a novel efficient and transferable compiler framework for fast tensor program optimization across diverse hardware platforms to address these challenges. Specifically, TCL is built on three core enablers: (1) the RDU Sampler, a data-efficient active learning strategy that selects only 10% of tensor programs by jointly optimizing Representativeness, Diversity, and Uncertainty, substantially reducing data collection costs while maintaining near-original model accuracy; (2) a new Mamba-based cost model that efficiently captures long-range schedule dependencies while achieving a favorable trade-off between prediction accuracy and computational cost through reduced parameterization and lightweight sequence modeling; and (3) a continuous knowledge distillation framework that effectively and progressively transfers knowledge across multiple hardware platforms while avoiding the parameter explosion and data dependency issues typically caused by traditional multi-task learning. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of each individual enabler and the holistic TCL framework. When optimizing a range of mainstream DL models on both CPU and GPU platforms, TCL achieves, on average, 16.8x and 12.48x faster tuning time, and 1.20x and 1.13x lower inference latency, respectively, compared to Tenset-MLP.

</details>


### [535] [Information-Theoretic Optimization for Task-Adapted Compressed Sensing Magnetic Resonance Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12709)
*Xinyu Peng,Ziyang Zheng,Wenrui Dai,Duoduo Xue,Shaohui Li,Chenglin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出首个基于信息论的任务自适应压缩感知MRI框架，通过最大化欠采样k空间测量与临床任务间的互信息，实现不确定性预测和任意采样比的自适应控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有任务自适应CS-MRI方法存在医学诊断的不确定性问题，且无法在端到端优化中实现自适应采样，限制了其在临床任务中的实际应用。

Method: 从信息论角度形式化任务自适应CS-MRI优化问题，最大化欠采样k空间测量与临床任务间的互信息。采用摊销优化和变分边界构建，联合优化采样、重建和任务推理模型，实现单一模型对任意采样比的灵活控制。

Result: 在大规模MRI数据集上的实验表明，该框架在Dice等标准指标上达到高度竞争力，同时通过广义能量距离(GED)测量显示能更好地匹配真实后验分布。

Conclusion: 提出的信息论框架首次解决了任务自适应CS-MRI的不确定性问题，实现了任意采样比的自适应控制和两种不同临床场景的统一处理，为临床MRI应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Task-adapted compressed sensing magnetic resonance imaging (CS-MRI) is emerging to address the specific demands of downstream clinical tasks with significantly fewer k-space measurements than required by Nyquist sampling. However, existing task-adapted CS-MRI methods suffer from the uncertainty problem for medical diagnosis and cannot achieve adaptive sampling in end-to-end optimization with reconstruction or clinical tasks. To address these limitations, we propose the first task-adapted CS-MRI from the information-theoretic perspective to simultaneously achieve probabilistic inference for uncertainty prediction and adapt to arbitrary sampling ratios and versatile clinical applications. Specifically, we formalize the task-adapted CS-MRI optimization problem by maximizing the mutual information between undersampled k-space measurements and clinical tasks to enable probabilistic inference for addressing the uncertainty problem. We leverage amortized optimization and construct tractable variational bounds for mutual information to jointly optimize sampling, reconstruction, and task-inference models, which enables flexible sampling ratio control using a single end-to-end trained model. Furthermore, the proposed framework addresses two kinds of distinct clinical scenarios within a unified approach, i.e., i) joint task and reconstruction, where reconstruction serves as an auxiliary process to enhance task performance; and ii) task implementation with suppressed reconstruction, applicable for privacy protection. Extensive experiments on large-scale MRI datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves highly competitive performance on standard metrics like Dice compared to deterministic counterpart but provides better distribution matching to the ground-truth posterior distribution as measured by the generalized energy distance (GED).

</details>


### [536] [Understanding and Improving Continuous Adversarial Training for LLMs via In-context Learning Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12817)
*Shaopeng Fu,Di Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次从理论角度分析了基于嵌入空间的连续对抗训练（CAT）对大型语言模型的防御机制，提出了基于上下文学习理论的鲁棒泛化边界，并基于嵌入矩阵奇异值提出了改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然连续对抗训练（CAT）在防御大型语言模型的越狱攻击方面取得了经验性成功，但其底层机制——为什么嵌入空间中的对抗扰动能够帮助LLM防御输入标记空间合成的越狱提示——仍然未知。论文旨在从理论上解释CAT的工作原理。

Method: 1. 基于上下文学习（ICL）理论对CAT进行首次理论分析；2. 针对在线性变换器上使用嵌入空间对抗样本训练的上下文线性回归任务，证明了鲁棒泛化边界与嵌入空间扰动半径呈负相关；3. 基于嵌入矩阵奇异值与鲁棒性的关系，提出在CAT目标函数中引入依赖于嵌入矩阵奇异值的正则化项。

Result: 1. 理论证明了CAT的鲁棒泛化边界与嵌入空间扰动半径呈负相关，解释了CAT防御越狱提示的机制；2. 发现对抗训练LLM的鲁棒性与嵌入矩阵的奇异值密切相关；3. 实验表明提出的正则化方法能够帮助LLM实现更好的越狱鲁棒性-实用性权衡。

Conclusion: 该研究首次从理论上解释了连续对抗训练在大型语言模型中的防御机制，提出了基于嵌入矩阵奇异值的改进方法，为高效防御越狱攻击提供了理论依据和实践指导。

Abstract: Adversarial training (AT) is an effective defense for large language models (LLMs) against jailbreak attacks, but performing AT on LLMs is costly. To improve the efficiency of AT for LLMs, recent studies propose continuous AT (CAT) that searches for adversarial inputs within the continuous embedding space of LLMs during AT. While CAT has achieved empirical success, its underlying mechanism, i.e., why adversarial perturbations in the embedding space can help LLMs defend against jailbreak prompts synthesized in the input token space, remains unknown. This paper presents the first theoretical analysis of CAT on LLMs based on in-context learning (ICL) theory. For linear transformers trained with adversarial examples from the embedding space on in-context linear regression tasks, we prove a robust generalization bound that has a negative correlation with the perturbation radius in the embedding space. This clearly explains why CAT can defend against jailbreak prompts from the LLM's token space. Further, the robust bound shows that the robustness of an adversarially trained LLM is closely related to the singular values of its embedding matrix. Based on this, we propose to improve LLM CAT by introducing an additional regularization term, which depends on singular values of the LLM's embedding matrix, into the objective function of CAT. Experiments on real-world LLMs demonstrate that our method can help LLMs achieve a better jailbreak robustness-utility tradeoff. The code is available at https://github.com/fshp971/continuous-adv-icl.

</details>


### [537] [Algorithmic Analysis of Dense Associative Memory: Finite-Size Guarantees and Adversarial Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12811)
*Madhava Gaikwad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文对密集联想记忆(DAM)的检索动力学进行了算法分析，提供了有限N保证、收敛速率、对抗鲁棒性和容量界限，并建立了DAM检索与势博弈的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对密集联想记忆(DAM)的动力学分析主要研究随机采样模式下的热力学极限N→∞，缺乏有限规模保证和显式收敛速率。需要开发能够提供有限N保证和明确收敛速率的算法分析框架。

Method: 开发了DAM检索动力学的算法分析方法，在显式可验证的模式条件下获得有限N保证。在模式分离假设和高负载下的有界干扰条件下，证明了异步检索动力学的几何收敛性。建立了通过显式边界条件量化的对抗鲁棒性界限，推导了容量保证，并展示了DAM检索动力学具有势博弈解释。

Result: 证明了异步检索动力学在进入吸引域后具有几何收敛性，意味着O(log N)收敛时间。建立了对抗鲁棒性界限，量化了每次扫描可容忍的损坏比特数。推导了容量保证在最坏情况下为Θ(N^{n-1})乘以多对数因子，对于随机模式集合恢复经典Θ(N^{n-1})缩放。展示了DAM检索动力学具有势博弈解释，确保在异步更新下收敛到纯纳什均衡。

Conclusion: 该研究为密集联想记忆提供了首个有限规模保证和显式收敛速率分析框架，建立了对抗鲁棒性界限和容量保证，并揭示了DAM检索动力学与势博弈理论的深刻联系，为理解DAM的算法性质提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Dense Associative Memory (DAM) generalizes Hopfield networks through higher-order interactions and achieves storage capacity that scales as $O(N^{n-1})$ under suitable pattern separation conditions. Existing dynamical analyses primarily study the thermodynamic limit $N\to\infty$ with randomly sampled patterns and therefore do not provide finite-size guarantees or explicit convergence rates.
  We develop an algorithmic analysis of DAM retrieval dynamics that yields finite-$N$ guarantees under explicit, verifiable pattern conditions. Under a separation assumption and a bounded-interference condition at high loading, we prove geometric convergence of asynchronous retrieval dynamics, which implies $O(\log N)$ convergence time once the trajectory enters the basin of attraction. We further establish adversarial robustness bounds expressed through an explicit margin condition that quantifies the number of corrupted bits tolerable per sweep, and derive capacity guarantees that scale as $Θ(N^{n-1})$ up to polylogarithmic factors in the worst case, while recovering the classical $Θ(N^{n-1})$ scaling for random pattern ensembles. Finally, we show that DAM retrieval dynamics admit a potential-game interpretation that ensures convergence to pure Nash equilibria under asynchronous updates.
  Complete proofs are provided in the appendices, together with preliminary experiments that illustrate the predicted convergence, robustness, and capacity scaling behavior.

</details>


### [538] [VFA: Relieving Vector Operations in Flash Attention with Global Maximum Pre-computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12798)
*Yupeng Sun,Yanzhao Li,Zhiqiang Zou,Bai Du,Zhiyuan Zhang,Hui Dong,Gaoyige Fan,Hui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出VFA和VSA方法，通过改进FlashAttention的在线softmax机制，减少行最大值驱动的更新操作，缓解向量/SIMD瓶颈，提升现代加速器上的注意力计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着注意力核在现代加速器上接近峰值张量核心/立方核心吞吐量，在线softmax中的非矩阵乘法组件（特别是每块的行最大值和行和归约以及重缩放链）可能成为向量或SIMD限制并主导延迟。需要硬件友好的方法来减少这些开销。

Method: 提出Vector Relieved Flash Attention (VFA)：1) 通过键块表示的廉价近似初始化运行最大值；2) 重新排序键块遍历以优先处理高影响的sink和局部块；3) 冻结剩余块的最大值以避免重复归约和重缩放。进一步与BLASST等块稀疏跳过方法集成形成Vector Relieved Sparse Attention (VSA)，减少块数量和每块开销。

Result: 评估显示：1) sink和局部重排序能早期稳定运行最大值；2) 简单的Q和K块摘要因块内异质性而失败；3) 当最大值出现在中间块时需要m初始化。相比C16V32基线，C8V32、C4V32和C4V16在现代硬件上实现近两倍加速，C4V16通过增强指数容量将提供六倍加速。

Conclusion: VFA和VSA有效缓解了在线softmax归约瓶颈且无性能损失，通过硬件友好的设计提高了注意力计算效率，特别适合现代加速器架构。

Abstract: FlashAttention-style online softmax enables exact attention computation with linear memory by streaming score tiles through on-chip memory and maintaining a running maximum and normalizer. However, as attention kernels approach peak tensor-core/cube-core throughput on modern accelerators, non-matmul components of online softmax -- especially per-tile rowmax and rowsum reductions and rescale chains -- can become vector or SIMD limited and dominate latency. This paper revisits FlashAttention and proposes Vector Relieved Flash Attention (VFA), a hardware-friendly method that reduces rowmax-driven updates of the running maximum while retaining the online-softmax structure. VFA initializes the running maximum via a cheap approximation from key-block representations, reorders key-block traversal to prioritize high-impact sink and local blocks, and freezes the maximum for remaining blocks to avoid repeated reductions and rescaling. We further integrate VFA with block-sparse skipping methods such as BLASST to form Vector Relieved Sparse Attention (VSA), which reduces both block count and per-block overhead. Notably, VFA and VSA completely avoid the conditional rescale operation in the update stage used in FA4.0. Extensive evaluations on benchmarks including MMLU and MATH500, together with attention statistics, verify our design: (i) sink and local reordering stabilizes the running maximum early; (ii) simple Q and K block summaries fail due to intra-block heterogeneity; (iii) m-initialization is required when maxima appear in middle blocks. Overall, VFA and VSA efficiently alleviate online-softmax reduction bottlenecks without performance loss. Compared to the C16V32 baseline, C8V32, C4V32 and C4V16 achieve nearly two times speedup on modern hardware while hitting the vector bottleneck. With upcoming architecture improvements, C4V16 will deliver six times speedup by enhancing exponent capacity.

</details>


### [539] [OSC: Hardware Efficient W4A4 Quantization via Outlier Separation in Channel Dimension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12782)
*Zhiyuan Zhang,Yanzhao Li,Zhiqiang Zou,Bai Du,Yupeng Sun,Hui Dong,Hui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OSC框架通过分析激活异常值的空间分布，发现其具有token持久性结构聚类特征，提出双路径计算方案：4位低精度GEMM路径和16位高精度分支GEMM路径，实现硬件友好的异常值抑制，在保持精度的同时获得显著加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 4位量化对于大语言模型的高吞吐部署至关重要，但激活异常值常导致精度显著下降，因为低比特格式的动态范围受限。需要解决异常值问题以实现高效部署。

Method: 系统研究异常值的空间分布，发现token持久性结构聚类效应；提出OSC框架，采用双路径计算：4位低精度GEMM路径和16位高精度分支GEMM路径；使用离线分组策略识别异常值所在通道，在线执行结构化子张量提取将分散的激活通道聚合成紧凑密集张量；对W2输入集成FP8回退策略。

Result: 在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-30B上，平均精度下降分别限制在2.19和1.12点；硬件友好性高，在现代AI加速器上相比W8A8 GEMM基线达到1.78倍峰值加速。

Conclusion: OSC框架通过利用异常值的结构聚类特性，实现了硬件高效的异常值抑制，在保持模型精度的同时显著提升推理速度，为大语言模型的4位量化部署提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: While 4-bit quantization is essential for high-throughput deployment of Large Language Models, activation outliers often lead to significant accuracy degradation due to the restricted dynamic range of low-bit formats. In this paper, we systematically investigate the spatial distribution of outliers and demonstrate a token-persistent structural clustering effect, where high-magnitude outliers consistently occupy fixed channels across tokens. Building on this insight, we propose OSC, a hardware-efficient framework for outlier suppression. During inference, OSC executes a dual-path computation consisting of a low-precision 4-bit General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM) path and a high-precision 16-bit branch GEMM path. Specifically, OSC uses an offline group-wise strategy to identify the channels where outliers are located and then performs structured sub-tensor extraction to coalesce these scattered activation channels into a compact dense tensor online. This mechanism implements outlier protection through regularized and high-throughput GEMM operations, achieving a seamless fit with modern 4-bit micro-scaling hardware. Furthermore, for the inputs of W2 where outlier clustering is less pronounced, we integrate a fallback strategy to FP8. Evaluation on Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-30B restricts the average accuracy drop to 2.19 and 1.12 points, respectively. Notably, OSC is highly hardware-friendly, achieving a peak speedup of 1.78x over the W8A8 GEMM baseline on a modern AI accelerator.

</details>


### [540] [Rethinking the Personalized Relaxed Initialization in the Federated Learning: Consistency and Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12768)
*Li Shen,Yan Sun,Dacheng Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FedInit算法缓解联邦学习中的客户端漂移问题，通过个性化松弛初始化改进本地训练，无需额外训练或通信成本


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中存在"客户端漂移"问题，由本地客户端间不一致的最优解引起，但缺乏理论分析解释这种不一致性的影响。需要缓解客户端漂移的负面影响并探索其本质

Method: 提出FedInit算法，在每个本地训练阶段开始时采用个性化松弛初始化状态。具体通过从当前全局状态向最新本地状态的反方向移动来初始化本地状态。引入超额风险分析研究泛化误差界

Result: 优化误差对本地不一致性不敏感，而主要影响泛化误差界。FedInit无需额外训练或通信成本即可达到与先进基准相当的结果。个性化松弛初始化可集成到现有算法中提升泛化性能

Conclusion: FedInit有效缓解了客户端漂移问题，通过理论分析揭示了本地不一致性主要影响泛化误差而非优化误差，为联邦学习中的客户端漂移问题提供了新的解决方案和分析框架

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed paradigm that coordinates massive local clients to collaboratively train a global model via stage-wise local training processes on the heterogeneous dataset. Previous works have implicitly studied that FL suffers from the ``client-drift'' problem, which is caused by the inconsistent optimum across local clients. However, till now it still lacks solid theoretical analysis to explain the impact of this local inconsistency. To alleviate the negative impact of ``client drift'' and explore its substance in FL, in this paper, we first propose an efficient FL algorithm FedInit, which allows employing the personalized relaxed initialization state at the beginning of each local training stage. Specifically, FedInit initializes the local state by moving away from the current global state towards the reverse direction of the latest local state. Moreover, to further understand how inconsistency disrupts performance in FL, we introduce the excess risk analysis and study the divergence term to investigate the test error in FL. Our studies show that optimization error is not sensitive to this local inconsistency, while it mainly affects the generalization error bound. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate its efficiency. The proposed FedInit method could achieve comparable results compared to several advanced benchmarks without any additional training or communication costs. Meanwhile, the stage-wise personalized relaxed initialization could also be incorporated into several current advanced algorithms to achieve higher generalization performance in the FL paradigm.

</details>


### [541] [Stress Detection Using Wearable Physiological and Sociometric Sensors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12746)
*Oscar Martinez Mozos,Virginia Sandulescu,Sally Andrews,David Ellis,Nicola Bellotto,Radu Dobrescu,Jose Manuel Ferrandez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于生理和社交传感器数据，采用机器学习方法实现社交情境中压力的自动检测，在TSST实验中验证了多模态融合的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 压力是现代社会中个体面临的重要社会问题，需要开发自动检测方法以帮助识别和管理压力状况。

Method: 结合生理和社交响应两种传感器系统，采用支持向量机、AdaBoost和k近邻等分类器，在控制的Trier社交压力测试(TSST)中进行实验。

Result: 融合两种传感器系统的测量数据能够准确区分压力情境和中性情境，同时评估了各传感器模态的单独判别能力及其在实时压力检测中的适用性。

Conclusion: 多模态传感器融合方法在压力检测中具有优势，研究还识别了最具判别性的压力检测特征，为实时压力监测系统开发提供了依据。

Abstract: Stress remains a significant social problem for individuals in modern societies. This paper presents a machine learning approach for the automatic detection of stress of people in a social situation by combining two sensor systems that capture physiological and social responses. We compare the performance using different classifiers including support vector machine, AdaBoost, and k-nearest neighbor. Our experimental results show that by combining the measurements from both sensor systems, we could accurately discriminate between stressful and neutral situations during a controlled Trier social stress test (TSST). Moreover, this paper assesses the discriminative ability of each sensor modality individually and considers their suitability for real-time stress detection. Finally, we present an study of the most discriminative features for stress detection.

</details>


### [542] [BID-LoRA: A Parameter-Efficient Framework for Continual Learning and Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12686)
*Jagadeesh Rachapudi,Ritali Vatsi,Praful Hambarde,Amit Shukla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个统一的持续学习与机器遗忘框架BID-LoRA，通过双向低秩适配器和逃逸遗忘机制，在仅更新5%参数的情况下实现精确知识删除、高效新知识整合并最小化知识泄漏。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习系统需要同时具备持续学习获取新知识的能力和机器遗忘删除过时、敏感或隐私信息的能力。现有持续学习方法较为成熟，但机器遗忘技术仍处于早期阶段，缺乏统一框架。简单组合现有方法会导致知识泄漏和基础知识的逐渐退化。

Method: 提出持续学习遗忘（CLU）统一范式，包含三个目标：精确删除不需要的知识、高效整合新知识同时保留先前信息、最小化跨周期知识泄漏。提出BID-LoRA框架，包含三个专用适配器路径（保留、新知识、遗忘）应用于注意力层，结合逃逸遗忘机制将遗忘类嵌入推送到与保留知识最远的位置，仅更新5%的参数。

Result: 在CIFAR-100数据集上的实验表明，BID-LoRA在多个适应周期中优于CLU基线方法。在CASIA-Face100（精选的人脸识别子集）上的进一步评估展示了在实际身份管理系统中的适用性，能够处理新用户注册和已撤销用户的删除。

Conclusion: 该研究提出了首个统一的持续学习与机器遗忘框架，通过BID-LoRA实现了高效的知识管理和隐私保护，为需要动态知识更新的实际应用提供了可行解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep learning underscore the need for systems that can not only acquire new knowledge through Continual Learning (CL) but also remove outdated, sensitive, or private information through Machine Unlearning (MU). However, while CL methods are well-developed, MU techniques remain in early stages, creating a critical gap for unified frameworks that depend on both capabilities. We find that naively combining existing CL and MU approaches results in knowledge leakage a gradual degradation of foundational knowledge across repeated adaptation cycles. To address this, we formalize Continual Learning Unlearning (CLU) as a unified paradigm with three key goals: (i) precise deletion of unwanted knowledge, (ii) efficient integration of new knowledge while preserving prior information, and (iii) minimizing knowledge leakage across cycles. We propose Bi-Directional Low-Rank Adaptation (BID-LoRA), a novel framework featuring three dedicated adapter pathways-retain, new, and unlearn applied to attention layers, combined with escape unlearning that pushes forget-class embeddings to positions maximally distant from retained knowledge, updating only 5% of parameters. Experiments on CIFAR-100 show that BID-LoRA outperforms CLU baselines across multiple adaptation cycles. We further evaluate on CASIA-Face100, a curated face recognition subset, demonstrating practical applicability to real-world identity management systems where new users must be enrolled and withdrawn users removed.

</details>


### [543] [Do VLMs Truly "Read" Candlesticks? A Multi-Scale Benchmark for Visual Stock Price Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12659)
*Kaiqi Hu,Linda Xiao,Shiyue Xu,Ziyi Tang,Mingwen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文构建了一个多尺度K线图数据集和标准化评估框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在股票价格预测中对多尺度视觉市场信号的理解能力，发现现有模型在常见市场场景中表现不佳且存在预测偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在股票价格预测中的应用缺乏有效的评估基准，无法真正评估模型对K线图的理解能力。现有数据集多为单周期或表格输入，而人类分析师依赖多尺度K线图进行分析，需要系统评估模型整合短期和长期视觉市场动态的能力。

Method: 构建多尺度K线图数据集和标准化评估框架，结合混淆矩阵诊断和信息系数时间序列指标进行评估，并引入XGBoost作为基于特征的时间基线模型。使用该数据集对代表性视觉语言模型进行基准测试，分析其利用多尺度股票价格数据的能力。

Result: 实验结果显示，大多数视觉语言模型仅在持续上涨或下跌趋势条件下表现良好，在更常见的市场场景中表现出较弱的预测能力。同时发现显著的预测偏差和对提示中明确指定的预测时间范围敏感性有限，表明在精确时间推理方面存在固有局限性。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前视觉语言模型在股票价格预测中的局限性，特别是在多尺度视觉市场动态理解和精确时间推理方面存在不足。提出的数据集和评估框架为未来研究提供了标准化基准，有助于推动视觉语言模型在金融领域的更有效应用。

Abstract: Vision-language models(VLMs) are increasingly applied to visual stock price forecasting, yet existing benchmarks inadequately evaluate their understanding of stock price in candlestick charts. First, prior studies fail to isolate VLMs' comprehension of visual inputs genuinely improves predictive performance and whether VLMs truly comprehend candlestick patterns. Further, most existing datasets and evaluation setups are designed around single-period or tabular inputs. However, human analysts strongly rely on multi-scale candlestick charts, where longer-term horizons capture trend direction and shorter-term horizons provide cues for inflection points, making it difficult to systematically assess VLMs' ability to integrate short-term and long-term visual market dynamics. To bridge this gap, we construct a multi-scale candlestick charts dataset and a standardized evaluation framework to assess VLMs' ability to utilize multi-scale visual market signals. Evaluation combines confusion-matrix-based diagnostics with information coefficient(IC) time series metrics and includes XGBoost as a feature-based temporal baseline. Using this dataset, we benchmark representative VLMs and analyze their ability to leverage multi-scale stock price data. Experimental results show that most VLMs perform well only under persistent uptrend or downtrend conditions, while exhibiting weak predictive capability in more common market scenarios. We also identify significant prediction biases and limited sensitivity to explicitly specified forecast horizons in prompts, indicating inherent limitations in precise temporal reasoning.

</details>


### [544] [SOAR: Self-Correction for Optimal Alignment and Refinement in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12617)
*You Qin,Linqing Wang,Hao Fei,Roger Zimmermann,Liefeng Bo,Qinglin Lu,Chunyu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SOAR是一种用于扩散模型后训练的自校正方法，填补了监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）之间的空白，通过单步停止梯度展开和重噪声技术提供密集的每时间步监督，无需奖励模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前扩散模型后训练流程存在根本性缺陷：SFT仅在理想的前向噪声过程状态上优化去噪器，一旦推理偏离这些状态，后续去噪就依赖分布外泛化而非学习到的校正，存在类似于自回归模型的暴露偏差问题。RL理论上可以解决这种不匹配，但其终端奖励信号稀疏、存在信用分配困难且容易奖励黑客攻击。

Method: SOAR是一种偏差校正后训练方法：从真实样本开始，使用当前模型执行单步停止梯度展开，对得到的偏离轨迹状态重新加噪，然后监督模型使其回归到原始干净目标。该方法是在策略的、无需奖励的，提供密集的每时间步监督，没有信用分配问题。

Result: 在SD3.5-Medium上，SOAR将GenEval从0.70提升到0.78，OCR从0.64提升到0.67，同时提高了所有基于模型的偏好分数。在受控的奖励特定实验中，SOAR在美学和文本-图像对齐任务上都超越了Flow-GRPO的最终指标值，尽管没有访问奖励模型。

Conclusion: SOAR填补了SFT和RL之间的空白，其基础损失函数包含了标准SFT目标，可以直接替代SFT作为预训练后更强的第一阶段后训练方法，同时保持与后续RL对齐的完全兼容性。

Abstract: The post-training pipeline for diffusion models currently has two stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated data and reinforcement learning (RL) with reward models. A fundamental gap separates them. SFT optimizes the denoiser only on ground-truth states sampled from the forward noising process; once inference deviates from these ideal states, subsequent denoising relies on out-of-distribution generalization rather than learned correction, exhibiting the same exposure bias that afflicts autoregressive models, but accumulated along the denoising trajectory instead of the token sequence. RL can in principle address this mismatch, yet its terminal reward signal is sparse, suffers from credit-assignment difficulty, and risks reward hacking. We propose SOAR (Self-Correction for Optimal Alignment and Refinement), a bias-correction post-training method that fills this gap. Starting from a real sample, SOAR performs a single stop-gradient rollout with the current model, re-noises the resulting off-trajectory state, and supervises the model to steer back toward the original clean target. The method is on-policy, reward-free, and provides dense per-timestep supervision with no credit-assignment problem. On SD3.5-Medium, SOAR improves GenEval from 0.70 to 0.78 and OCR from 0.64 to 0.67 over SFT, while simultaneously raising all model-based preference scores. In controlled reward-specific experiments, SOAR surpasses Flow-GRPO in final metric value on both aesthetic and text-image alignment tasks, despite having no access to a reward model. Since SOAR's base loss subsumes the standard SFT objective, it can directly replace SFT as a stronger first post-training stage after pretraining, while remaining fully compatible with subsequent RL alignment.

</details>


### [545] [KumoRFM-2: Scaling Foundation Models for Relational Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12596)
*Valter Hudovernik,Federico López,Vid Kocijan,Akihiro Nitta,Jan Eric Lenssen,Jure Leskovec,Matthias Fey*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: KumoRFM-2是第二代关系数据预训练基础模型，支持上下文学习和微调，能直接处理多表关系数据而无需扁平化，在41个基准测试中超越监督方法达8%，首次实现少样本基础模型在常见任务上超越监督方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格基础模型需要手动扁平化关系数据，无法原生处理多表连接关系，且缺乏时间一致性。KumoRFM-2旨在开发能直接处理关系数据的基础模型，支持上下文学习和微调，适应广泛的预测任务。

Method: 模型原生处理一个或多个连接表，无需手动扁平化或目标变量生成。通过大规模合成和真实数据在四个维度预训练：表级的行和列维度，数据库级的外键和跨样本维度。相比前代，更早注入任务信息以增强任务相关列选择和噪声鲁棒性。

Result: 在41个挑战性基准测试中，KumoRFM-2超越监督和基础方法达8%，在冷启动和噪声数据极端设置下保持强性能。首次实现少样本基础模型在常见基准任务上超越监督方法，微调后性能进一步提升。从内存级小数据集扩展到十亿级关系数据集。

Conclusion: KumoRFM-2作为关系数据基础模型，通过原生多表处理、四维度预训练和早期任务信息注入，在少样本设置下超越监督方法，为关系数据预测任务提供了强大的基础模型解决方案。

Abstract: We introduce KumoRFM-2, the next iteration of a pre-trained foundation model for relational data. KumoRFM-2 supports in-context learning as well as fine-tuning and is applicable to a wide range of predictive tasks. In contrast to tabular foundation models, KumoRFM-2 natively operates on relational data, processing one or more connected tables simultaneously without manual table flattening or target variable generation, all while preserving temporal consistency. KumoRFM-2 leverages a large corpus of synthetic and real-world data to pre-train across four axes: the row and column dimensions at the individual table level, and the foreign key and cross-sample dimensions at the database level. In contrast to its predecessor, KumoRFM-2 injects task information as early as possible, enabling sharper selection of task-relevant columns and improved robustness to noisy data. Through extensive experiments on 41 challenging benchmarks and analysis around expressivity and sensitivity, we demonstrate that KumoRFM-2 outperforms supervised and foundational approaches by up to 8%, while maintaining strong performance under extreme settings of cold start and noisy data. To our knowledge, this is the first time a few-shot foundation model has been shown to surpass supervised approaches on common benchmark tasks, with performance further improving upon fine-tuning. Finally, while KumoRFM-1 was limited to small-scale in-memory datasets, KumoRFM-2 scales to billion-scale relational datasets.

</details>


### [546] [EEG-Based Multimodal Learning via Hyperbolic Mixture-of-Curvature Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12579)
*Runhe Zhou,Shanglin Li,Guanxiang Huang,Xinliang Zhou,Qibin Zhao,Motoaki Kawanabe,Yi Ding,Cuntai Guan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出EEG-MoCE：一种用于多模态神经技术的双曲混合曲率专家框架，通过可学习曲率的双曲空间建模各模态的层次结构，实现更好的脑电多模态学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑电多模态学习需要有效表示异构模态的层次结构，但欧几里得嵌入难以表示层次结构，而双曲空间因其指数增长特性自然适合建模层次结构。

Method: 提出EEG-MoCE框架：1) 为每个模态分配一个可学习曲率双曲空间中的专家，自适应建模其内在几何；2) 采用曲率感知融合策略动态加权专家，强调具有更丰富层次信息的模态。

Result: 在基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，EEG-MoCE在情感识别、睡眠分期和认知评估等任务上实现了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: EEG-MoCE通过双曲混合曲率专家框架有效建模多模态的层次结构，为脑电多模态学习提供了有前景的解决方案，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG)-based multimodal learning integrates brain signals with complementary modalities to improve mental state assessment, providing great clinical potential. The effectiveness of such paradigms largely depends on the representation learning on heterogeneous modalities. For EEG-based paradigms, one promising approach is to leverage their hierarchical structures, as recent studies have shown that both EEG and associated modalities (e.g., facial expressions) exhibit hierarchical structures reflecting complex cognitive processes. However, Euclidean embeddings struggle to represent these hierarchical structures due to their flat geometry, while hyperbolic spaces, with their exponential growth property, are naturally suited for them. In this work, we propose EEG-MoCE, a novel hyperbolic mixture-of-curvature experts framework designed for multimodal neurotechnology. EEG-MoCE assigns each modality to an expert in a learnable-curvature hyperbolic space, enabling adaptive modeling of its intrinsic geometry. A curvature-aware fusion strategy then dynamically weights experts, emphasizing modalities with richer hierarchical information. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that EEG-MoCE achieves state-of-the-art performance, including emotion recognition, sleep staging, and cognitive assessment.

</details>


### [547] [Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11805)
*Mihir Prabhudesai,Aryan Satpathy,Yangmin Li,Zheyang Qin,Nikash Bhardwaj,Amir Zadeh,Chuan Li,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Deepak Pathak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 利用物理模拟器生成合成数据训练LLM进行物理推理，实现零样本模拟到真实迁移


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理能力提升主要依赖互联网QA数据，但这些数据规模有限且集中在数学等领域，物理科学缺乏大规模QA数据集来有效训练推理模型

Method: 在物理引擎中生成随机场景，从模拟交互中创建合成QA对，使用强化学习在合成数据上训练LLM

Result: 模型在真实物理基准测试中表现出零样本模拟到真实迁移能力：仅使用合成模拟数据训练，在IPhO问题上的性能提升5-10个百分点

Conclusion: 物理模拟器可作为可扩展的数据生成器，使LLM能够获得超越互联网规模QA数据限制的深度物理推理能力

Abstract: We have witnessed remarkable advances in LLM reasoning capabilities with the advent of DeepSeek-R1. However, much of this progress has been fueled by the abundance of internet question-answer (QA) pairs, a major bottleneck going forward, since such data is limited in scale and concentrated mainly in domains like mathematics. In contrast, other sciences such as physics lack large-scale QA datasets to effectively train reasoning-capable models. In this work, we show that physics simulators can serve as a powerful alternative source of supervision for training LLMs for physical reasoning. We generate random scenes in physics engines, create synthetic question-answer pairs from simulated interactions, and train LLMs using reinforcement learning on this synthetic data. Our models exhibit zero-shot sim-to-real transfer to real-world physics benchmarks: for example, training solely on synthetic simulated data improves performance on IPhO (International Physics Olympiad) problems by 5-10 percentage points across model sizes. These results demonstrate that physics simulators can act as scalable data generators, enabling LLMs to acquire deep physical reasoning skills beyond the limitations of internet-scale QA data. Code available at: https://sim2reason.github.io/.

</details>


### [548] [Orthogonal Subspace Projection for Continual Machine Unlearning via SVD-Based LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12526)
*Yogachandran Rahulamathavan,Nasir Iqbal,Juncheng Hu,Sangarapillai Lambotharan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于SVD引导正交子空间投影的静态持续机器学习遗忘方法，通过约束新LoRA更新位于先前遗忘任务子空间的正交补空间中，避免参数冲突并保持任务隔离，在长期序列遗忘任务中保持稳定性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续机器学习遗忘旨在顺序删除不应保留的数据影响，同时保持模型在其他数据上的有效性。当删除请求顺序到达时，模型需要反复适应而不擦除先前保留的知识。低秩适应（LoRA）提供了一种高效的更新方式，但简单组合多个顺序LoRA模块会导致参数冲突，造成任务间的强干扰。

Method: 提出基于奇异值分解（SVD）引导的正交子空间投影方法。在训练期间约束每个新的LoRA更新，使其位于早期遗忘任务使用的子空间的正交补空间中。这种方法保持了任务隔离，无需在部署时进行动态路由。

Result: 在CIFAR-100（使用ResNet-20）和MNIST数据集上的实验表明，该方法在长序列遗忘任务中表现出稳定行为。经过30个顺序遗忘任务后，最先进的静态融合方法将保留准确率从60.39%降至12.70%，而提出的训练中约束优化方法保持了基线性能（约58.1%），同时保持了强大的遗忘效果。

Conclusion: 通过SVD引导的正交子空间投影方法，成功解决了持续机器学习遗忘中的参数冲突问题，实现了在长期序列遗忘任务中稳定保持模型性能的同时有效执行遗忘操作。

Abstract: Continual machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of data that should no longer be retained, while preserving the usefulness of the model on everything else. This setting becomes especially difficult when deletion requests arrive sequentially, because the model must repeatedly adapt without erasing previously retained knowledge. Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) offers an efficient way to implement such updates, but naively combining many sequential LoRA modules leads to parameter collision, causing \textit{strong interference} between tasks. We propose a static alternative based on Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)-guided orthogonal subspace projection. Our method constrains each new LoRA update during training so that it lies in the orthogonal complement of the subspaces used by earlier unlearning tasks. This preserves task isolation without requiring dynamic routing at deployment. Experiments on CIFAR-100 with ResNet-20 and on MNIST show stable behavior across long sequences of unlearning tasks. After thirty sequential unlearning tasks, state-of-the-art static fusion reduces retained accuracy from 60.39\% to 12.70\%, whereas the proposed in-training constrained optimization maintains baseline performance ($\sim$58.1\%) while preserving strong unlearning efficacy.

</details>


### [549] [Instantiating Bayesian CVaR lower bounds in Interactive Decision Making Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12519)
*Raghav Bongole,Tobias J. Oechtering,Mikael Skoglund*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文展示了如何将广义Fano框架具体应用于交互式统计决策问题，通过平方Hellinger距离比较困难模型与参考模型，推导出明确的贝叶斯CVaR下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究建立了用于下界先验预测（贝叶斯）CVaR的广义Fano框架，但需要将其具体应用于实际交互式问题，以获得明确且参数透明的下界。

Method: 使用平方Hellinger距离比较困难模型与参考模型，结合参考铰链项的下界和两个模型可区分性的界限，将抽象框架实例化到具体交互式问题中。

Result: 在包括高斯赌博机在内的典型示例中获得了明确的贝叶斯CVaR下界，这些界限清晰地展示了关键问题参数的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 广义Fano贝叶斯CVaR框架可作为交互式学习和风险敏感决策的实用下界工具，为实际应用提供了具体可操作的界限推导方法。

Abstract: Recent work established a generalized-Fano framework for lower bounding prior-predictive (Bayesian) CVaR in interactive statistical decision making. In this paper, we show how to instantiate that framework in concrete interactive problems and derive explicit Bayesian CVaR lower bounds from its abstract corollaries. Our approach compares a hard model with a reference model using squared Hellinger distance, and combines a lower bound on a reference hinge term with a bound on the distinguishability of the two models. We apply this approach to canonical examples, including Gaussian bandits, and obtain explicit bounds that make the dependence on key problem parameters transparent. These results show how the generalized-Fano Bayesian CVaR framework can be used as a practical lower-bound tool for interactive learning and risk-sensitive decision making.

</details>


### [550] [Safety Training Modulates Harmful Misalignment Under On-Policy RL, But Direction Depends on Environment Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12500)
*Leon Eshuijs,Shihan Wang,Antske Fokkens*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现模型规模在某些环境中起到安全缓冲作用，但在其他环境中会促进有害利用；安全基准大多无法预测RL导致的错位；在线RL保留了模型生成分布中的内在安全缓冲


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究强化学习下规范博弈导致LLMs产生奉承、操纵或欺骗行为的条件，这些条件目前尚不清楚

Method: 在3个环境中使用在线RL训练11个指令调优的LLMs（0.5B-14B），进行受控消融实验追踪环境特定特征的影响

Result: 模型规模在某些环境中起到安全缓冲作用，但在其他环境中会促进有害利用；安全基准大多无法预测RL导致的错位，除了当利用依赖于推断用户偏好时的奉承分数；在线RL保留了模型自身生成分布中的安全缓冲

Conclusion: 模型规模对安全性的影响取决于环境特征；大多数安全基准无法预测RL诱导的错位；在线RL相比离线设置保留了内在的安全缓冲

Abstract: Specification gaming under Reinforcement Learning (RL) is known to cause LLMs to develop sycophantic, manipulative, or deceptive behavior, yet the conditions under which this occurs remain unclear. We train 11 instruction-tuned LLMs (0.5B--14B) with on-policy RL across 3 environments and find that model size acts as a safety buffer in some environments but enables greater harmful exploitation in others. Controlled ablations trace this reversal to environment-specific features such as role framing and implicit gameability cues. We further show that most safety benchmarks do not predict RL-induced misalignment, except in the case of Sycophancy scores when the exploit relies on inferring the user's preference. Finally, we find that on-policy RL preserves a safety buffer inherent in the model's own generation distribution, one that is bypassed during off-policy settings.

</details>


### [551] [Adaptive Budget Allocation in LLM-Augmented Surveys](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12497)
*Zikun Ye,Jiameng Lyu,Rui Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应分配算法，在LLM生成调查响应时，实时学习LLM在不同问题上的可靠性，将有限的人工标注预算定向分配到LLM最不可靠的问题上，无需先验知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM能以低成本生成调查响应，但其可靠性在不同问题间差异很大且事先未知。部署LLM仍需要昂贵的人工响应进行验证和校正，但如何实时分配有限的人工标注预算是一个挑战。

Method: 提出自适应分配算法，在收集人工响应的同时学习LLM在不同问题上的困难程度。每个人工标签具有双重作用：改进该问题的估计，并揭示LLM在该问题上预测人工响应的能力。算法将更多预算分配给LLM最不可靠的问题，无需任何关于问题层面LLM准确性的先验知识。

Result: 在合成数据和包含68个问题、超过2000名受访者的真实调查数据集上验证。在真实调查数据中，传统均匀分配方法浪费10-12%的预算，而该算法将浪费减少到2-6%。当问题在LLM预测质量上更加异质时，优势更加明显。算法能以更少的人工样本达到与传统均匀采样相同的估计质量，无需试点研究，且有形式化性能保证。

Conclusion: 该算法框架适用于任何需要将稀缺的人工监督分配到LLM可靠性未知的任务中的场景，为LLM在调查中的应用提供了高效、理论保证的预算分配方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate survey responses at low cost, but their reliability varies substantially across questions and is unknown before data collection. Deploying LLMs in surveys still requires costly human responses for verification and correction. How should a limited human-labeling budget be allocated across questions in real time? We propose an adaptive allocation algorithm that learns which questions are hardest for the LLM while simultaneously collecting human responses. Each human label serves a dual role: it improves the estimate for that question and reveals how well the LLM predicts human responses on it. The algorithm directs more budget to questions where the LLM is least reliable, without requiring any prior knowledge of question-level LLM accuracy. We prove that the allocation gap relative to the best possible allocation vanishes as the budget grows, and validate the approach on both synthetic data and a real survey dataset with 68 questions and over 2000 respondents. On real survey data, the standard practice of allocating human labels uniformly across questions wastes 10--12% of the budget relative to the optimal; our algorithm reduces this waste to 2--6%, and the advantage grows as questions become more heterogeneous in LLM prediction quality. The algorithm achieves the same estimation quality as traditional uniform sampling with fewer human samples, requires no pilot study, and is backed by formal performance guarantees validated on real survey data. More broadly, the framework applies whenever scarce human oversight must be allocated across tasks where LLM reliability is unknown.

</details>


### [552] [Nemotron 3 Super: Open, Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Model for Agentic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12374)
*NVIDIA,:,Aakshita Chandiramani,Aaron Blakeman,Abdullahi Olaoye,Abhibha Gupta,Abhilash Somasamudramath,Abhinav Khattar,Adeola Adesoba,Adi Renduchintala,Adil Asif,Aditya Agrawal,Aditya Vavre,Ahmad Pasumarthi,Saurav Mishra,Saurav Muralidharan,Scott Hara,Sean Narenthiran,Sebastian Rogawski,Seonjin Na,Seonmyeong Bak,Sepehr Sameni,Seth Poulos,Shahar Mor,Shantanu Acharya,Shaona Ghosh Adam Lord,Sharath Turuvekere Sreenivas,Shaun Kotek,Shaya Gharghabi,Shelby Thomas,Sheng-Chieh Lin,Shibani Likhite,Shiqing Fan,Shiyang Chen,Shreya Gopal,Shrimai Prabhumoye,Shubham Pachori,Shubham Toshniwal,Shuo Zhang,Shuoyang Ding,Shyam Renjith,Shyamala Prayaga,Siddhartha Jain,Simeng Sun,Sirisha Rella,Sirshak Das,Smita Ithape,Sneha Harishchandra S,Somshubra Majumdar,Soumye Singhal,Sri Harsha Singudasu,Sriharsha Niverty,Stas Sergienko,Stefana Gloginic,Stefania Alborghetti,Stephen Ge,Stephen McCullough,Sugam Dipak Devare,Suguna Varshini Velury,Sukrit Rao,Sumeet Kumar Barua,Sunny Gai,Suseella Panguluri,Sushil Koundinyan,Swathi Patnam,Sweta Priyadarshi,Swetha Bhendigeri,Syeda Nahida Akter,Sylendran Arunagiri,Tailling Yuan,Talor Abramovich,Tan Bui,Tan Yu,Terry Kong,Thanh Do,Thomas Gburek,Thorgane Marques,Tiffany Moore,Tijmen Blankevoort,Tim Moon,Timothy Ma,Tiyasa Mitra,Tomasz Grzegorzek,Tomer Asida,Tomer Bar Natan,Tomer Keren,Tomer Ronen,Traian Rebedea,Trenton Starkey,Tugrul Konuk,Twinkle Vashishth,Tyler Condensa,Udi Karpas,Ushnish De,Vahid Noorozi,Vahid Noroozi,Vanshil Atul Shah,Veena Vaidyanathan,Venkat Srinivasan,Venmugil Elango,Victor Cui,Vijay Korthikanti,Vikas Mehta,Virginia Adams,Virginia Wu,Vitaly Kurin,Vitaly Lavrukhin,Vladimir Anisimov,Wan Seo,Wanli Jiang,Wasi Uddin Ahmad,Wei Du,Wei Ping,Wei-Ming Chen,Wendy Quan,Wenliang Dai,Wenwen Gao,Will Jennings,William Zhang,Xiaowei Ren,Xiaowen Xin,Xin Li,Yang Yu,Yangyi Chen,Yaniv Galron,Yashaswi Karnati,Yejin Choi,Yev Meyer,Yi-Fu Wu,Yian Zhang,Ying Lin,Yonatan Geifman,Yonggan Fu,Yoshi Suhara,Youngeun Kwon,Yuan Zhang,Yuki Huang,Zach Moshe,Zhilin Wang,Zhiyu Cheng,Zhongbo Zhu,Zhuolin Yang,Zihan Liu,Zijia Chen,Zijie Yan,Zuhair Ahmed*

Main category: cs.LG
