TL;DR: Nemotron 3 Super是首个采用NVFP4预训练、LatentMoE架构和MTP层的1200亿参数混合Mamba-Attention MoE模型，在1M上下文长度下实现高精度，推理吞吐量相比GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3.5-122B分别提升2.2倍和7.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个结合Mamba和注意力机制的混合专家模型，通过创新的LatentMoE架构优化FLOP和参数效率，并利用MTP层实现原生推测解码加速推理，同时支持超长上下文处理能力。

Method: 1) 在25万亿token上进行NVFP4预训练；2) 采用LatentMoE架构平衡精度/FLOP和精度/参数；3) 集成MTP层实现原生推测解码；4) 通过监督微调(SFT)和强化学习(RL)进行后训练；5) 支持1M上下文长度；6) 提供量化检查点。

Result: 模型在常见基准测试中达到可比精度，推理吞吐量相比GPT-OSS-120B提升2.2倍，相比Qwen3.5-122B提升7.5倍。数据集、基础模型、后训练模型和量化检查点已在HuggingFace开源。

Conclusion: Nemotron 3 Super通过创新的架构设计和训练方法，在保持高精度的同时显著提升了推理效率，为大规模语言模型的发展提供了新的技术路径和开源资源。

Abstract: We describe the pre-training, post-training, and quantization of Nemotron 3 Super, a 120 billion (active 12 billion) parameter hybrid Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts model. Nemotron 3 Super is the first model in the Nemotron 3 family to 1) be pre-trained in NVFP4, 2) leverage LatentMoE, a new Mixture-of-Experts architecture that optimizes for both accuracy per FLOP and accuracy per parameter, and 3) include MTP layers for inference acceleration through native speculative decoding. We pre-trained Nemotron 3 Super on 25 trillion tokens followed by post-training using supervised fine tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). The final model supports up to 1M context length and achieves comparable accuracy on common benchmarks, while also achieving up to 2.2x and 7.5x higher inference throughput compared to GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3.5-122B, respectively. Nemotron 3 Super datasets, along with the base, post-trained, and quantized checkpoints, are open-sourced on HuggingFace.

</details>


### [553] [Is Sliding Window All You Need? An Open Framework for Long-Sequence Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12372)
*Sayak Chakrabarty,Souradip Pal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个完整的端到端框架，用于实现工业级长序列训练，包括滑动窗口、数据处理、训练和评估脚本，并引入了k-shift嵌入层以在有限资源下支持大规模词汇表。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长交互历史对现代推荐系统至关重要，但在实际内存和延迟预算下，长序列训练常被认为不切实际。本文旨在证明长序列训练不仅可行且有效，并将工业级技术转化为开放、实用的社区方法。

Method: 1. 完整的端到端框架，实现工业风格的长序列训练，采用滑动窗口方法；2. 运行时感知的消融研究，量化不同窗口机制和步长下的精度-计算边界；3. 新颖的k-shift嵌入层，使商品GPU能够处理百万级词汇表，且精度损失可忽略。

Result: 1. 在Retailrocket数据集上实现高达+6.04% MRR和+6.34% Recall@10的提升；2. 训练时间开销约为4倍；3. 在有限的大学集群上可靠训练，同时保持竞争力检索质量；4. k-shift嵌入层有效支持大规模词汇表。

Conclusion: 通过提供稳健的流水线、报告训练时间成本以及引入针对低资源环境的嵌入机制，本研究将长序列训练从封闭的工业技术转变为实用、开放且可扩展的社区方法，证明长序列训练在学术规模上既实用又有效。

Abstract: Long interaction histories are central to modern recommender systems, yet training with long sequences is often dismissed as impractical under realistic memory and latency budgets. This work demonstrates that it is not only practical but also effective-at academic scale. We release a complete, end-to-end framework that implements industrial-style long-sequence training with sliding windows, including all data processing, training, and evaluation scripts. Beyond reproducing prior gains, we contribute two capabilities missing from earlier reports: (i) a runtime-aware ablation study that quantifies the accuracy-compute frontier across windowing regimes and strides, and (ii) a novel k-shift embedding layer that enables million-scale vocabularies on commodity GPUs with negligible accuracy loss. Our implementation trains reliably on modest university clusters while delivering competitive retrieval quality (e.g., up to +6.04% MRR and +6.34% Recall@10 on Retailrocket) with $\sim 4 \times $ training-time overheads. By packaging a robust pipeline, reporting training time costs, and introducing an embedding mechanism tailored for low-resource settings, we transform long-sequence training from a closed, industrial technique into a practical, open, and extensible methodology for the community.

</details>


### [554] [Scaffold-Conditioned Preference Triplets for Controllable Molecular Optimization with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12350)
*Yi Xiong,Liang Xiong,Xiaohong Ji,Sen Yang,Zhifeng Gao,Huaimin Wang,Kele Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SCPT是一种基于支架约束偏好三元组的分子优化方法，通过化学驱动的过滤器构建偏好数据，对齐预训练分子LLM，在保持支架相似性的同时改善分子性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖黑盒评分，对支架保留的控制有限，常产生不稳定或生物学上不可信的编辑。LLMs作为分子生成器有潜力，但缺乏化学基础的偏好监督和原则性数据管理限制了优化能力。

Method: 提出SCPT管道，通过支架对齐和化学驱动过滤器（有效性、可合成性、有意义的性质增益）构建相似性约束的三元组⟨支架,更好,更差⟩。使用这些偏好数据对齐预训练的分子LLM作为条件编辑器。

Result: 在单目标和多目标基准测试中，SCPT提高了优化成功率和性质增益，同时保持比竞争基线更高的支架相似性。相比非LLM方法，SCPT训练的LLMs更适合支架约束和多目标优化。单属性和双属性监督训练的模型能有效泛化到三属性任务。

Conclusion: SCPT提供可控的数据构建机制，产生可预测的相似性-增益前沿，支持系统适应不同的优化机制。该方法在保持支架的同时改善分子性质方面表现出色，并展示了有前景的外推泛化能力。

Abstract: Molecular property optimization is central to drug discovery, yet many deep learning methods rely on black-box scoring and offer limited control over scaffold preservation, often producing unstable or biologically implausible edits. While large language models (LLMs) are promising molecular generators, optimization remains constrained by the lack of chemistry-grounded preference supervision and principled data curation. We introduce \textbf{Scaffold-Conditioned Preference Triplets (SCPT)}, a pipeline that constructs similarity-constrained triplets $\langle\text{scaffold}, \text{better}, \text{worse}\rangle$ via scaffold alignment and chemistry-driven filters for validity, synthesizability, and meaningful property gains. Using these preferences, we align a pretrained molecular LLM as a conditional editor, enabling property-improving edits that retain the scaffold. Across single- and multi-objective benchmarks, SCPT improves optimization success and property gains while maintaining higher scaffold similarity than competitive baselines. Compared with representative non-LLM molecular optimization methods, SCPT-trained LLMs are better suited to scaffold-constrained and multi-objective optimization. In addition, models trained on single-property and two-property supervision generalize effectively to three-property tasks, indicating promising extrapolative generalization under limited higher-order supervision. SCPT also provides controllable data-construction knobs that yield a predictable similarity-gain frontier, enabling systematic adaptation to diverse optimization regimes.

</details>


### [555] [PrivEraserVerify: Efficient, Private, and Verifiable Federated Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12348)
*Parthaw Goswami,Md Khairul Islam,Ashfak Yeafi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PEV是首个同时实现高效性、隐私性和可验证性的联邦遗忘统一框架，通过自适应检查点、分层差分隐私校准和指纹验证，在保持性能的同时快速移除客户贡献。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习虽然保护数据隐私，但模型仍可能记忆敏感信息，与"被遗忘权"冲突。现有联邦遗忘方案各有不足：FedEraser高效但无隐私保护，FedRecovery提供差分隐私但降低精度，VeriFi可验证但无效率和隐私保证。需要统一解决效率、隐私和可验证性三大挑战。

Method: 提出PrivEraserVerify (PEV)框架，包含三个核心技术：1) 自适应检查点保留关键历史更新以实现快速重构；2) 分层自适应差分隐私校准，选择性移除客户影响同时最小化精度损失；3) 基于指纹的验证，支持去中心化、非侵入式的遗忘确认。

Result: 在图像、手写字符和医疗数据集上的实验表明，PEV比重新训练快2-3倍，提供形式化的不可区分性保证且性能下降较小，支持可扩展验证。是首个同时实现效率、隐私和可验证性的联邦遗忘框架。

Conclusion: PEV统一解决了联邦遗忘的效率、隐私和可验证性挑战，推动联邦学习向实用化和合规部署迈进。该框架首次同时提供这三项关键特性，为满足数据保护法规要求提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data, offering a promising path toward privacy preserving artificial intelligence. However, FL models may still memorize sensitive information from participants, conflicting with the right to be forgotten (RTBF). To meet these requirements, federated unlearning has emerged as a mechanism to remove the contribution of departing clients. Existing solutions only partially address this challenge: FedEraser improves efficiency but lacks privacy protection, FedRecovery ensures differential privacy (DP) but degrades accuracy, and VeriFi enables verifiability but introduces overhead without efficiency or privacy guarantees. We present PrivEraserVerify (PEV), a unified framework that integrates efficiency, privacy, and verifiability into federated unlearning. PEV employs (i) adaptive checkpointing to retain critical historical updates for fast reconstruction, (ii) layer adaptive differentially private calibration to selectively remove client influence while minimizing accuracy loss, and (iii) fingerprint based verification, enabling participants to confirm unlearning in a decentralized and noninvasive manner. Experiments on image, handwritten character, and medical datasets show that PEV achieves up to 2 to 3 times faster unlearning than retraining, provides formal indistinguishability guarantees with reduced performance degradation, and supports scalable verification. To the best of our knowledge, PEV is the first framework to simultaneously deliver efficiency, privacy, and verifiability for federated unlearning, moving FL closer to practical and regulation compliant deployment.

</details>


### [556] [Labeled TrustSet Guided: Batch Active Learning with Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12303)
*Guofeng Cui,Yang Liu,Pichao Wang,Hankai Hsu,Xiaohang Sun,Xiang Hao,Zhu Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出BRAL-T框架，结合TrustSet和强化学习进行批量主动学习，在10个图像分类基准和2个主动微调任务中达到SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统批量主动学习方法主要依赖未标记数据的分布度量（如马氏距离），未能充分利用已标记数据的反馈和模型性能信息，存在局限性

Method: 提出TrustSet方法从已标记数据中选择最具信息量的样本，平衡类别分布以缓解长尾问题；然后提出基于强化学习的采样策略，从未标记池中近似选择高质量的TrustSet候选；结合两者形成BRAL-T框架

Result: 在10个图像分类基准和2个主动微调任务中取得了最先进的结果，证明了其在不同领域的有效性和效率

Conclusion: BRAL-T框架通过结合TrustSet的已标记数据优化和强化学习的未标记数据采样，显著提升了批量主动学习的性能，为解决传统方法的局限性提供了有效方案

Abstract: Batch active learning (BAL) is a crucial technique for reducing labeling costs and improving data efficiency in training large-scale deep learning models. Traditional BAL methods often rely on metrics like Mahalanobis Distance to balance uncertainty and diversity when selecting data for annotation. However, these methods predominantly focus on the distribution of unlabeled data and fail to leverage feedback from labeled data or the model's performance. To address these limitations, we introduce TrustSet, a novel approach that selects the most informative data from the labeled dataset, ensuring a balanced class distribution to mitigate the long-tail problem. Unlike CoreSet, which focuses on maintaining the overall data distribution, TrustSet optimizes the model's performance by pruning redundant data and using label information to refine the selection process. To extend the benefits of TrustSet to the unlabeled pool, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL)-based sampling policy that approximates the selection of high-quality TrustSet candidates from the unlabeled data. Combining TrustSet and RL, we introduce the Batch Reinforcement Active Learning with TrustSet (BRAL-T) framework. BRAL-T achieves state-of-the-art results across 10 image classification benchmarks and 2 active fine-tuning tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness and efficiency in various domains.

</details>


### [557] [Models Know Their Shortcuts: Deployment-Time Shortcut Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12277)
*Jiayi Li,Shijie Tang,Gün Kaynar,Shiyi Du,Carl Kingsford*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Shortcut Guardrail：一种部署时框架，通过梯度归因识别捷径标记，使用掩码对比学习训练轻量级LoRA去偏模块，无需原始训练数据或捷径标注即可缓解标记级捷径学习问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练语言模型常依赖训练时看似预测性强但测试时泛化失败的表面特征（捷径学习）。现有缓解方法多在训练时操作，需要大量监督（如原始训练数据或捷径类型先验知识）。需要一种部署时框架，无需原始数据或捷径标注即可缓解标记级捷径。

Method: 提出Shortcut Guardrail框架：1）利用梯度归因在偏置模型上识别捷径标记；2）基于此训练轻量级LoRA去偏模块，使用掩码对比学习目标，鼓励在有/无单个标记时保持表征一致性。

Result: 在情感分类、毒性检测和自然语言推理任务中，针对自然发生和受控捷径场景，Shortcut Guardrail在分布偏移下提高了整体准确率和最差组准确率，同时保持了域内性能。

Conclusion: Shortcut Guardrail是一种有效的部署时捷径缓解框架，无需原始训练数据或捷径标注，通过梯度归因识别捷径标记并结合掩码对比学习训练去偏模块，在多种任务中显著改善模型对分布偏移的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Pretrained language models often rely on superficial features that appear predictive during training yet fail to generalize at test time, a phenomenon known as shortcut learning. Existing mitigation methods generally operate at training time and require heavy supervision such as access to the original training data or prior knowledge of shortcut type. We propose Shortcut Guardrail, a deployment-time framework that mitigates token-level shortcuts without access to the original training data or shortcut annotations. Our key insight is that gradient-based attribution on a biased model highlights shortcut tokens. Building on this finding, we train a lightweight LoRA-based debiasing module with a Masked Contrastive Learning (MaskCL) objective that encourages consistent representations with or without individual tokens. Across sentiment classification, toxicity detection, and natural language inference under both naturally occurring and controlled shortcuts, Shortcut Guardrail improves overall accuracy and worst-group accuracy over the unmitigated model under distribution shifts while preserving in-distribution performance.

</details>


### [558] [SubFlow: Sub-mode Conditioned Flow Matching for Diverse One-Step Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12273)
*Yexiong Lin,Jia Shi,Shanshan Ye,Wanyu Wang,Yu Yao,Tongliang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SubFlow通过子模态条件化流匹配解决少步生成模型的多样性退化问题，消除平均失真，在保持图像质量的同时显著提升生成多样性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有少步流匹配生成模型存在严重的多样性退化问题，样本集中在主导模态而忽略目标分布中罕见但有效的变体。这种退化源于平均失真：使用MSE目标训练时，类条件流学习的是类内子模态的频率加权平均，导致模型过度表示高密度模态而系统性地忽略低密度模态。

Method: 提出SubFlow（子模态条件化流匹配），通过语义聚类将每个类别分解为细粒度子模态，并在子模态索引上条件化流。每个条件化的子分布近似单模态，因此学习的流能准确针对单个模态而无平均失真，在单步推理中恢复完整的模态覆盖。该方法完全即插即用，无需架构修改即可集成到现有单步模型（如MeanFlow和Shortcut Models）中。

Result: 在ImageNet-256上的大量实验表明，SubFlow在生成多样性（Recall）方面带来显著提升，同时保持竞争力的图像质量（FID），证实了其在不同单步生成框架中的广泛适用性。

Conclusion: SubFlow通过消除平均失真有效解决了少步生成模型的多样性退化问题，提供了一种即插即用的解决方案，能在保持图像质量的同时显著提升生成多样性，具有广泛的适用性。

Abstract: Flow matching has emerged as a powerful generative framework, with recent few-step methods achieving remarkable inference acceleration. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked limitation: these models suffer from severe diversity degradation, concentrating samples on dominant modes while neglecting rare but valid variations of the target distribution. We trace this degradation to averaging distortion: when trained with MSE objectives, class-conditional flows learn a frequency-weighted mean over intra-class sub-modes, causing the model to over-represent high-density modes while systematically neglecting low-density ones. To address this, we propose SubFlow, Sub-mode Conditioned Flow Matching, which eliminates averaging distortion by decomposing each class into fine-grained sub-modes via semantic clustering and conditioning the flow on sub-mode indices. Each conditioned sub-distribution is approximately unimodal, so the learned flow accurately targets individual modes with no averaging distortion, restoring full mode coverage in a single inference step. Crucially, SubFlow is entirely plug-and-play: it integrates seamlessly into existing one-step models such as MeanFlow and Shortcut Models without any architectural modifications. Extensive experiments on ImageNet-256 demonstrate that SubFlow yields substantial gains in generation diversity (Recall) while maintaining competitive image quality (FID), confirming its broad applicability across different one-step generation frameworks. Project page: https://yexionglin.github.io/subflow.

</details>


### [559] [MolMem: Memory-Augmented Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Sample-Efficient Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12237)
*Ziqing Wang,Yibo Wen,Abhishek Pandy,Han Liu,Kaize Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MolMem：基于双记忆系统的分子优化强化学习框架，通过静态范例记忆和演化技能记忆提升样本效率，在有限预算下显著提升优化成功率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 药物发现中分子优化的每次评估成本高昂，现有方法样本效率不足。试错法需要大量评估调用，而依赖外部知识的方法倾向于重复使用熟悉模板，难以应对挑战性目标。缺乏能够支撑决策并为未来优化提供可复用见解的长期记忆系统。

Method: 提出MolMem框架：1）静态范例记忆用于检索相关范例进行冷启动；2）演化技能记忆将成功轨迹提炼为可复用策略。基于记忆增强的表述，使用密集步进奖励训练策略，将昂贵的轨迹转化为长期知识以改进未来优化。

Result: 在仅使用500次评估调用条件下，MolMem在单属性任务上达到90%成功率（比最佳基线高1.5倍），在多属性任务上达到52%成功率。

Conclusion: MolMem通过双记忆系统有效解决了分子优化中的样本效率问题，将昂贵的轨迹转化为可复用知识，显著提升了在有限评估预算下的优化性能。

Abstract: In drug discovery, molecular optimization aims to iteratively refine a lead compound to improve molecular properties while preserving structural similarity to the original molecule. However, each oracle evaluation is expensive, making sample efficiency a key challenge for existing methods under a limited oracle budget. Trial-and-error approaches require many oracle calls, while methods that leverage external knowledge tend to reuse familiar templates and struggle on challenging objectives. A key missing piece is long-term memory that can ground decisions and provide reusable insights for future optimizations. To address this, we present MolMem (\textbf{Mol}ecular optimization with \textbf{Mem}ory), a multi-turn agentic reinforcement learning (RL) framework with a dual-memory system. Specifically, MolMem uses Static Exemplar Memory to retrieve relevant exemplars for cold-start grounding, and Evolving Skill Memory to distill successful trajectories into reusable strategies. Built on this memory-augmented formulation, we train the policy with dense step-wise rewards, turning costly rollouts into long-term knowledge that improves future optimization. Extensive experiments show that MolMem achieves 90\% success on single-property tasks (1.5$\times$ over the best baseline) and 52\% on multi-property tasks using only 500 oracle calls. Our code is available at https://github.com/REAL-Lab-NU/MolMem.

</details>


### [560] [LLM-Enhanced Log Anomaly Detection: A Comprehensive Benchmark of Large Language Models for Automated System Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12218)
*Disha Patel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文对基于大语言模型与传统方法的日志异常检测进行了系统性基准测试，发现微调transformer模型性能最优，但基于提示的LLM在零样本场景下表现突出，无需标注数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统日志异常检测方法难以处理现代日志数据的异构性和动态性，而基于大语言模型的新方法虽有潜力但缺乏系统性评估。需要全面比较LLM方法与传统技术在实际应用中的表现。

Method: 在四个公共数据集（HDFS、BGL、Thunderbird、Spirit）上评估三类方法：1）经典日志解析器（Drain、Spell、AEL）结合机器学习分类器；2）微调transformer模型（BERT、RoBERTa）；3）基于提示的LLM方法（GPT-3.5、GPT-4、LLaMA-3）的零样本和少样本设置。

Result: 微调transformer模型获得最高F1分数（0.96-0.99），而基于提示的LLM在零样本场景下表现出色（F1：0.82-0.91），无需任何标注训练数据。研究进一步分析了各种方法的成本-精度权衡、延迟特性和失败模式。

Conclusion: 研究为从业者根据准确性、延迟、成本和标签可用性等具体约束选择日志异常检测方法提供了实用指南。微调transformer在性能最优，而基于提示的LLM在标注数据稀缺的实际部署中具有显著优势。

Abstract: System log anomaly detection is critical for maintaining the reliability of large-scale software systems, yet traditional methods struggle with the heterogeneous and evolving nature of modern log data. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising new approaches to log understanding, but a systematic comparison of LLM-based methods against established techniques remains lacking. In this paper, we present a comprehensive benchmark study evaluating both LLM-based and traditional approaches for log anomaly detection across four widely-used public datasets: HDFS, BGL, Thunderbird, and Spirit. We evaluate three categories of methods: (1) classical log parsers (Drain, Spell, AEL) combined with machine learning classifiers, (2) fine-tuned transformer models (BERT, RoBERTa), and (3) prompt-based LLM approaches (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, LLaMA-3) in zero-shot and few-shot settings. Our experiments reveal that while fine-tuned transformers achieve the highest F1-scores (0.96-0.99), prompt-based LLMs demonstrate remarkablezero-shot capabilities (F1: 0.82-0.91) without requiring any labeled training data -- a significant advantage for real-world deployment where labeled anomalies are scarce. We further analyze the cost-accuracy trade-offs, latency characteristics, and failure modes of each approach. Our findings provide actionable guidelines for practitioners choosing log anomaly detection methods based on their specific constraints regarding accuracy, latency, cost, and label availability. All code and experimental configurations are publicly available to facilitate reproducibility.

</details>


### [561] [A Residual-Shell-Based Lower Bound for Ollivier-Ricci Curvature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12211)
*Xiang Gu,Huichun Zhang,Jian Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种计算效率高且近似精度显著优于现有方法的Ollivier-Ricci曲率下界估计方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Ollivier-Ricci曲率(ORC)因Wasserstein距离计算成本高而应用受限，现有基于1-hop随机游走的下界估计与精确ORC差距较大

Method: 建立比现有下界更紧的ORC下界估计方法，不仅适用于1-hop随机游走，还扩展到k-hop随机游走(k>1)，计算成本远低于精确ORC计算

Result: 新方法在多种基本图结构上实验验证，在近似精度和计算效率方面均表现优异，实际加速可达数十倍

Conclusion: 提出的ORC下界估计方法在保持低计算成本的同时显著提高了近似精度，为ORC的广泛应用提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Ollivier-Ricci curvature (ORC), defined via the Wasserstein distance that captures rich geometric information, has received growing attention in both theory and applications. However, the high computational cost of Wasserstein distance evaluation has significantly limited the broader practical use of ORC. To alleviate this issue, previous work introduced a computationally efficient lower bound as a proxy for ORC based on 1-hop random walks, but this approach empirically exhibits large gaps from the exact ORC. In this paper, we establish a substantially tighter lower bound for ORC than the existing lower bound, while retaining much lower computational cost than exact ORC computation, with practical speedups of tens of times. Moreover, our bound is not restricted to 1-hop random walks, but also applies to k-hop random walks (k > 1). Experiments on several fundamental graph structures demonstrate the effectiveness of our bound in terms of both approximation accuracy and computational efficiency.

</details>


### [562] [Clustering-Enhanced Domain Adaptation for Cross-Domain Intrusion Detection in Industrial Control Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12183)
*Luyao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种聚类增强的域自适应方法，用于工业控制系统的跨域入侵检测，通过特征对齐和聚类策略解决数据稀缺和域偏移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业控制系统在动态环境中运行，面临流量分布变化、标记样本有限和未知攻击频发等挑战，传统入侵检测方法难以应对跨域场景。

Method: 提出包含两个关键组件的框架：1) 基于特征迁移学习的模块，通过谱变换特征对齐将源域和目标域投影到共享潜在子空间，迭代减少分布差异；2) 聚类增强策略，结合K-Medoids聚类和PCA降维，改善跨域相关性估计，减少人工参数调优带来的性能下降。

Result: 实验结果表明，相比五个基线模型，该方法将检测准确率提升高达49%，F-score增益更大，稳定性更强。聚类增强策略在代表性任务上进一步将检测准确率提升高达26%。

Conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了数据稀缺和域偏移问题，为动态工业环境中的鲁棒跨域入侵检测提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Industrial control systems operate in dynamic environments where traffic distributions vary across scenarios, labeled samples are limited, and unknown attacks frequently emerge, posing significant challenges to cross-domain intrusion detection. To address this issue, this paper proposes a clustering-enhanced domain adaptation method for industrial control traffic. The framework contains two key components. First, a feature-based transfer learning module projects source and target domains into a shared latent subspace through spectral-transform-based feature alignment and iteratively reduces distribution discrepancies, enabling accurate cross-domain detection. Second, a clustering enhancement strategy combines K-Medoids clustering with PCA-based dimensionality reduction to improve cross-domain correlation estimation and reduce performance degradation caused by manual parameter tuning. Experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves unknown attack detection. Compared with five baseline models, it increases detection accuracy by up to 49%, achieves larger gains in F-score, and demonstrates stronger stability. Moreover, the clustering enhancement strategy further boosts detection accuracy by up to 26% on representative tasks. These results suggest that the proposed method effectively alleviates data scarcity and domain shift, providing a practical solution for robust cross-domain intrusion detection in dynamic industrial environments.

</details>


### [563] [CycloneMAE: A Scalable Multi-Task Learning Model for Global Tropical Cyclone Probabilistic Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12180)
*Renlong Hang,Zihao Xu,Jiuwei Zhao,Runling Yu,Leye Cheng,Qingshan Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CycloneMAE：基于TC结构感知掩码自编码器的可扩展多任务预报模型，通过预训练/微调范式同时提供确定性预报和概率分布，在多个海盆的预报性能优于主流数值天气预报系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热带气旋是最具破坏性的自然灾害之一，但现有预报方法存在根本性权衡：数值天气预报模型计算成本高且难以利用历史数据，而现有深度学习模型是变量特定且确定性的，无法泛化到不同预报变量。

Method: 提出CycloneMAE模型，采用TC结构感知掩码自编码器从多模态数据中学习可迁移的TC表示。通过结合离散概率网格化机制与预训练/微调范式，同时提供确定性预报和概率分布。

Result: 在五个全球海盆评估中，CycloneMAE在气压和风速预报上优于主流数值天气预报系统达120小时，在路径预报上优于达24小时。通过积分梯度归因分析揭示了物理可解释的学习动态。

Conclusion: 该框架为业务化TC预报建立了可扩展、概率化和可解释的路径，短时预报主要依赖卫星图像中的内部核心对流结构，而长期预报逐渐转向关注外部环境因素。

Abstract: Tropical cyclones (TCs) rank among the most destructive natural hazards, yet their forecasting faces fundamental trade-offs: numerical weather prediction (NWP) models are computationally prohibitive and struggle to leverage historical data, while existing deep learning (DL)-based intelligent models are variable-specific and deterministic, which fail to generalize across different forecasting variables. Here we present CycloneMAE, a scalable multi-task forecasting model that learns transferable TC representations from multi-modal data using a TC structure-aware masked autoencoder. By coupling a discrete probabilistic gridding mechanism with a pre-train/fine-tune paradigm, CycloneMAE simultaneously delivers deterministic forecasts and probability distributions. Evaluated across five global ocean basins, CycloneMAE outperforms leading NWP systems in pressure and wind forecasting up to 120 hours and in track forecasting up to 24 hours. Attribution analysis via integrated gradients reveals physically interpretable learning dynamics: short-term forecasts rely predominantly on the internal core convective structure from satellite imagery, whereas longer-term forecasts progressively shift attention to external environmental factors. Our framework establishes a scalable, probabilistic, and interpretable pathway for operational TC forecasting.

</details>


### [564] [PubSwap: Public-Data Off-Policy Coordination for Federated RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12160)
*Anupam Nayak,Baris Askin,Muhammed Ustaomeroglu,Carlee Joe-Wong,Gauri Joshi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 联邦学习框架结合LoRA本地适应和基于公共数据的离策略步骤，用于可验证奖励的强化学习推理后训练，提高通信效率和跨客户端协调


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中，可验证奖励的强化学习推理后训练通常在集中式设置中研究，但许多实际应用涉及分布在多个组织的分散私有数据。联邦训练是自然解决方案，但在此机制下扩展RLVR具有挑战性：全模型同步成本高，执行许多本地步骤可能导致异构数据下的严重客户端漂移

Method: 提出联邦RLVR框架，结合基于LoRA的本地适应和基于公共数据的离策略步骤。使用小型共享公共数据集定期跨组织交换和重用响应级训练信号，提供轻量级锚点以实现更全局对齐的目标而不暴露私有数据。在公共数据步骤中，选择性地用全局正确响应替换本地错误响应，从而保持训练更接近本地策略，同时仍受益于跨客户端协调

Result: 在数学和医学推理基准测试及模型中，该方法始终优于标准基线方法

Conclusion: 研究结果强调了联邦推理后训练的简单有效方法：将低秩通信与有限的公共数据协调相结合

Abstract: Reasoning post-training with reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) is typically studied in centralized settings, yet many realistic applications involve decentralized private data distributed across organizations. Federated training is a natural solution, but scaling RLVR in this regime is challenging: full-model synchronization is expensive, and performing many local steps can cause severe client drift under heterogeneous data. We propose a federated RLVR framework that combines LoRA-based local adaptation with public-data-based off-policy steps to improve both communication efficiency and cross-client coordination. In particular, a small shared public dataset is used to periodically exchange and reuse response-level training signals across organizations, providing a lightweight anchor toward a more globally aligned objective without exposing private data. Our method selectively replaces locally incorrect responses with globally correct ones during public-data steps, thereby keeping training closer to the local policy while still benefiting from cross-client coordination. Across mathematical and medical reasoning benchmarks and models, our method consistently improves over standard baselines. Our results highlight a simple and effective recipe for federated reasoning post-training: combining low-rank communication with limited public-data coordination.

</details>


### [565] [SOLARIS: Speculative Offloading of Latent-bAsed Representation for Inference Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12110)
*Zikun Liu,Liang Luo,Qianru Li,Zhengyu Zhang,Wei Ling,Jingyi Shen,Zeliang Chen,Yaning Huang,Jingxian Huang,Abdallah Aboelela,Chonglin Sun,Feifan Gu,Fenggang Wu,Hang Qu,Huayu Li,Jill Pan,Kaidi Pei,Laming Chen,Longhao Jin,Qin Huang,Tongyi Tang,Varna Puvvada,Wenlin Chen,Xiaohan Wei,Xu Cao,Yantao Yao,Yuan Jin,Yunchen Pu,Yuxin Chen,Zijian Shen,Zhengkai Zhang,Dong Liang,Ellie Wen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SOLARIS框架通过预测未来用户-物品交互并异步预计算其基础模型表示，将计算密集型的基础模型推理与延迟敏感的在线服务路径解耦，实现实时知识迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推荐系统基础模型虽然性能优越，但计算需求巨大，实时服务不切实际。现有方法通常依赖知识蒸馏，牺牲服务质量换取效率，需要一种既能保持基础模型性能又能实现实时服务的新方案。

Method: SOLARIS受推测解码启发，主动预测未来可能出现的用户-物品交互对，并异步预计算这些交互的基础模型嵌入表示。通过将昂贵的模型推理与延迟敏感的服务路径解耦，实现实时知识迁移。

Result: 在Meta广告系统中部署，每日处理数十亿请求，SOLARIS实现了0.67%的收入驱动关键指标提升，证明了其在大规模应用中的有效性。

Conclusion: SOLARIS成功解决了基础模型实时服务的挑战，通过推测性卸载实现了高质量推荐与低延迟服务的平衡，为先前被认为过于昂贵而无法在线使用的大型模型提供了可行的部署方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in recommendation scaling laws have led to foundation models of unprecedented complexity. While these models offer superior performance, their computational demands make real-time serving impractical, often forcing practitioners to rely on knowledge distillation-compromising serving quality for efficiency. To address this challenge, we present SOLARIS (Speculative Offloading of Latent-bAsed Representation for Inference Scaling), a novel framework inspired by speculative decoding. SOLARIS proactively precomputes user-item interaction embeddings by predicting which user-item pairs are likely to appear in future requests, and asynchronously generating their foundation model representations ahead of time. This approach decouples the costly foundation model inference from the latency-critical serving path, enabling real-time knowledge transfer from models previously considered too expensive for online use. Deployed across Meta's advertising system serving billions of daily requests, SOLARIS achieves 0.67% revenue-driving top-line metrics gain, demonstrating its effectiveness at scale.

</details>


### [566] [VISTA: Validation-Informed Trajectory Adaptation via Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12044)
*Eli Corn,Daphna Weinshall*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VISTA是一个在线自蒸馏框架，通过识别早期模型状态作为专家锚点，在训练过程中强制优化轨迹一致性，防止模型放弃已学习的高泛化特征，从而解决轨迹偏差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型可能收敛到次优解，尽管验证精度很高，这掩盖了称为"轨迹偏差"的优化失败。随着训练进行，模型可能放弃对特定数据子群体的高泛化状态，丢弃先前学习的潜在特征，而不会触发经典过拟合信号。

Method: VISTA使用验证信息化的边际覆盖分数识别专家锚点（保留对特定数据区域专门能力的早期模型状态），通过覆盖加权的锚点集成在线整合到训练中，正则化损失景观并保留已掌握的知识。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，VISTA相比标准训练和先前的自蒸馏方法展示了改进的鲁棒性和泛化能力，同时轻量级实现减少了90%的存储开销且无性能损失。

Conclusion: VISTA通过在线自蒸馏框架有效解决了轨迹偏差问题，强制优化轨迹一致性，防止模型放弃高泛化状态，在保持性能的同时显著降低了存储需求。

Abstract: Deep learning models may converge to suboptimal solutions despite strong validation accuracy, masking an optimization failure we term Trajectory Deviation. This is because as training proceeds, models can abandon high generalization states for specific data sub-populations, thus discarding previously learned latent features without triggering classical overfitting signals. To address this problem we introduce VISTA, an online self-distillation framework that enforces consistency along the optimization trajectory. Using a validation-informed Marginal Coverage score, VISTA identifies expert anchors, which are earlier model states that retain specialized competence over distinct data regions. A coverage-weighted ensemble of these anchors is integrated online during training, regularizing the loss landscape and preserving mastered knowledge. When evaluated across multiple benchmarks, VISTA demonstrates improved robustness and generalization over standard training and prior self-distillation methods, while a lightweight implementation reduces storage overhead by 90% without performance loss.

</details>


### [567] [UCS: Estimating Unseen Coverage for Improved In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12015)
*Jiayi Xin,Xiang Li,Evan Qiang,Weiqing He,Tianqi Shang,Weijie J. Su,Qi Long*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出UCS（Unseen Coverage Selection）方法，通过估计未揭示的潜在聚类数量来选择演示样本，提升上下文学习性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有演示选择方法主要依赖启发式的相关性或多样性概念，对演示集的覆盖范围提供有限洞察。需要一种能更好评估演示集对潜在聚类覆盖程度的方法

Method: UCS基于"好的演示集应暴露模型当前选定子集中未揭示的潜在聚类"原则，通过(1)从模型一致嵌入中诱导离散潜在聚类，(2)使用平滑Good-Turing估计器从经验频率谱估计候选子集中未揭示聚类数量。该方法无需训练，可与现有选择基线通过正则化目标结合

Result: 在多个意图分类和推理基准测试中，将UCS与强基线结合可在相同选择预算下将ICL准确率提升2-6%，同时提供任务和模型层面潜在聚类分布的洞察

Conclusion: UCS作为一种基于覆盖范围且无需训练的选择方法，能有效提升上下文学习性能，为演示选择提供了新的覆盖视角

Abstract: In-context learning (ICL) performance depends critically on which demonstrations are placed in the prompt, yet most existing selectors prioritize heuristic notions of relevance or diversity and provide limited insight into the coverage of a demonstration set. We propose Unseen Coverage Selection (UKS), a training-free, subset-level coverage prior motivated by the principle that a good demonstration set should expose the model to latent cluster unrevealed by the currently selected subset. UCS operationalizes this idea by (1) inducing discrete latent clusters from model-consistent embeddings and (2) estimating the number of unrevealed clusters within a candidate subset via a Smoothed Good--Turing estimator from its empirical frequency spectrum. Unlike previous selection methods, UCS is coverage-based and training-free, and can be seamlessly combined with both query-dependent and query-independent selection baselines via a simple regularized objective. Experiments on multiple intent-classification and reasoning benchmarks with frontier Large Language Models show that augmenting strong baselines with UCS consistently improves ICL accuracy by up to 2-6% under the same selection budget, while also yielding insights into task- and model-level latent cluster distributions. Code is available at https://github.com/Raina-Xin/UCS.

</details>


### [568] [Sample Complexity of Autoregressive Reasoning: Chain-of-Thought vs. End-to-End](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12013)
*Steve Hanneke,Idan Mehalel,Shay Moran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了自回归语言模型的学习复杂性，发现在端到端监督下样本复杂度可以是常数到线性之间的任意增长率，而在思维链监督下样本复杂度与生成长度T无关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究自回归语言模型的学习复杂性，特别是样本复杂度如何依赖于生成长度T，以及思维链监督能否减少这种依赖性。

Method: 采用PAC学习框架分析下一个标记生成器，引入新的组合工具，对比端到端监督和思维链监督两种学习场景。

Result: 端到端学习下样本复杂度可以是常数到线性之间的任意增长率；思维链监督下样本复杂度与T无关，完全消除了对生成长度的依赖。

Conclusion: 揭示了自回归学习复杂性的完整分类，证明了思维链监督能显著降低学习复杂性，解决了Joshi等人提出的开放性问题。

Abstract: Modern large language models generate text autoregressively, producing tokens one at a time. To study the learnability of such systems, Joshi et al. (COLT 2025) introduced a PAC-learning framework for next-token generators, the primitive underlying autoregressive models. In this framework, an unknown next-token generator maps a sequence of tokens to the next token and is iteratively applied for $T$ steps, producing a chain of tokens whose final token constitutes the model's output. The learning task is to learn the input-output mapping induced by this autoregressive process. Depending on the available supervision, training examples may reveal only the final output (End-to-End supervision) or the entire generated chain (Chain-of-Thought supervision). This raises two natural questions: how the sample complexity depends on the generation length $T$, and how much Chain-of-Thought supervision can reduce this dependence.
  In this work we give a nearly complete answer to both questions by uncovering a taxonomy of how the sample complexity scales with $T$. For End-to-End learning, we show that the landscape is remarkably rich: subject to mild conditions, essentially any growth rate $r(T)$ between constant and linear can arise as the sample complexity, and combined with the linear upper bound of Joshi et al., this yields an essentially complete characterization. In contrast, under Chain-of-Thought supervision we show that the sample complexity is independent of $T$, demonstrating that access to intermediate reasoning steps can eliminate the dependence on the generation length altogether. Our analysis introduces new combinatorial tools, and as corollaries we resolve several open questions posed by Joshi et al. regarding the dependence of learnability on the generation length and the role of Chain-of-Thought supervision.

</details>


### [569] [BayMOTH: Bayesian optiMizatiOn with meTa-lookahead -- a simple approacH](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12005)
*Rahman Ejaz,Varchas Gopalaswamy,Ricardo Luna,Aarne Lees,Vineet Gundecha,Christopher Kanan,Soumyendu Sarkar,Riccardo Betti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的元贝叶斯优化算法，在任务相关性高时利用元训练信息，相关性低时回退到前瞻策略，实现鲁棒性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统元贝叶斯优化在任务结构可迁移时样本效率高，但当元训练任务与测试任务对齐不佳时，会导致在线优化过程中提出次优查询。需要一种能根据任务相关性自适应调整策略的方法。

Method: 提出简单元贝叶斯优化算法，在统一框架内：当确定相关任务信息有用时利用该信息，否则回退到前瞻策略。算法能自适应判断何时使用元训练信息。

Result: 在函数优化任务上与现有方法竞争力相当，同时在低任务相关性场景（测试任务与元训练集共享有限结构）下保持强劲性能

Conclusion: 提出的自适应元贝叶斯优化算法既能利用相关任务信息提高样本效率，又能在任务相关性低时避免性能下降，实现了鲁棒的优化性能

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) has for sequential optimization of expensive black-box functions demonstrated practicality and effectiveness in many real-world settings. Meta-Bayesian optimization (meta-BO) focuses on improving the sample efficiency of BO by making use of information from related tasks. Although meta-BO is sample-efficient when task structure transfers, poor alignment between meta-training and test tasks can cause suboptimal queries to be suggested during online optimization. To this end, we propose a simple meta-BO algorithm that utilizes related-task information when determined useful, falling back to lookahead otherwise, within a unified framework. We demonstrate competitiveness of our method with existing approaches on function optimization tasks, while retaining strong performance in low task-relatedness regimes where test tasks share limited structure with the meta-training set.

</details>


### [570] [Loss-Driven Bayesian Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11995)
*Zhuoyue Huang,Freddie Bickford Smith,Tom Rainforth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于损失的贝叶斯主动学习方法，允许数据采集直接针对特定决策问题的损失，通过推导损失函数得到唯一的数据采集目标，并在加权Bregman散度形式的损失下实现解析计算


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统主动学习方法在针对不同下游问题和损失定制数据采集方面灵活性有限，需要一种能够直接针对决策问题损失进行数据采集的严格方法

Method: 提出损失驱动的贝叶斯主动学习方法，从任何损失函数推导出唯一的数据采集目标，特别证明加权Bregman散度形式的损失允许对其目标中的关键组件进行解析计算

Result: 在回归和分类实验中，使用多种不同损失函数时，该方法相对于现有技术能够降低测试损失

Conclusion: 该方法为主动学习提供了一种灵活且理论严谨的损失驱动框架，能够针对特定决策问题定制数据采集策略，并在实践中具有可行性

Abstract: The central goal of active learning is to gather data that maximises downstream predictive performance, but popular approaches have limited flexibility in customising this data acquisition to different downstream problems and losses. We propose a rigorous loss-driven approach to Bayesian active learning that allows data acquisition to directly target the loss associated with a given decision problem. In particular, we show how any loss can be used to derive a unique objective for optimal data acquisition. Critically, we then show that any loss taking the form of a weighted Bregman divergence permits analytic computation of a central component of its corresponding objective, making the approach applicable in practice. In regression and classification experiments with a range of different losses, we find our approach reduces test losses relative to existing techniques.

</details>


### [571] [Offline-Online Reinforcement Learning for Linear Mixture MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11994)
*Zhongjun Zhang,Sean R. Sinclair*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究线性混合MDP中的离线-在线强化学习，处理环境偏移问题，提出自适应利用离线数据的算法，在离线数据有益时提升性能，无益时安全忽略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究离线-在线强化学习在环境偏移下的性能，解决离线数据可能来自不匹配环境的问题，探索如何自适应地利用离线数据来提升在线学习效率。

Method: 提出自适应算法，根据离线数据的质量（覆盖度或环境偏移大小）动态调整利用策略。当离线数据信息丰富时充分利用，当数据无益时安全忽略并匹配纯在线学习性能。

Result: 建立了显式刻画离线数据何时有益的遗憾上界，并提供了近乎匹配的下界。数值实验进一步验证了理论发现，表明算法在离线数据有益时优于纯在线学习。

Conclusion: 该算法能自适应地利用离线数据，在环境偏移下实现性能提升，为离线-在线强化学习提供了理论保证和实用方法。

Abstract: We study offline-online reinforcement learning in linear mixture Markov decision processes (MDPs) under environment shift. In the offline phase, data are collected by an unknown behavior policy and may come from a mismatched environment, while in the online phase the learner interacts with the target environment. We propose an algorithm that adaptively leverages offline data. When the offline data are informative, either due to sufficient coverage or small environment shift, the algorithm provably improves over purely online learning. When the offline data are uninformative, it safely ignores them and matches the online-only performance. We establish regret upper bounds that explicitly characterize when offline data are beneficial, together with nearly matching lower bounds. Numerical experiments further corroborate our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [572] [Multi-Head Residual-Gated DeepONet for Coherent Nonlinear Wave Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11972)
*Zhiwei Fan,Yiming Pan,Daniel Coca*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MH-RG DeepONet，一种结合物理描述符的神经算子框架，通过多头残差门控机制提升非线性波动力学预测精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经算子将输入输出映射视为黑箱回归问题，未能充分利用初始状态的紧凑物理描述符结构。现有特征集成策略通常依赖直接拼接或FiLM式仿射调制，缺乏对物理结构信息的有效利用

Method: 提出多头残差门控DeepONet：1) 标准DeepONet状态路径学习波场；2) 并行条件路径处理紧凑物理描述符；3) 预分支残差调制器、分支残差门、主干残差门构成三重调制；4) 低秩多头机制捕获多个互补条件响应模式，避免参数爆炸

Result: 在高度非线性保守波动力学和耗散俘获动力学基准测试中，相比特征增强基线，MH-RG DeepONet实现更低误差，更好保持相位相干性和物理相关动力学量的保真度

Conclusion: MH-RG DeepONet通过将物理描述符作为残差调制因子，结合多头门控机制，有效提升了非线性波动力学预测的精度和物理一致性，为物理信息神经算子设计提供了新范式

Abstract: Coherent nonlinear wave dynamics are often strongly shaped by a compact set of physically meaningful descriptors of the initial state. Traditional neural operators typically treat the input-output mapping as a largely black-box high-dimensional regression problem, without explicitly exploiting this structured physical context. Common feature-integration strategies usually rely on direct concatenation or FiLM-style affine modulation in hidden latent spaces. Here we introduce a different paradigm, loosely inspired by the complementary roles of state evolution and physically meaningful observables in quantum mechanics: the wave field is learned through a standard DeepONet state pathway, while compact physical descriptors follow a parallel conditioning pathway and act as residual modulation factors on the state prediction. Based on this idea, we develop a Multi-Head Residual-Gated DeepONet (MH-RG), which combines a pre-branch residual modulator, a branch residual gate, and a trunk residual gate with a low-rank multi-head mechanism to capture multiple complementary conditioned response patterns without prohibitive parameter growth. We evaluate the framework on representative benchmarks including highly nonlinear conservative wave dynamics and dissipative trapped dynamics and further perform detailed mechanistic analyses of the learned multi-head gating behavior. Compared with feature-augmented baselines, MH-RG DeepONet achieves consistently lower error while better preserving phase coherence and the fidelity of physically relevant dynamical quantities.

</details>


### [573] [Classification of Epileptic iEEG using Topological Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11971)
*Sunia Tanweer,Narayan Puthanmadam Subramaniyam,Firas A. Khasawneh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了拓扑数据分析特征在癫痫发作检测中的应用，通过大规模消融实验发现，降维后的拓扑表示在三分类任务中达到80%的平衡准确率，且经典机器学习模型性能与深度学习相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 癫痫发作检测面临脑电信号高维度和非线性动态特性的挑战，需要探索拓扑数据分析特征是否能改善脑状态分类，并研究这些特征与现代机器学习管道的交互作用。

Method: 使用55名患者的iEEG数据，从信号中提取持久图，通过Carlsson坐标、持久图像和模板函数等TDA表示进行向量化。进行大规模消融研究，涵盖多个iEEG频段、降维技术、特征表示和分类器架构。

Result: 降维后的拓扑表示在三分类中达到80%平衡准确率；经典机器学习模型表现与深度学习相当（79.17%平衡准确率）；完整多通道特征结构会导致严重过拟合。

Conclusion: 精心设计的拓扑特征能显著降低模型复杂度要求，将拓扑表示应用于多通道神经数据时，结构保持的降维至关重要，完整特征结构会导致过拟合问题。

Abstract: Epileptic seizure detection from EEG signals remains challenging due to the high dimensionality and nonlinear, potentially stochastic, dynamics of neural activity. In this work, we investigate whether features derived from topological data analysis (TDA) can improve the classification of brain states in preictal, ictal and interictal iEEG recordings from epilepsy patients using multichannel data. We analyze data from 55 patients, significantly larger than many previous studies that rely on patient-specific models. Persistence diagrams derived from iEEG signals are vectorized using several TDA representations, including Carlsson coordinates, persistence images, and template functions. To understand how topological representations interact with modern machine learning pipelines, we conduct a large-scale ablation study across multiple iEEG frequency bands, dimensionality reduction techniques, feature representations, and classifier architectures. Our experiments show that dimension-reduced topological representations achieve up to 80\% balanced accuracy for three-class classification. Interestingly, classical machine learning models perform comparably to deep learning models, achieving up to 79.17\% balanced accuracy, suggesting that carefully designed topological features can substantially reduce model complexity requirements. In contrast, pipelines preserving the full multichannel feature structure exhibit severe overfitting due to the high-dimensional feature space. These findings highlight the importance of structure-preserving dimensionality reduction when applying topology-based representations to multichannel neural data.

</details>


### [574] [Active Imitation Learning for Thermal- and Kernel-Aware LFM Inference on 3D S-NUCA Many-Cores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11948)
*Yixian Shen,Chaoyao Shen,Jan Deen,George Floros,Andy Pimentel,Anuj Pathania*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AILFM：基于主动模仿学习的调度框架，用于在3D S-NUCA CPU上优化大型基础模型推理的能效和热管理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GPU成本高昂且供应有限，促使采用高性能通用CPU（特别是3D S-NUCA架构）运行大型基础模型。但3D架构面临严重热挑战和不均匀缓存延迟，现有热管理方法依赖过于简化的分析模型且缺乏适应性。

Method: 提出AILFM框架，采用主动模仿学习方法，从Oracle演示中学习近乎最优的热感知调度策略，考虑核心级性能异构性和LFM内核特定行为，实现运行时开销最小化。

Result: 大量实验表明，AILFM在保持热安全的同时最大化性能，优于现有最先进基线方法，并在多样化LFM工作负载上表现出良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: AILFM为3D S-NUCA CPU上的大型基础模型推理提供了有效的热感知调度解决方案，通过主动模仿学习实现了自适应、高性能的热管理。

Abstract: Large Foundation Model (LFM) inference is both memory- and compute-intensive, traditionally relying on GPUs. However, the limited availability and high cost have motivated the adoption of high-performance general-purpose CPUs, especially emerging 3D-stacked Static Non-Uniform Cache Architecture (3D S-NUCA) systems. These architectures offer enhanced bandwidth and locality but suffer from severe thermal challenges and uneven cache latencies due to 3D Networks-on-Chip (NoC). Optimal management of thread migration and V/f scaling is non-trivial due to LFM kernel diversity and system heterogeneity. Existing thermal management approaches often rely on oversimplified analytical models and lack adaptability. We propose AILFM, an Active Imitation Learning (AIL)-based scheduling framework that learns near-optimal thermal-aware scheduling policies from Oracle demonstrations with minimal run-time overhead. AILFM accounts for both core-level performance heterogeneity and kernel-specific behavior in LFMs to maintain thermal safety while maximizing performance. Extensive experiments show that AILFM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and generalizes well across diverse LFM workloads.

</details>


### [575] [Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10009)
*Kening Wang,Di Wen,Yufan Chen,Ruiping Liu,Junwei Zheng,Jiale Wei,Kailun Yang,Rainer Stiefelhagen,Kunyu Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FF-TRUST：首个针对多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声问题的基准与框架，通过联合时频早期学习正则化提升鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动睡眠分期面临多模态生理信号（EEG、EOG）的域偏移问题，同时实际数据常受噪声标签影响。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降，而标签噪声鲁棒的多源域泛化研究仍不足。

Method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，包含联合时频早期学习正则化（JTF-ELR）。通过联合利用时域和频域一致性，结合置信度多样性正则化，在噪声监督下提升鲁棒性。框架实现域不变的多模态睡眠分期。

Result: 在五个公开数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的SOTA性能。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降。

Conclusion: 建立了首个多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声的基准（NL-DGSS），提出的FF-TRUST框架通过JTF-ELR有效解决了域偏移和标签噪声共存的挑战，为实际临床应用提供了鲁棒解决方案。

Abstract: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

</details>


### [576] [Fast and principled equation discovery from chaos to climate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11929)
*Yuzheng Zhang,Weizhen Li,Rui Carvalho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Bayesian-ARGOS：结合快速频率主义筛选与聚焦贝叶斯推断的混合框架，用于从噪声有限数据中自动发现方程，提供原则性不确定性量化，计算成本显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从噪声有限观测中识别复杂系统动力学方程是数据驱动科学的核心挑战。现有基于库的稀疏回归方法在自动化、统计严谨性和计算效率之间存在折衷，需要一种能协调这些需求的新方法。

Method: 开发Bayesian-ARGOS混合框架：1) 使用快速频率主义方法进行初步筛选；2) 对筛选出的候选项进行聚焦贝叶斯推断；3) 提供原则性不确定性量化；4) 支持标准统计诊断（影响分析、多重共线性检测）；5) 可与表示学习（SINDy-SHRED）集成处理高维数据。

Result: 在7个混沌系统的测试中：1) 在大多数场景下优于两种最先进方法；2) 在所有系统中数据效率超过SINDy；3) 在7个系统中的6个噪声容忍度超过SINDy；4) 相比基于bootstrap的ARGOS计算成本降低两个数量级；5) 与SINDy-SHRED集成时，显著提高有效潜在方程产量并改善长期稳定性。

Conclusion: Bayesian-ARGOS提供了一条从稀缺噪声观测到可解释控制方程的原则性、自动化且计算高效的途径，为从基准混沌系统到全球气候模式潜在动力学的方程发现提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Our ability to predict, control, and ultimately understand complex systems rests on discovering the equations that govern their dynamics. Identifying these equations directly from noisy, limited observations has therefore become a central challenge in data-driven science, yet existing library-based sparse regression methods force a compromise between automation, statistical rigor, and computational efficiency. Here we develop Bayesian-ARGOS, a hybrid framework that reconciles these demands by combining rapid frequentist screening with focused Bayesian inference, enabling automated equation discovery with principled uncertainty quantification at a fraction of the computational cost of existing methods. Tested on seven chaotic systems under varying data scarcity and noise levels, Bayesian-ARGOS outperforms two state-of-the-art methods in most scenarios. It surpasses SINDy in data efficiency for all systems and noise tolerance for six out of the seven, with a two-order-of-magnitude reduction in computational cost compared to bootstrap-based ARGOS. The probabilistic formulation additionally enables a suite of standard statistical diagnostics, including influence analysis and multicollinearity detection that expose failure modes otherwise opaque. When integrated with representation learning (SINDy-SHRED) for high dimensional sea surface temperature reconstruction, Bayesian-ARGOS increases the yield of valid latent equations with significantly improved long horizon stability. Bayesian-ARGOS thus provides a principled, automated, and computationally efficient route from scarce and noisy observations to interpretable governing equations, offering a practical framework for equation discovery across scales, from benchmark chaotic systems to the latent dynamics underlying global climate patterns.

</details>


### [577] [INTARG: Informed Real-Time Adversarial Attack Generation for Time-Series Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11928)
*Gamze Kirman Tokgoz,Onat Gungor,Tajana Rosing,Baris Aksanli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种针对时间序列预测的在线有界缓冲区对抗攻击框架，通过选择性攻击高置信度且预期误差最大的时间步，实现更少但更有效的攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列预测在现实系统中至关重要，但基于深度学习的预测模型容易受到对抗攻击。现有攻击方法在时间序列场景中不适用，因为存储完整历史数据或在每个时间步进行攻击通常不切实际

Method: 提出在线有界缓冲区设置下的对抗攻击框架，采用知情选择性攻击策略，针对模型置信度高且预期预测误差最大的时间步进行攻击

Result: 实验表明该框架能将预测误差提高至2.42倍，同时在少于10%的时间步中进行攻击

Conclusion: 该选择性对抗攻击框架在时间序列预测中实现了更高效、更实用的攻击效果，为时间序列预测模型的安全性研究提供了新方向

Abstract: Time-series forecasting aims to predict future values by modeling temporal dependencies in historical observations. It is a critical component of many real-world systems, where accurate forecasts improve operational efficiency and help mitigate uncertainty and risk. More recently, machine learning (ML), and especially deep learning (DL)-based models, have gained widespread adoption for time-series forecasting, but they remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, many state-of-the-art attack methods are not directly applicable in time-series settings, where storing complete historical data or performing attacks at every time step is often impractical. This paper proposes an adversarial attack framework for time-series forecasting under an online bounded-buffer setting, leveraging an informed and selective attack strategy. By selectively targeting time steps where the model exhibits high confidence and the expected prediction error is maximal, our framework produces fewer but substantially more effective attacks. Experiments show that our framework can increase the prediction error up to 2.42x, while performing attacks in fewer than 10% of time steps.

</details>


### [578] [Can AI Detect Life? Lessons from Artificial Life](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11915)
*Ankit Gupta,Christoph Adami*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 机器学习方法用于外星生命检测时容易被分布外样本欺骗，导致高置信度的假阳性结果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估现代机器学习方法在外星生命检测中的可靠性，因为这些方法在区分生物与非生物样本时可能被分布外样本欺骗

Method: 使用人工生命技术展示机器学习方法如何被分布外样本欺骗，即使样本不具备生命能力也能被检测为生命

Result: 机器学习方法会被分布外样本欺骗，以接近100%的置信度检测到"生命"，即使样本实际上不具备生命能力

Conclusion: 由于外星样本很可能超出地球生物和非生物样本的分布范围，使用AI方法进行生命检测必然会产生显著的假阳性结果

Abstract: Modern machine learning methods have been proposed to detect life in extraterrestrial samples, drawing on their ability to distinguish biotic from abiotic samples based on training models using natural and synthetic organic molecular mixtures. Here we show using Artificial Life that such methods are easily fooled into detecting life with near 100% confidence even if the analyzed sample is not capable of life. This is due to modern machine learning methods' propensity to be easily fooled by out-of-distribution samples. Because extra-terrestrial samples are very likely out of the distribution provided by terrestrial biotic and abiotic samples, using AI methods for life detection is bound to yield significant false positives.

</details>


### [579] [Autonomous Diffractometry Enabled by Visual Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11773)
*J. Oppliger,M. Stifter,A. Rüegg,I. Biało,L. Martinelli,P. G. Freeman,D. Prabhakaran,J. Zhao,Q. Wang,J. Chang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用无模型强化学习框架，让智能体直接从劳厄衍射图案中学习识别和导航至高对称性取向，实现单晶自动对齐


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化在科学和工业领域至关重要，但需要解释抽象视觉信息的任务（如晶体对齐）仍然依赖人类专业知识。晶体对齐严重依赖人类理解衍射图案的能力，这限制了自动化实验流程的发展。

Method: 采用无模型强化学习框架，智能体直接从劳厄衍射图案中学习识别和导航至高对称性取向，无需访问晶体学和衍射理论知识，也不需要人类监督。

Result: 智能体开发出类似人类的策略，在不同晶体对称性类别中实现时间高效的晶体对齐，提供了智能衍射仪的计算框架。

Conclusion: 该方法推进了材料科学中自动化实验流程的发展，为需要解释抽象视觉信息的自动化任务提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Automation underpins progress across scientific and industrial disciplines. Yet, automating tasks requiring interpretation of abstract visual information remain challenging. For example, crystal alignment strongly relies on humans with the ability to comprehend diffraction patterns. Here we introduce an autonomous system that aligns single crystals without access to crystallography and diffraction theory. Using a model-free reinforcement learning framework, an agent learns to identify and navigate towards high-symmetry orientations directly from Laue diffraction patterns. Despite the absence of human supervision, the agent develops human-like strategies to achieve time-efficient alignment across different crystal symmetry classes. With this, we provide a computational framework for intelligent diffractometers. As such, our approach advances the development of automated experimental workflows in materials science.

</details>


### [580] [How Transformers Learn to Plan via Multi-Token Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11912)
*Jianhao Huang,Zhanpeng Zhou,Renqiu Xia,Baharan Mirzasoleiman,Weijie Su,Wei Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 多标记预测（MTP）在推理任务中优于传统的下一个标记预测（NTP），通过诱导反向推理过程实现更好的全局结构捕捉


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的下一个标记预测（NTP）在捕捉推理任务的全局结构方面存在困难，而多标记预测（MTP）作为一种有前景的替代方法，其工作机制尚未得到充分理解。本文旨在研究MTP如何促进推理，特别是规划任务。

Method: 采用实证和理论相结合的方法：1）在合成图路径寻找任务和实际推理基准（如Countdown和布尔可满足性问题）上比较MTP和NTP的性能；2）在星图任务上分析简化的两层Transformer，证明MTP诱导反向推理过程的理论机制。

Result: 实证结果显示MTP在各项推理任务上持续优于NTP。理论分析表明MTP诱导了一个两阶段的反向推理过程：模型首先关注结束节点，然后通过向后追踪中间节点来重建路径。这种行为的产生源于MTP的梯度解耦特性，相比NTP提供了更清晰的训练信号。

Conclusion: 多标记目标函数通过梯度解耦机制，在优化过程中偏向于构建鲁棒且可解释的推理电路，从而在推理任务中实现更好的性能。这一发现揭示了MTP相对于传统NTP在捕捉全局结构方面的优势。

Abstract: While next-token prediction (NTP) has been the standard objective for training language models, it often struggles to capture global structure in reasoning tasks. Multi-token prediction (MTP) has recently emerged as a promising alternative, yet its underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this paper, we study how MTP facilitates reasoning, with a focus on planning. Empirically, we show that MTP consistently outperforms NTP on both synthetic graph path-finding tasks and more realistic reasoning benchmarks, such as Countdown and boolean satisfiability problems. Theoretically, we analyze a simplified two-layer Transformer on a star graph task. We prove that MTP induces a two-stage reverse reasoning process: the model first attends to the end node and then reconstructs the path by tracing intermediate nodes backward. This behavior arises from a gradient decoupling property of MTP, which provides a cleaner training signal compared to NTP. Ultimately, our results highlight how multi-token objectives inherently bias optimization toward robust and interpretable reasoning circuits.

</details>


### [581] [Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Networks: Physics-Bounded Deep Learning for Solar Forecasting in Autonomous Off-Grid Microgrids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11909)
*Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Network，解决光伏预测中深度学习模型的相位滞后和夜间虚假发电问题，通过将气象几何变量映射到Koopman线性化流形，实现严格的天体几何约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度学习模型在自主离网光伏系统预测中存在严重问题：云层瞬变时出现时间相位滞后，以及物理上不可能的夜间发电现象。需要解决数据驱动建模与确定性天体力学之间的分歧。

Method: 提出Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Network，将22个气象和几何变量投影到Koopman线性化的黎曼流形中，系统映射复杂气候动态。架构包含Spectral Calibration单元和乘法Thermodynamic Alpha-Gate，合成实时大气不透明度与理论晴空边界模型，结构上强制执行严格的天体几何合规性。

Result: 在五年半干旱气候测试中，RMSE为18.31 Wh/m²，Pearson相关系数0.988。模型在所有1826个测试日保持零幅度夜间误差，高频光学瞬变时相位响应低于30分钟。模型仅含63,458个可训练参数，超轻量设计。

Conclusion: 该框架建立了稳健、热力学一致的标准，适用于边缘可部署微电网控制器，完全消除了夜间虚假发电，并在快速天气变化时保持零滞后同步。

Abstract: The stable operation of autonomous off-grid photovoltaic systems requires solar forecasting algorithms that respect atmospheric thermodynamics. Contemporary deep learning models consistently exhibit critical anomalies, primarily severe temporal phase lags during cloud transients and physically impossible nocturnal power generation. To resolve this divergence between data-driven modeling and deterministic celestial mechanics, this research introduces the Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Network. The methodology projects 22 meteorological and geometric variables into a Koopman-linearized Riemannian manifold to systematically map complex climatic dynamics. The architecture integrates a Spectral Calibration unit and a multiplicative Thermodynamic Alpha-Gate. This system synthesizes real-time atmospheric opacity with theoretical clear-sky boundary models, structurally enforcing strict celestial geometry compliance. This completely neutralizes phantom nocturnal generation while maintaining zero-lag synchronization during rapid weather shifts. Validated against a rigorous five-year testing horizon in a severe semi-arid climate, the framework achieves an RMSE of 18.31 Wh/m2 and a Pearson correlation of 0.988. The model strictly maintains a zero-magnitude nocturnal error across all 1826 testing days and exhibits a sub-30-minute phase response during high-frequency optical transients. Comprising exactly 63,458 trainable parameters, this ultra-lightweight design establishes a robust, thermodynamically consistent standard for edge-deployable microgrid controllers.

</details>


### [582] [A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11791)
*Hugh Blayney,Álvaro Arroyo,Johan Obando-Ceron,Pablo Samuel Castro,Aaron Courville,Michael M. Bronstein,Xiaowen Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对循环语言模型进行机制分析，研究其内部动态与标准前馈模型的差异，发现循环块学习到与前者相似的推理阶段并在深度上重复


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管循环推理语言模型在性能上有提升，但对其内部动态与标准前馈模型的差异研究较少，需要深入理解其工作机制以指导架构设计

Method: 对循环语言模型的潜在状态进行机制分析，研究循环递归中每层收敛到不同固定点的现象，分析注意力头行为稳定化，并研究循环块大小、输入注入和归一化对循环固定点出现和稳定性的影响

Result: 发现循环块学习到的推理阶段与标准前馈模型高度相似，这些阶段在每次迭代中深度重复；注意力头行为在达到固定点后稳定；循环块大小、输入注入和归一化显著影响循环固定点的出现和稳定性

Conclusion: 循环语言模型在潜在空间中遵循一致的循环轨迹，学习到可重复的推理阶段，这些发现有助于将机制洞察转化为架构设计的实用指导

Abstract: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recent research has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping an LLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models. Despite promising results, few works have investigated how their internal dynamics differ from those of standard feedforward models. In this paper, we conduct a mechanistic analysis of the latent states in looped language models, focusing in particular on how the stages of inference observed in feedforward models compare to those observed in looped ones. To this end, we analyze cyclic recurrence and show that for many of the studied models each layer in the cycle converges to a distinct fixed point; consequently, the recurrent block follows a consistent cyclic trajectory in the latent space. We provide evidence that as these fixed points are reached, attention-head behavior stabilizes, leading to constant behavior across recurrences. Empirically, we discover that recurrent blocks learn stages of inference that closely mirror those of feedforward models, repeating these stages in depth with each iteration. We study how recurrent block size, input injection, and normalization influence the emergence and stability of these cyclic fixed points. We believe these findings help translate mechanistic insights into practical guidance for architectural design.

</details>


### [583] [KL Divergence Between Gaussians: A Step-by-Step Derivation for the Variational Autoencoder Objective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11744)
*Andrés Muñoz,Rodrigo Ramele*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文详细推导了高斯分布之间Kullback-Leibler散度的闭式表达式，特别关注其在变分自编码器中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: KL散度是信息论中的基本概念，在变分自编码器中作为正则化项对潜在空间施加结构，使模型具备生成能力。高斯分布之间的KL散度在VAE实践中特别重要，需要明确的闭式表达式来理解和优化模型训练。

Method: 从连续随机变量的通用定义出发，推导单变量高斯分布的KL散度表达式，然后扩展到多变量情况（假设对角协方差矩阵）。详细分析最终表达式中各项的数学含义。

Result: 获得了高斯分布之间KL散度的闭式解析表达式，该表达式包含均值差异和方差相关的项。表达式为VAE训练提供了明确的数学基础，有助于理解KL正则化项对模型训练动态的影响。

Conclusion: 推导出的高斯分布KL散度闭式表达式为VAE实现提供了理论基础，有助于深入理解正则化项在潜在空间结构化和模型生成能力中的作用，对优化VAE训练过程具有重要意义。

Abstract: Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence is a fundamental concept in information theory that quantifies the discrepancy between two probability distributions. In the context of Variational Autoencoders (VAEs), it serves as a central regularization term, imposing structure on the latent space and thereby enabling the model to exhibit generative capabilities. In this work, we present a detailed derivation of the closed-form expression for the KL divergence between Gaussian distributions, a case of particular importance in practical VAE implementations. Starting from the general definition for continuous random variables, we derive the expression for the univariate case and extend it to the multivariate setting under the assumption of diagonal covariance. Finally, we discuss the interpretation of each term in the resulting expression and its impact on the training dynamics of the model.

</details>


### [584] [Towards Autonomous Mechanistic Reasoning in Virtual Cells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11661)
*Yunhui Jang,Lu Zhu,Jake Fawkes,Alisandra Kaye Denton,Dominique Beaini,Emmanuel Noutahi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了VCR-Agent框架，通过多智能体系统和验证机制为虚拟细胞生成可靠的机理解释，并创建了VC-TRACES数据集，证明这种解释能提高事实准确性和下游任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在开放科学领域（如生物学）的应用受限，主要因为缺乏事实基础和可操作的机理解释。需要一种能够生成可验证、可证伪的生物学推理方法。

Method: 提出结构化解释形式化方法，将生物学推理表示为机理行动图；开发VCR-Agent多智能体框架，整合生物学知识检索和基于验证器的过滤方法，自主生成和验证机理推理；创建VC-TRACES数据集。

Result: 使用该框架从Tahoe-100M图谱中提取了经过验证的机理解释数据集；实验表明，使用这些解释进行训练能提高事实精确度，并为下游基因表达预测提供更有效的监督信号。

Conclusion: 可靠的机理推理对虚拟细胞研究至关重要，通过多智能体系统和严格验证的协同作用可以实现这一目标，为加速科学发现提供了新途径。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently gained significant attention as a promising approach to accelerate scientific discovery. However, their application in open-ended scientific domains such as biology remains limited, primarily due to the lack of factually grounded and actionable explanations. To address this, we introduce a structured explanation formalism for virtual cells that represents biological reasoning as mechanistic action graphs, enabling systematic verification and falsification. Building upon this, we propose VCR-Agent, a multi-agent framework that integrates biologically grounded knowledge retrieval with a verifier-based filtering approach to generate and validate mechanistic reasoning autonomously. Using this framework, we release VC-TRACES dataset, which consists of verified mechanistic explanations derived from the Tahoe-100M atlas. Empirically, we demonstrate that training with these explanations improves factual precision and provides a more effective supervision signal for downstream gene expression prediction. These results underscore the importance of reliable mechanistic reasoning for virtual cells, achieved through the synergy of multi-agent and rigorous verification.

</details>


### [585] [LASA: Language-Agnostic Semantic Alignment at the Semantic Bottleneck for LLM Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12710)
*Junxiao Yang,Haoran Liu,Jinzhe Tu,Jiale Cheng,Zhexin Zhang,Shiyao Cui,Jiaqi Weng,Jialing Tao,Hui Xue,Hongning Wang,Han Qiu,Minlie Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出语言无关语义对齐(LASA)方法，通过识别LLMs中的语义瓶颈层，将安全对齐锚定在语言无关的语义空间而非表面文本，显著提升低资源语言的安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在高资源语言中表现出良好的安全性，但在低资源语言中存在严重漏洞。作者认为这种差距源于语言无关的语义理解能力与偏向高资源语言的安全对齐之间的不匹配。

Method: 首先识别LLMs中的语义瓶颈层（中间层），该层的表示几何主要由共享语义内容而非语言身份主导。然后提出语言无关语义对齐(LASA)，将安全对齐直接锚定在语义瓶颈中。

Result: LASA显著提升了所有语言的安全性：在LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct上，平均攻击成功率从24.7%降至2.8%；在Qwen2.5和Qwen3 Instruct模型（7B-32B）上保持在3-4%左右。

Conclusion: 研究表明安全对齐需要锚定在模型的语言无关语义空间而非表面文本，为LLM安全性提供了表示层面的新视角。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often demonstrate strong safety performance in high-resource languages, yet exhibit severe vulnerabilities when queried in low-resource languages. We attribute this gap to a mismatch between language-agnostic semantic understanding ability and language-dominant safety alignment biased toward high-resource languages. Consistent with this hypothesis, we empirically identify the semantic bottleneck in LLMs, an intermediate layer in which the geometry of model representations is governed primarily by shared semantic content rather than language identity. Building on this observation, we propose Language-Agnostic Semantic Alignment (LASA), which anchors safety alignment directly in semantic bottlenecks. Experiments show that LASA substantially improves safety across all languages: average attack success rate (ASR) drops from 24.7% to 2.8% on LLaMA-3.1-8B-Instruct and remains around 3-4% across Qwen2.5 and Qwen3 Instruct models (7B-32B). Together, our analysis and method offer a representation-level perspective on LLM safety, suggesting that safety alignment requires anchoring safety understanding not in surface text, but in the model's language-agnostic semantic space.

</details>


### [586] [Layerwise Dynamics for In-Context Classification in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11613)
*Patrick Lutz,Themistoklis Haris,Arjun Chandra,Aditya Gangrade,Venkatesh Saligrama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了Transformer在少样本分类中的内部机制，通过强制特征和标签置换等变性使计算可识别，提取出深度索引递归更新规则，揭示了基于几何驱动的算法模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer能够在少量标记样本上进行上下文分类，但其推理时算法仍不透明。研究旨在理解Transformer在硬无边界多类线性分类中的内部计算机制。

Method: 在硬无边界多类线性分类中，通过强制每一层的特征和标签置换等变性使计算可识别，同时保持功能等价性。从这些模型中提取出深度索引递归：softmax Transformer内部出现的端到端可识别更新规则。

Result: 注意力矩阵由混合特征-标签Gram结构形成，驱动训练点、标签和测试探针的耦合更新。得到的动态实现了几何驱动的算法模式，可证明能够放大类别分离并产生稳健的预期类别对齐。

Conclusion: 研究首次提取出Transformer内部出现的端到端可识别更新规则，揭示了基于几何驱动的算法机制，为理解Transformer的上下文学习能力提供了理论解释。

Abstract: Transformers can perform in-context classification from a few labeled examples, yet the inference-time algorithm remains opaque. We study multi-class linear classification in the hard no-margin regime and make the computation identifiable by enforcing feature- and label-permutation equivariance at every layer. This enables interpretability while maintaining functional equivalence and yields highly structured weights. From these models we extract an explicit depth-indexed recursion: an end-to-end identified, emergent update rule inside a softmax transformer, to our knowledge the first of its kind. Attention matrices formed from mixed feature-label Gram structure drive coupled updates of training points, labels, and the test probe. The resulting dynamics implement a geometry-driven algorithmic motif, which can provably amplify class separation and yields robust expected class alignment.

</details>


### [587] [WOMBET: World Model-based Experience Transfer for Robust and Sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08958)
*Mintae Kim,Koushil Sreenath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WOMBET框架通过世界模型生成可靠的离线数据，结合不确定性惩罚规划和自适应采样，实现从源任务到目标任务的稳定经验迁移，提升强化学习的样本效率和最终性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人强化学习面临数据收集成本高、风险大的挑战，现有离线到在线RL方法通常假设已有固定数据集，但未解决如何生成可靠的迁移数据问题。

Method: 提出WOMBET框架：1）在源任务中学习世界模型；2）通过不确定性惩罚规划生成离线数据；3）筛选高回报、低认知不确定性的轨迹；4）在目标任务中进行在线微调，采用离线与在线数据的自适应采样策略。

Result: 理论证明不确定性惩罚目标提供了真实回报的下界，并推导了有限样本误差分解。实验表明WOMBET在连续控制基准测试中优于强基线方法，显著提升样本效率和最终性能。

Conclusion: WOMBET通过联合优化数据生成和迁移，为机器人强化学习中的经验迁移提供了有效解决方案，证明了同时考虑数据生成和利用的重要性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) in robotics is often limited by the cost and risk of data collection, motivating experience transfer from a source task to a target task. Offline-to-online RL leverages prior data but typically assumes a given fixed dataset and does not address how to generate reliable data for transfer. We propose \textit{World Model-based Experience Transfer} (WOMBET), a framework that jointly generates and utilizes prior data. WOMBET learns a world model in the source task and generates offline data via uncertainty-penalized planning, followed by filtering trajectories with high return and low epistemic uncertainty. It then performs online fine-tuning in the target task using adaptive sampling between offline and online data, enabling a stable transition from prior-driven initialization to task-specific adaptation. We show that the uncertainty-penalized objective provides a lower bound on the true return and derive a finite-sample error decomposition capturing distribution mismatch and approximation error. Empirically, WOMBET improves sample efficiency and final performance over strong baselines on continuous control benchmarks, demonstrating the benefit of jointly optimizing data generation and transfer.

</details>


### [588] [Continuous Adversarial Flow Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11521)
*Shanchuan Lin,Ceyuan Yang,Zhijie Lin,Hao Chen,Haoqi Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出连续对抗流模型，这是一种使用对抗目标训练的连续时间流模型，通过引入学习判别器来改进流匹配方法，显著提升图像生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统流匹配方法使用固定的均方误差准则，限制了生成样本与目标数据分布的匹配程度。作者希望通过引入对抗训练机制来改进流模型，使生成的样本更好地对齐目标分布。

Method: 提出连续对抗流模型，在连续时间流模型中引入学习判别器进行对抗训练。该方法可作为现有流匹配模型的后训练方法，也可从头训练模型。通过判别器的引导，诱导出不同的广义分布。

Result: 在ImageNet 256px生成任务中，后训练显著提升了无引导FID：潜在空间SiT从8.26提升到3.63，像素空间JiT从7.17提升到3.57。有引导生成也得到改善：SiT从2.06提升到1.53，JiT从1.86提升到1.80。在文生图任务中，在GenEval和DPG基准测试上均取得改进结果。

Conclusion: 连续对抗流模型通过引入对抗训练目标有效改进了流匹配方法，显著提升了生成样本的质量和与目标分布的匹配度，为流模型训练提供了新的优化方向。

Abstract: We propose continuous adversarial flow models, a type of continuous-time flow model trained with an adversarial objective. Unlike flow matching, which uses a fixed mean-squared-error criterion, our approach introduces a learned discriminator to guide training. This change in objective induces a different generalized distribution, which empirically produces samples that are better aligned with the target data distribution. Our method is primarily proposed for post-training existing flow-matching models, although it can also train models from scratch. On the ImageNet 256px generation task, our post-training substantially improves the guidance-free FID of latent-space SiT from 8.26 to 3.63 and of pixel-space JiT from 7.17 to 3.57. It also improves guided generation, reducing FID from 2.06 to 1.53 for SiT and from 1.86 to 1.80 for JiT. We further evaluate our approach on text-to-image generation, where it achieves improved results on both the GenEval and DPG benchmarks.

</details>


### [589] [bacpipe: a Python package to make bioacoustic deep learning models accessible](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11560)
*Vincent S. Kather,Sylvain Haupert,Burooj Ghani,Dan Stowell*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Bacpipe是一个用于生物声学深度学习的模块化软件包，提供图形和编程接口，旨在简化最先进模型在自定义音频数据集上的使用，为生态学家和计算机科学家提供统一的分析工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 被动声学监测积累了数百万小时的生物声学数据，深度学习模型极大加速了数据分析，但现有模型工具难以充分发挥其潜力，需要更易用的工具来促进生态和进化问题的研究。

Method: 开发bacpipe模块化软件包，包含生物声学深度学习模型和评估流程，提供图形界面和编程接口，支持生成声学特征向量（嵌入）和分类器预测，通过交互式可视化、聚类和探测实现模型评估和基准测试。

Result: Bacpipe实现了对最先进模型的简化使用，能够处理自定义音频数据集，生成声学特征和分类预测，其模块化设计支持模型评估和基准测试，成为生物声学模型的汇聚点。

Conclusion: 将深度学习进展普及到更广泛的受众有利于解决生态学问题，Bacpipe通过面向广泛用户群体的设计，使研究人员能够探索生物声学中的新生态和进化问题。

Abstract: 1. Natural sounds have been recorded for millions of hours over the previous decades using passive acoustic monitoring. Improvements in deep learning models have vastly accelerated the analysis of large portions of this data. While new models advance the state-of-the-art, accessing them using tools to harness their full potential is not always straightforward. Here we present bacpipe, a collection of bioacoustic deep learning models and evaluation pipelines accessible through a graphical and programming interface, designed for both ecologists and computer scientists. Bacpipe is a modular software package intended as a point of convergence for bioacoustic models.
  2. Bacpipe streamlines the usage of state-of-the-art models on custom audio datasets, generating acoustic feature vectors (embeddings) and classifier predictions. A modular design allows evaluation and benchmarking of models through interactive visualizations, clustering and probing.
  3. We believe that access to new deep learning models is important. By designing bacpipe to target a wide audience, researchers will be enabled to answer new ecological and evolutionary questions in bioacoustics.
  4. In conclusion, we believe accessibility to developments in deep learning to a wider audience benefits the ecological questions we are trying to answer.

</details>


### [590] [Eliciting Medical Reasoning with Knowledge-enhanced Data Synthesis: A Semi-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11547)
*Haolin Li,Shuyang Jiang,Ruipeng Zhang,Jiangchao Yao,Ya Zhang,Yanfeng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MedSSR：一种医学知识增强的数据合成与半监督强化学习框架，通过合成分布可控的推理问题和利用策略模型生成伪标签，有效提升医学推理能力，特别是在罕见病领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在复杂医学应用中的发展受到高质量推理数据稀缺的阻碍。现有方法通常通过监督微调从大型专有模型中蒸馏思维链推理轨迹，然后进行强化学习，但这些方法在罕见病等代表性不足的领域改进有限，且生成复杂推理链的成本高昂。

Method: 提出MedSSR框架：1）利用罕见病知识合成分布可控的推理问题；2）使用策略模型本身生成高质量伪标签；3）采用两阶段训练范式：先在伪标记合成数据上进行自监督强化学习，然后在人工标注的真实数据上进行监督强化学习。

Result: 在Qwen和Llama模型上的广泛实验表明，该方法在十个医学基准测试中优于现有方法，在罕见病任务上实现了高达+5.93%的性能提升。

Conclusion: MedSSR能够高效扩展模型训练，无需依赖昂贵的轨迹蒸馏，为医学推理任务特别是罕见病领域提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: While large language models hold promise for complex medical applications, their development is hindered by the scarcity of high-quality reasoning data. To address this issue, existing approaches typically distill chain-of-thought reasoning traces from large proprietary models via supervised fine-tuning, then conduct reinforcement learning (RL). These methods exhibit limited improvement on underrepresented domains like rare diseases while incurring substantial costs from generating complex reasoning chains. To efficiently enhance medical reasoning, we propose MedSSR, a Medical Knowledge-enhanced data Synthesis and Semi-supervised Reinforcement learning framework. Our framework first employs rare disease knowledge to synthesize distribution-controllable reasoning questions. We then utilize the policy model itself to generate high-quality pseudo-labels. This enables a two-stage, intrinsic-to-extrinsic training paradigm: self-supervised RL on the pseudo-labeled synthetic data, followed by supervised RL on the human-annotated real data. MedSSR scales model training efficiently without relying on costly trace distillation. Extensive experiments on Qwen and Llama demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods across ten medical benchmarks, achieving up to +5.93% gain on rare-disease tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/tdlhl/MedSSR.

</details>


### [591] [TempusBench: An Evaluation Framework for Time-Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11529)
*Denizalp Goktas,Gerardo Riaño-Briceño,Alif Abdullah,Aryan Nair,Chenkai Shen,Beatriz de Lucio,Alexandra Magnusson,Farhan Mashrur,Ahmed Abdulla,Shawrna Sen,Mahitha Thippireddy,Gregory Schwartz,Amy Greenwald*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了TempusBench，一个用于时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）的开源评估框架，旨在解决当前评估框架的四个主要问题：过时数据集、评估维度狭窄、不公平比较和缺乏可视化工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）领域缺乏全面且被社区接受的模型评估框架。当前存在四个主要问题阻碍了此类框架的发展：1）使用过时数据集且与预训练语料库重叠；2）评估维度狭窄，忽视核心统计特性；3）对领域特定模型进行不公平比较；4）缺乏可视化工具。

Method: 提出TempusBench框架，包含四个核心组件：1）新的数据集（不包含在现有TSFM预训练语料中）；2）超越现有基准的新颖基准任务；3）具有标准化超参数调优协议的模型评估流水线；4）基于TensorBoard的可视化界面。

Result: 开发了TempusBench开源评估框架，代码已在GitHub上公开（https://github.com/Smlcrm/TempusBench），为时间序列基础模型提供了更全面、公平和可解释的评估解决方案。

Conclusion: TempusBench通过解决当前评估框架的四个关键问题，为时间序列基础模型的发展提供了更可靠、公平和全面的评估基准，有助于推动该领域的进步。

Abstract: Foundation models have transformed natural language processing and computer vision, and a rapidly growing literature on time-series foundation models (TSFMs) seeks to replicate this success in forecasting. While recent open-source models demonstrate the promise of TSFMs, the field lacks a comprehensive and community-accepted model evaluation framework. We see at least four major issues impeding progress on the development of such a framework. First, current evaluation frameworks consist of benchmark forecasting tasks derived from often outdated datasets (e.g., M3), many of which lack clear metadata and overlap with the corpora used to pre-train TSFMs. Second, existing frameworks evaluate models along a narrowly defined set of benchmark forecasting tasks such as forecast horizon length or domain, but overlook core statistical properties such as non-stationarity and seasonality. Third, domain-specific models (e.g., XGBoost) are often compared unfairly, as existing frameworks neglect a systematic and consistent hyperparameter tuning convention for all models.
