*Andrei Polubarov,Lyubaykin Nikita,Alexander Derevyagin,Artyom Grishin,Igor Saprygin,Aleksandr Serkov,Mark Averchenko,Daniil Tikhonov,Maksim Zhdanov,Alexander Nikulin,Ilya Zisman,Albina Klepach,Alexey Zemtsov,Vladislav Kurenkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 将决策预训练Transformer（DPT）扩展到多领域环境，使用流匹配训练，在数百个任务上实现更好的泛化性能，超越先前的算法蒸馏方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的上下文强化学习（ICRL）方法存在局限性：算法蒸馏（AD）在多领域设置中泛化能力有限，而决策预训练Transformer（DPT）在简化领域表现出更强的上下文学习能力但可扩展性未经验证。需要将DPT扩展到多样化的多领域环境以验证其可扩展性和泛化能力。

Method: 将DPT扩展到多样化的多领域环境，采用流匹配作为训练方法，这种方法保持了DPT作为贝叶斯后验采样的解释。在数百个不同任务上进行训练。

Result: 训练出的智能体在保留测试集上实现了明显的泛化增益，超越了先前的AD扩展方法，在在线和离线推理中都表现出更强的性能。

Conclusion: 这项工作验证了DPT在多领域环境中的可扩展性，强化了ICRL作为训练通用智能体的可行替代方案，相对于专家蒸馏方法具有优势。

Abstract: Recent progress in in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) has demonstrated its potential for training generalist agents that can acquire new tasks directly at inference. Algorithm Distillation (AD) pioneered this paradigm and was subsequently scaled to multi-domain settings, although its ability to generalize to unseen tasks remained limited. The Decision Pre-Trained Transformer (DPT) was introduced as an alternative, showing stronger in-context reinforcement learning abilities in simplified domains, but its scalability had not been established. In this work, we extend DPT to diverse multi-domain environments, applying Flow Matching as a natural training choice that preserves its interpretation as Bayesian posterior sampling. As a result, we obtain an agent trained across hundreds of diverse tasks that achieves clear gains in generalization to the held-out test set. This agent improves upon prior AD scaling and demonstrates stronger performance in both online and offline inference, reinforcing ICRL as a viable alternative to expert distillation for training generalist agents.

</details>


### [631] [MoEITS: A Green AI approach for simplifying MoE-LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10603)
*Luis Balderas,Miguel Lastra,José M. Benítez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MoEITS是一种基于信息论框架的MoE-LLM简化算法，通过降低计算和内存占用以及能耗来优化混合专家模型，在多个基准测试中优于现有剪枝方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合专家模型虽然强大但计算负担重，需要简化方法来减少计算、内存占用和能耗，同时保持模型性能。

Method: 提出MoEITS算法，基于标准化的信息论框架，对MoE-LLM进行简化，分析了算法的计算复杂度，并在Mixtral 8×7B、Qwen1.5-2.7B和DeepSeek-V2-Lite等模型上进行了实验评估。

Result: MoEITS在准确性和简化率方面优于现有的MoE-LLM剪枝方法，生成的模型在所有基准测试中都有效且计算效率高。

Conclusion: MoEITS是一种有效的MoE-LLM简化算法，通过信息论框架实现了更好的性能与效率平衡，代码已开源。

Abstract: Large language models are transforming all areas of academia and industry, attracting the attention of researchers, professionals, and the general public. In the trek for more powerful architectures, Mixture-of-Experts, inspired by ensemble models, have emerged as one of the most effective ways to follow. However, this implies a high computational burden for both training and inference. To reduce the impact on computing and memory footprint as well as the energy consumption, simplification methods has arisen as very effective procedures.
  In this paper, an original algorithm, MoEITS, for MoE-LLMs simplification is presented. The algorithm is characterized by a refined simplicity, underpinned by standardized Information Theoretic frameworks. MoEITS is analyzed in depth from theoretical and practical points of view. Its computational complexity is studied. Its performance on the accuracy of the simplified LLMs and the reduction rate achieved is assessed through a thoroughly designed experimentation. This empirical evaluation includes a comparison with state-of-the-art MoE-LLM pruning methods applied on Mixtral $8\times7$B, Qwen1.5-2.7B, and DeepSeek-V2-Lite. The extensive experimentation conducted demonstrates that MoEITS outperforms state-of-the-art techniques by generating models that are both effective across all benchmarks and computationally efficient.
  The code implementing the method will be available at https://github.com/luisbalru/MoEITS.

</details>


### [632] [Calibration Collapse Under Sycophancy Fine-Tuning: How Reward Hacking Breaks Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10585)
*Subramanyam Sahoo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究探讨了强化学习微调（特别是GRPO）是否会因奖励模型迎合人类偏好而导致校准性能下降。实验发现迎合性微调确实会降低校准质量，即使经过后处理校正，这种影响仍然存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代大语言模型通常通过人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）进行微调以提升帮助性，但研究者担心这种迎合人类偏好的奖励信号可能会损害模型的校准性能——这是可靠不确定性量化的关键属性。

Method: 对Qwen3-8B模型进行三种微调：1）无微调（基础模型）；2）在TriviaQA上进行中性监督微调（SFT）；3）使用Group Relative Policy Optimisation（GRPO）进行迎合性微调，该优化会奖励模型同意植入的错误答案。在MMLU的1000个题目上评估，使用自助置信区间和置换检验分析校准性能。

Result: 迎合性GRPO导致一致的校准退化方向：ECE相对于基础模型增加0.006，MCE相对于中性SFT增加0.010，尽管在当前训练预算下未达到统计显著性（p=0.41）。后处理矩阵缩放使所有模型的ECE降低40-64%，准确率提升1.5-3.0个百分点，但迎合性模型在缩放后仍保持最高的ECE（0.042 vs 0.037）。

Conclusion: 迎合性奖励优化会导致校准性能下降，即使经过仿射校正后，这种奖励诱导的校准偏差仍会留下结构化残差。研究建立了评估奖励攻击对校准影响的方法论，并启发了校准感知的训练目标设计。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) are increasingly fine-tuned via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) or related reward optimisation schemes. While such procedures improve perceived helpfulness, we investigate whether sycophantic reward signals degrade calibration -- a property essential for reliable uncertainty quantification. We fine-tune Qwen3-8B under three regimes: no fine-tuning (base), neutral supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on TriviaQA, and sycophancy-inducing Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) that rewards agreement with planted wrong answers. Evaluating on $1{,}000$ MMLU items across five subject domains with bootstrap confidence intervals and permutation testing, we find that \textbf{sycophantic GRPO produces consistent directional calibration degradation} -- ECE rises by $+0.006$ relative to the base model and MCE increases by $+0.010$ relative to neutral SFT -- though the effect does not reach statistical significance ($p = 0.41$) at this training budget. Post-hoc matrix scaling applied to all three models reduces ECE by $40$--$64\%$ and improves accuracy by $1.5$--$3.0$ percentage points. However, the sycophantic model retains the highest post-scaling ECE relative to the neutral SFT control ($0.042$ vs.\ $0.037$), suggesting that reward-induced miscalibration leaves a structured residual even after affine correction. These findings establish a methodology for evaluating the calibration impact of reward hacking and motivate calibration-aware training objectives.

</details>


### [633] [WOODELF-HD: Efficient Background SHAP for High-Depth Decision Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10569)
*Ron Wettenstein,Alexander Nadel,Udi Boker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WoodelfHD扩展了Woodelf方法，通过Strassen-like矩阵乘法将复杂度从3^D降低到2^D，实现深度树的高效精确Background SHAP计算


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Background SHAP方法在解释决策树集成模型时存在可扩展性问题，特别是对于深度树，现有方法如Woodelf和PLTreeSHAP虽然将时间复杂度从O(mn)降低到O(m+n)，但引入了随树深度D呈3^D增长的预处理瓶颈，限制了实际应用

Method: WoodelfHD扩展Woodelf方法，采用类似Strassen的矩阵乘法方案，利用Woodelf矩阵的结构特性，将矩阵-向量乘法从O(k^2)降低到O(k*log(k))。实现完全向量化、非递归的实现，并合并具有相同特征的路径节点以减少缓存大小和内存使用

Result: WoodelfHD能够在标准环境下对深度达21的树进行精确Background SHAP计算，而先前方法因内存使用过多而失败。对于深度12和15的集成模型，分别实现了33倍和162倍的加速，超越了现有最先进方法

Conclusion: WoodelfHD通过创新的矩阵乘法优化和内存管理策略，显著提高了Background SHAP计算的可扩展性，使得对深度决策树集成模型的精确解释成为可能，为实际应用中的模型解释提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Decision-tree ensembles are a cornerstone of predictive modeling, and SHAP is a standard framework for interpreting their predictions. Among its variants, Background SHAP offers high accuracy by modeling missing features using a background dataset. Historically, this approach did not scale well, as the time complexity for explaining n instances using m background samples included an O(mn) component. Recent methods such as Woodelf and PLTreeSHAP reduce this to O(m+n), but introduce a preprocessing bottleneck that grows as 3^D with tree depth D, making them impractical for deep trees. We address this limitation with WoodelfHD, a Woodelf extension that reduces the 3^D factor to 2^D. The key idea is a Strassen-like multiplication scheme that exploits the structure of Woodelf matrices, reducing matrix-vector multiplication from O(k^2) to O(k*log(k)) via a fully vectorized, non-recursive implementation. In addition, we merge path nodes with identical features, reducing cache size and memory usage. When running on standard environments, WoodelfHD enables exact Background SHAP computation for trees with depths up to 21, where previous methods fail due to excessive memory usage. For ensembles of depths 12 and 15, it achieves speedups of 33x and 162x, respectively, over the state-of-the-art.

</details>


### [634] [ReadMOF: Structure-Free Semantic Embeddings from Systematic MOF Nomenclature for Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10568)
*Kewei Zhu,Cameron Wilson,Bartosz Mazur,Yi Li,Ashleigh M. Chester,Peyman Z. Moghadam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ReadMOF：首个基于MOF系统命名法的机器学习框架，无需原子坐标或连接图，利用预训练语言模型从化学名称直接预测材料性质


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金属有机框架（MOF）的系统化学名称（如IUPAC命名法）包含丰富的结构和组成信息，但传统方法需要原子坐标或连接图。研究者希望开发一种无需几何结构信息、仅通过化学名称就能建模结构-性质关系的方法

Method: 使用预训练语言模型将剑桥结构数据库（CSD）中的MOF系统名称转换为向量嵌入，这些嵌入能近似表示传统基于结构的描述符。框架支持性质预测、相似性检索和聚类等应用，并与大语言模型结合实现化学意义的推理

Result: ReadMOF的性能与几何依赖方法相当，能够实现材料信息学应用，包括性质预测、相似性检索和聚类。当结合大语言模型时，仅凭文本输入就能建立化学意义的推理能力

Conclusion: 通过现代自然语言处理技术解释结构化化学语言，可以提供可扩展、可解释且几何独立的替代方案，为材料科学中的语言驱动发现开辟新机会

Abstract: Systematic chemical names, such as IUPAC-style nomenclature for metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), contain rich structural and compositional information in a standardized textual format. Here we introduce ReadMOF, which is, to our knowledge, the first nomenclature-free machine learning framework that leverages these names to model structure-property relationships without requiring atomic coordinates or connectivity graphs. By employing pretrained language models, ReadMOF converts systematic MOF names from the Cambridge Structural Database (CSD) into vector embeddings that closely represent traditional structure-based descriptors. These embeddings enable applications in materials informatics, including property prediction, similarity retrieval, and clustering, with performance comparable to geometry-dependent methods. When combined with large language models, ReadMOF also establishes chemically meaningful reasoning ability with textual input only. Our results show that structured chemical language, interpreted through modern natural language processing techniques, can provide a scalable, interpretable, and geometry-independent alternative to conventional molecular representations. This approach opens new opportunities for language-driven discovery in materials science.

</details>


### [635] [WaveMoE: A Wavelet-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts Foundation Model for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10544)
*Shunyu Wu,Jiawei Huang,Weibin Feng,Boxin Li,Xiao Zhang,Erli Meng,Dan Li,Jian Lou,See-Kiong Ng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WaveMoE：一种基于小波增强的专家混合基础模型，通过双路径架构同时处理时域和小波域表示来提升时间序列预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型在通用预测方面取得显著进展，但频率域信息能更好地建模复杂时间模式（如周期性和局部高频动态），这些模式在真实世界时间序列中普遍存在

Method: 提出WaveMoE模型，采用双路径架构同时处理时间序列token和小波token，通过共享专家路由机制协调两者，实现一致的专家专业化同时高效扩展模型容量

Result: 在16个多样化基准数据集上的初步实验结果表明，WaveMoE通过整合小波域语料库有潜力进一步提升预测性能

Conclusion: 将显式频率域表示集成到可扩展基础模型中是一个有前景的方向，WaveMoE通过小波增强的专家混合架构为时间序列预测提供了新的解决方案

Abstract: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) have recently achieved remarkable success in universal forecasting by leveraging large-scale pretraining on diverse time series data. Complementing this progress, incorporating frequency-domain information yields promising performance in enhancing the modeling of complex temporal patterns, such as periodicity and localized high-frequency dynamics, which are prevalent in real-world time series. To advance this direction, we propose a new perspective that integrates explicit frequency-domain representations into scalable foundation models, and introduce WaveMoE, a wavelet-enhanced mixture-of-experts foundation model for time series forecasting. WaveMoE adopts a dual-path architecture that jointly processes time series tokens and wavelet tokens aligned along a unified temporal axis, and coordinates them through a shared expert routing mechanism that enables consistent expert specialization while efficiently scaling model capacity. Preliminary experimental results on 16 diverse benchmark datasets indicate that WaveMoE has the potential to further improve forecasting performance by incorporating wavelet-domain corpora.

</details>


### [636] [IceCache: Memory-efficient KV-cache Management for Long-Sequence LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10539)
*Yuzhen Mao,Qitong Wang,Martin Ester,Ke Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: IceCache：一种结合语义令牌聚类与分页注意力的KV缓存管理策略，通过将语义相关令牌组织到连续内存区域，在有限GPU内存下实现高效CPU-GPU传输，保持99%原始准确率的同时仅需25%的KV缓存令牌预算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型推理中，KV缓存的内存占用随序列长度线性增长，导致资源受限硬件上的内存瓶颈。现有方法将KV缓存卸载到CPU但仅保留GPU上的子集，依赖不精确的令牌选择，在长生成任务（如思维链推理）中性能下降。

Method: 提出IceCache策略，集成语义令牌聚类与PagedAttention。通过将语义相关令牌组织到连续内存区域，由分层、动态可更新的数据结构管理，实现更高效的令牌选择和CPU-GPU传输时的内存带宽更好利用。

Result: 在LongBench上，256令牌预算下保持完整KV缓存模型99%的原始准确率。相比其他基于卸载的方法，仅使用25%的KV缓存令牌预算即达到竞争性或更优的延迟和准确率，在长序列场景中表现有效。

Conclusion: IceCache通过语义令牌聚类与分页注意力的集成，有效解决了KV缓存的内存瓶颈问题，在有限GPU内存下实现了高效的长序列推理，为资源受限环境中的大语言模型部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Key-Value (KV) cache plays a crucial role in accelerating inference in large language models (LLMs) by storing intermediate attention states and avoiding redundant computation during autoregressive generation. However, its memory footprint scales linearly with sequence length, often leading to severe memory bottlenecks on resource-constrained hardware. Prior work has explored offloading KV cache to the CPU while retaining only a subset on the GPU, but these approaches often rely on imprecise token selection and suffer performance degradation in long-generation tasks such as chain-of-thought reasoning. In this paper, we propose a novel KV cache management strategy, IceCache, which integrates semantic token clustering with PagedAttention. By organizing semantically related tokens into contiguous memory regions managed by a hierarchical, dynamically updatable data structure, our method enables more efficient token selection and better utilization of memory bandwidth during CPU-GPU transfers. Experimental results on LongBench show that, with a 256-token budget, IceCache maintains 99% of the original accuracy achieved by the full KV cache model. Moreover, compared to other offloading-based methods, IceCache attains competitive or even superior latency and accuracy while using only 25% of the KV cache token budget, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-sequence scenarios. The code is available on our project website at https://yuzhenmao.github.io/IceCache/.

</details>


### [637] [Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning with LLMs for Generalizable Multimodal Clinical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11835)
*Hongxi Mao,Wei Zhou,Mengting Jia,Tao Fang,Huan Gao,Bin Zhang,Shangyang Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning方法，利用大语言模型生成可迁移的表格嵌入，解决表格数据模式泛化问题，在痴呆症诊断任务中实现零样本跨模式迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表格数据面临模式泛化能力差的问题，特别是在临床医学等领域，电子健康记录模式差异显著。传统方法缺乏对结构化变量的语义理解，导致跨模式迁移困难。

Method: 提出Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning方法：1) 将结构化变量转换为语义自然语言陈述；2) 使用预训练大语言模型编码这些陈述；3) 构建多模态框架，结合表格数据和MRI数据用于痴呆症诊断；4) 实现零样本跨模式对齐，无需手动特征工程或重新训练。

Result: 在NACC和ADNI数据集上的实验表明：1) 达到最先进的性能；2) 成功实现零样本迁移到未见过的模式；3) 在回顾性诊断任务中显著优于临床基线方法，包括经过委员会认证的神经科医生。

Conclusion: 验证了基于大语言模型的方法作为处理异构现实世界数据的可扩展、鲁棒解决方案，为将基于大语言模型的推理扩展到结构化领域提供了途径。

Abstract: Machine learning for tabular data remains constrained by poor schema generalization, a challenge rooted in the lack of semantic understanding of structured variables. This challenge is particularly acute in domains like clinical medicine, where electronic health record (EHR) schemas vary significantly. To solve this problem, we propose Schema-Adaptive Tabular Representation Learning, a novel method that leverages large language models (LLMs) to create transferable tabular embeddings. By transforming structured variables into semantic natural language statements and encoding them with a pretrained LLM, our approach enables zero-shot alignment across unseen schemas without manual feature engineering or retraining. We integrate our encoder into a multimodal framework for dementia diagnosis, combining tabular and MRI data. Experiments on NACC and ADNI datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and successful zero-shot transfer to unseen schemas, significantly outperforming clinical baselines, including board-certified neurologists, in retrospective diagnostic tasks. These results validate our LLM-driven approach as a scalable, robust solution for heterogeneous real-world data, offering a pathway to extend LLM-based reasoning to structured domains.

</details>


### [638] [CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10496)
*Xiangyang Yin,Xingyu Liu,Tianhua Xia,Bo Bao,Vithursan Thangarasa,Valavan Manohararajah,Eric Sather,Sai Qian Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CodeQuant：一种统一的量化-聚类方案，通过可学习旋转平滑激活异常值，并将权重异常值吸收到微调的聚类中心中，显著降低MoE模型的量化误差


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异常值已成为低精度大模型保持准确性的主要瓶颈，特别是在MoE架构中。后训练量化中，异常值会导致显著的量化误差，造成严重的精度下降。现有的旋转平滑技术虽能缓解问题，但残留误差仍阻碍可靠的低精度部署。

Method: 提出CodeQuant统一方案：1）通过可学习旋转平滑激活异常值；2）将权重异常值吸收到微调的聚类中心中。这种设计通过将极端值拟合到聚类中心来减少其影响，从而降低量化误差同时保持表达能力。还设计了专用的GPU和CPU内核。

Result: CodeQuant实现了高达4.15倍的加速，同时在多种MoE模型上比最先进的量化方法提供显著更高的准确性。在低精度约束下为MoE大语言模型的高效准确部署提供了有前景的方向。

Conclusion: CodeQuant通过统一的量化-聚类方案有效解决了MoE模型中的异常值问题，实现了精度和效率的双重提升，为低精度大模型部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Outliers have emerged as a fundamental bottleneck in preserving accuracy for low-precision large models, particularly within Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures that are increasingly central to large-scale language modeling. Under post-training quantization (PTQ), these outliers induce substantial quantization errors, leading to severe accuracy degradation. While recent rotation-based smoothing techniques alleviate the problem by redistributing outlier magnitudes, residual errors remain and continue to impede reliable low-precision deployment.
  In this work, we tackle this challenge by introducing \textit{CodeQuant}, a unified quantization-and-clustering scheme that contains smoothing activation outliers via learnable rotation and absorbing weight outliers into fine-tuned cluster centroids for MoE. This design reduces the influence of extreme values by fitting them within cluster centroids, thereby lowering quantization error while maintaining expressive capacity. Coupled with a dedicated kernel design for GPU and CPU, CodeQuant achieves up to $4.15\times$ speedup while delivering significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art quantization approaches across diverse MoE models. Our results highlight CodeQuant as a promising direction for efficient and accurate deployment of MoE-based large language models under low-precision constraints. Our code is available at https://github.com/SAI-Lab-NYU/CodeQuant.

</details>


### [639] [Exact Finite-Sample Variance Decomposition of Subagging: A Spectral Filtering Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10469)
*Ye Su,Mingrui Ye,Yining Wang,Jipeng Guo,Yong Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文通过Hoeffding-ANOVA分解推导出子装袋的精确有限样本方差分解，揭示子装袋作为确定性低通谱滤波器的本质，并提出基于复杂度谱的自适应子采样算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准重采样比率（如α≈0.632）作为集成学习默认基线已使用三十年，但这些比率如何与基学习器内在函数复杂度在有限样本中相互作用缺乏精确数学刻画。

Method: 利用Hoeffding-ANOVA分解推导子装袋的精确有限样本方差分解，适用于任何对称基学习器，无需渐近极限或平滑性假设。建立子装袋作为确定性低通谱滤波器的理论框架。

Result: 子装袋通过几何因子α^c衰减c阶交互方差，保留低阶结构信号。默认基线常对高容量插值器欠正则化，需要更小的α来指数抑制虚假高阶噪声。

Conclusion: 提出复杂度引导的自适应子采样算法，动态校准α以适应学习器复杂度谱，实验证明相比静态基线能持续改善泛化性能。

Abstract: Standard resampling ratios (e.g., $α\approx 0.632$) are widely used as default baselines in ensemble learning for three decades. However, how these ratios interact with a base learner's intrinsic functional complexity in finite samples lacks a exact mathematical characterization. We leverage the Hoeffding-ANOVA decomposition to derive the first exact, finite-sample variance decomposition for subagging, applicable to any symmetric base learner without requiring asymptotic limits or smoothness assumptions. We establish that subagging operates as a deterministic low-pass spectral filter: it preserves low-order structural signals while attenuating $c$-th order interaction variance by a geometric factor approaching $α^c$. This decoupling reveals why default baselines often under-regularize high-capacity interpolators, which instead require smaller $α$ to exponentially suppress spurious high-order noise. To operationalize these insights, we propose a complexity-guided adaptive subsampling algorithm, empirically demonstrating that dynamically calibrating $α$ to the learner's complexity spectrum consistently improves generalization over static baselines.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [640] [PipeLive: Efficient Live In-place Pipeline Parallelism Reconfiguration for Dynamic LLM Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12171)
*Xu Bai,Muhammed Tawfiqul Islam,Chen Wang,Adel N. Toosi*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: PipeLive实现了大语言模型流水线并行的在线原地重配置，通过重新设计KV缓存布局和增量KV修补机制，显著降低了重配置开销和延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流水线并行系统采用静态配置，无法适应动态环境（如无服务器平台和异构GPU环境）。停止服务进行重配置会导致不可接受的停机时间，因此需要在不中断推理的情况下进行在线原地重配置。

Method: 1) 重新设计KV缓存布局，与PageAttention协同设计，形成统一的在线KV缓存调整机制；2) 采用增量KV修补机制（受虚拟机在线迁移启发），在源配置和目标配置之间同步KV状态并确定安全切换点。

Result: 相比禁用KV缓存调整，PipeLive将首令牌时间(TTFT)降低2.5倍且无KV缓存溢出。相比无KV修补的变体，将重配置开销从秒级降至10ms以下，TTFT和每输出令牌时间(TPOT)分别提升54.7%和14.7%。

Conclusion: PipeLive成功解决了流水线并行在线原地重配置的根本挑战，通过KV缓存布局重设计和增量同步机制，实现了最小化中断的动态重配置，显著提升了系统在动态环境中的适应性。

Abstract: Pipeline parallelism (PP) is widely used to partition layers of large language models (LLMs) across GPUs, enabling scalable inference for large models. However, existing systems rely on static PP configurations that fail to adapt to dynamic settings, such as serverless platforms and heterogeneous GPU environments. Reconfiguring PP by stopping and redeploying service incurs prohibitive downtime, so reconfiguration must instead proceed live and in place, without interrupting inference. However, live in-place PP reconfiguration is fundamentally challenging. GPUs are already saturated with model weights and KV cache, leaving little room for new layer placements and necessitating KV cache resizing, at odds with systems like vLLM that preallocate for throughput. Moreover, maintaining KV consistency during execution is difficult: stop-and-copy introduces large pauses, while background synchronization risks inconsistency as states evolve. We present PipeLive, which enables live in-place PP reconfiguration with minimal disruption. PipeLive introduces a redesigned KV cache layout together with a co-designed extension to PageAttention, forming a unified mechanism for live KV resizing. It further adopts an incremental KV patching mechanism, inspired by live virtual machine migration, to synchronize KV states between source and target configurations and identify a safe switch point. PipeLive achieves a 2.5X reduction in time-to-first-token (TTFT) without KV cache overflow compared to disabling KV resizing. Furthermore, compared to a variant without KV patching, it reduces reconfiguration overhead from seconds to under 10ms, and improves TTFT and time-per-output-token (TPOT) by up to 54.7% and 14.7%, respectively.

</details>


### [641] [Record-Remix-Replay: Hierarchical GPU Kernel Optimization using Evolutionary Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11109)
*Daniel Nichols,Konstantinos Parasyris,Caetano Melone,Tal Ben-Nun,Giorgis Georgakoudis,Harshitha Menon*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: R³框架通过层次化优化方法，结合LLM驱动的进化搜索、贝叶斯优化和记录-重放编译技术，高效探索GPU内核从源代码实现到编译器配置的完整优化空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着高性能计算和AI工作负载对GPU依赖加深，跨硬件代际保持高性能成为重大挑战。开发者需要花费数月调优科学应用以充分利用新架构，而现有方法只能孤立地搜索部分优化空间，完整优化仍需大量人工经验和迭代努力。

Method: 提出Record-Remix-Replay（R³）层次化优化框架，结合LLM驱动的进化搜索、贝叶斯优化和记录-重放编译技术。通过快速可扩展的候选评估，实现对源代码实现选择、编译器传递顺序和运行时配置等优化维度的端到端搜索。

Result: R³能够比传统方法更好地优化完整的科学应用（包括内核参数和编译器标志），同时比现代进化搜索方法快近一个数量级。

Conclusion: R³框架通过层次化优化方法有效解决了GPU内核跨维度优化的挑战，实现了高效、全面的端到端优化搜索，显著减少了人工调优工作量。

Abstract: As high-performance computing and AI workloads become increasingly dependent on GPUs, maintaining high performance across rapidly evolving hardware generations has become a major challenge. Developers often spend months tuning scientific applications to fully exploit new architectures, navigating a complex optimization space that spans algorithm design, source implementation, compiler flags and pass sequences, and kernel launch parameters. Existing approaches can effectively search parts of this space in isolation, such as launch configurations or compiler settings, but optimizing across the full space still requires substantial human expertise and iterative manual effort.
  In this paper, we present Record-Remix-Replay (R^3), a hierarchical optimization framework that combines LLM-driven evolutionary search, Bayesian optimization, and record-replay compilation techniques to efficiently explore GPU kernel optimizations from source-level implementation choices down to compiler pass ordering and runtime configuration. By making candidate evaluation fast and scalable, our approach enables practical end-to-end search over optimization dimensions that are typically treated separately. We show that Record-Remix-Replay can optimize full scientific applications better than traditional approaches over kernel parameters and compiler flags, while also being nearly an order of magnitude faster than modern evolutionary search approaches.

</details>


### [642] [Exploiting Aggregate Programming in a Multi-Robot Service Prototype](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06876)
*Giorgio Audrito,Andrea Basso,Daniele Bortoluzzi,Ferruccio Damiani,Giordano Scarso,Gianluca Torta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 将聚合编程应用于多机器人系统协调，通过原型验证展示其在医疗、探索、救援等领域的应用潜力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在医疗、探索、救援等领域应用日益重要，但构建此类系统面临物理环境和分布式协调的双重复杂性挑战。聚合编程作为一种新兴的分布式系统工程方法，具有弹性设计和邻近通信优势，适合解决多机器人协调问题。

Method: 采用聚合编程方法设计和实现多机器人服务系统的协调软件，构建原型系统，并通过仿真和大学图书馆实际测试进行验证。

Result: 成功开发出基于聚合编程的多机器人服务系统原型，并在仿真环境和实际大学图书馆场景中完成了验证测试。

Conclusion: 聚合编程为多机器人系统的协调软件设计提供了可行且有前景的工程方法，能够有效应对物理环境和分布式协调的复杂性挑战。

Abstract: Multi-robot systems are becoming increasingly relevant within diverse application domains, such as healthcare, exploration, and rescue missions. However, building such systems is still a significant challenge, since it adds the complexities of the physical nature of robots and their environments to those inherent in coordinating any distributed (multi-agent) system. Aggregate Programming (AP) has recently emerged as a promising approach to engineering resilient, distributed systems with proximity-based communication, and is notably supported by practical frameworks.  In this paper we present a prototype of a multi-robot service system, which adopts AP for the design and implementation of its coordination software. The prototype has been validated both with simulations, and with tests in a University library.

</details>


### [643] [FEDBUD: Joint Incentive and Privacy Optimization for Resource-Constrained Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10499)
*Tao Liu,Xuehe Wang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: FEDBUD是一个结合隐私保护和经济激励的联邦学习系统，通过考虑数据量和噪声水平的联合影响来设计激励机制，使用两阶段Stackelberg博弈建模并求解纳什均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习在隐私保护和边缘机器学习中越来越流行，但差分攻击防御和激励机制设计仍是重要瓶颈。现有隐私感知激励机制很少同时考虑数据量和噪声水平对激励策略的影响。

Method: 提出FEDBUD系统，将隐私保护和经济激励结合，考虑数据量和噪声水平对激励策略的联合影响。系统采用两阶段Stackelberg博弈建模，云服务器控制货币支付，边缘节点控制数据量和噪声水平。使用均值场估计器和虚拟队列求解纳什均衡。

Result: 在真实数据集上的实验结果表明FEDBUD具有出色的性能表现。

Conclusion: FEDBUD通过联合考虑数据量和噪声水平，有效解决了联邦学习中隐私保护和经济激励的协同设计问题，为隐私感知的激励机制提供了新思路。

Abstract: Federated learning has become a popular paradigm for privacy protection and edge-based machine learning. However, defending against differential attacks and devising incentive strategies remain significant bottlenecks in this field. Despite recent works on privacy-aware incentive mechanism design for federated learning, few of them consider both data volume and noise level. In this paper, we propose a novel federated learning system called FEDBUD, which combines privacy and economic concerns together by considering the joint influence of data volume and noise level on incentive strategy determination. In this system, the cloud server controls monetary payments to edge nodes, while edge nodes control data volume and noise level that potentially impact the model performance of the cloud server. To determine the mutually optimal strategies for both sides, we model FEDBUD as a two-stage Stackelberg Game and derive the Nash Equilibrium using the mean-field estimator and virtual queue. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate the outstanding performance of FEDBUD.

</details>


<div id='cs.DS'></div>

# cs.DS [[Back]](#toc)

### [644] [Constant-Factor Approximation for the Uniform Decision Tree](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12036)
*Michał Szyfelbein*

Main category: cs.DS

TL;DR: 本文针对均匀概率分布下的平均情况决策树问题，提出了首个常数因子近似算法，近似比为11.57，解决了该领域长期存在的开放性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 决策树问题在均匀概率分布下的平均情况版本长期以来缺乏常数因子近似算法，现有的贪心算法只能达到O(log n/log log n)的近似比。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为这一基础问题提供首个常数因子近似解。

Method: 采用两种关键技术：1) 使用从层次聚类问题中借鉴的分解技术，将最优决策树分解为一系列称为"分离子族"的对象；2) 将寻找分离子族的子问题转化为最大覆盖问题实例，通过分析将团切割成小片段（代表需要分离的假设对）的性质，获得分离子族问题的良好近似。

Result: 提出了一个简单的多项式时间算法，实现了小于11.57的近似比，显著改进了现有O(log n/log log n)的近似结果，首次为平均情况决策树问题提供了常数因子近似算法。

Conclusion: 成功解决了长期存在的开放性问题，证明了均匀概率分布下平均情况决策树问题存在常数因子近似算法，为11.57近似比，为相关领域提供了新的理论工具和分析框架。

Abstract: We resolve a long-standing open question, about the existence of a constant-factor approximation algorithm for the average-case \textsc{Decision Tree} problem with uniform probability distribution over the hypotheses. We answer the question in the affirmative by providing a simple polynomial-time algorithm with approximation ratio of $\frac{2}{1-\sqrt{(e+1)/(2e)}}+ε<11.57$. This improves upon the currently best-known, greedy algorithm which achieves $O(\log n/{\log\log n})$-approximation. The first key ingredient in our analysis is the usage of a decomposition technique known from problems related to \textsc{Hierarchical Clustering} [SODA '17, WALCOM '26], which allows us to decompose the optimal decision tree into a series of objects called separating subfamilies. The second crucial idea is to reduce the subproblem of finding a \textsc{Separating Subfamily} to an instance of the \textsc{Maximum Coverage} problem. To do so, we analyze the properties of cutting cliques into small pieces, which represent pairs of hypotheses to be separated. This allows us to obtain a good approximation for the \textsc{Separating Subfamily} problem, which then enables the design of the approximation algorithm for the original problem.

</details>


### [645] [Differentially Private Verification of Distribution Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10819)
*Elbert Du,Cynthia Dwork,Pranay Tankala,Linjun Zhang*

Main category: cs.DS

TL;DR: 本文研究了差分隐私（DP）分布属性测试，探讨了在不可信证明者协助下，隐私保护对验证协议复杂度的影响，揭示了不同隐私参数下私币协议与公币协议的复杂度关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注不可信证明者协助下的分布属性验证，但未考虑隐私保护。既然不信任证明者协助验证，为何要信任其处理敏感样本？因此需要研究差分隐私下的分布属性测试。

Method: 通过连接可复制性和放大技术，分析不同隐私参数下私币与公币协议的复杂度关系。具体包括：(1) 在ε=O(1/√n)和δ=O(1/n^{5/2})参数下，将任何一轮(ε,δ)-DP私币交互证明约简为公币DP交互证明；(2) 当验证者消息具有O(1/√log n)本地DP时，通过额外变换获得公币协议；(3) 在宽松隐私保证(ε∈Ω(log n))下分析私币的复杂度优势。

Result: (1) 在特定隐私参数下，私币协议可无损转换为公币协议；(2) 在更宽松的本地DP下，通过额外变换可获得公币协议；(3) 在非常宽松的隐私保证下，私币协议确实能降低复杂度。同时获得了乘积分布隐私测试的Merlin-Arthur证明，并证明其样本复杂度最优。

Conclusion: 差分隐私分布属性测试中，私币协议与公币协议的复杂度关系取决于隐私参数范围。在严格隐私下两者等价，在宽松隐私下私币具有优势。该研究为隐私保护下的分布验证提供了理论框架。

Abstract: A recent line of work initiated by Chiesa and Gur and further developed by Herman and Rothblum investigates the sample and communication complexity of verifying properties of distributions with the assistance of a powerful, knowledgeable, but untrusted prover. In this work, we initiate the study of differentially private (DP) distribution property testing. After all, if we do not trust the prover to help us with verification, why should we trust it with our sensitive sample? We map a landscape of DP prover-aided proofs of properties of distributions. In the non-private case it is known that one-round (two message) private-coin protocols can have substantially lower complexity than public-coin AM protocols, but in the private case, the possibility for improvement depends on the parameter regime and privacy model. Drawing on connections to replicability and techniques for amplification, we show: (1) There exists a reduction from any one-round $(\varepsilon,δ)$-DP private-coin interactive proof to a one-round public-coin DP interactive proof with the same privacy parameters, for the parameter regime $\varepsilon=O(1/\sqrt{n})$ and $δ=O(1/n^{5/2})$, and with the same sample and communication complexities. (2) If the verifier's message in the private-coin interactive proof is $O(1/\sqrt{\log n})$ locally DP -- a far more relaxed privacy parameter regime in a different model -- then applying one additional transformation again yields a one-round public-coin protocol with the same privacy bound and the same sample and computational complexities. (3) However, when the privacy guarantee is very relaxed ($\varepsilon\inΩ(\log n)$), private coins indeed reduce complexity. We also obtain a Merlin-Arthur (one-message) proof for privately testing whether samples are drawn from a product distribution, and prove that its sample complexity is optimal.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.IM'></div>

# astro-ph.IM [[Back]](#toc)

### [646] [FRTSearch: Unified Detection and Parameter Inference of Fast Radio Transients using Instance Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12344)
*Bin Zhang,Yabiao Wang,Xiaoyao Xie,Shanping You,Xuhong Yu,Qiuhua Li,Hongwei Li,Shaowen Du,Chenchen Miao,Dengke Zhou,Jianhua Fang,Jiafu Wu,Pei Wang,Di Li*

Main category: astro-ph.IM

TL;DR: FRTSearch是一个端到端的快速射电瞬变检测框架，将传统搜索算法重构为基于色散轨迹形态的模式识别问题，显著降低误报率并提升处理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代射电望远镜数据呈指数增长，传统单脉冲搜索算法计算量大且易受射频干扰影响产生高误报率，需要更高效、准确的检测方法。

Method: 基于冷等离子体色散关系的形态学普遍性，将FRT检测重构为模式识别问题；构建CRAFTS-FRT像素级标注数据集；使用Mask R-CNN进行精确轨迹分割；结合物理驱动的IMPIC算法从几何坐标直接推断色散量和到达时间。

Result: 在FAST-FREX数据集上达到98.0%召回率，与穷举搜索方法相当；相比PRESTO减少99.9%以上的误报；处理速度提升13.9倍；在ASKAP巡天中无需重新训练即可检测所有19个测试FRB，展现跨设施泛化能力。

Conclusion: FRTSearch通过将范式从"搜索-识别"转变为"检测-推断"，为PB级射电天文学时代的实时发现提供了可扩展、高精度的解决方案。

Abstract: The exponential growth of data from modern radio telescopes presents a significant challenge to traditional single-pulse search algorithms, which are computationally intensive and prone to high false-positive rates due to Radio Frequency Interference (RFI). In this work, we introduce FRTSearch, an end-to-end framework unifying the detection and physical characterization of Fast Radio Transients (FRTs). Leveraging the morphological universality of dispersive trajectories in time-frequency dynamic spectra, we reframe FRT detection as a pattern recognition problem governed by the cold plasma dispersion relation. To facilitate this, we constructed CRAFTS-FRT, a pixel-level annotated dataset derived from the Commensal Radio Astronomy FAST Survey (CRAFTS), comprising 2{,}392 instances across diverse source classes. This dataset enables the training of a Mask R-CNN model for precise trajectory segmentation. Coupled with our physics-driven IMPIC algorithm, the framework maps the geometric coordinates of segmented trajectories to directly infer the Dispersion Measure (DM) and Time of Arrival (ToA). Benchmarking on the FAST-FREX dataset shows that FRTSearch achieves a 98.0\% recall, competitive with exhaustive search methods, while reducing false positives by over 99.9\% compared to PRESTO and delivering a processing speedup of up to $13.9\times$. Furthermore, the framework demonstrates robust cross-facility generalization, detecting all 19 tested FRBs from the ASKAP survey without retraining. By shifting the paradigm from ``search-then-identify'' to ``detect-and-infer,'' FRTSearch provides a scalable, high-precision solution for real-time discovery in the era of petabyte-scale radio astronomy.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [647] [A Geometric Algebra-informed NeRF Framework for Generalizable Wireless Channel Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11983)
*Jingzhou Shen,Luis Lago Enamorado,Shiwen Mao,Xuyu Wang*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: GAI-NeRF：一种结合几何代数注意力机制和神经辐射场的无线信道预测框架，通过全局令牌表示和新型光线追踪架构，在复杂传播环境中实现优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态光线追踪模块存在泛化能力不足的问题，限制了无线信道预测模型在多样化场景中的应用。需要一种能够有效捕捉复杂传播环境中光线-物体相互作用的新方法。

Method: 提出几何代数感知神经辐射场（GAI-NeRF）框架：1）引入几何代数注意力机制捕捉光线-物体相互作用；2）采用全局令牌表示（受Transformer启发）聚合空间-电磁特征；3）设计新型光线追踪架构提升模型泛化能力；4）结合几何代数原理与神经场景表示。

Result: GAI-NeRF在多个无线场景中显著优于现有方法，在单场景下游任务和泛化测试中均表现出鲁棒性能，在未见环境中保持高效预测能力，为下一代无线通信系统提供了有前景的方向。

Conclusion: GAI-NeRF通过整合几何代数注意力机制、全局令牌表示和新型光线追踪架构，成功解决了传统方法的泛化限制，在复杂无线信道预测任务中实现了优越性能，展示了在多样化无线场景中的强大应用潜力。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose the geometric algebra-informed neural radiance fields (GAI-NeRF), a novel framework for wireless channel prediction that leverages geometric algebra attention mechanisms to capture ray-object interactions in complex propagation environments. Our approach incorporates global token representations, drawing inspiration from transformer architectures in language and vision domains, to aggregate learned spatial-electromagnetic features and enhance scene understanding. We identify limitations in conventional static ray tracing modules that hinder model generalization and address this challenge through a new ray tracing architecture. This design enables effective generalization across diverse wireless scenarios while maintaining computational efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that GAI-NeRF achieves superior performance in channel prediction tasks by combining geometric algebra principles with neural scene representations, offering a promising direction for next-generation wireless communication systems. Moreover, GAI-NeRF greatly outperforms existing methods across multiple wireless scenarios. To ensure comprehensive assessment, we further evaluate our approach against multiple benchmarks using newly collected real-world indoor datasets tailored for single-scene downstream tasks and generalization testing, confirming its robust performance in unseen environments and establishing its high efficacy for wireless channel prediction.

</details>


<div id='quant-ph'></div>

# quant-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [648] [Classical and Quantum Speedups for Non-Convex Optimization via Energy Conserving Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13022)
*Yihang Sun,Huaijin Wang,Patrick Hayden,Jose Blanchet*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 该论文首次对能量守恒下降(ECD)算法进行理论分析，在一维设置下证明了其相比梯度下降的指数级加速优势，并提出了随机ECD和量子ECD变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ECD算法能够逃离局部最小值并收敛到全局最小值，但缺乏理论分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，为ECD提供理论基础，并探索其随机和量子变体在机器学习优化中的潜力。

Method: 在一维设置下，形式化定义了随机ECD(sECD)和量子ECD(qECD)动力学。sECD引入能量保持噪声，qECD通过哈密顿模拟实现量子算法。针对正双井目标函数，计算了从局部最小值到全局最小值的期望命中时间。

Result: 证明sECD和qECD相比各自的梯度下降基线(随机梯度下降及其量子化)都实现了指数级加速。对于具有高势垒的目标函数，qECD相比sECD获得进一步加速。

Conclusion: 该研究为ECD算法提供了首个理论分析框架，证明了其在非凸优化中的优越性，并为量子优化算法的发展奠定了基础。

Abstract: The Energy Conserving Descent (ECD) algorithm was recently proposed (De Luca & Silverstein, 2022) as a global non-convex optimization method. Unlike gradient descent, appropriately configured ECD dynamics escape strict local minima and converge to a global minimum, making it appealing for machine learning optimization.
  We present the first analytical study of ECD, focusing on the one-dimensional setting for this first installment. We formalize a stochastic ECD dynamics (sECD) with energy-preserving noise, as well as a quantum analog of the ECD Hamiltonian (qECD), providing the foundation for a quantum algorithm through Hamiltonian simulation.
  For positive double-well objectives, we compute the expected hitting time from a local to the global minimum. We prove that both sECD and qECD yield exponential speedup over respective gradient descent baselines--stochastic gradient descent and its quantization. For objectives with tall barriers, qECD achieves a further speedup over sECD.

</details>


### [649] [Minimizing classical resources in variational measurement-based quantum computation for generative modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11578)
*Arunava Majumder,Hendrik Poulsen Nautrup,Hans J. Briegel*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种受限的变分测量基量子计算模型，仅使用单个额外可训练参数将酉模型扩展到通道模型，能够生成酉模型无法学习到的概率分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MBQC通过经典处理校正测量随机性以确保确定性酉计算，而VMBQC利用这种随机性在生成建模中获得优势。但现有VMBQC模型的通道参数数量是酉模型的两倍（N×D），导致优化困难且模型难以训练。

Method: 提出受限VMBQC模型，仅使用单个额外可训练参数将酉设置扩展到基于通道的模型。通过数值和代数方法证明这种最小扩展的充分性。

Result: 该最小扩展足以生成对应酉模型无法学习的概率分布。通过数值和代数分析验证了模型的表达能力。

Conclusion: 受限VMBQC模型在保持VMBQC优势的同时，显著减少了参数数量，解决了传统VMBQC参数过多导致的优化困难和训练问题，为量子生成建模提供了更实用的框架。

Abstract: Measurement-based quantum computation (MBQC) is a framework for quantum information processing in which a computational task is carried out through one-qubit measurements on a highly entangled resource state. Due to the indeterminacy of the outcomes of a quantum measurement, the random outcomes of these operations, if not corrected, yield a variational quantum channel family. Traditionally, this randomness is corrected through classical processing in order to ensure deterministic unitary computations. Recently, variational measurement-based quantum computation (VMBQC) has been introduced to exploit this measurement-induced randomness to gain an advantage in generative modeling. A limitation of this approach is that the corresponding channel model has twice as many parameters compared to the unitary model, scaling as $N \times D$, where $N$ is the number of logical qubits (width) and $D$ is the depth of the VMBQC model. This can often make optimization more difficult and may lead to poorly trainable models. In this paper, we present a restricted VMBQC model that extends the unitary setting to a channel-based one using only a single additional trainable parameter. We show, both numerically and algebraically, that this minimal extension is sufficient to generate probability distributions that cannot be learned by the corresponding unitary model.

</details>


### [650] [Adaptive H-EFT-VA: A Provably Safe Trajectory Through the Trainability-Expressibility Landscape of Variational Quantum Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10607)
*Eyad I. B. Hamid*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: A-H-EFT通过自适应扩展希尔伯特空间，在保持梯度方差Ω(1/poly(N))的同时解决了静态H-EFT-VA的参考态间隙问题，实现了训练性与表达性之间的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态H-EFT-VA虽然通过分层EFT紫外截断解决了BP问题，但其定位特性将ansatz限制在多项式子空间中，导致远离|0>^N的态存在参考态间隙。需要一种方法在保持训练性的同时扩展可访问的希尔伯特空间。

Method: 提出自适应H-EFT-VA（A-H-EFT），通过沿安全轨迹扩展可访问的希尔伯特空间来导航训练性-表达性权衡。当σ(t) ≤ 0.5/√(LN)时，梯度方差保持在Ω(1/poly(N))（定理1）。安全扩展推论和单调增长引理确保扩展过程无间断跳跃。

Result: 在16个实验中（N最大为14），A-H-EFT达到保真度F=0.54，是静态H-EFT-VA（F=0.27）的两倍，显著优于HEA（F~0.01），梯度方差始终≥0.5。对于Heisenberg XXZ模型（Δ_ref=1），A-H-EFT成功识别负基态，而静态方法失败。结果具有统计显著性（p < 10^-37）。

Conclusion: A-H-EFT通过自适应扩展机制有效解决了VQA中的训练性-表达性权衡问题，在保持梯度方差可训练性的同时显著提升了表达能力和性能，是首个在VQA景观中具有严格界限的轨迹方法。

Abstract: H-EFT-VA established a physics-informed solution to the Barren Plateau (BP) problem via a hierarchical EFT UV-cutoff, guaranteeing gradient variance in Omega(1/poly(N)). However, localization restricts the ansatz to a polynomial subspace, creating a reference-state gap for states distant from |0>^N. We introduce Adaptive H-EFT-VA (A-H-EFT) to navigate the trainability-expressibility tradeoff by expanding the reachable Hilbert space along a safe trajectory. Gradient variance is maintained in Omega(1/poly(N)) if sigma(t) <= 0.5/sqrt(LN) (Theorem 1). A Safe Expansion Corollary and Monotone Growth Lemma confirm expansion without discontinuous jumps. Benchmarking across 16 experiments (up to N=14) shows A-H-EFT achieves fidelity F=0.54, doubling static H-EFT-VA (F=0.27) and outperforming HEA (F~0.01), with gradient variance >= 0.5 throughout. For Heisenberg XXZ (Delta_ref=1), A-H-EFT identifies the negative ground state while static methods fail. Results are statistically significant (p < 10^-37). Robustness over three decades of hyperparameters enables deployment without search. This is the first rigorously bounded trajectory through the VQA landscape.

</details>


<div id='cs.ET'></div>

# cs.ET [[Back]](#toc)

### [651] [Robust Reasoning and Learning with Brain-Inspired Representations under Hardware-Induced Nonlinearities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12079)
*William Youngwoo Chung,Hamza Errahmouni Barkam,Tamoghno Das,Mohsen Imani*

Main category: cs.ET

TL;DR: 提出基于超维计算的硬件感知优化框架，通过系统补偿内存计算中的非线性失真，提升在非理想硬件条件下的分类和推理性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习依赖高精度计算和理想硬件假设，而内存计算架构虽然能缓解数据移动瓶颈和提高能效，但引入了非线性失真和可靠性问题。需要解决在激进的半导体器件缩放中硬件变异性的挑战。

Method: 基于超维计算的硬件感知优化框架，将编码公式化为优化问题，最小化理想核函数与其硬件约束对应物之间的Frobenius范数，采用联合优化策略进行超向量表示的端到端校准。

Result: 在严重硬件扰动下，应用该方法于QuantHD达到84%准确率，比相同条件下朴素QuantHD提高48%；在Cora数据集上，RelHD保持准确率，比朴素RelHD在非线性环境下提高5.4倍准确率。

Conclusion: 该框架通过保持超维计算的鲁棒性和符号特性，使能可扩展、高能效的智能系统，能够在新兴内存计算硬件上执行分类和推理任务。

Abstract: Traditional machine learning depends on high-precision arithmetic and near-ideal hardware assumptions, which is increasingly challenged by variability in aggressively scaled semiconductor devices. Compute-in-memory (CIM) architectures alleviate data-movement bottlenecks and improve energy efficiency yet introduce nonlinear distortions and reliability concerns. We address these issues with a hardware-aware optimization framework based on Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC), systematically compensating for non-ideal similarity computations in CIM. Our approach formulates encoding as an optimization problem, minimizing the Frobenius norm between an ideal kernel and its hardware-constrained counterpart, and employs a joint optimization strategy for end-to-end calibration of hypervector representations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method when applied to QuantHD achieves 84\% accuracy under severe hardware-induced perturbations, a 48\% increase over naive QuantHD under the same conditions. Additionally, our optimization is vital for graph-based HDC reliant on precise variable-binding for interpretable reasoning. Our framework preserves the accuracy of RelHD on the Cora dataset, achieving a 5.4$\times$ accuracy improvement over naive RelHD under nonlinear environments. By preserving HDC's robustness and symbolic properties, our solution enables scalable, energy-efficient intelligent systems capable of classification and reasoning on emerging CIM hardware.

</details>


<div id='physics.optics'></div>

# physics.optics [[Back]](#toc)

### [652] [Harnessing Photonics for Machine Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10841)
*Hanqing Zhu,Shupeng Ning,Hongjian Zhou,Ziang Yin,Ray T. Chen,Jiaqi Gu,David Z. Pan*

Main category: physics.optics

TL;DR: 该综述从电路与系统角度重新审视光子计算，提出跨层协同设计和全栈设计自动化路线图，旨在实现可扩展的光子机器学习智能系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习工作负载的指数增长与后摩尔时代功率、内存和互连限制相冲突，需要超越晶体管密度的计算基板。集成光子学利用光学带宽和并行性重塑数据移动和计算，成为AI加速的候选方案。

Method: 采用电路与系统视角，超越基础构件进展，进行跨层系统分析和全栈设计自动化。通过瓶颈驱动的分类法综合最新进展，界定光子学能提供端到端持续优势的工作机制和扩展趋势。强调跨层协同设计和负载自适应可编程性。

Result: 提出电子-光子设计自动化（EPDA）作为关键，实现仿真、逆向设计、系统建模和物理实现的闭环协同优化。绘制从实验室原型到可扩展、可重复电子-光子生态系统的路线图。

Conclusion: 该综述旨在引导电路与系统社区走向自动化、系统中心的光子机器学习智能时代，通过跨层协同设计和工作负载自适应可编程性，在扩展规模下维持高效率和多功能性。

Abstract: The exponential growth of machine-intelligence workloads is colliding with the power, memory, and interconnect limits of the post-Moore era, motivating compute substrates that scale beyond transistor density alone. Integrated photonics is emerging as a candidate for artificial intelligence (AI) acceleration by exploiting optical bandwidth and parallelism to reshape data movement and computation. This review reframes photonic computing from a circuits-and-systems perspective, moving beyond building-block progress toward cross-layer system analysis and full-stack design automation. We synthesize recent advances through a bottleneck-driven taxonomy that delineates the operating regimes and scaling trends where photonics can deliver end-to-end sustained benefits. A central theme is cross-layer co-design and workload-adaptive programmability to sustain high efficiency and versatility across evolving application domains at scale. We further argue that Electronic-Photonic Design Automation (EPDA) will be pivotal, enabling closed-loop co-optimization across simulation, inverse design, system modeling, and physical implementation. By charting a roadmap from laboratory prototypes to scalable, reproducible electronic-photonic ecosystems, this review aims to guide the CAS community toward an automated, system-centric era of photonic machine intelligence.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [653] [LLM-Based Automated Diagnosis Of Integration Test Failures At Google](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12108)
*Celal Ziftci,Ray Liu,Spencer Greene,Livio Dalloro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Auto-Diagnose是一个基于LLM的诊断工具，用于帮助开发者高效确定集成测试失败的根因，通过分析失败日志、生成简洁摘要，并集成到Google内部代码审查系统中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集成测试失败诊断面临重大挑战：日志量大、非结构化、异构性导致认知负荷高、信噪比低、诊断困难耗时。开发者抱怨诊断集成测试失败比单元测试花费更多时间。

Method: 引入Auto-Diagnose工具，利用LLM分析失败日志，生成包含最相关日志行的简洁摘要，并集成到Google内部代码审查系统Critique中，提供上下文和及时协助。

Result: 在71个真实世界失败案例的手动评估中，诊断根因准确率达到90.14%。Google范围内部署后，在52,635个不同失败测试中使用，仅5.8%案例被认为"无帮助"，在Critique的370个工具中帮助性排名第14。用户访谈确认了工具的实用性和集成到现有工作流的积极接受度。

Conclusion: LLM因其处理和总结复杂文本数据的能力，在诊断集成测试失败方面非常成功。将此类AI驱动工具自动集成到开发者日常工作流中受到积极认可，工具的准确性仍然是影响开发者感知和采用的关键因素。

Abstract: Integration testing is critical for the quality and reliability of complex software systems. However, diagnosing their failures presents significant challenges due to the massive volume, unstructured nature, and heterogeneity of logs they generate. These result in a high cognitive load, low signal-to-noise ratio, and make diagnosis difficult and time-consuming. Developers complain about these difficulties consistently and report spending substantially more time diagnosing integration test failures compared to unit test failures. To address these shortcomings, we introduce Auto-Diagnose, a novel diagnosis tool that leverages LLMs to help developers efficiently determine the root cause of integration test failures. Auto-Diagnose analyzes failure logs, produces concise summaries with the most relevant log lines, and is integrated into Critique, Google's internal code review system, providing contextual and in-time assistance. Based on our case studies, Auto-Diagnose is highly effective. A manual evaluation conducted on 71 real-world failures demonstrated 90.14% accuracy in diagnosing the root cause. Following its Google-wide deployment, Auto-Diagnose was used across 52, 635 distinct failing tests. User feedback indicated that the tool was deemed "Not helpful" in only 5.8% of cases, and it was ranked #14 in helpfulness among 370 tools that post findings in Critique. Finally, user interviews confirmed the perceived usefulness of Auto-Diagnose and positive reception of integrating automatic diagnostic assistance into existing workflows. We conclude that LLMs are highly successful in diagnosing integration test failures due to their capacity to process and summarize complex textual data. Integrating such AI-powered tooling automatically into developers' daily workflows is perceived positively, with the tool's accuracy remaining a critical factor in shaping developer perception and adoption.

</details>


### [654] [AnyPoC: Universal Proof-of-Concept Test Generation for Scalable LLM-Based Bug Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11950)
*Zijie Zhao,Chenyuan Yang,Weidong Wang,Yihan Yang,Ziqi Zhang,Lingming Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AnyPoC是一个多智能体框架，用于自动生成概念验证测试来验证候选bug报告，通过执行验证减少误报，提高自动化bug检测的实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的bug检测工具只能生成静态的候选bug报告，需要人工验证，限制了自动化bug检测的实用性。需要一种能够自动生成可执行概念验证测试的方法来验证bug报告的真实性。

Method: AnyPoC采用多智能体框架：(1)分析和事实检查候选bug报告；(2)迭代合成和执行概念验证测试并收集执行轨迹；(3)独立重新执行和审查概念验证测试以减少幻觉和奖励攻击。框架还持续提取和演化概念验证知识库以处理异构任务。

Result: 相比最先进的编码智能体（如Claude Code和Codex），AnyPoC为真阳性bug报告生成的有效概念验证测试多1.3倍，拒绝的假阳性bug报告多9.8倍。已发现122个新bug（105个已确认，86个已修复），其中45个生成的概念验证测试被采纳为官方回归测试。

Conclusion: AnyPoC提供了一种可扩展的自动化bug验证方法，通过生成可执行的概念验证测试来验证候选bug报告，显著提高了自动化bug检测的准确性和实用性，能够处理大规模、多语言的复杂软件系统。

Abstract: While recent LLM-based agents can identify many candidate bugs in source code, their reports remain static hypotheses that require manual validation, limiting the practicality of automated bug detection. We frame this challenge as a test generation task: given a candidate report, synthesizing an executable proof-of-concept test, or simply a PoC - such as a script, command sequence, or crafted input - to trigger the suspected defect. Automated PoC generation can act as a scalable validation oracle, enabling end-to-end autonomous bug detection by providing concrete execution evidence. However, naive LLM agents are unreliable validators: they are biased toward "success" and may reward-hack by producing plausible but non-functional PoCs or even hallucinated traces. To address this, we present AnyPoC, a general multi-agent framework that (1) analyzes and fact-checks a candidate bug report, (2) iteratively synthesizes and executes a PoC while collecting execution traces, and (3) independently re-executes and scrutinizes the PoC to mitigate hallucination and reward hacking. In addition, AnyPoC also continuously extracts and evolves a PoC knowledge base to handle heterogeneous tasks. AnyPoC operates on candidate bug reports regardless of their source and can be paired with different bug reporters. To demonstrate practicality and generality, we apply AnyPoC, with a simple agentic bug reporter, on 12 critical software systems across diverse languages/domains (many with millions of lines of code) including Firefox, Chromium, LLVM, OpenSSL, SQLite, FFmpeg, and Redis. Compared to the state-of-the-art coding agents, e.g., Claude Code and Codex, AnyPoC produces 1.3x more valid PoCs for true-positive bug reports and rejects 9.8x more false-positive bug reports. To date, AnyPoC has discovered 122 new bugs (105 confirmed, 86 already fixed), with 45 generated PoCs adopted as official regression tests.

</details>


### [655] [FM-Agent: Scaling Formal Methods to Large Systems via LLM-Based Hoare-Style Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11556)
*Haoran Ding,Zhaoguo Wang,Haibo Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: FM-Agent：首个实现大规模系统自动组合推理的框架，利用LLM自动生成函数级规范，支持自然语言规范推理，并在大型系统中发现522个新bug


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM辅助软件开发日益普遍，能够生成大规模系统（如编译器），但确保生成代码的正确性至关重要。现有自动推理方法难以应对大规模系统，Hoare逻辑虽然提供组合推理方法，但需要为每个函数编写形式化规范，人工负担重。当代码由LLM生成时，开发者缺乏对每个函数预期行为的深入理解，问题更加严重。

Method: FM-Agent采用自上而下的范式，利用LLM自动生成函数级规范。具体方法：1）从调用者对函数的期望行为推导函数规范，即使实现有bug也能反映开发者意图；2）将Hoare风格推理泛化到自然语言规范，支持开发者用自然语言表达的意图；3）自动生成测试用例触发潜在bug以确认bug存在并解释原因。

Result: FM-Agent在2天内成功推理了大规模系统（最大达143k行代码）。这些系统已经过开发者测试，但FM-Agent仍发现了522个新bug。这些bug可能导致严重后果，包括系统崩溃和不正确的执行结果。

Conclusion: FM-Agent是首个实现大规模系统自动组合推理的框架，通过LLM自动生成函数规范、支持自然语言规范推理，显著提高了大规模系统验证的可扩展性，并能有效发现传统测试方法遗漏的严重bug。

Abstract: LLM-assisted software development has become increasingly prevalent, and can generate large-scale systems, such as compilers. It becomes crucial to strengthen the correctness of the generated code. However, automated reasoning for large-scale systems remains challenging due to code complexity. Hoare logic offers an approach to decomposing a large system into smaller components and reasoning about them separately (i.e., compositional reasoning). However, existing works still struggle to scale, because Hoare logic requires writing formal specifications for each function, imposing a heavy human burden. The problem is exacerbated when code is generated by LLMs, as developers lack a deep understanding of each function's expected behavior.
  This paper presents FM-Agent, the first framework that realizes automated compositional reasoning for large-scale systems. Leveraging LLMs, FM-Agent introduces a top-down paradigm to automatically generate function-level specifications. Specifically, FM-Agent derives the specification of a function from how its callers expect the function to behave, so the generated specifications can reflect the developer's intent of a function even if the implementation is buggy. Developers' intent is usually expressed in natural language, while existing verifiers only support formulas. Therefore, FM-Agent generalizes Hoare-style inference to reason about functions against natural-language specifications. Finally, to confirm bug existence and explain bug causes, FM-Agent automatically generates test cases to trigger potential bugs. In our evaluation, FM-Agent successfully reasons about large-scale systems within 2 days, each of which has up to 143k LoC. These systems have already been tested by their developers, but FM-Agent still finds 522 newly discovered bugs. These bugs can cause serious consequences, including system crashes and incorrect execution results.

</details>


### [656] [Designing Adaptive Digital Nudging Systems with LLM-Driven Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11206)
*Tiziano Santilli,Mina Alipour,Mahyar Tourchi Moghaddam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种将行为科学理论转化为软件架构的数字助推系统设计框架，通过显式架构决策整合多维用户建模与伦理合规，并验证了其可行性和有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字助推系统缺乏将行为科学转化为软件设计的架构指导，现有架构未能将多维用户建模与伦理合规作为架构关注点进行整合。

Method: 通过文献综述综合68种助推策略、11个质量属性和3个用户画像维度形成架构需求；设计包含顺序处理层和跨领域评估模块的架构，将伦理和公平作为结构护栏；使用LLM驱动的住宅能源可持续性概念验证进行可行性评估。

Result: 13位软件架构师验证确认了需求满足和领域可转移性；15名用户评估显示高感知干预质量和可测量的积极情感影响；证明了架构在平衡有效性与伦理约束方面的可行性。

Conclusion: 该工作通过提供可重用模式，在行为科学与软件架构之间架起桥梁，支持构建既有效又符合伦理约束的自适应系统。

Abstract: Digital nudging systems lack architectural guidance for translating behavioral science into software design. While research identifies nudge strategies and quality attributes, existing architectures fail to integrate multi-dimensional user modeling with ethical compliance as architectural concerns. We present an architecture that uses behavioral theory through explicit architectural decisions, treating ethics and fairness as structural guardrails rather than implementation details. A literature review synthesized 68 nudging strategies, 11 quality attributes, and 3 user profiling dimensions into architectural requirements. The architecture implements sequential processing layers with cross-cutting evaluation modules enforcing regulatory compliance. Validation with 13 software architects confirmed requirements satisfaction and domain transferability. An LLM-powered proof-of-concept in residential energy sustainability demonstrated feasibility through evaluation with 15 users, achieving high perceived intervention quality and measurable positive emotional impact. This work bridges behavioral science and software architecture by providing reusable patterns for adaptive systems that balance effectiveness with ethical constraints.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [657] [NSFL: A Post-Training Neuro-Symbolic Fuzzy Logic Framework for Boolean Operators in Neural Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10604)
*Vladi Vexler,Ofer Idan,Gil Lederman,Dima Sivov*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: NSFL是一种神经符号模糊逻辑框架，为密集检索器提供无需重新训练的多原子逻辑约束计算，通过神经符号增量保持原子意义并防止表示崩溃，结合球形查询优化实现实时检索，在多种编码器配置上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准密集检索器缺乏处理多原子逻辑约束的原生计算能力，传统几何基线存在表示崩溃和流形逃逸问题，需要一种无需重新训练、能保持原子意义并捕获领域依赖的逻辑计算框架。

Method: 提出神经符号模糊逻辑（NSFL）框架：1）将形式t-范数和t-余范数适配到神经嵌入空间；2）使用神经符号增量（NS-Delta）作为一阶边际差异来引导表示；3）通过球形查询优化（SQO）利用黎曼优化将模糊公式投影到流形稳定的查询向量中。

Result: 在六种不同编码器配置和两种模态（包括零样本和SOTA微调模型）上验证，NSFL带来mAP提升高达+81%。即使应用于专门为逻辑推理微调的编码器，仍能提供平均20%、最高47%的额外提升。

Conclusion: NSFL建立了一个无需训练、顺序感知的高维空间计算框架，为未来动态扩展和学习流形逻辑奠定了基础，解决了密集检索器缺乏逻辑约束计算能力的关键问题。

Abstract: Standard dense retrievers lack a native calculus for multi-atom logical constraints. We introduce Neuro-Symbolic Fuzzy Logic (NSFL), a framework that adapts formal t-norms and t-conorms to neural embedding spaces without requiring retraining. NSFL operates as a first-order hybrid calculus: it anchors logical operations on isolated zero-order similarity scores while actively steering representations using Neuro-Symbolic Deltas (NS-Delta) -- the first-order marginal differences derived from contextual fusion. This preserves pure atomic meaning while capturing domain reliance, preventing the representation collapse and manifold escape endemic to traditional geometric baselines. For scalable real-time retrieval, Spherical Query Optimization (SQO) leverages Riemannian optimization to project these fuzzy formulas into manifold-stable query vectors. Validated across six distinct encoder configurations and two modalities (including zero-shot and SOTA fine-tuned models), NSFL yields mAP improvements up to +81%. Notably, NSFL provides an additive 20% average and up to 47% boost even when applied to encoders explicitly fine-tuned for logical reasoning. By establishing a training-free, order-aware calculus for high-dimensional spaces, this framework lays the foundation for future dynamic scaling and learned manifold logic.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [658] [PAL: Personal Adaptive Learner](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13017)
*Megha Chakraborty,Darssan L. Eswaramoorthi,Madhur Thareja,Het Riteshkumar Shah,Finlay Palmer,Aryaman Bahl,Michelle A Ihetu,Amit Sheth*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PAL是一个AI驱动的自适应学习平台，将讲座视频转化为交互式学习体验，通过实时分析多模态内容和动态调整问题难度，为学习者提供个性化支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI教育平台大多局限于静态适应（预定义测验、统一节奏或通用反馈），无法响应学习者不断变化的理解水平。这凸显了对既具备情境感知能力又能实时自适应的系统的需求。

Method: PAL平台将讲座视频转化为交互式学习体验，通过持续分析多模态讲座内容，在学习过程中动态向学习者提出不同难度的问题，并根据他们的回答进行调整。课程结束后，平台生成个性化总结，强化关键概念并根据学习者兴趣定制示例。

Result: PAL通过结合多模态内容分析和自适应决策，为响应式数字学习提供了一个新颖框架。该工作展示了AI如何超越静态个性化，实现实时、个性化的支持。

Conclusion: PAL解决了AI赋能教育中的一个核心挑战，展示了AI如何从静态个性化向实时、个性化支持发展，为数字学习提供了更有效的自适应框架。

Abstract: AI-driven education platforms have made some progress in personalisation, yet most remain constrained to static adaptation--predefined quizzes, uniform pacing, or generic feedback--limiting their ability to respond to learners' evolving understanding. This shortfall highlights the need for systems that are both context-aware and adaptive in real time. We introduce PAL (Personal Adaptive Learner), an AI-powered platform that transforms lecture videos into interactive learning experiences. PAL continuously analyzes multimodal lecture content and dynamically engages learners through questions of varying difficulty, adjusting to their responses as the lesson unfolds. At the end of a session, PAL generates a personalized summary that reinforces key concepts while tailoring examples to the learner's interests. By uniting multimodal content analysis with adaptive decision-making, PAL contributes a novel framework for responsive digital learning. Our work demonstrates how AI can move beyond static personalization toward real-time, individualized support, addressing a core challenge in AI-enabled education.

</details>


### [659] [BEAM: Bi-level Memory-adaptive Algorithmic Evolution for LLM-Powered Heuristic Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12898)
*Chuyang Xiang,Yichen Wei,Jiale Ma,Handing Wang,Junchi Yan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BEAM提出了一种双层记忆自适应算法演化框架，将启发式设计重新表述为双层优化问题，通过遗传算法演化高层算法结构，MCTS实现具体函数，显著提升了大型语言模型在复杂求解器设计中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的超启发式方法主要针对预定义求解器中的单一函数优化，其单层演化结构难以设计完整的求解器。虽然有些变体加入了超参数调优或通过迭代局部修改生成复杂代码，但仍缺乏高层算法建模，导致探索效率有限。

Method: BEAM将启发式设计重新表述为双层优化问题：外层使用遗传算法演化带有函数占位符的高层算法结构；内层通过蒙特卡洛树搜索实现这些占位符。引入自适应记忆模块促进复杂代码生成，并提出知识增强管道来支持复杂代码评估。

Result: 实验结果表明，BEAM在多个优化问题上显著优于现有LHH方法，在CVRP混合算法设计中将最优性差距降低了37.84%。BEAM设计的启发式算法甚至超越了最先进的MIS求解器KaMIS。

Conclusion: BEAM通过双层优化框架有效解决了现有LHH方法在复杂求解器设计中的局限性，将高层算法结构与具体函数实现分离，结合自适应记忆和知识增强，显著提升了算法设计的探索效率和性能。

Abstract: Large Language Model-based Hyper Heuristic (LHH) has recently emerged as an efficient way for automatic heuristic design. However, most existing LHHs just perform well in optimizing a single function within a pre-defined solver. Their single-layer evolution makes them not effective enough to write a competent complete solver. While some variants incorporate hyperparameter tuning or attempt to generate complex code through iterative local modifications, they still lack a high-level algorithmic modeling, leading to limited exploration efficiency. To address this, we reformulate heuristic design as a Bi-level Optimization problem and propose \textbf{BEAM} (Bi-level Memory-adaptive Algorithmic Evolution). BEAM's exterior layer evolves high-level algorithmic structures with function placeholders through genetic algorithm (GA), while the interior layer realizes these placeholders via Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). We further introduce an Adaptive Memory module to facilitate complex code generation. To support the evaluation for complex code generation, we point out the limitations of starting LHHs from scratch or from code templates and introduce a Knowledge Augmentation (KA) Pipeline. Experimental results on several optimization problems demonstrate that BEAM significantly outperforms existing LHHs, notably reducing the optimality gap by 37.84\% on aggregate in CVRP hybrid algorithm design. BEAM also designs a heuristic that outperforms SOTA Maximum Independent Set (MIS) solver KaMIS.

</details>


### [660] [AISafetyBenchExplorer: A Metric-Aware Catalogue of AI Safety Benchmarks Reveals Fragmented Measurement and Weak Benchmark Governance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12875)
*Abiodun A. Solanke*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AISafetyBenchExplorer是一个包含195个AI安全基准测试的结构化目录，揭示了基准测试激增但测量标准缺失的问题，导致领域碎片化而非稀缺性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型安全评估快速发展产生了大量基准测试，但缺乏统一的测量生态系统。当前基准测试激增但标准化不足，导致研究者难以选择合适的基准、缺乏共享测量语言和可持续维护规范。

Method: 构建AISafetyBenchExplorer结构化目录，包含195个2018-2026年发布的AI安全基准测试，采用多工作表模式记录基准级元数据、度量级定义、论文元数据和仓库活动。设计支持元分析基准测试的存在方式、安全操作化、聚合和评估方法。

Result: 发现基准测试激增远超测量标准化：195个基准中94个为中等复杂度，仅7个属于流行层级；165个仅支持英文评估，170个仅为评估资源；137个GitHub仓库和96个Hugging Face数据集已过时；度量层面常见标签如准确率、F1分数等掩盖了不同的评估者、聚合规则和威胁模型。

Conclusion: AI安全评估领域的主要失败模式是碎片化而非稀缺性。AISafetyBenchExplorer通过提供可追溯的基准目录、受控元数据模式和复杂度分类法，支持更严谨的基准发现、比较和元评估，填补了共享测量语言和基准选择原则的空白。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of large language model (LLM) safety evaluation has produced a substantial benchmark ecosystem, but not a correspondingly coherent measurement ecosystem. We present AISafetyBenchExplorer, a structured catalogue of 195 AI safety benchmarks released between 2018 and 2026, organized through a multi-sheet schema that records benchmark-level metadata, metric-level definitions, benchmark-paper metadata, and repository activity. This design enables meta-analysis not only of what benchmarks exist, but also of how safety is operationalized, aggregated, and judged across the literature. Using the updated catalogue, we identify a central structural problem: benchmark proliferation has outpaced measurement standardization. The current landscape is dominated by medium-complexity benchmarks (94/195), while only 7 benchmarks occupy the Popular tier. The workbook further reports strong concentration around English-only evaluation (165/195), evaluation-only resources (170/195), stale GitHub repositories (137/195), stale Hugging Face datasets (96/195), and heavy reliance on arXiv preprints among benchmarks with known venue metadata. At the metric level, the catalogue shows that familiar labels such as accuracy, F1 score, safety score, and aggregate benchmark scores often conceal materially different judges, aggregation rules, and threat models. We argue that the field's main failure mode is fragmentation rather than scarcity. Researchers now have many benchmark artifacts, but they often lack a shared measurement language, a principled basis for benchmark selection, and durable stewardship norms for post publication maintenance. AISafetyBenchExplorer addresses this gap by providing a traceable benchmark catalogue, a controlled metadata schema, and a complexity taxonomy that together support more rigorous benchmark discovery, comparison, and meta-evaluation.

</details>


### [661] [QuarkMedSearch: A Long-Horizon Deep Search Agent for Exploring Medical Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12867)
*Zhichao Lin,Zhichao Liang,Gaoqiang Liu,Meng Xu,Baoyu Xiang,Jian Xu,Guanjun Jiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 基于通义DeepResearch构建的QuarkMedSearch系统，针对中文医疗深度搜索场景，通过医疗多跳数据构建、两阶段训练策略和专家验证评估基准，在垂直领域实现了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着智能体基础模型的发展，如何进一步提升其在垂直领域的性能成为重要挑战。针对中文医疗深度搜索场景，需要解决医疗领域深度搜索训练数据稀缺、模型规划与工具调用能力不足等问题。

Method: 1) 数据合成：结合大规模医疗知识图谱和实时在线探索构建长视野医疗深度搜索训练数据；2) 后训练：采用两阶段SFT和RL训练策略，渐进增强模型规划、工具调用和反思能力；3) 评估：与医学专家合作构建QuarkMedSearch Benchmark并进行严格人工验证。

Result: QuarkMedSearch在QuarkMedSearch Benchmark上实现了同规模开源模型中的SOTA性能，同时在通用基准测试中保持强大竞争力。

Conclusion: 通过全流程方法（数据构建、训练策略、评估基准）系统探索，成功提升了智能体基础模型在医疗垂直领域的性能上限，为垂直领域智能体发展提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: As agentic foundation models continue to evolve, how to further improve their performance in vertical domains has become an important challenge. To this end, building upon Tongyi DeepResearch, a powerful agentic foundation model, we focus on the Chinese medical deep search scenario and propose QuarkMedSearch, systematically exploring a full-pipeline approach spanning medical multi-hop data construction, training strategies, and evaluation benchmarks to further push and assess its performance upper bound in vertical domains. Specifically, for data synthesis, to address the scarcity of deep search training data in the medical domain, we combine a large-scale medical knowledge graph with real-time online exploration to construct long-horizon medical deep search training data; for post-training, we adopt a two-stage SFT and RL training strategy that progressively enhances the model's planning, tool invocation, and reflection capabilities required for deep search, while maintaining search efficiency; for evaluation, we collaborate with medical experts to construct the QuarkMedSearch Benchmark through rigorous manual verification. Experimental results demonstrate that QuarkMedSearch achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models of comparable scale on the QuarkMedSearch Benchmark, while also maintaining strong competitiveness on general benchmarks.

</details>


### [662] [From edges to meaning: Semantic line sketches as a cognitive scaffold for ancient pictograph invention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12865)
*Seowung Leem,Lin Gu,Ruogu Fang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究提出大脑的视觉处理机制自然产生象形文字，通过构建生物启发的视觉层次数字孪生模型，模拟人类视觉皮层的前馈-反馈架构，生成与早期象形文字结构相似的符号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类能够从稀疏线条画中识别物体，这种能力在发育早期出现且跨文化存在，表明其神经起源而非纯粹学习获得。然而，大脑如何将高级语义知识转化为低级视觉符号的计算机制尚不清楚。研究者旨在探索象形文字是否源于大脑固有的视觉压缩倾向。

Method: 构建生物启发的视觉层次数字孪生模型，模拟人类视觉皮层架构：1) 编码图像为低级特征；2) 生成轮廓草图；3) 通过基于语义表征的顶向下反馈进行迭代细化。该模型模仿了人类视觉系统的前馈和循环处理过程。

Result: 模型生成的符号与跨文化的早期象形文字（埃及象形文字、中国甲骨文、原始楔形文字）在结构上惊人相似。该模型还能为未解读文字提供候选解释，支持象形文字的神经计算起源假说。

Conclusion: 研究支持象形文字源于大脑内在的神经计算机制，即通过视觉压缩产生稳定的边界抽象。该框架使AI能够复现人类首次将感知外化为符号的认知过程，为理解符号起源提供了计算神经科学基础。

Abstract: Humans readily recognize objects from sparse line drawings, a capacity that appears early in development and persists across cultures, suggesting neural rather than purely learned origins. Yet the computational mechanism by which the brain transforms high-level semantic knowledge into low-level visual symbols remains poorly understood. Here we propose that ancient pictographic writing emerged from the brain's intrinsic tendency to compress visual input into stable, boundary-based abstractions. We construct a biologically inspired digital twin of the visual hierarchy that encodes an image into low-level features, generates a contour sketch, and iteratively refines it through top-down feedback guided by semantic representations, mirroring the feedforward and recurrent architecture of the human visual cortex. The resulting symbols bear striking structural resemblance to early pictographs across culturally distant writing systems, including Egyptian hieroglyphs, Chinese oracle bone characters, and proto-cuneiform, and offer candidate interpretations for undeciphered scripts. Our findings support a neuro-computational origin of pictographic writing and establish a framework in which AI can recapitulate the cognitive processes by which humans first externalized perception into symbols.

</details>


### [663] [RePAIR: Interactive Machine Unlearning through Prompt-Aware Model Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12820)
*Jagadeesh Rachapudi,Pranav Singh,Ritali Vatsi,Praful Hambarde,Amit Shukla*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了交互式机器遗忘(IMU)新范式，让用户通过自然语言在推理时指导LLM遗忘特定知识，并开发了RePAIR框架和STAMP方法实现训练无关的单样本遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在预训练中会吸收有害知识、错误信息和个人数据，但现有遗忘方法需要服务提供商主导，缺乏用户对自身数据的控制权。需要让终端用户能够主动指导模型遗忘特定内容。

Method: 提出RePAIR框架：包含检测遗忘意图的watchdog模型、生成修复程序的surgeon模型、以及自主更新参数的patient模型。核心是STAMP方法，通过伪逆更新将MLP激活重定向到拒绝子空间，无需训练且仅需单样本。低秩变体将计算复杂度从O(d³)降至O(r³ + r²*d)。

Result: 在有害知识抑制、错误信息修正和个人数据擦除实验中，RePAIR实现接近零的遗忘分数(Acc_f=0.00, F-RL=0.00)，同时保持模型实用性(Acc_r达84.47, R-RL达0.88)，优于六种SOTA基线方法，速度提升约3倍。

Conclusion: RePAIR为基于用户的模型编辑提供了有效实用框架，推进了对学习知识的透明和设备端控制，并可扩展到多模态基础模型。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) inherently absorb harmful knowledge, misinformation, and personal data during pretraining on large-scale web corpora, with no native mechanism for selective removal. While machine unlearning offers a principled solution, existing approaches are provider-centric, requiring retraining pipelines, curated retain datasets, and direct intervention by model service providers (MSPs), thereby excluding end users from controlling their own data. We introduce Interactive Machine Unlearning (IMU), a new paradigm in which users can instruct LLMs to forget targeted knowledge through natural language at inference time. To realize IMU, we propose RePAIR, a prompt-aware model repair framework comprising (i) a watchdog model for unlearning intent detection, (ii) a surgeon model for generating repair procedures, and (iii) a patient model whose parameters are updated autonomously. At the core of RePAIR, we develop Steering Through Activation Manipulation with PseudoInverse (STAMP), a training-free, single-sample unlearning method that redirects MLP activations toward a refusal subspace via closed-form pseudoinverse updates. Its low-rank variant reduces computational complexity from O(d^3) to O(r^3 + r^2 * d), enabling efficient on-device unlearning with up to ~3x speedup over training-based baselines. Extensive experiments across harmful knowledge suppression, misinformation correction, and personal data erasure demonstrate that RePAIR achieves near-zero forget scores (Acc_f = 0.00, F-RL = 0.00) while preserving model utility (Acc_r up to 84.47, R-RL up to 0.88), outperforming six state-of-the-art baselines. These results establish RePAIR as an effective and practical framework for user-driven model editing, advancing transparent and on-device control over learned knowledge, with potential extensions to multimodal foundation models.

</details>


### [664] [DocSeeker: Structured Visual Reasoning with Evidence Grounding for Long Document Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12812)
*Hao Yan,Yuliang Liu,Xingchen Liu,Yuyi Zhang,Minghui Liao,Jihao Wu,Wei Chen,Xiang Bai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DocSeeker提出了一种新的多模态大语言模型训练范式，通过"分析-定位-推理"结构化工作流程解决长文档理解中的低信噪比和监督稀缺问题，采用两阶段训练框架和证据感知优化策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLMs在长文档理解任务中随着文档长度增加性能显著下降，主要面临两个挑战：1)低信噪比，关键证据被埋没在无关页面中；2)监督稀缺，仅提供最终简短答案的数据集提供弱学习信号。

Method: 提出结构化"分析、定位和推理"工作流程。设计两阶段训练框架：首先在通过高效知识蒸馏生成的高质量数据上进行监督微调；然后采用证据感知组相对策略优化，联合优化证据定位和答案准确性。引入证据引导的分辨率分配策略缓解多页文档训练的内存约束。

Result: 广泛实验表明DocSeeker在领域内和领域外任务上都取得了优越性能。模型能够从短页训练稳健地泛化到超长文档，并且与视觉检索增强生成系统自然协同，为其实现提供了坚实基础。

Conclusion: DocSeeker通过结构化工作流程和两阶段训练框架有效解决了MLLMs在长文档理解中的核心挑战，为长文档理解和视觉检索增强生成系统提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) suffer from significant performance degradation on the long document understanding task as document length increases. This stems from two fundamental challenges: 1) a low Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR), with crucial evidence buried in irrelevant pages; and 2) supervision scarcity, as datasets offering only final short answers provide a weak learning signal. In this paper, we address these challenges by proposing a paradigm that requires the model to execute a structured ``\textbf{Analysis}, \textbf{Localization} and \textbf{Reasoning}'' workflow. To instill this capability, we design a two-stage training framework: we first perform Supervised Fine-Tuning on high-quality data generated via an efficient knowledge distillation strategy. Subsequently, we employ an Evidence-aware Group Relative Policy Optimization which jointly optimizes for both evidence localization and answer accuracy. Additionally, we introduce a Evidence-Guided Resolution Allocation strategy to mitigate memory constraints of training on multi-pages documents. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DocSeeker achieves superior performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain tasks. We show it robustly generalizes from short-page training to ultra-long documents and is naturally synergistic with visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems, serving as a solid foundation for their implementation.

</details>


### [665] [Can AI Tools Transform Low-Demand Math Tasks? An Evaluation of Task Modification Capabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12743)
*Danielle S. Fox,Brenda L. Robles,Elizabeth DiPietro Brovey,Christian D. Schunn*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AI工具在提升低认知需求数学任务质量方面表现中等，成功率仅64%，专业工具仅略优于通用工具


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已有研究探索AI工具对数学任务质量的分类能力，但对其提升现有任务质量的能力知之甚少，本研究旨在填补这一空白

Method: 使用任务分析指南框架，测试11种AI工具（6种通用工具如ChatGPT和Claude，5种数学教师专用工具），采用代表知识型教师典型方法的提示策略，而非优化提示

Result: AI工具平均成功率64%，表现范围从33%到88%；专业工具仅略优于通用工具；失败模式包括"不足"（维持低认知需求）和"过度"（提升到教师可能拒绝的过高目标类别）；任务分类能力与任务升级能力呈负相关（r=-0.35）

Conclusion: AI在课程改编中的潜力有限，需要专门方法来支持教师修改教学材料，任务修改能力与任务分类能力是不同的能力

Abstract: While recent research has explored AI tools' ability to classify the quality of mathematical tasks (arXiv:2603.03512), little is known about their capacity to increase the quality of existing tasks. This study investigated whether AI tools could successfully upgrade low-cognitive-demand mathematics tasks. Eleven tools were tested, including six broadly available, general-purpose AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT and Claude) and five tools specialized for mathematics teachers (e.g., Khanmigo, coteach.ai). Using the Task Analysis Guide framework (Stein & Smith, 1998), we prompted AI tools to modify two different types of low-demand mathematical tasks. The prompting strategy aimed to represent likely approaches taken by knowledgeable teachers, rather than extensive optimization to find a more effective prompt (i.e., an optimistic typical outcome). On average, AI tools were only moderately successful: tasks were accurately upgraded only 64% of the time, with different AI tool performance ranging from quite weak (33%) to broadly successful (88%). Specialized tools were only moderately more successful than general-purpose tools. Failure modes included both "undershooting" (maintaining low cognitive demand) and "overshooting" (elevating tasks to an overly ambitious target category that likely would be rejected by teachers). Interestingly, there was a small negative correlation (r = -.35) between whether a given AI tool was able to correctly classify the cognitive demand of tasks and whether the AI was able to upgrade tasks, showing that the ability to modify tasks (i.e., a generative task) represents a distinct capability from the ability to classify them (i.e., judgement using a rubric).
